authors_text: Angtian Wang,Peng Wang,Jian Sun,Adam Kortylewski,Alan Yuille
title: VoGE: A Differentiable Volume Renderer using Gaussian Ellipsoids for Analysis-by-Synthesis
title_zh: VoGE：使用高斯椭球进行综合分析的可微分体积渲染器
abstract: The Gaussian reconstruction kernels have been proposed by Westover (1990) and studied by the computer graphics community back in the 90s, which gives an alternative representation of object 3D geometry from meshes and point clouds. On the other hand, current state-of-the-art (SoTA) differentiable renderers, Liu et al. (2019), use rasterization to collect triangles or points on each image pixel and blend them based on the viewing distance. In this paper, we propose VoGE, which utilizes the volumetric Gaussian reconstruction kernels as geometric primitives. The VoGE rendering pipeline uses ray tracing to capture the nearest primitives and blends them as mixtures based on their volume density distributions along the rays. To efficiently render via VoGE, we propose an approximate closeform solution for the volume density aggregation and a coarse-to-fine rendering strategy. Finally, we provide a CUDA implementation of VoGE, which enables real-time level rendering with a competitive rendering speed in comparison to PyTorch3D. Quantitative and qualitative experiment results show VoGE outperforms SoTA counterparts when applied to various vision tasks, e.g., object pose estimation, shape/texture fitting, and occlusion reasoning. The VoGE library and demos are available at: https://github.com/Angtian/VoGE.
summary: The Gaussian reconstruction kernels have been proposed by Westover (1990) and studied by the computer graphics community back in the 90s, which gives an alternative representation of object 3D geometry from meshes and point clouds. On the other hand, current state-of-the-art (SoTA) differentiable renderers, Liu et al. (2019), use rasterization to collect triangles or points on each image pixel and blend them based on the viewing distance. In this paper, we propose VoGE, which utilizes the volumetric Gaussian reconstruction kernels as geometric primitives. The VoGE rendering pipeline uses ray tracing to capture the nearest primitives and blends them as mixtures based on their volume density distributions along the rays. To efficiently render via VoGE, we propose an approximate closeform solution for the volume density aggregation and a coarse-to-fine rendering strategy. Finally, we provide a CUDA implementation of VoGE, which enables real-time level rendering with a competitive rendering speed in comparison to PyTorch3D. Quantitative and qualitative experiment results show VoGE outperforms SoTA counterparts when applied to various vision tasks, e.g., object pose estimation, shape/texture fitting, and occlusion reasoning. The VoGE library and demos are available at: https://github.com/Angtian/VoGE.
abstract_zh: 高斯重建内核由 Westover (1990) 提出，并在 90 年代由计算机图形学界进行研究，它给出了来自网格和点云的对象 3D 几何图形的替代表示。另一方面，当前最先进的（SoTA）可微渲染器，Liu 等人。 （2019），使用光栅化来收集每个图像像素上的三角形或点，并根据观看距离将它们混合。在本文中，我们提出了 VoGE，它利用体积高斯重建核作为几何基元。 VoGE 渲染管道使用光线追踪来捕获最近的图元，并根据它们沿光线的体积密度分布将它们混合为混合物。为了通过 VoGE 进行高效渲染，我们提出了一种体积密度聚合的近似封闭解决方案和从粗到精的渲染策略。最后，我们提供了 VoGE 的 CUDA 实现，它可以实现实时关卡渲染，与 PyTorch3D 相比，其渲染速度具有竞争力。定量和定性实验结果表明，当应用于各种视觉任务（例如物体姿态估计、形状/纹理拟合和遮挡推理）时，VoGE 优于 SoTA 对应物。 VoGE 库和演示位于：https://github.com/Angtian/VoGE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VoGE，一种基于高斯椭球体的可微体积渲染器，用于分析-合成任务。
AI.motivation: 传统可微渲染器依赖光栅化处理三角形或点，存在效率与精度限制，而高斯重建核能提供更优的三维几何表示。
AI.method: 采用光线追踪捕捉最近高斯椭球体，通过体积密度分布混合生成图像，并提出密度聚合近似解与粗到细渲染策略，配合CUDA实现实时渲染。
AI.result: 在目标姿态估计、形状/纹理拟合等任务中优于现有方法，渲染速度可与PyTorch3D竞争。
AI.conclusion: VoGE通过高斯椭球体体积渲染提供了高效且精确的分析-合成框架，适用于多种视觉任务。

title: Designing Rewards for Fast Learning
title_zh: 为快速学习设计奖励
comment: To appear at the 5th Multidisciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM2022)
comments: To appear at the 5th Multidisciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM2022)
abstract: To convey desired behavior to a Reinforcement Learning (RL) agent, a designer must choose a reward function for the environment, arguably the most important knob designers have in interacting with RL agents. Although many reward functions induce the same optimal behavior (Ng et al., 1999), in practice, some of them result in faster learning than others. In this paper, we look at how reward-design choices impact learning speed and seek to identify principles of good reward design that quickly induce target behavior. This reward-identification problem is framed as an optimization problem: Firstly, we advocate choosing state-based rewards that maximize the action gap, making optimal actions easy to distinguish from suboptimal ones. Secondly, we propose minimizing a measure of the horizon, something we call the "subjective discount", over which rewards need to be optimized to encourage agents to make optimal decisions with less lookahead. To solve this optimization problem, we propose a linear-programming based algorithm that efficiently finds a reward function that maximizes action gap and minimizes subjective discount. We test the rewards generated with the algorithm in tabular environments with Q-Learning, and empirically show they lead to faster learning. Although we only focus on Q-Learning because it is perhaps the simplest and most well understood RL algorithm, preliminary results with R-max (Brafman and Tennenholtz, 2000) suggest our results are much more general. Our experiments support three principles of reward design: 1) consistent with existing results, penalizing each step taken induces faster learning than rewarding the goal. 2) When rewarding subgoals along the target trajectory, rewards should gradually increase as the goal gets closer. 3) Dense reward that's nonzero on every state is only good if designed carefully.
summary: To convey desired behavior to a Reinforcement Learning (RL) agent, a designer must choose a reward function for the environment, arguably the most important knob designers have in interacting with RL agents. Although many reward functions induce the same optimal behavior (Ng et al., 1999), in practice, some of them result in faster learning than others. In this paper, we look at how reward-design choices impact learning speed and seek to identify principles of good reward design that quickly induce target behavior. This reward-identification problem is framed as an optimization problem: Firstly, we advocate choosing state-based rewards that maximize the action gap, making optimal actions easy to distinguish from suboptimal ones. Secondly, we propose minimizing a measure of the horizon, something we call the "subjective discount", over which rewards need to be optimized to encourage agents to make optimal decisions with less lookahead. To solve this optimization problem, we propose a linear-programming based algorithm that efficiently finds a reward function that maximizes action gap and minimizes subjective discount. We test the rewards generated with the algorithm in tabular environments with Q-Learning, and empirically show they lead to faster learning. Although we only focus on Q-Learning because it is perhaps the simplest and most well understood RL algorithm, preliminary results with R-max (Brafman and Tennenholtz, 2000) suggest our results are much more general. Our experiments support three principles of reward design: 1) consistent with existing results, penalizing each step taken induces faster learning than rewarding the goal. 2) When rewarding subgoals along the target trajectory, rewards should gradually increase as the goal gets closer. 3) Dense reward that's nonzero on every state is only good if designed carefully.
abstract_zh: 为了向强化学习 (RL) 代理传达所需的行为，设计者必须为环境选择一个奖励函数，这可以说是设计者与 RL 代理交互时最重要的旋钮。尽管许多奖励函数都会引发相同的最佳行为（Ng 等人，1999），但在实践中，其中一些函数比其他函数产生更快的学习速度。在本文中，我们研究了奖励设计选择如何影响学习速度，并寻求确定快速诱导目标行为的良好奖励设计原则。这个奖励识别问题被视为一个优化问题：首先，我们主张选择基于状态的奖励来最大化行动差距，使最佳行动与次优行动易于区分。其次，我们建议最小化视野的测量，我们称之为“主观折扣”，需要优化奖励，以鼓励代理人在更少的前瞻下做出最佳决策。为了解决这个优化问题，我们提出了一种基于线性规划的算法，该算法可以有效地找到最大化行动差距并最小化主观折扣的奖励函数。我们在表格环境中使用 Q-Learning 测试了该算法生成的奖励，并凭经验证明它们可以加快学习速度。尽管我们只关注 Q-Learning，因为它可能是最简单且最容易理解的 RL 算法，但 R-max 的初步结果（Brafman 和 Tennenholtz，2000）表明我们的结果更为普遍。我们的实验支持奖励设计的三个原则：1）与现有结果一致，惩罚所采取的每一步比奖励目标会导致更快的学习。 2）当沿着目标轨迹奖励子目标时，奖励应该随着目标的接近而逐渐增加。 3）只有精心设计，每个状态都非零的密集奖励才是好的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计能够加速强化学习代理学习过程的奖励函数，通过优化奖励设计原则来快速诱导目标行为。
AI.motivation: 尽管不同奖励函数可能产生相同最优行为，但实际中某些奖励函数能显著提升学习速度。现有研究未充分解决如何设计奖励以加快学习的问题。
AI.method: 将奖励设计问题建模为优化问题，提出最大化动作差距（区分最优与次优动作）和最小化主观折扣（减少对长期回报的依赖）的双目标优化方法，并设计线性规划算法求解。
AI.result: 在表格环境中通过Q-Learning验证，生成的奖励函数显著提升学习速度；初步实验表明方法对R-max算法也具有普适性，并总结出三条奖励设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的奖励函数能显著加速学习过程，本文提出的优化框架和三条设计原则为高效奖励设计提供了理论支持和实践指导。

authors_text: Gavin Parpart,Carlos Gonzalez,Terrence C. Stewart,Edward Kim,Jocelyn Rego,Andrew O'Brien,Steven Nesbit,Garrett T. Kenyon,Yijing Watkins
title: Dictionary Learning with Accumulator Neurons
title_zh: 使用累加器神经元进行字典学习
abstract: The Locally Competitive Algorithm (LCA) uses local competition between non-spiking leaky integrator neurons to infer sparse representations, allowing for potentially real-time execution on massively parallel neuromorphic architectures such as Intel's Loihi processor. Here, we focus on the problem of inferring sparse representations from streaming video using dictionaries of spatiotemporal features optimized in an unsupervised manner for sparse reconstruction. Non-spiking LCA has previously been used to achieve unsupervised learning of spatiotemporal dictionaries composed of convolutional kernels from raw, unlabeled video. We demonstrate how unsupervised dictionary learning with spiking LCA (\hbox{S-LCA}) can be efficiently implemented using accumulator neurons, which combine a conventional leaky-integrate-and-fire (\hbox{LIF}) spike generator with an additional state variable that is used to minimize the difference between the integrated input and the spiking output. We demonstrate dictionary learning across a wide range of dynamical regimes, from graded to intermittent spiking, for inferring sparse representations of both static images drawn from the CIFAR database as well as video frames captured from a DVS camera. On a classification task that requires identification of the suite from a deck of cards being rapidly flipped through as viewed by a DVS camera, we find essentially no degradation in performance as the LCA model used to infer sparse spatiotemporal representations migrates from graded to spiking. We conclude that accumulator neurons are likely to provide a powerful enabling component of future neuromorphic hardware for implementing online unsupervised learning of spatiotemporal dictionaries optimized for sparse reconstruction of streaming video from event based DVS cameras.

Here, we focus on the problem of inferring sparse representations from streaming video using dictionaries of spatiotemporal features optimized in an unsupervised manner for sparse reconstruction. We demonstrate dictionary learning across a wide range of dynamical regimes, from graded to intermittent spiking, for inferring sparse representations of both static images drawn from the CIFAR database as well as video frames captured from a DVS camera. On a classification task that requires identification of the suite from a deck of cards being rapidly flipped through as viewed by a DVS camera, we find essentially no degradation in performance as the LCA model used to infer sparse spatiotemporal representations migrates from graded to spiking. abstract_zh: 局部竞争算法 (LCA) 使用非尖峰泄漏积分器神经元之间的局部竞争来推断稀疏表示，从而允许在大规模并行神经形态架构（例如英特尔的 Loihi 处理器）上进行潜在的实时执行。在这里，我们重点关注使用以无监督方式优化的时空特征词典从流视频推断稀疏表示的问题，以进行稀疏重建。非尖峰 LCA 之前曾用于实现时空字典的无监督学习，该时空字典由来自原始、未标记视频的卷积核组成。我们演示了如何使用累加器神经元有效地实现使用尖峰 LCA (\hbox{S-LCA}) 的无监督字典学习，累加器神经元将传统的泄漏积分激发 (\hbox{LIF}) 尖峰生成器与一个附加状态变量相结合，该状态变量用于最小化积分输入和尖峰输出之间的差异。我们展示了从分级到间歇尖峰的各种动态机制中的字典学习，用于推断从 CIFAR 数据库提取的静态图像以及从 DVS 摄像机捕获的视频帧的稀疏表示。在需要从 DVS 摄像头快速翻阅的一副卡片中识别套件的分类任务中，我们发现，随着用于推断稀疏时空表示的 LCA 模型从分级迁移到尖峰，性能基本上没有下降。我们的结论是，累加器神经元很可能为未来的神经形态硬件提供强大的支持组件，用于实现时空字典的在线无监督学习，并针对基于事件的 DVS 摄像机的流视频的稀疏重建进行优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于积累器神经元的脉冲LCA（S-LCA）方法，用于从流视频中学习时空字典的无监督稀疏表示。
AI.motivation: 传统LCA在处理流视频时存在实时性不足的问题，需通过改进神经元结构提升稀疏表示效率以适配神经形态硬件。
AI.method: 设计结合漏积-放电（LIF）神经元与额外状态变量的积累器神经元，通过最小化输入与脉冲输出差异实现S-LCA的高效字典学习。
AI.result: 在CIFAR静态图像和DVS摄像头视频帧上验证了方法有效性，卡牌识别任务中从渐进式到间歇式脉冲无性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 积累器神经元为未来神经形态硬件实现流视频稀疏重建的在线无监督学习提供了关键技术支持。

title: Truly Deterministic Policy Optimization
title_zh: 真正确定性的策略优化
abstract: In this paper, we present a policy gradient method that avoids exploratory noise injection and performs policy search over the deterministic landscape. By avoiding noise injection all sources of estimation variance can be eliminated in systems with deterministic dynamics (up to the initial state distribution). Since deterministic policy regularization is impossible using traditional non-metric measures such as the KL divergence, we derive a Wasserstein-based quadratic model for our purposes. We state conditions on the system model under which it is possible to establish a monotonic policy improvement guarantee, propose a surrogate function for policy gradient estimation, and show that it is possible to compute exact advantage estimates if both the state transition model and the policy are deterministic. Finally, we describe two novel robotic control environments -- one with non-local rewards in the frequency domain and the other with a long horizon (8000 time-steps) -- for which our policy gradient method (TDPO) significantly outperforms existing methods (PPO, TRPO, DDPG, and TD3). Our implementation with all the experimental settings is available at https://github.com/ehsansaleh/code_tdpo
summary: In this paper, we present a policy gradient method that avoids exploratory noise injection and performs policy search over the deterministic landscape. By avoiding noise injection all sources of estimation variance can be eliminated in systems with deterministic dynamics (up to the initial state distribution). Since deterministic policy regularization is impossible using traditional non-metric measures such as the KL divergence, we derive a Wasserstein-based quadratic model for our purposes. We state conditions on the system model under which it is possible to establish a monotonic policy improvement guarantee, propose a surrogate function for policy gradient estimation, and show that it is possible to compute exact advantage estimates if both the state transition model and the policy are deterministic. Finally, we describe two novel robotic control environments -- one with non-local rewards in the frequency domain and the other with a long horizon (8000 time-steps) -- for which our policy gradient method (TDPO) significantly outperforms existing methods (PPO, TRPO, DDPG, and TD3). Our implementation with all the experimental settings is available at https://github.com/ehsansaleh/code_tdpo
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种策略梯度方法，可以避免探索性噪声注入并在确定性景观上执行策略搜索。通过避免噪声注入，可以在具有确定性动态（直至初始状态分布）的系统中消除所有估计方差来源。由于使用传统的非度量指标（例如 KL 散度）不可能实现确定性策略正则化，因此我们出于我们的目的推导了基于 Wasserstein 的二次模型。我们描述了系统模型的条件，在该条件下可以建立单调策略改进保证，提出策略梯度估计的代理函数，并表明如果状态转换模型和策略都是确定性的，则可以计算精确的优势估计。最后，我们描述了两种新颖的机器人控制环境——一种在频域中具有非局部奖励，另一种具有长视野（8000个时间步）——我们的策略梯度方法（TDPO）显着优于现有方法（PPO、TRPO、DDPG和TD3）。我们使用所有实验设置的实现可以在 https://github.com/ehsansaleh/code_tdpo 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需探索噪声注入的确定性策略优化方法（TDPO），在确定性动态系统中实现无方差策略搜索。
AI.motivation: 传统策略梯度方法依赖噪声注入导致估计方差，且难以用KL散度等非度量方法实现确定性策略正则化。
AI.method: 基于Wasserstein距离构建二次模型，通过确定性动态系统条件建立单调策略改进保证，并提出精确优势估计的代理函数。
AI.result: TDPO在包含频域非局部奖励和8000步长时域的机器人控制任务中，显著优于PPO、TRPO、DDPG和TD3等基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 确定性策略优化在特定动态系统中可实现更优性能，新设计的环境有效验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Guy Tennenholtz,Nadav Merlis,Lior Shani,Shie Mannor,Uri Shalit,Gal Chechik,Assaf Hallak,Gal Dalal
title: Reinforcement Learning with a Terminator
title_zh: 使用终结者进行强化学习
abstract: We present the problem of reinforcement learning with exogenous termination. We define the Termination Markov Decision Process (TerMDP), an extension of the MDP framework, in which episodes may be interrupted by an external non-Markovian observer. This formulation accounts for numerous real-world situations, such as a human interrupting an autonomous driving agent for reasons of discomfort. We learn the parameters of the TerMDP and leverage the structure of the estimation problem to provide state-wise confidence bounds. We use these to construct a provably-efficient algorithm, which accounts for termination, and bound its regret. Motivated by our theoretical analysis, we design and implement a scalable approach, which combines optimism (w.r.t. termination) and a dynamic discount factor, incorporating the termination probability. We deploy our method on high-dimensional driving and MinAtar benchmarks. Additionally, we test our approach on human data in a driving setting. Our results demonstrate fast convergence and significant improvement over various baseline approaches.
summary: We present the problem of reinforcement learning with exogenous termination. We define the Termination Markov Decision Process (TerMDP), an extension of the MDP framework, in which episodes may be interrupted by an external non-Markovian observer. This formulation accounts for numerous real-world situations, such as a human interrupting an autonomous driving agent for reasons of discomfort. We learn the parameters of the TerMDP and leverage the structure of the estimation problem to provide state-wise confidence bounds. We use these to construct a provably-efficient algorithm, which accounts for termination, and bound its regret. Motivated by our theoretical analysis, we design and implement a scalable approach, which combines optimism (w.r.t. termination) and a dynamic discount factor, incorporating the termination probability. We deploy our method on high-dimensional driving and MinAtar benchmarks. Additionally, we test our approach on human data in a driving setting. Our results demonstrate fast convergence and significant improvement over various baseline approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了具有外源终止的强化学习问题。我们定义了终止马尔可夫决策过程（TermMDP），它是 MDP 框架的扩展，其中事件可能会被外部非马尔可夫观察者中断。这种表述考虑了许多现实世界的情况，例如人类因不适而中断自动驾驶代理。我们学习 TerMDP 的参数并利用估计问题的结构来提供状态方面的置信界限。我们使用这些来构建一个可证明有效的算法，该算法可以解释终止并限制其遗憾。在理论分析的推动下，我们设计并实现了一种可扩展的方法，该方法结合了乐观（w.r.t.终止）和动态折扣因子，并结合了终止概率。我们在高维驱动和 MinAtar 基准测试上部署我们的方法。此外，我们还在驾驶环境中测试人类数据的方法。我们的结果表明，与各种基线方法相比，收敛速度快，并且有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种处理外部终止的强化学习框架TerMDP，并设计了相应的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 现有马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）无法处理外部非马尔可夫观察者导致的中断问题，例如人类干预自动驾驶场景。
AI.method: 通过学习TerMDP参数并构建状态置信区间，结合乐观主义策略与动态折扣因子设计算法，有效处理终止概率。
AI.result: 算法在高维驾驶任务和MinAtar基准测试中表现优异，收敛速度快且显著优于基线方法，并通过了人类驾驶数据验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理现实场景中的外部中断问题提供了理论保证和可扩展解决方案。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning with a Terminator 使用终结者进行强化学习 We present the problem of reinforcement learning with exogenous termination. We define the Termination Markov Decision Process (TerMDP), an extension of the MDP framework, in which episodes may be interrupted by an external non-Markovian observer. This formulation accounts for numerous real-world situations, such as a human interrupting an autonomous driving agent for reasons of discomfort. We learn the parameters of the TerMDP and leverage the structure of the estimation problem to provide state-wise confidence bounds. We use these to construct a provably-efficient algorithm, which accounts for termination, and bound its regret. Motivated by our theoretical analysis, we design and implement a scalable approach, which combines optimism (w.r.t. termination) and a dynamic discount factor, incorporating the termination probability. We deploy our method on high-dimensional driving and MinAtar benchmarks. Additionally, we test our approach on human data in a driving setting. Our results demonstrate fast convergence and significant improvement over various baseline approaches. 我们提出了具有外源终止的强化学习问题。我们定义了终止马尔可夫决策过程（TermMDP），它是 MDP 框架的扩展，其中事件可能会被外部非马尔可夫观察者中断。这种表述考虑了许多现实世界的情况，例如人类因不适而中断自动驾驶代理。我们学习 TerMDP 的参数并利用估计问题的结构来提供状态方面的置信界限。我们使用这些来构建一个可证明有效的算法，该算法可以解释终止并限制其遗憾。在理论分析的推动下，我们设计并实现了一种可扩展的方法，该方法结合了乐观（w.r.t.终止）和动态折扣因子，并结合了终止概率。我们在高维驱动和 MinAtar 基准测试上部署我们的方法。此外，我们还在驾驶环境中测试人类数据的方法。我们的结果表明，与各种基线方法相比，收敛速度快，并且有显着改进。 本文提出了一种处理外部终止的强化学习框架TerMDP，并设计了相应的高效算法。 Guy Tennenholtz,Nadav Merlis,Lior Shani,Shie Mannor,Uri Shalit,Gal Chechik,Assaf Hallak,Gal Dalal cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yair Carmon,Danielle Hausler,Arun Jambulapati,Yujia Jin,Aaron Sidford
title: Optimal and Adaptive Monteiro-Svaiter Acceleration
title_zh: 最优自适应 Monteiro-Svaiter 加速
abstract: We develop a variant of the Monteiro-Svaiter (MS) acceleration framework that removes the need to solve an expensive implicit equation at every iteration. Consequently, for any $p\ge 2$ we improve the complexity of convex optimization with Lipschitz $p$th derivative by a logarithmic factor, matching a lower bound. We also introduce an MS subproblem solver that requires no knowledge of problem parameters, and implement it as either a second- or first-order method by solving linear systems or applying MinRes, respectively. On logistic regression our method outperforms previous second-order momentum methods, but under-performs Newton's method; simply iterating our first-order adaptive subproblem solver performs comparably to L-BFGS.
summary: We develop a variant of the Monteiro-Svaiter (MS) acceleration framework that removes the need to solve an expensive implicit equation at every iteration. Consequently, for any $p\ge 2$ we improve the complexity of convex optimization with Lipschitz $p$th derivative by a logarithmic factor, matching a lower bound. We also introduce an MS subproblem solver that requires no knowledge of problem parameters, and implement it as either a second- or first-order method by solving linear systems or applying MinRes, respectively. On logistic regression our method outperforms previous second-order momentum methods, but under-performs Newton's method; simply iterating our first-order adaptive subproblem solver performs comparably to L-BFGS.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了 Monteiro-Svaiter (MS) 加速框架的变体，无需在每次迭代时求解昂贵的隐式方程。因此，对于任何 $p\ge 2$，我们通过对数因子提高 Lipschitz $p$th 导数凸优化的复杂性，匹配下限。我们还引入了一种不需要问题参数知识的 MS 子问题求解器，并通过求解线性系统或应用 MinRes 分别将其实现为二阶或一阶方法。在逻辑回归上，我们的方法优于以前的二阶动量方法，但低于牛顿方法；简单地迭代我们的一阶自适应子问题求解器的性能与 L-BFGS 相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Monteiro-Svaiter加速框架，用于凸优化问题，减少了每次迭代中求解隐式方程的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统MS加速方法在每次迭代中需要求解昂贵的隐式方程，限制了其在大规模优化问题中的应用效率。
AI.method: 设计无需问题参数的MS子问题求解器，通过线性系统求解或MinRes算法实现二阶/一阶方法，并应用于逻辑回归实验。
AI.result: 新方法在逻辑回归上优于二阶动量法，但弱于牛顿法；一阶自适应求解器性能与L-BFGS相当。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在理论复杂度上达到下界，实际应用中表现良好，但需进一步优化以匹配牛顿法效率。

title: Guided-TTS 2: A Diffusion Model for High-quality Adaptive Text-to-Speech with Untranscribed Data
title_zh: Guided-TTS 2：使用未转录数据进行高质量自适应文本转语音的扩散模型
abstract: We propose Guided-TTS 2, a diffusion-based generative model for high-quality adaptive TTS using untranscribed data. Guided-TTS 2 combines a speaker-conditional diffusion model with a speaker-dependent phoneme classifier for adaptive text-to-speech. We train the speaker-conditional diffusion model on large-scale untranscribed datasets for a classifier-free guidance method and further fine-tune the diffusion model on the reference speech of the target speaker for adaptation, which only takes 40 seconds. We demonstrate that Guided-TTS 2 shows comparable performance to high-quality single-speaker TTS baselines in terms of speech quality and speaker similarity with only a ten-second untranscribed data. We further show that Guided-TTS 2 outperforms adaptive TTS baselines on multi-speaker datasets even with a zero-shot adaptation setting. Guided-TTS 2 can adapt to a wide range of voices only using untranscribed speech, which enables adaptive TTS with the voice of non-human characters such as Gollum in \textit{"The Lord of the Rings"}.
summary: We propose Guided-TTS 2, a diffusion-based generative model for high-quality adaptive TTS using untranscribed data. Guided-TTS 2 combines a speaker-conditional diffusion model with a speaker-dependent phoneme classifier for adaptive text-to-speech. We train the speaker-conditional diffusion model on large-scale untranscribed datasets for a classifier-free guidance method and further fine-tune the diffusion model on the reference speech of the target speaker for adaptation, which only takes 40 seconds. We demonstrate that Guided-TTS 2 shows comparable performance to high-quality single-speaker TTS baselines in terms of speech quality and speaker similarity with only a ten-second untranscribed data. We further show that Guided-TTS 2 outperforms adaptive TTS baselines on multi-speaker datasets even with a zero-shot adaptation setting. Guided-TTS 2 can adapt to a wide range of voices only using untranscribed speech, which enables adaptive TTS with the voice of non-human characters such as Gollum in \textit{"The Lord of the Rings"}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Guided-TTS 2，这是一种基于扩散的生成模型，用于使用未转录数据的高质量自适应 TTS。 Guided-TTS 2 将说话人条件扩散模型与说话人相关的音素分类器相结合，实现自适应文本转语音。我们在大规模非转录数据集上训练说话人条件扩散模型，以实现无分类器指导方法，并进一步在目标说话人的参考语音上微调扩散模型以进行适应，只需 40 秒。我们证明，Guided-TTS 2 在语音质量和说话人相似性方面与高质量单说话人 TTS 基线相当，仅需要 10 秒的未转录数据。我们进一步表明，即使采用零样本自适应设置，Guided-TTS 2 在多说话者数据集上也优于自适应 TTS 基线。 Guided-TTS 2 仅使用未转录的语音即可适应多种语音，这使得自适应 TTS 能够使用 \textit{“指环王”} 中的 Gollum 等非人类角色的声音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Guided-TTS 2，一种基于扩散模型的高质量自适应文本到语音生成方法，能够使用未转录数据。
AI.motivation: 传统文本到语音系统通常需要大量转录数据，而本文旨在开发一种能够仅使用未转录数据实现高质量自适应语音合成的方法。
AI.method: Guided-TTS 2结合了说话人条件扩散模型和说话人依赖的音素分类器，通过在大规模未转录数据集上训练扩散模型，并在目标说话人的参考语音上进行微调，仅需40秒即可完成适应。
AI.result: Guided-TTS 2在语音质量和说话人相似性方面表现出与高质量单说话人TTS基线相当的性能，仅需10秒未转录数据。在多说话人数据集上，即使在零样本适应设置下也优于自适应TTS基线。
AI.conclusion: Guided-TTS 2能够仅使用未转录语音适应广泛的声音，使自适应TTS能够使用非人类角色（如《指环王》中的咕噜）的声音。

We demonstrate that Guided-TTS 2 shows comparable performance to high-quality single-speaker TTS baselines in terms of speech quality and speaker similarity with only a ten-second untranscribed data. We further show that Guided-TTS 2 outperforms adaptive TTS baselines on multi-speaker datasets even with a zero-shot adaptation setting. Guided-TTS 2 can adapt to a wide range of voices only using untranscribed speech, which enables adaptive TTS with the voice of non-human characters such as Gollum in \textit{"The Lord of the Rings"}. 我们提出了 Guided-TTS 2，这是一种基于扩散的生成模型，用于使用未转录数据的高质量自适应 TTS。 Guided-TTS 2 将说话人条件扩散模型与说话人相关的音素分类器相结合，实现自适应文本转语音。我们在大规模非转录数据集上训练说话人条件扩散模型，以实现无分类器指导方法，并进一步在目标说话人的参考语音上微调扩散模型以进行适应，只需 40 秒。我们证明，Guided-TTS 2 在语音质量和说话人相似性方面与高质量单说话人 TTS 基线相当，仅需要 10 秒的未转录数据。我们进一步表明，即使采用零样本自适应设置，Guided-TTS 2 在多说话者数据集上也优于自适应 TTS 基线。 Guided-TTS 2 仅使用未转录的语音即可适应多种语音，这使得自适应 TTS 能够使用 \textit{“指环王”} 中的 Gollum 等非人类角色的声音。 本文提出Guided-TTS 2，一种基于扩散模型的高质量自适应文本到语音生成方法，能够使用未转录数据。 Sungwon Kim,Heeseung Kim,Sungroh Yoon cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

title: Non-Markovian Reward Modelling from Trajectory Labels via Interpretable Multiple Instance Learning
title_zh: 通过可解释的多实例学习从轨迹标签进行非马尔可夫奖励建模
comment: 27 pages (10 main content; 2 references; 1 checklist; 14 appendix). 14 figures (9 main content; 5 appendix). Published at NeurIPS 2022. Revisions: v2) Updated to NeurIPS camera ready version (extra experiments)
comments: 27 pages (10 main content; 2 references; 1 checklist; 14 appendix). 14 figures (9 main content; 5 appendix). Published at NeurIPS 2022. Revisions: v2) Updated to NeurIPS camera ready version (extra experiments)
abstract: We generalise the problem of reward modelling (RM) for reinforcement learning (RL) to handle non-Markovian rewards. Existing work assumes that human evaluators observe each step in a trajectory independently when providing feedback on agent behaviour. In this work, we remove this assumption, extending RM to capture temporal dependencies in human assessment of trajectories. We show how RM can be approached as a multiple instance learning (MIL) problem, where trajectories are treated as bags with return labels, and steps within the trajectories are instances with unseen reward labels. We go on to develop new MIL models that are able to capture the time dependencies in labelled trajectories. We demonstrate on a range of RL tasks that our novel MIL models can reconstruct reward functions to a high level of accuracy, and can be used to train high-performing agent policies.
summary: We generalise the problem of reward modelling (RM) for reinforcement learning (RL) to handle non-Markovian rewards. Existing work assumes that human evaluators observe each step in a trajectory independently when providing feedback on agent behaviour. In this work, we remove this assumption, extending RM to capture temporal dependencies in human assessment of trajectories. We show how RM can be approached as a multiple instance learning (MIL) problem, where trajectories are treated as bags with return labels, and steps within the trajectories are instances with unseen reward labels. We go on to develop new MIL models that are able to capture the time dependencies in labelled trajectories. We demonstrate on a range of RL tasks that our novel MIL models can reconstruct reward functions to a high level of accuracy, and can be used to train high-performing agent policies.
abstract_zh: 我们概括了强化学习（RL）的奖励建模（RM）问题来处理非马尔可夫奖励。现有的工作假设人类评估者在提供有关代理行为的反馈时独立观察轨迹中的每一步。在这项工作中，我们删除了这个假设，扩展 RM 以捕获人类轨迹评估中的时间依赖性。我们展示了如何将 RM 作为多实例学习 (MIL) 问题来处理，其中轨迹被视为带有返回标签的袋子，轨迹内的步骤是带有看不见的奖励标签的实例。我们继续开发新的 MIL 模型，能够捕获标记轨迹中的时间依赖性。我们在一系列 RL 任务中证明，我们新颖的 MIL 模型可以高精度地重建奖励函数，并可用于训练高性能代理策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可解释多重实例学习的方法，从轨迹标签中建模非马尔可夫奖励函数，以捕捉人类评估轨迹时的时间依赖性。
AI.motivation: 传统奖励建模假设人类评估者独立看待轨迹中的每一步，但实际评估可能依赖于时间序列信息。现有方法无法有效建模这种时序依赖性，导致奖励函数重建精度不足。
AI.method: 将轨迹视为多重实例学习中的'袋子'，步骤为'实例'，通过开发新型MIL模型捕捉轨迹标签中的时序依赖关系，实现非马尔可夫奖励建模。
AI.result: 在多个强化学习任务中验证了方法有效性，模型能以高精度重建奖励函数，并成功训练出高性能智能体策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的可解释MIL框架有效解决了非马尔可夫奖励建模问题，通过时间依赖性建模提升了奖励函数重建精度与策略性能。

authors_text: Dahun Kim,Jun Xie,Huiyu Wang,Siyuan Qiao,Qihang Yu,Hong-Seok Kim,Hartwig Adam,In So Kweon,Liang-Chieh Chen
title: TubeFormer-DeepLab: Video Mask Transformer
title_zh: TubeFormer-DeepLab：视频掩模变压器
comment: CVPR 2022; arXiv v2: add results on VIPSeg val/test sets and VSPW new test set
comments: CVPR 2022; arXiv v2: add results on VIPSeg val/test sets and VSPW new test set
abstract: We present TubeFormer-DeepLab, the first attempt to tackle multiple core video segmentation tasks in a unified manner. Different video segmentation tasks (e.g., video semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation) are usually considered as distinct problems. State-of-the-art models adopted in the separate communities have diverged, and radically different approaches dominate in each task. By contrast, we make a crucial observation that video segmentation tasks could be generally formulated as the problem of assigning different predicted labels to video tubes (where a tube is obtained by linking segmentation masks along the time axis) and the labels may encode different values depending on the target task. The observation motivates us to develop TubeFormer-DeepLab, a simple and effective video mask transformer model that is widely applicable to multiple video segmentation tasks. TubeFormer-DeepLab directly predicts video tubes with task-specific labels (either pure semantic categories, or both semantic categories and instance identities), which not only significantly simplifies video segmentation models, but also advances state-of-the-art results on multiple video segmentation benchmarks
summary: We present TubeFormer-DeepLab, the first attempt to tackle multiple core video segmentation tasks in a unified manner. Different video segmentation tasks (e.g., video semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation) are usually considered as distinct problems. State-of-the-art models adopted in the separate communities have diverged, and radically different approaches dominate in each task. By contrast, we make a crucial observation that video segmentation tasks could be generally formulated as the problem of assigning different predicted labels to video tubes (where a tube is obtained by linking segmentation masks along the time axis) and the labels may encode different values depending on the target task. The observation motivates us to develop TubeFormer-DeepLab, a simple and effective video mask transformer model that is widely applicable to multiple video segmentation tasks. TubeFormer-DeepLab directly predicts video tubes with task-specific labels (either pure semantic categories, or both semantic categories and instance identities), which not only significantly simplifies video segmentation models, but also advances state-of-the-art results on multiple video segmentation benchmarks
abstract_zh: 我们推出 TubeFormer-DeepLab，这是首次尝试以统一的方式处理多个核心视频分割任务。不同的视频分割任务（例如视频语义/实例/全景分割）通常被视为不同的问题。不同社区采用的最先进模型存在差异，并且在每项任务中占主导地位的方法也截然不同。相比之下，我们做出了一个重要的观察，即视频分割任务通常可以表述为向视频管分配不同预测标签的问题（其中通过沿时间轴链接分割掩码获得管），并且标签可以根据目标任务编码不同的值。这一观察促使我们开发 TubeFormer-DeepLab，这是一种简单有效的视频掩模变换器模型，广泛适用于多种视频分割任务。 TubeFormer-DeepLab 直接预测具有任务特定标签（纯语义类别，或语义类别和实例标识）的视频管，这不仅显着简化了视频分割模型，而且在多个视频分割基准上取得了最先进的结果

AI.tldr: 本文提出TubeFormer-DeepLab，一种统一处理视频语义、实例和全景分割任务的视频掩码变换器模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割任务（如语义/实例/全景分割）被分别处理，导致方法分散且复杂。作者观察到不同任务均可归结为对视频tube（时间轴上连接的分割掩码）分配不同标签的问题，从而提出统一框架。
AI.method: 设计TubeFormer-DeepLab模型，直接预测带有任务特定标签（如语义类别或语义与实例身份组合）的视频tube，通过统一架构简化模型结构并适配多任务。
AI.result: 在多个视频分割基准测试中取得最先进的结果，显著提升模型性能与适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过统一框架简化了视频分割流程，验证了跨任务标签分配方法的有效性，为多任务视频分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nikos D. Fakotakis,Stavros Nousias,Gerasimos Arvanitis,Evangelia I. Zacharaki,Konstantinos Moustakas
title: AI-enabled Sound Pattern Recognition on Asthma Medication Adherence: Evaluation with the RDA Benchmark Suite
title_zh: 基于人工智能的声音模式识别对哮喘药物依从性的影响：使用 RDA 基准套件进行评估
abstract: Asthma is a common, usually long-term respiratory disease with negative impact on global society and economy. Treatment involves using medical devices (inhalers) that distribute medication to the airways and its efficiency depends on the precision of the inhalation technique. There is a clinical need for objective methods to assess the inhalation technique, during clinical consultation. Integrated health monitoring systems, equipped with sensors, enable the recognition of drug actuation, embedded with sound signal detection, analysis and identification, from intelligent structures, that could provide powerful tools for reliable content management. Health monitoring systems equipped with sensors, embedded with sound signal detection, enable the recognition of drug actuation and could be used for effective audio content analysis. This paper revisits sound pattern recognition with machine learning techniques for asthma medication adherence assessment and presents the Respiratory and Drug Actuation (RDA) Suite (https://gitlab.com/vvr/monitoring-medication-adherence/rda-benchmark) for benchmarking and further research. The RDA Suite includes a set of tools for audio processing, feature extraction and classification procedures and is provided along with a dataset, consisting of respiratory and drug actuation sounds. The classification models in RDA are implemented based on conventional and advanced machine learning and deep networks' architectures. This study provides a comparative evaluation of the implemented approaches, examines potential improvements and discusses on challenges and future tendencies.

The classification models in RDA are implemented based on conventional and advanced machine learning and deep networks' architectures. This study provides a comparative evaluation of the implemented approaches, examines potential improvements and discusses on challenges and future tendencies.
abstract_zh: 哮喘是一种常见的、通常是长期的呼吸道疾病，对全球社会和经济产生负面影响。治疗涉及使用医疗设备（吸入器）将药物分配到气道，其效率取决于吸入技术的精度。在临床会诊期间，临床需要客观的方法来评估吸入技术。配备传感器的集成健康监测系统能够识别药物驱动，嵌入智能结构的声音信号检测、分析和识别，为可靠的内容管理提供强大的工具。配备传感器并嵌入声音信号检测的健康监测系统能够识别药物驱动，并可用于有效的音频内容分析。本文重新审视了用于哮喘药物依从性评估的机器学习技术的声音模式识别，并提出了呼吸和药物驱动 (RDA) 套件 (https://gitlab.com/vvr/monitoring-medication-adherence/rda-benchmark) 用于基准测试和进一步研究。 RDA 套件包括一套用于音频处理、特征提取和分类程序的工具，并随数据集一起提供，其中包括呼吸和药物驱动声音。 RDA 中的分类模型是基于传统和先进的机器学习以及深度网络架构来实现的。本研究对所实施的方法进行了比较评估，检查了潜在的改进并讨论了挑战和未来趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于人工智能的声音模式识别方法，用于评估哮喘患者用药依从性，并开发了RDA基准套件进行评估。
AI.motivation: 哮喘治疗依赖吸入器使用技巧，但缺乏客观评估手段。通过声音信号分析可提供可靠监测工具，提升治疗效果。
AI.method: 结合传统与深度学习模型，构建RDA套件实现音频处理、特征提取与分类，包含呼吸声和药物触发声数据集。
AI.result: 对比多种机器学习方法性能，分析改进潜力，并讨论实际应用中的挑战与未来方向。
AI.conclusion: RDA套件为哮喘用药依从性研究提供基准，验证了AI在医疗监测中的潜力，需进一步优化模型精度与实用性。

search_text: AI-enabled Sound Pattern Recognition on Asthma Medication Adherence: Evaluation with the RDA Benchmark Suite 基于人工智能的声音模式识别对哮喘药物依从性的影响：使用 RDA 基准套件进行评估 Asthma is a common, usually long-term respiratory disease with negative impact on global society and economy. Treatment involves using medical devices (inhalers) that distribute medication to the airways and its efficiency depends on the precision of the inhalation technique. There is a clinical need for objective methods to assess the inhalation technique, during clinical consultation. Integrated health monitoring systems, equipped with sensors, enable the recognition of drug actuation, embedded with sound signal detection, analysis and identification, from intelligent structures, that could provide powerful tools for reliable content management. Health monitoring systems equipped with sensors, embedded with sound signal detection, enable the recognition of drug actuation and could be used for effective audio content analysis. This paper revisits sound pattern recognition with machine learning techniques for asthma medication adherence assessment and presents the Respiratory and Drug Actuation (RDA) Suite (https://gitlab.com/vvr/monitoring-medication-adherence/rda-benchmark) for benchmarking and further research. The RDA Suite includes a set of tools for audio processing, feature extraction and classification procedures and is provided along with a dataset, consisting of respiratory and drug actuation sounds. The classification models in RDA are implemented based on conventional and advanced machine learning and deep networks' architectures. This study provides a comparative evaluation of the implemented approaches, examines potential improvements and discusses on challenges and future tendencies. 哮喘是一种常见的、通常是长期的呼吸道疾病，对全球社会和经济产生负面影响。治疗涉及使用医疗设备（吸入器）将药物分配到气道，其效率取决于吸入技术的精度。在临床会诊期间，临床需要客观的方法来评估吸入技术。配备传感器的集成健康监测系统能够识别药物驱动，嵌入智能结构的声音信号检测、分析和识别，为可靠的内容管理提供强大的工具。配备传感器并嵌入声音信号检测的健康监测系统能够识别药物驱动，并可用于有效的音频内容分析。本文重新审视了用于哮喘药物依从性评估的机器学习技术的声音模式识别，并提出了呼吸和药物驱动 (RDA) 套件 (https://gitlab.com/vvr/monitoring-medication-adherence/rda-benchmark) 用于基准测试和进一步研究。 RDA 套件包括一套用于音频处理、特征提取和分类程序的工具，并随数据集一起提供，其中包括呼吸和药物驱动声音。 RDA 中的分类模型是基于传统和先进的机器学习以及深度网络架构来实现的。本研究对所实施的方法进行了比较评估，检查了潜在的改进并讨论了挑战和未来趋势。 本文提出基于人工智能的声音模式识别方法，用于评估哮喘患者用药依从性，并开发了RDA基准套件进行评估。 Nikos D. title: Searching for the Essence of Adversarial Perturbations
title_zh: 寻找对抗性扰动的本质
abstract: Neural networks have demonstrated state-of-the-art performance in various machine learning fields. However, the introduction of malicious perturbations in input data, known as adversarial examples, has been shown to deceive neural network predictions. This poses potential risks for real-world applications such as autonomous driving and text identification. In order to mitigate these risks, a comprehensive understanding of the mechanisms underlying adversarial examples is essential. In this study, we demonstrate that adversarial perturbations contain human-recognizable information, which is the key conspirator responsible for a neural network's incorrect prediction, in contrast to the widely held belief that human-unidentifiable characteristics play a critical role in fooling a network. This concept of human-recognizable characteristics enables us to explain key features of adversarial perturbations, including their existence, transferability among different neural networks, and increased interpretability for adversarial training. We also uncover two unique properties of adversarial perturbations that deceive neural networks: masking and generation. Additionally, a special class, the complementary class, is identified when neural networks classify input images. The presence of human-recognizable information in adversarial perturbations allows researchers to gain insight into the working principles of neural networks and may lead to the development of techniques for detecting and defending against adversarial attacks.
summary: Neural networks have demonstrated state-of-the-art performance in various machine learning fields. However, the introduction of malicious perturbations in input data, known as adversarial examples, has been shown to deceive neural network predictions. This poses potential risks for real-world applications such as autonomous driving and text identification. In order to mitigate these risks, a comprehensive understanding of the mechanisms underlying adversarial examples is essential. In this study, we demonstrate that adversarial perturbations contain human-recognizable information, which is the key conspirator responsible for a neural network's incorrect prediction, in contrast to the widely held belief that human-unidentifiable characteristics play a critical role in fooling a network. This concept of human-recognizable characteristics enables us to explain key features of adversarial perturbations, including their existence, transferability among different neural networks, and increased interpretability for adversarial training. We also uncover two unique properties of adversarial perturbations that deceive neural networks: masking and generation. Additionally, a special class, the complementary class, is identified when neural networks classify input images. The presence of human-recognizable information in adversarial perturbations allows researchers to gain insight into the working principles of neural networks and may lead to the development of techniques for detecting and defending against adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络已经在各个机器学习领域展示了最先进的性能。然而，在输入数据中引入恶意扰动（称为对抗性示例）已被证明会欺骗神经网络预测。这给自动驾驶和文本识别等现实应用带来了潜在风险。为了减轻这些风险，全面了解对抗性例子背后的机制至关重要。在这项研究中，我们证明对抗性扰动包含人类可识别的信息，这是导致神经网络错误预测的关键共谋者，这与人们普遍认为的人类无法识别的特征在欺骗网络中发挥关键作用的观点相反。这种人类可识别特征的概念使我们能够解释对抗性扰动的关键特征，包括它们的存在、不同神经网络之间的可转移性以及对抗性训练的可解释性增强。我们还发现了欺骗神经网络的对抗性扰动的两个独特属性：掩蔽和生成。此外，当神经网络对输入图像进行分类时，会识别出一个特殊的类别，即补充类别。对抗性扰动中人类可识别信息的存在使研究人员能够深入了解神经网络的工作原理，并可能导致检测和防御对抗性攻击的技术的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨对抗性扰动的本质，揭示其包含可被人类识别的信息，而非传统认为的不可识别特征。
AI.motivation: 对抗样本可能威胁自动驾驶等现实应用，需深入理解其机制以开发防御技术。
AI.method: 通过分析对抗扰动的特性，提出可识别信息的概念，并验证其在转移性、可解释性及对抗训练中的作用。
AI.result: 发现对抗扰动包含人类可识别信息，揭示其‘遮蔽’和‘生成’特性，并识别出互补类别现象。
AI.conclusion: 人类可识别信息的发现为理解神经网络原理及开发检测防御技术提供了新方向。

authors_text: Lu Yin,Vlado Menkovski,Meng Fang,Tianjin Huang,Yulong Pei,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Decebal Constantin Mocanu,Shiwei Liu
title: Superposing Many Tickets into One: A Performance Booster for Sparse Neural Network Training
title_zh: 将多张票叠加为一张：稀疏神经网络训练的性能助推器
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures, accepted by the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI)
comments: 17 pages, 5 figures, accepted by the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI)
abstract: Recent works on sparse neural network training (sparse training) have shown that a compelling trade-off between performance and efficiency can be achieved by training intrinsically sparse neural networks from scratch. Existing sparse training methods usually strive to find the best sparse subnetwork possible in one single run, without involving any expensive dense or pre-training steps. For instance, dynamic sparse training (DST), is capable of reaching a competitive performance of dense training by iteratively evolving the sparse topology during the course of training. In this paper, we argue that it is better to allocate the limited resources to create multiple low-loss sparse subnetworks and superpose them into a stronger one, instead of allocating all resources entirely to find an individual subnetwork. To achieve this, two desiderata are required: (1) efficiently producing many low-loss subnetworks, the so-called cheap tickets, within one training process limited to the standard training time used in dense training; (2) effectively superposing these cheap tickets into one stronger subnetwork. To corroborate our conjecture, we present a novel sparse training approach, termed Sup-tickets, which can satisfy the above two desiderata concurrently in a single sparse-to-sparse training process. Across various modern architectures on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, we show that Sup-tickets integrates seamlessly with the existing sparse training methods and demonstrates consistent performance improvement.
summary: Recent works on sparse neural network training (sparse training) have shown that a compelling trade-off between performance and efficiency can be achieved by training intrinsically sparse neural networks from scratch. Existing sparse training methods usually strive to find the best sparse subnetwork possible in one single run, without involving any expensive dense or pre-training steps. For instance, dynamic sparse training (DST), is capable of reaching a competitive performance of dense training by iteratively evolving the sparse topology during the course of training. In this paper, we argue that it is better to allocate the limited resources to create multiple low-loss sparse subnetworks and superpose them into a stronger one, instead of allocating all resources entirely to find an individual subnetwork. To achieve this, two desiderata are required: (1) efficiently producing many low-loss subnetworks, the so-called cheap tickets, within one training process limited to the standard training time used in dense training; (2) effectively superposing these cheap tickets into one stronger subnetwork. To corroborate our conjecture, we present a novel sparse training approach, termed Sup-tickets, which can satisfy the above two desiderata concurrently in a single sparse-to-sparse training process. Across various modern architectures on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, we show that Sup-tickets integrates seamlessly with the existing sparse training methods and demonstrates consistent performance improvement.
abstract_zh: 最近关于稀疏神经网络训练（稀疏训练）的工作表明，通过从头开始训练本质上稀疏的神经网络可以实现性能和效率之间令人信服的权衡。现有的稀疏训练方法通常努力在一次运行中找到可能的最佳稀疏子网络，而不涉及任何昂贵的密集或预训练步骤。例如，动态稀疏训练（DST）能够通过在训练过程中迭代地演化稀疏拓扑来达到密集训练的竞争性能。在本文中，我们认为最好分配有限的资源来创建多个低损耗稀疏子网络并将它们叠加成一个更强的子网络，而不是完全分配所有资源来寻找单个子网络。为了实现这一目标，需要满足两个要求：（1）在仅限于密集训练中使用的标准训练时间的一个训练过程中有效地生成许多低损耗子网络，即所谓的廉价门票； （2）有效地将这些廉价机票叠加到一个更强的子网络中。为了证实我们的猜想，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏训练方法，称为 Sup-tickets，它可以在单个稀疏到稀疏的训练过程中同时满足上述两个需求。在 CIFAR-10/100 和 ImageNet 上的各种现代架构中，我们表明 Sup-tickets 与现有的稀疏训练方法无缝集成，并展示了一致的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Sup-tickets的新方法，通过在稀疏神经网络训练过程中生成多个低损失子网络（廉价票）并将其叠加，提升稀疏训练性能。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏训练方法专注于单次运行中寻找最优子网络，但作者认为应将有限资源分配给生成多个子网络并叠加，以更高效利用资源并提升性能。
AI.method: 提出Sup-tickets方法，在单次稀疏到稀疏的训练过程中同时满足两个目标：1）在标准训练时间内生成多个廉价票；2）将这些子网络有效叠加为更强网络。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet数据集上，Sup-tickets与现有稀疏训练方法无缝集成，展现出持续的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过叠加多个稀疏子网络，Sup-tickets在资源受限场景下显著提升了稀疏神经网络训练的性能，验证了多子网络协作的有效性。

search_text: Superposing Many Tickets into One: A Performance Booster for Sparse Neural Network Training 将多张票叠加为一张：稀疏神经网络训练的性能助推器 Recent works on sparse neural network training (sparse training) have shown that a compelling trade-off between performance and efficiency can be achieved by training intrinsically sparse neural networks from scratch. Existing sparse training methods usually strive to find the best sparse subnetwork possible in one single run, without involving any expensive dense or pre-training steps. For instance, dynamic sparse training (DST), is capable of reaching a competitive performance of dense training by iteratively evolving the sparse topology during the course of training. In this paper, we argue that it is better to allocate the limited resources to create multiple low-loss sparse subnetworks and superpose them into a stronger one, instead of allocating all resources entirely to find an individual subnetwork. To achieve this, two desiderata are required: (1) efficiently producing many low-loss subnetworks, the so-called cheap tickets, within one training process limited to the standard training time used in dense training; (2) effectively superposing these cheap tickets into one stronger subnetwork. To corroborate our conjecture, we present a novel sparse training approach, termed Sup-tickets, which can satisfy the above two desiderata concurrently in a single sparse-to-sparse training process. Across various modern architectures on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, we show that Sup-tickets integrates seamlessly with the existing sparse training methods and demonstrates consistent performance improvement. 最近关于稀疏神经网络训练（稀疏训练）的工作表明，通过从头开始训练本质上稀疏的神经网络可以实现性能和效率之间令人信服的权衡。现有的稀疏训练方法通常努力在一次运行中找到可能的最佳稀疏子网络，而不涉及任何昂贵的密集或预训练步骤。例如，动态稀疏训练（DST）能够通过在训练过程中迭代地演化稀疏拓扑来达到密集训练的竞争性能。在本文中，我们认为最好分配有限的资源来创建多个低损耗稀疏子网络并将它们叠加成一个更强的子网络，而不是完全分配所有资源来寻找单个子网络。为了实现这一目标，需要满足两个要求：（1）在仅限于密集训练中使用的标准训练时间的一个训练过程中有效地生成许多低损耗子网络，即所谓的廉价门票； （2）有效地将这些廉价机票叠加到一个更强的子网络中。为了证实我们的猜想，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏训练方法，称为 Sup-tickets，它可以在单个稀疏到稀疏的训练过程中同时满足上述两个需求。在 CIFAR-10/100 和 ImageNet 上的各种现代架构中，我们表明 Sup-tickets 与现有的稀疏训练方法无缝集成，并展示了一致的性能改进。 本文提出一种名为Sup-tickets的新方法，通过在稀疏神经网络训练过程中生成多个低损失子网络（廉价票）并将其叠加，提升稀疏训练性能。 Lu Yin,Vlado Menkovski,Meng Fang,Tianjin Huang,Yulong Pei,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Decebal Constantin Mocanu,Shiwei Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongqi Zhang,Zhanke Zhou,Quanming Yao,Xiaowen Chu,Bo Han
title: AdaProp: Learning Adaptive Propagation for Graph Neural Network based Knowledge Graph Reasoning
title_zh: AdaProp：基于知识图推理的图神经网络的学习自适应传播
abstract: Due to the popularity of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), various GNN-based methods have been designed to reason on knowledge graphs (KGs). An important design component of GNN-based KG reasoning methods is called the propagation path, which contains a set of involved entities in each propagation step. Existing methods use hand-designed propagation paths, ignoring the correlation between the entities and the query relation. In addition, the number of involved entities will explosively grow at larger propagation steps. In this work, we are motivated to learn an adaptive propagation path in order to filter out irrelevant entities while preserving promising targets. First, we design an incremental sampling mechanism where the nearby targets and layer-wise connections can be preserved with linear complexity. Second, we design a learning-based sampling distribution to identify the semantically related entities. Extensive experiments show that our method is powerful, efficient, and semantic-aware. The code is available at https://github.com/LARS-research/AdaProp.
summary: Due to the popularity of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), various GNN-based methods have been designed to reason on knowledge graphs (KGs). An important design component of GNN-based KG reasoning methods is called the propagation path, which contains a set of involved entities in each propagation step. Existing methods use hand-designed propagation paths, ignoring the correlation between the entities and the query relation. In addition, the number of involved entities will explosively grow at larger propagation steps. In this work, we are motivated to learn an adaptive propagation path in order to filter out irrelevant entities while preserving promising targets. First, we design an incremental sampling mechanism where the nearby targets and layer-wise connections can be preserved with linear complexity. Second, we design a learning-based sampling distribution to identify the semantically related entities. Extensive experiments show that our method is powerful, efficient, and semantic-aware. The code is available at https://github.com/LARS-research/AdaProp.
abstract_zh: 由于图神经网络（GNN）的流行，人们设计了各种基于 GNN 的方法来对知识图（KG）进行推理。基于 GNN 的 KG 推理方法的一个重要设计组件称为传播路径，它包含每个传播步骤中涉及的一组实体。现有方法使用手工设计的传播路径，忽略实体和查询关系之间的相关性。此外，涉及的实体数量将在更大的传播步长下呈爆炸式增长。在这项工作中，我们有动力学习自适应传播路径，以便过滤掉不相关的实体，同时保留有希望的目标。首先，我们设计了一种增量采样机制，可以以线性复杂度保留附近的目标和分层连接。其次，我们设计了基于学习的采样分布来识别语义相关的实体。大量的实验表明，我们的方法强大、高效且具有语义感知能力。代码可在 https://github.com/LARS-research/AdaProp 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaProp方法，通过学习自适应传播路径提升基于图神经网络的知识图谱推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工设计的传播路径，忽视实体与查询关系的相关性，且传播步数增加时实体数量爆炸式增长导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计增量抽样机制保持线性复杂度，结合学习型抽样分布识别语义相关实体，实现自适应传播路径过滤。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持高效性的同时显著提升推理效果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: AdaProp通过自适应传播路径学习有效解决了传统方法的局限性，在知识图谱推理任务中表现出色。

authors_text: Valerii Likhosherstov,Krzysztof Choromanski,Avinava Dubey,Frederick Liu,Tamas Sarlos,Adrian Weller
title: Chefs' Random Tables: Non-Trigonometric Random Features
title_zh: 厨师随机表：非三角随机特征
abstract: We introduce chefs' random tables (CRTs), a new class of non-trigonometric random features (RFs) to approximate Gaussian and softmax kernels. CRTs are an alternative to standard random kitchen sink (RKS) methods, which inherently rely on the trigonometric maps. We present variants of CRTs where RFs are positive, a key requirement for applications in recent low-rank Transformers. Further variance reduction is possible by leveraging statistics which are simple to compute. One instantiation of CRTs, the optimal positive random features (OPRFs), is to our knowledge the first RF method for unbiased softmax kernel estimation with positive and bounded RFs, resulting in exponentially small tails and much lower variance than its counterparts. As we show, orthogonal random features applied in OPRFs provide additional variance reduction for any dimensionality $d$ (not only asymptotically for sufficiently large $d$, as for RKS). We test CRTs on many tasks ranging from non-parametric classification to training Transformers for text, speech and image data, obtaining new state-of-the-art results for low-rank text Transformers, while providing linear space and time complexity.
summary: We introduce chefs' random tables (CRTs), a new class of non-trigonometric random features (RFs) to approximate Gaussian and softmax kernels. CRTs are an alternative to standard random kitchen sink (RKS) methods, which inherently rely on the trigonometric maps. We present variants of CRTs where RFs are positive, a key requirement for applications in recent low-rank Transformers. Further variance reduction is possible by leveraging statistics which are simple to compute. One instantiation of CRTs, the optimal positive random features (OPRFs), is to our knowledge the first RF method for unbiased softmax kernel estimation with positive and bounded RFs, resulting in exponentially small tails and much lower variance than its counterparts. As we show, orthogonal random features applied in OPRFs provide additional variance reduction for any dimensionality $d$ (not only asymptotically for sufficiently large $d$, as for RKS). We test CRTs on many tasks ranging from non-parametric classification to training Transformers for text, speech and image data, obtaining new state-of-the-art results for low-rank text Transformers, while providing linear space and time complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们引入厨师随机表 (CRT)，这是一类新的非三角随机特征 (RF)，用于逼近高斯和 softmax 内核。 CRT 是标准随机厨房水槽 (RKS) 方法的替代方法，后者本质上依赖于三角图。我们提出了 RF 为正的 CRT 变体，这是最近低阶 Transformer 中应用的关键要求。通过利用易于计算的统计数据可以进一步减少方差。据我们所知，CRT 的一个实例是最佳正随机特征 (OPRF)，它是第一个用于具有正且有界 RF 的无偏 Softmax 核估计的 RF 方法，与同类方法相比，尾部呈指数级小且方差低得多。正如我们所展示的，OPRF 中应用的正交随机特征为任何维度 $d$ 提供了额外的方差减少（不仅对于足够大的 $d$ 是渐近的，对于 RKS 来说）。我们在许多任务上测试 CRT，从非参数分类到训练文本、语音和图像数据的 Transformer，为低阶文本 Transformer 获得新的最先进的结果，同时提供线性空间和时间复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Chefs' Random Tables (CRTs)的新类非三角随机特征方法，用于近似高斯核和softmax核，作为传统随机厨房水槽（RKS）方法的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 传统RKS方法依赖三角映射，难以满足低秩Transformer等应用对正随机特征（RFs）的需求，且存在方差较大的问题。
AI.method: 设计非三角随机特征CRTs及其正变体（如最优正随机特征OPRFs），利用统计信息和正交特征实现方差降低，确保RFs的正性和有界性。
AI.result: 在非参数分类、文本、语音和图像数据的Transformer训练中取得新状态-of-the-art结果，尤其在低秩文本Transformer中表现突出，且具有线性时空复杂度。
AI.conclusion: CRTs为需要正随机特征的应用提供了更优替代方案，相比RKS具有更低的方差和更广的适用性，推动了高效核方法的发展。

method: 设计非三角随机特征CRTs及其正变体（如最优正随机特征OPRFs），利用统计信息和正交特征实现方差降低，确保RFs的正性和有界性。
result: 在非参数分类、文本、语音和图像数据的Transformer训练中取得新状态-of-the-art结果，尤其在低秩文本Transformer中表现突出，且具有线性时空复杂度。
conclusion: CRTs为需要正随机特征的应用提供了更优替代方案，相比RKS具有更低的方差和更广的适用性，推动了高效核方法的发展。
search_text: Chefs' Random Tables: Non-Trigonometric Random Features 厨师随机表：非三角随机特征 We introduce chefs' random tables (CRTs), a new class of non-trigonometric random features (RFs) to approximate Gaussian and softmax kernels. CRTs are an alternative to standard random kitchen sink (RKS) methods, which inherently rely on the trigonometric maps. We present variants of CRTs where RFs are positive, a key requirement for applications in recent low-rank Transformers. Further variance reduction is possible by leveraging statistics which are simple to compute. One instantiation of CRTs, the optimal positive random features (OPRFs), is to our knowledge the first RF method for unbiased softmax kernel estimation with positive and bounded RFs, resulting in exponentially small tails and much lower variance than its counterparts. As we show, orthogonal random features applied in OPRFs provide additional variance reduction for any dimensionality $d$ (not only asymptotically for sufficiently large $d$, as for RKS). We test CRTs on many tasks ranging from non-parametric classification to training Transformers for text, speech and image data, obtaining new state-of-the-art results for low-rank text Transformers, while providing linear space and time complexity. 我们引入厨师随机表 (CRT)，这是一类新的非三角随机特征 (RF)，用于逼近高斯和 softmax 内核。 CRT 是标准随机厨房水槽 (RKS) 方法的替代方法，后者本质上依赖于三角图。我们提出了 RF 为正的 CRT 变体，这是最近低阶 Transformer 中应用的关键要求。通过利用易于计算的统计数据可以进一步减少方差。据我们所知，CRT 的一个实例是最佳正随机特征 (OPRF)，它是第一个用于具有正且有界 RF 的无偏 Softmax 核估计的 RF 方法，与同类方法相比，尾部呈指数级小且方差低得多。正如我们所展示的，OPRF 中应用的正交随机特征为任何维度 $d$ 提供了额外的方差减少（不仅对于足够大的 $d$ 是渐近的，对于 RKS 来说）。我们在许多任务上测试 CRT，从非参数分类到训练文本、语音和图像数据的 Transformer，为低阶文本 Transformer 获得新的最先进的结果，同时提供线性空间和时间复杂度。 本文提出了一种名为Chefs' Random Tables (CRTs)的新类非三角随机特征方法，用于近似高斯核和softmax核，作为传统随机厨房水槽（RKS）方法的替代方案。 Valerii Likhosherstov,Krzysztof Choromanski,Avinava Dubey,Frederick Liu,Tamas Sarlos,Adrian Weller cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Mean Field inference of CRFs based on GAT
title_zh: 基于GAT的CRF平均场推断
abstract: In this paper we propose an improved mean-field inference algorithm for the fully connected paired CRFs model. The improved method Message Passing operation is changed from the original linear convolution to the present graph attention operation, while the process of the inference algorithm is turned into the forward process of the GAT model. Combined with the mean-field inferred label distribution, it is equivalent to the output of a classifier with only unary potential. To this end, we propose a graph attention network model with residual structure, and the model approach is applicable to all sequence annotation tasks, such as pixel-level image semantic segmentation tasks as well as text annotation tasks.
summary: In this paper we propose an improved mean-field inference algorithm for the fully connected paired CRFs model. The improved method Message Passing operation is changed from the original linear convolution to the present graph attention operation, while the process of the inference algorithm is turned into the forward process of the GAT model. Combined with the mean-field inferred label distribution, it is equivalent to the output of a classifier with only unary potential. To this end, we propose a graph attention network model with residual structure, and the model approach is applicable to all sequence annotation tasks, such as pixel-level image semantic segmentation tasks as well as text annotation tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对全连接配对 CRF 模型的改进平均场推理算法。改进方法的Message Passing操作由原来的线性卷积改为现在的图注意力操作，同时推理算法的过程变成了GAT模型的前向过程。结合平均场推断的标签分布，它相当于仅具有一元势的分类器的输出。为此，我们提出了一种具有残差结构的图注意力网络模型，该模型方法适用于所有序列标注任务，例如像素级图像语义分割任务以及文本标注任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图注意力网络（GAT）的改进均场推断算法，用于全连接配对条件随机场（CRF）模型，以提升序列标注任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统线性卷积在CRF消息传递中难以捕捉复杂依赖关系，而图注意力机制可自适应学习节点间权重，从而提升模型表达能力。
AI.method: 将CRF均场推断中的消息传递操作替换为图注意力操作，并将推断过程转化为GAT的前向传播，结合残差结构设计新型GAT模型。
AI.result: 该方法适用于像素级图像分割和文本标注等序列标注任务，通过均场推断标签分布等效于单势能分类器输出。
AI.conclusion: 基于GAT的改进算法能有效处理序列标注任务中的复杂依赖关系，为CRF模型提供更优的推断框架。

title: Biological Evolution and Genetic Algorithms: Exploring the Space of Abstract Tile Self-Assembly
title_zh: 生物进化与遗传算法：探索抽象瓦片自组装空间
comment: MPhys Thesis, 2012. Awarded University of Oxford Tessella Prize
comments: MPhys Thesis, 2012. Awarded University of Oxford Tessella Prize
abstract: A physically-motivated genetic algorithm (GA) and full enumeration for a tile-based model of self-assembly (JaTAM) is implemented using a graphics processing unit (GPU). We observe performance gains with respect to state-of-the-art implementations on CPU of factor 7.7 for the GA and 2.9 for JaTAM. The correctness of our GA implementation is demonstrated using a test-bed fitness function, and our JaTAM implementation is verified by classifying a well-known search space $S_{2,8}$ based on two tile types. The performance gains achieved allow for the classification of a larger search space $S^{32}_{3,8}$ based on three tile types. The prevalence of structures based on two tile types demonstrates that simple organisms emerge preferrably even in complex ecosystems. The modularity of the largest structures found motivates the assumption that to first order, $S_{2,8}$ forms the building blocks of $S_{3,8}$. We conclude that GPUs may play an important role in future studies of evolutionary dynamics.
summary: A physically-motivated genetic algorithm (GA) and full enumeration for a tile-based model of self-assembly (JaTAM) is implemented using a graphics processing unit (GPU). We observe performance gains with respect to state-of-the-art implementations on CPU of factor 7.7 for the GA and 2.9 for JaTAM. The correctness of our GA implementation is demonstrated using a test-bed fitness function, and our JaTAM implementation is verified by classifying a well-known search space $S_{2,8}$ based on two tile types. The performance gains achieved allow for the classification of a larger search space $S^{32}_{3,8}$ based on three tile types. The prevalence of structures based on two tile types demonstrates that simple organisms emerge preferrably even in complex ecosystems. The modularity of the largest structures found motivates the assumption that to first order, $S_{2,8}$ forms the building blocks of $S_{3,8}$. We conclude that GPUs may play an important role in future studies of evolutionary dynamics.
abstract_zh: 使用图形处理单元 (GPU) 实现物理驱动的遗传算法 (GA) 和基于图块的自组装模型 (JaTAM) 的完整枚举。我们观察到，相对于最先进的 CPU 实现，GA 的性能提升为 7.7，JaTAM 的性能提升为 2.9。我们的 GA 实现的正确性是使用测试台适应度函数来证明的，并且我们的 JaTAM 实现是通过根据两种图块类型对众所周知的搜索空间 $S_{2,8}$ 进行分类来验证的。所实现的性能提升允许基于三种图块类型对更大的搜索空间 $S^{32}_{3,8}$ 进行分类。基于两种瓦片类型的结构的流行表明，即使在复杂的生态系统中，简单的生物体也更容易出现。所发现的最大结构的模块化激发了这样的假设：对于一阶而言，$S_{2,8}$ 形成$S_{3,8}$ 的构建块。我们的结论是 GPU 可能在未来的进化动力学研究中发挥重要作用。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过GPU实现物理驱动的遗传算法和JaTAM模型，加速自组装系统的搜索空间分类。
AI.motivation: 传统CPU实现的自组装模型计算效率不足，限制了复杂生态系统的研究，需借助GPU提升性能。
AI.method: 基于GPU实现遗传算法（GA）和JaTAM模型，通过对比CPU性能、测试床验证正确性，并分类搜索空间$S_{2,8}$和$S^{32}_{3,8}$。
AI.result: GPU实现使GA性能提升7.7倍，JaTAM提升2.9倍；发现两类型瓷砖结构在复杂系统中更常见，且$S_{2,8}$是$S_{3,8}$的构建模块。
AI.conclusion: GPU可显著加速自组装演化动力学研究，为复杂生态系统分析提供新工具。

authors_text: Jun Rao,Xv Meng,Liang Ding,Shuhan Qi,Dacheng Tao
title: Parameter-Efficient and Student-Friendly Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 参数高效、学生友好的知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) has been extensively employed to transfer the knowledge from a large teacher model to the smaller students, where the parameters of the teacher are fixed (or partially) during training. Recent studies show that this mode may cause difficulties in knowledge transfer due to the mismatched model capacities. To alleviate the mismatch problem, teacher-student joint training methods, e.g., online distillation, have been proposed, but it always requires expensive computational cost. In this paper, we present a parameter-efficient and student-friendly knowledge distillation method, namely PESF-KD, to achieve efficient and sufficient knowledge transfer by updating relatively few partial parameters. Technically, we first mathematically formulate the mismatch as the sharpness gap between their predictive distributions, where we show such a gap can be narrowed with the appropriate smoothness of the soft label. Then, we introduce an adapter module for the teacher and only update the adapter to obtain soft labels with appropriate smoothness. Experiments on a variety of benchmarks show that PESF-KD can significantly reduce the training cost while obtaining competitive results compared to advanced online distillation methods. Code will be released upon acceptance.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) has been extensively employed to transfer the knowledge from a large teacher model to the smaller students, where the parameters of the teacher are fixed (or partially) during training. Recent studies show that this mode may cause difficulties in knowledge transfer due to the mismatched model capacities. To alleviate the mismatch problem, teacher-student joint training methods, e.g., online distillation, have been proposed, but it always requires expensive computational cost. In this paper, we present a parameter-efficient and student-friendly knowledge distillation method, namely PESF-KD, to achieve efficient and sufficient knowledge transfer by updating relatively few partial parameters. Technically, we first mathematically formulate the mismatch as the sharpness gap between their predictive distributions, where we show such a gap can be narrowed with the appropriate smoothness of the soft label. Then, we introduce an adapter module for the teacher and only update the adapter to obtain soft labels with appropriate smoothness. Experiments on a variety of benchmarks show that PESF-KD can significantly reduce the training cost while obtaining competitive results compared to advanced online distillation methods. Code will be released upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）已被广泛用于将知识从大型教师模型转移到较小的学生，其中教师的参数在训练期间是固定的（或部分固定的）。最近的研究表明，这种模式可能会由于模型能力不匹配而导致知识转移困难。为了缓解不匹配问题，已经提出了师生联合训练方法，例如在线蒸馏，但它总是需要昂贵的计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种参数高效且学生友好的知识蒸馏方法，即PESF-KD，通过更新相对较少的部分参数来实现高效且充分的知识转移。从技术上讲，我们首先在数学上将不匹配公式化为其预测分布之间的锐度差距，其中我们表明可以通过软标签的适当平滑度来缩小这种差距。然后，我们为教师引入一个适配器模块，并且仅更新适配器以获得具有适当平滑度的软标签。各种基准的实验表明，与先进的在线蒸馏方法相比，PESF-KD 可以显着降低训练成本，同时获得有竞争力的结果。代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种参数高效且学生友好的知识蒸馏方法，以解决模型容量不匹配导致的知识转移困难问题。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法在模型容量不匹配时知识转移效率低，且现有联合训练方法计算成本高，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过数学公式将模型容量不匹配问题表述为预测分布的sharpness gap，引入adapter模块仅更新教师模型的部分参数以生成适当平滑的soft labels。

search_text: Parameter-Efficient and Student-Friendly Knowledge Distillation 参数高效、学生友好的知识蒸馏 Knowledge distillation (KD) has been extensively employed to transfer the knowledge from a large teacher model to the smaller students, where the parameters of the teacher are fixed (or partially) during training. Recent studies show that this mode may cause difficulties in knowledge transfer due to the mismatched model capacities. To alleviate the mismatch problem, teacher-student joint training methods, e.g., online distillation, have been proposed, but it always requires expensive computational cost. In this paper, we present a parameter-efficient and student-friendly knowledge distillation method, namely PESF-KD, to achieve efficient and sufficient knowledge transfer by updating relatively few partial parameters. Technically, we first mathematically formulate the mismatch as the sharpness gap between their predictive distributions, where we show such a gap can be narrowed with the appropriate smoothness of the soft label. Then, we introduce an adapter module for the teacher and only update the adapter to obtain soft labels with appropriate smoothness. Experiments on a variety of benchmarks show that PESF-KD can significantly reduce the training cost while obtaining competitive results compared to advanced online distillation methods. Code will be released upon acceptance. 知识蒸馏（KD）已被广泛用于将知识从大型教师模型转移到较小的学生，其中教师的参数在训练期间是固定的（或部分固定的）。最近的研究表明，这种模式可能会由于模型能力不匹配而导致知识转移困难。为了缓解不匹配问题，已经提出了师生联合训练方法，例如在线蒸馏，但它总是需要昂贵的计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种参数高效且学生友好的知识蒸馏方法，即PESF-KD，通过更新相对较少的部分参数来实现高效且充分的知识转移。从技术上讲，我们首先在数学上将不匹配公式化为其预测分布之间的锐度差距，其中我们表明可以通过软标签的适当平滑度来缩小这种差距。然后，我们为教师引入一个适配器模块，并且仅更新适配器以获得具有适当平滑度的软标签。各种基准的实验表明，与先进的在线蒸馏方法相比，PESF-KD 可以显着降低训练成本，同时获得有竞争力的结果。代码将在接受后发布。 提出一种参数高效且学生友好的知识蒸馏方法，以解决模型容量不匹配导致的知识转移困难问题。 Jun Rao,Xv Meng,Liang Ding,Shuhan Qi,Dacheng Tao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Yu Pan,Zeyong Su,Ao Liu,Jingquan Wang,Nannan Li,Zenglin Xu
title: A Unified Weight Initialization Paradigm for Tensorial Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 张量卷积神经网络的统一权重初始化范式
abstract: Tensorial Convolutional Neural Networks (TCNNs) have attracted much research attention for their power in reducing model parameters or enhancing the generalization ability. However, exploration of TCNNs is hindered even from weight initialization methods. To be specific, general initialization methods, such as Xavier or Kaiming initialization, usually fail to generate appropriate weights for TCNNs. Meanwhile, although there are ad-hoc approaches for specific architectures (e.g., Tensor Ring Nets), they are not applicable to TCNNs with other tensor decomposition methods (e.g., CP or Tucker decomposition). To address this problem, we propose a universal weight initialization paradigm, which generalizes Xavier and Kaiming methods and can be widely applicable to arbitrary TCNNs. Specifically, we first present the Reproducing Transformation to convert the backward process in TCNNs to an equivalent convolution process. Then, based on the convolution operators in the forward and backward processes, we build a unified paradigm to control the variance of features and gradients in TCNNs. Thus, we can derive fan-in and fan-out initialization for various TCNNs. We demonstrate that our paradigm can stabilize the training of TCNNs, leading to faster convergence and better results.
summary: Tensorial Convolutional Neural Networks (TCNNs) have attracted much research attention for their power in reducing model parameters or enhancing the generalization ability. However, exploration of TCNNs is hindered even from weight initialization methods. To be specific, general initialization methods, such as Xavier or Kaiming initialization, usually fail to generate appropriate weights for TCNNs. Meanwhile, although there are ad-hoc approaches for specific architectures (e.g., Tensor Ring Nets), they are not applicable to TCNNs with other tensor decomposition methods (e.g., CP or Tucker decomposition). To address this problem, we propose a universal weight initialization paradigm, which generalizes Xavier and Kaiming methods and can be widely applicable to arbitrary TCNNs. Specifically, we first present the Reproducing Transformation to convert the backward process in TCNNs to an equivalent convolution process. Then, based on the convolution operators in the forward and backward processes, we build a unified paradigm to control the variance of features and gradients in TCNNs. Thus, we can derive fan-in and fan-out initialization for various TCNNs. We demonstrate that our paradigm can stabilize the training of TCNNs, leading to faster convergence and better results.
abstract_zh: 张量卷积神经网络（TCNN）因其在减少模型参数或增强泛化能力方面的能力而引起了广泛的研究关注。然而，即使权重初始化方法也阻碍了对 TCNN 的探索。具体来说，一般的初始化方法，例如 Xavier 或 Kaiming 初始化，通常无法为 TCNN 生成合适的权重。同时，虽然有针对特定架构的临时方法（例如张量环网络），但它们不适用于具有其他张量分解方法（例如 CP 或 Tucker 分解）的 TCNN。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通用权重初始化范式，它概括了 Xavier 和 Kaiming 方法，并且可以广泛适用于任意 TCNN。具体来说，我们首先提出再现变换，将 TCNN 中的后向过程转换为等效的卷积过程。然后，基于前向和后向过程中的卷积算子，我们构建了一个统一的范式来控制 TCNN 中特征和梯度的方差。因此，我们可以导出各种 TCNN 的扇入和扇出初始化。我们证明了我们的范式可以稳定 TCNN 的训练，从而实现更快的收敛和更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于各种张量卷积神经网络（TCNNs）的统一权重初始化范式，解决现有初始化方法不适用的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Xavier/Kaiming初始化无法适应TCNNs，且针对特定分解方法的初始化缺乏通用性，阻碍了TCNNs的发展。
AI.method: 提出Reproducing Transformation将反向过程转化为等效卷积，并基于前后向卷积算子构建统一范式，推导出适用于不同TCNNs的初始化参数。
AI.result: 该范式有效稳定TCNNs训练，提升收敛速度和模型性能，适用于多种张量分解方法（如CP/Tucker）。
AI.conclusion: 本文为TCNNs提供通用初始化方案，为后续研究与应用奠定基础。

title: How to Compose Shortest Paths
title_zh: 如何构建最短路径
abstract: The composition problem for shortest paths asks the following: given shortest paths on weighted graphs M and N which share a common boundary, find the shortest paths on their union. This problem is a crucial step in any algorithm which uses the divide and conquer method to find shortest paths. This extended abstract details how this problem may be understood categorically. Finding shortest paths is represented by a functor and the composition problem asks to find the value of this functor on a pushout using the values of the functor on the components. Furthermore, we present an algorithm which solves the composition problem for shortest paths. When implemented in Python, this algorithm reduces the computation time for finding shortest paths by relying on precompilation.
summary: The composition problem for shortest paths asks the following: given shortest paths on weighted graphs M and N which share a common boundary, find the shortest paths on their union. This problem is a crucial step in any algorithm which uses the divide and conquer method to find shortest paths. This extended abstract details how this problem may be understood categorically. Finding shortest paths is represented by a functor and the composition problem asks to find the value of this functor on a pushout using the values of the functor on the components. Furthermore, we present an algorithm which solves the composition problem for shortest paths. When implemented in Python, this algorithm reduces the computation time for finding shortest paths by relying on precompilation.
abstract_zh: 最短路径的组合问题提出以下问题：给定共享公共边界的加权图 M 和 N 上的最短路径，找到它们并集上的最短路径。这个问题是任何使用分治法寻找最短路径的算法中的关键步骤。这个扩展的摘要详细说明了如何明确地理解这个问题。查找最短路径由函子表示，组合问题要求使用组件上函子的值在推出上找到该函子的值。此外，我们提出了一种解决最短路径组合问题的算法。当在Python中实现时，该算法通过依赖预编译减少了寻找最短路径的计算时间。

AI.tldr: 解决共享边界的两个加权图的最短路径组合问题，通过范畴论方法和算法实现高效计算
AI.motivation: 分治法寻找最短路径需要高效组合子图的最短路径，而传统方法可能存在效率问题
AI.method: 采用范畴论中的函子理论，将问题转化为推出结构上的函子计算，并设计相应算法
AI.result: 提出一种基于范畴论的最短路径组合算法，Python实现通过预编译优化提升了计算效率
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分治算法提供了理论基础和高效实现，推动了最短路径问题的优化

title: A Combination of Deep Neural Networks and K-Nearest Neighbors for Credit Card Fraud Detection
title_zh: 深度神经网络和 K 最近邻的结合用于信用卡欺诈检测
abstract: Detection of a Fraud transaction on credit cards became one of the major problems for financial institutions, organizations and companies. As the global financial system is highly connected to non-cash transactions and online operations fraud makers invent more effective ways to access customers' finances. The main problem in credit card fraud detection is that the number of fraud transactions is significantly lower than genuine ones. The aim of the paper is to implement new techniques, which contains of under-sampling algorithms, K-nearest Neighbor Algorithm (KNN) and Deep Neural Network (KNN) on new obtained dataset. The performance evaluation showed that DNN model gives precise high accuracy (98.12%), which shows the good ability of presented method to detect fraudulent transactions.
summary: Detection of a Fraud transaction on credit cards became one of the major problems for financial institutions, organizations and companies. As the global financial system is highly connected to non-cash transactions and online operations fraud makers invent more effective ways to access customers' finances. The main problem in credit card fraud detection is that the number of fraud transactions is significantly lower than genuine ones. The aim of the paper is to implement new techniques, which contains of under-sampling algorithms, K-nearest Neighbor Algorithm (KNN) and Deep Neural Network (KNN) on new obtained dataset. The performance evaluation showed that DNN model gives precise high accuracy (98.12%), which shows the good ability of presented method to detect fraudulent transactions.
abstract_zh: 信用卡欺诈交易的检测成为金融机构、组织和公司面临的主要问题之一。由于全球金融体系与非现金交易和在线操作高度相关，欺诈者发明了更有效的方法来获取客户的财务信息。信用卡欺诈检测的主要问题是欺诈交易数量明显低于真实交易数量。本文的目的是在新获得的数据集上实现新技术，其中包括欠采样算法、K 最近邻算法（KNN）和深度神经网络（KNN）。性能评估表明，DNN模型具有很高的准确率（98.12％），这表明该方法具有良好的检测欺诈交易的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合深度神经网络（DNN）和K近邻算法（KNN）的方法，用于信用卡欺诈交易检测。
AI.motivation: 信用卡欺诈交易数量远少于正常交易，导致数据不平衡，传统方法难以有效检测，需探索新算法组合提升检测能力。
AI.method: 采用欠采样算法处理数据不平衡问题，结合KNN与深度神经网络（DNN）进行分类，并在新数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，DNN模型在测试数据中达到98.12%的高准确率，证明该方法对欺诈交易具有良好的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 融合DNN与KNN的算法在信用卡欺诈检测中表现优异，尤其DNN在处理不平衡数据时展现出显著优势。
