search_text: A Combination of Deep Neural Networks and K-Nearest Neighbors for Credit Card Fraud Detection 深度神经网络和 K 最近邻的结合用于信用卡欺诈检测 Detection of a Fraud transaction on credit cards became one of the major problems for financial institutions, organizations and companies. As the global financial system is highly connected to non-cash transactions and online operations fraud makers invent more effective ways to access customers' finances. The main problem in credit card fraud detection is that the number of fraud transactions is significantly lower than genuine ones. The aim of the paper is to implement new techniques, which contains of under-sampling algorithms, K-nearest Neighbor Algorithm (KNN) and Deep Neural Network (KNN) on new obtained dataset. The performance evaluation showed that DNN model gives precise high accuracy (98.12%), which shows the good ability of presented method to detect fraudulent transactions. 信用卡欺诈交易的检测成为金融机构、组织和公司面临的主要问题之一。由于全球金融体系与非现金交易和在线操作高度相关，欺诈者发明了更有效的方法来获取客户的财务信息。信用卡欺诈检测的主要问题是欺诈交易数量明显低于真实交易数量。本文的目的是在新获得的数据集上实现新技术，其中包括欠采样算法、K 最近邻算法（KNN）和深度神经网络（KNN）。性能评估表明，DNN模型具有很高的准确率（98.12％），这表明该方法具有良好的检测欺诈交易的能力。 本文提出结合深度神经网络（DNN）和K近邻算法（KNN）的方法，用于信用卡欺诈交易检测。 Dinara Rzayeva,Saber Malekzadeh cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ashish Kumar,Zhongyu Li,Jun Zeng,Deepak Pathak,Koushil Sreenath,Jitendra Malik
title: Adapting Rapid Motor Adaptation for Bipedal Robots
title_zh: 为双足机器人进行快速电机适应
comment: First two authors contributed equally. Website at https://ashish-kmr.github.io/a-rma/
comments: First two authors contributed equally. Website at https://ashish-kmr.github.io/a-rma/
abstract: Recent advances in legged locomotion have enabled quadrupeds to walk on challenging terrains. However, bipedal robots are inherently more unstable and hence it's harder to design walking controllers for them. In this work, we leverage recent advances in rapid adaptation for locomotion control, and extend them to work on bipedal robots. Similar to existing works, we start with a base policy which produces actions while taking as input an estimated extrinsics vector from an adaptation module. This extrinsics vector contains information about the environment and enables the walking controller to rapidly adapt online. However, the extrinsics estimator could be imperfect, which might lead to poor performance of the base policy which expects a perfect estimator. In this paper, we propose A-RMA (Adapting RMA), which additionally adapts the base policy for the imperfect extrinsics estimator by finetuning it using model-free RL. We demonstrate that A-RMA outperforms a number of RL-based baseline controllers and model-based controllers in simulation, and show zero-shot deployment of a single A-RMA policy to enable a bipedal robot, Cassie, to walk in a variety of different scenarios in the real world beyond what it has seen during training. Videos and results at https://ashish-kmr.github.io/a-rma/
summary: Recent advances in legged locomotion have enabled quadrupeds to walk on challenging terrains. However, bipedal robots are inherently more unstable and hence it's harder to design walking controllers for them. In this work, we leverage recent advances in rapid adaptation for locomotion control, and extend them to work on bipedal robots. Similar to existing works, we start with a base policy which produces actions while taking as input an estimated extrinsics vector from an adaptation module. This extrinsics vector contains information about the environment and enables the walking controller to rapidly adapt online. However, the extrinsics estimator could be imperfect, which might lead to poor performance of the base policy which expects a perfect estimator. In this paper, we propose A-RMA (Adapting RMA), which additionally adapts the base policy for the imperfect extrinsics estimator by finetuning it using model-free RL. We demonstrate that A-RMA outperforms a number of RL-based baseline controllers and model-based controllers in simulation, and show zero-shot deployment of a single A-RMA policy to enable a bipedal robot, Cassie, to walk in a variety of different scenarios in the real world beyond what it has seen during training. Videos and results at https://ashish-kmr.github.io/a-rma/
abstract_zh: 腿式运动的最新进展使四足动物能够在具有挑战性的地形上行走。然而，双足机器人本质上更加不稳定，因此为它们设计行走控制器更加困难。在这项工作中，我们利用了运动控制快速适应方面的最新进展，并将其扩展到双足机器人上。与现有的工作类似，我们从一个基本策略开始，该策略产生动作，同时将来自适应模块的估计外在向量作为输入。该外部向量包含有关环境的信息，并使行走控制器能够快速在线适应。然而，外部估计器可能不完美，这可能会导致期望完美估计器的基本策略表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了 A-RMA（适应 RMA），它通过使用无模型 RL 对其进行微调来另外适应不完美外在估计器的基本策略。我们在仿真中证明了 A-RMA 的性能优于许多基于 RL 的基线控制器和基于模型的控制器，并展示了单个 A-RMA 策略的零样本部署，使双足机器人 Cassie 能够在现实世界中的各种不同场景中行走，超出了训练期间所见的范围。视频和结果位于 https://ashish-kmr.github.io/a-rma/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为A-RMA的方法，通过结合模型无关的强化学习来改进双足机器人步态控制器的快速适应能力。
AI.motivation: 双足机器人相比四足机器人更不稳定，现有基于快速适应的步态控制方法在处理双足机器人时因环境估计误差导致性能下降。
AI.method: 在原有RMA框架基础上，提出A-RMA方法通过模型无关强化学习对基础策略进行微调，以补偿环境估计器的不完美性。
AI.result: A-RMA在仿真环境中优于多种基线控制器，并成功在未训练场景中实现Cassie双足机器人的零样本部署。
AI.conclusion: A-RMA通过策略微调有效解决了环境估计误差问题，验证了该方法在真实世界双足机器人控制中的泛化能力。

title: On the solvability of weakly linear systems of fuzzy relation equations
title_zh: 模糊关系方程弱线性系统的可解性
abstract: Systems of fuzzy relation equations and inequalities in which an unknown fuzzy relation is on the one side of the equation or inequality are linear systems. They are the most studied ones, and a vast literature on linear systems focuses on finding solutions and solvability criteria for such systems. The situation is quite different with the so-called weakly linear systems, in which an unknown fuzzy relation is on both sides of the equation or inequality. Precisely, the scholars have only given the characterization of the set of exact solutions to such systems. This paper describes the set of fuzzy relations that solve weakly linear systems to a certain degree and provides ways to compute them. We pay special attention to developing the algorithms for computing fuzzy preorders and fuzzy equivalences that are solutions to some extent to weakly linear systems. We establish additional properties for the set of such approximate solutions over some particular types of complete residuated lattices. We demonstrate the advantage of this approach via many examples that arise from the problem of aggregation of fuzzy networks.
summary: Systems of fuzzy relation equations and inequalities in which an unknown fuzzy relation is on the one side of the equation or inequality are linear systems. They are the most studied ones, and a vast literature on linear systems focuses on finding solutions and solvability criteria for such systems. The situation is quite different with the so-called weakly linear systems, in which an unknown fuzzy relation is on both sides of the equation or inequality. Precisely, the scholars have only given the characterization of the set of exact solutions to such systems. This paper describes the set of fuzzy relations that solve weakly linear systems to a certain degree and provides ways to compute them. We pay special attention to developing the algorithms for computing fuzzy preorders and fuzzy equivalences that are solutions to some extent to weakly linear systems. We establish additional properties for the set of such approximate solutions over some particular types of complete residuated lattices. We demonstrate the advantage of this approach via many examples that arise from the problem of aggregation of fuzzy networks.
abstract_zh: 未知模糊关系位于方程或不等式一侧的模糊关系方程和不等式系统是线性系统。它们是研究最多的系统，关于线性系统的大量文献集中于寻找此类系统的解决方案和可解性标准。所谓的弱线性系统的情况则完全不同，在弱线性系统中，方程或不等式的两边都存在未知的模糊关系。准确地说，学者们只是给出了此类系统的精确解集的表征。本文描述了在一定程度上解决弱线性系统的模糊关系集，并提供了计算它们的方法。我们特别关注开发计算模糊前序和模糊等价的算法，这些算法在某种程度上是弱线性系统的解决方案。我们在某些特定类型的完整剩余格上为此类近似解集建立了附加属性。我们通过模糊网络聚合问题产生的许多例子来证明这种方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱线性模糊关系方程系统的可解性，提出求解近似解的算法并分析其性质。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注精确解，而弱线性系统因未知关系出现在方程两边，缺乏有效求解方法，需探索近似解的计算框架。
AI.method: 发展计算模糊预序和模糊等价关系的算法，在特定完全残余格上建立近似解的性质，并通过模糊网络聚合案例验证方法。
AI.result: 提出近似解的刻画方法，构建相关算法，证明其在特定代数结构下的性质，并通过实例展示应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为弱线性系统提供有效解决方案，尤其在模糊网络聚合问题中具有显著优势。

result: 提出近似解的刻画方法，构建相关算法，证明其在特定代数结构下的性质，并通过实例展示应用价值。
conclusion: 该方法为弱线性系统提供有效解决方案，尤其在模糊网络聚合问题中具有显著优势。
search_text: On the solvability of weakly linear systems of fuzzy relation equations 模糊关系方程弱线性系统的可解性 Systems of fuzzy relation equations and inequalities in which an unknown fuzzy relation is on the one side of the equation or inequality are linear systems. They are the most studied ones, and a vast literature on linear systems focuses on finding solutions and solvability criteria for such systems. The situation is quite different with the so-called weakly linear systems, in which an unknown fuzzy relation is on both sides of the equation or inequality. Precisely, the scholars have only given the characterization of the set of exact solutions to such systems. This paper describes the set of fuzzy relations that solve weakly linear systems to a certain degree and provides ways to compute them. We pay special attention to developing the algorithms for computing fuzzy preorders and fuzzy equivalences that are solutions to some extent to weakly linear systems. We establish additional properties for the set of such approximate solutions over some particular types of complete residuated lattices. We demonstrate the advantage of this approach via many examples that arise from the problem of aggregation of fuzzy networks. 未知模糊关系位于方程或不等式一侧的模糊关系方程和不等式系统是线性系统。它们是研究最多的系统，关于线性系统的大量文献集中于寻找此类系统的解决方案和可解性标准。所谓的弱线性系统的情况则完全不同，在弱线性系统中，方程或不等式的两边都存在未知的模糊关系。准确地说，学者们只是给出了此类系统的精确解集的表征。本文描述了在一定程度上解决弱线性系统的模糊关系集，并提供了计算它们的方法。我们特别关注开发计算模糊前序和模糊等价的算法，这些算法在某种程度上是弱线性系统的解决方案。我们在某些特定类型的完整剩余格上为此类近似解集建立了附加属性。我们通过模糊网络聚合问题产生的许多例子来证明这种方法的优点。 本文研究弱线性模糊关系方程系统的可解性，提出求解近似解的算法并分析其性质。 Stefan Stanimirovic,Ivana Micic cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LO

title: Zero-Shot and Few-Shot Learning for Lung Cancer Multi-Label Classification using Vision Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 进行肺癌多标签分类的零样本和少样本学习
abstract: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related death worldwide. Lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) and lung squamous cell carcinoma (LUSC) are the most common histologic subtypes of non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC). Histology is an essential tool for lung cancer diagnosis. Pathologists make classifications according to the dominant subtypes. Although morphology remains the standard for diagnosis, significant tool needs to be developed to elucidate the diagnosis. In our study, we utilize the pre-trained Vision Transformer (ViT) model to classify multiple label lung cancer on histologic slices (from dataset LC25000), in both Zero-Shot and Few-Shot settings. Then we compare the performance of Zero-Shot and Few-Shot ViT on accuracy, precision, recall, sensitivity and specificity. Our study show that the pre-trained ViT model has a good performance in Zero-Shot setting, a competitive accuracy ($99.87\%$) in Few-Shot setting ({epoch = 1}) and an optimal result ($100.00\%$ on both validation set and test set) in Few-Shot seeting ({epoch = 5}).
summary: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related death worldwide. Lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) and lung squamous cell carcinoma (LUSC) are the most common histologic subtypes of non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC). Histology is an essential tool for lung cancer diagnosis. Pathologists make classifications according to the dominant subtypes. Although morphology remains the standard for diagnosis, significant tool needs to be developed to elucidate the diagnosis. In our study, we utilize the pre-trained Vision Transformer (ViT) model to classify multiple label lung cancer on histologic slices (from dataset LC25000), in both Zero-Shot and Few-Shot settings. Then we compare the performance of Zero-Shot and Few-Shot ViT on accuracy, precision, recall, sensitivity and specificity. Our study show that the pre-trained ViT model has a good performance in Zero-Shot setting, a competitive accuracy ($99.87\%$) in Few-Shot setting ({epoch = 1}) and an optimal result ($100.00\%$ on both validation set and test set) in Few-Shot seeting ({epoch = 5}).
abstract_zh: 肺癌是全球癌症相关死亡的主要原因。肺腺癌（LUAD）和肺鳞状细胞癌（LUSC）是非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）最常见的组织学亚型。组织学是肺癌诊断的重要工具。病理学家根据主要亚型进行分类。尽管形态学仍然是诊断的标准，但需要开发重要的工具来阐明诊断。在我们的研究中，我们利用预先训练的 Vision Transformer (ViT) 模型在零样本和少样本设置中对组织学切片（来自数据集 LC25000）上的多标签肺癌进行分类。然后我们比较了 Zero-Shot 和 Few-Shot ViT 在准确性、精确性、召回率、灵敏度和特异性方面的性能。我们的研究表明，预训练的 ViT 模型在零样本设置中具有良好的性能，在少样本设置（{epoch = 1}）中具有有竞争力的准确度（$99.87\%$），在少样本设置（{epoch = 5}）中具有最佳结果（在验证集和测试集上均为 100.00\%$）。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究利用预训练视觉Transformer（ViT）模型在零样本和少样本设置下对肺癌组织切片进行多标签分类的任务。
AI.motivation: 肺癌是全球癌症相关死亡的首要原因，传统病理诊断依赖形态学但存在局限性，需开发高效辅助工具以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用预训练ViT模型，在LC25000数据集上进行多标签分类实验，对比零样本和少样本（1 epoch与5 epoch）设置下的性能差异。
AI.result: 零样本设置下模型表现良好，少样本设置下1 epoch准确率达99.87%，5 epoch在验证集和测试集上均达到100%。
AI.conclusion: 预训练ViT模型在少样本场景下具有优异的肺癌分类性能，尤其经过更多训练轮次后可实现最优结果。

authors_text: Xin Wen,Bingchen Zhao,Anlin Zheng,Xiangyu Zhang,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning with Semantic Grouping
title_zh: 具有语义分组的自监督视觉表示学习
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the problem of learning visual representations from unlabeled scene-centric data. Existing works have demonstrated the potential of utilizing the underlying complex structure within scene-centric data; still, they commonly rely on hand-crafted objectness priors or specialized pretext tasks to build a learning framework, which may harm generalizability. Instead, we propose contrastive learning from data-driven semantic slots, namely SlotCon, for joint semantic grouping and representation learning. The semantic grouping is performed by assigning pixels to a set of learnable prototypes, which can adapt to each sample by attentive pooling over the feature and form new slots. Based on the learned data-dependent slots, a contrastive objective is employed for representation learning, which enhances the discriminability of features, and conversely facilitates grouping semantically coherent pixels together. Compared with previous efforts, by simultaneously optimizing the two coupled objectives of semantic grouping and contrastive learning, our approach bypasses the disadvantages of hand-crafted priors and is able to learn object/group-level representations from scene-centric images. Experiments show our approach effectively decomposes complex scenes into semantic groups for feature learning and significantly benefits downstream tasks, including object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. Code is available at: https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SlotCon.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the problem of learning visual representations from unlabeled scene-centric data. Existing works have demonstrated the potential of utilizing the underlying complex structure within scene-centric data; still, they commonly rely on hand-crafted objectness priors or specialized pretext tasks to build a learning framework, which may harm generalizability. Instead, we propose contrastive learning from data-driven semantic slots, namely SlotCon, for joint semantic grouping and representation learning. The semantic grouping is performed by assigning pixels to a set of learnable prototypes, which can adapt to each sample by attentive pooling over the feature and form new slots. Based on the learned data-dependent slots, a contrastive objective is employed for representation learning, which enhances the discriminability of features, and conversely facilitates grouping semantically coherent pixels together. Compared with previous efforts, by simultaneously optimizing the two coupled objectives of semantic grouping and contrastive learning, our approach bypasses the disadvantages of hand-crafted priors and is able to learn object/group-level representations from scene-centric images. Experiments show our approach effectively decomposes complex scenes into semantic groups for feature learning and significantly benefits downstream tasks, including object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. Code is available at: https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SlotCon.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了从未标记的以场景为中心的数据中学习视觉表示的问题。现有的工作已经证明了利用以场景为中心的数据中的底层复杂结构的潜力；尽管如此，他们通常依赖于手工制作的客观性先验或专门的借口任务来构建学习框架，这可能会损害普遍性。相反，我们提出从数据驱动的语义槽中进行对比学习，即 SlotCon，用于联合语义分组和表示学习。语义分组是通过将像素分配给一组可学习原型来执行的，这些原型可以通过对特征进行集中池化来适应每个样本并形成新的槽。基于学习到的数据相关槽，采用对比目标进行表示学习，这增强了特征的可辨别性，并且反过来有利于将语义相干的像素分组在一起。与之前的工作相比，通过同时优化语义分组和对比学习这两个耦合目标，我们的方法绕过了手工制作先验的缺点，并且能够从以场景为中心的图像中学习对象/组级表示。实验表明，我们的方法有效地将复杂场景分解为语义组以进行特征学习，并显着有益于下游任务，包括对象检测、实例分割和语义分割。代码位于：https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SlotCon。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义分组的自监督视觉表征学习方法，通过数据驱动的方式从无标签场景图像中学习对象级表征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工设计的对象先验或预设任务，限制了模型泛化能力，需探索更通用的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: 提出SlotCon方法，通过可学习的原型分配像素生成语义槽，结合对比学习优化语义分组与表征学习的耦合目标。
AI.result: 在场景分解和下游任务（目标检测、实例分割等）中表现优异，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化语义分组与对比学习可摆脱手工先验，实现更通用的场景表征学习。

title: Robust and accelerated single-spike spiking neural network training with applicability to challenging temporal tasks
title_zh: 稳健且加速的单峰尖峰神经网络训练，适用于具有挑战性的时间任务
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures, under review at ICLR 2023
comments: 18 pages, 6 figures, under review at ICLR 2023
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), particularly the single-spike variant in which neurons spike at most once, are considerably more energy efficient than standard artificial neural networks (ANNs). However, single-spike SSNs are difficult to train due to their dynamic and non-differentiable nature, where current solutions are either slow or suffer from training instabilities. These networks have also been critiqued for their limited computational applicability such as being unsuitable for time-series datasets. We propose a new model for training single-spike SNNs which mitigates the aforementioned training issues and obtains competitive results across various image and neuromorphic datasets, with up to a $13.98\times$ training speedup and up to an $81\%$ reduction in spikes compared to the multi-spike SNN. Notably, our model performs on par with multi-spike SNNs in challenging tasks involving neuromorphic time-series datasets, demonstrating a broader computational role for single-spike SNNs than previously believed.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), particularly the single-spike variant in which neurons spike at most once, are considerably more energy efficient than standard artificial neural networks (ANNs). However, single-spike SSNs are difficult to train due to their dynamic and non-differentiable nature, where current solutions are either slow or suffer from training instabilities. These networks have also been critiqued for their limited computational applicability such as being unsuitable for time-series datasets. We propose a new model for training single-spike SNNs which mitigates the aforementioned training issues and obtains competitive results across various image and neuromorphic datasets, with up to a $13.98\times$ training speedup and up to an $81\%$ reduction in spikes compared to the multi-spike SNN. Notably, our model performs on par with multi-spike SNNs in challenging tasks involving neuromorphic time-series datasets, demonstrating a broader computational role for single-spike SNNs than previously believed.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，尤其是神经元最多尖峰一次的单尖峰变体，比标准人工神经网络 (ANN) 的能效要高得多。然而，单尖峰 SSN 由于其动态和不可微分的性质而难以训练，当前的解决方案要么速度慢，要么训练不稳定。这些网络还因其有限的计算适用性而受到批评，例如不适合时间序列数据集。我们提出了一种用于训练单尖峰 SNN 的新模型，该模型可以缓解上述训练问题，并在各种图像和神经形态数据集上获得有竞争力的结果，与多尖峰 SNN 相比，训练速度提升高达 $13.98\times$，尖峰减少高达 $81\%$。值得注意的是，我们的模型在涉及神经形态时间序列数据集的挑战性任务中的表现与多尖峰 SNN 相当，这表明单尖峰 SNN 的计算作用比之前认为的更广泛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的单次脉冲神经网络训练方法，解决其训练速度慢、稳定性差及适用性受限的问题，并在多个数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 单次脉冲神经网络（SNN）虽比传统人工神经网络更节能，但因其动态性和非微分特性导致训练困难，现有方法存在速度慢或稳定性差的问题，且难以处理时间序列等复杂任务。
AI.method: 设计新型训练模型，通过优化算法和结构改进，缓解单次脉冲SNN的动态非微分特性，提升训练效率并增强对时间序列任务的适应性。
AI.result: 在图像和神经形态数据集上实现最高13.98倍训练加速和81%的脉冲减少，且在复杂时间序列任务中表现与多脉冲SNN相当。
AI.conclusion: 单次脉冲SNN通过新训练方法可显著提升性能，证明其在能效与复杂任务处理上的潜力，拓宽了其应用范围。

search_text: Robust and accelerated single-spike spiking neural network training with applicability to challenging temporal tasks 稳健且加速的单峰尖峰神经网络训练，适用于具有挑战性的时间任务 Spiking neural networks (SNNs), particularly the single-spike variant in which neurons spike at most once, are considerably more energy efficient than standard artificial neural networks (ANNs). However, single-spike SSNs are difficult to train due to their dynamic and non-differentiable nature, where current solutions are either slow or suffer from training instabilities. These networks have also been critiqued for their limited computational applicability such as being unsuitable for time-series datasets. We propose a new model for training single-spike SNNs which mitigates the aforementioned training issues and obtains competitive results across various image and neuromorphic datasets, with up to a $13.98\times$ training speedup and up to an $81\%$ reduction in spikes compared to the multi-spike SNN. Notably, our model performs on par with multi-spike SNNs in challenging tasks involving neuromorphic time-series datasets, demonstrating a broader computational role for single-spike SNNs than previously believed. 尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，尤其是神经元最多尖峰一次的单尖峰变体，比标准人工神经网络 (ANN) 的能效要高得多。然而，单尖峰 SSN 由于其动态和不可微分的性质而难以训练，当前的解决方案要么速度慢，要么训练不稳定。这些网络还因其有限的计算适用性而受到批评，例如不适合时间序列数据集。我们提出了一种用于训练单尖峰 SNN 的新模型，该模型可以缓解上述训练问题，并在各种图像和神经形态数据集上获得有竞争力的结果，与多尖峰 SNN 相比，训练速度提升高达 $13.98\times$，尖峰减少高达 $81\%$。值得注意的是，我们的模型在涉及神经形态时间序列数据集的挑战性任务中的表现与多尖峰 SNN 相当，这表明单尖峰 SNN 的计算作用比之前认为的更广泛。 本文提出一种新的单次脉冲神经网络训练方法，解决其训练速度慢、稳定性差及适用性受限的问题，并在多个数据集上验证其有效性。 Luke Taylor,Andrew King,Nicol Harper cs.NE

authors_text: Jiemin Fang,Taoran Yi,Xinggang Wang,Lingxi Xie,Xiaopeng Zhang,Wenyu Liu,Matthias Nießner,Qi Tian
title: Fast Dynamic Radiance Fields with Time-Aware Neural Voxels
title_zh: 具有时间感知神经体素的快速动态辐射场
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) have shown great success in modeling 3D scenes and synthesizing novel-view images. However, most previous NeRF methods take much time to optimize one single scene. Explicit data structures, e.g. voxel features, show great potential to accelerate the training process. However, voxel features face two big challenges to be applied to dynamic scenes, i.e. modeling temporal information and capturing different scales of point motions. We propose a radiance field framework by representing scenes with time-aware voxel features, named as TiNeuVox. A tiny coordinate deformation network is introduced to model coarse motion trajectories and temporal information is further enhanced in the radiance network. A multi-distance interpolation method is proposed and applied on voxel features to model both small and large motions. Our framework significantly accelerates the optimization of dynamic radiance fields while maintaining high rendering quality. Empirical evaluation is performed on both synthetic and real scenes. Our TiNeuVox completes training with only 8 minutes and 8-MB storage cost while showing similar or even better rendering performance than previous dynamic NeRF methods.
summary: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) have shown great success in modeling 3D scenes and synthesizing novel-view images. However, most previous NeRF methods take much time to optimize one single scene. Explicit data structures, e.g. voxel features, show great potential to accelerate the training process. However, voxel features face two big challenges to be applied to dynamic scenes, i.e. modeling temporal information and capturing different scales of point motions. We propose a radiance field framework by representing scenes with time-aware voxel features, named as TiNeuVox. A tiny coordinate deformation network is introduced to model coarse motion trajectories and temporal information is further enhanced in the radiance network. A multi-distance interpolation method is proposed and applied on voxel features to model both small and large motions. Our framework significantly accelerates the optimization of dynamic radiance fields while maintaining high rendering quality. Empirical evaluation is performed on both synthetic and real scenes. Our TiNeuVox completes training with only 8 minutes and 8-MB storage cost while showing similar or even better rendering performance than previous dynamic NeRF methods.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 在 3D 场景建模和合成新颖视图图像方面取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数先前的 NeRF 方法需要花费大量时间来优化单个场景。显式数据结构，例如体素特征，显示出加速训练过程的巨大潜力。然而，体素特征应用于动态场景面临两大挑战，即建模时间信息和捕获不同尺度的点运动。我们提出了一种辐射场框架，通过表示具有时间感知体素特征的场景，命名为 TiNeuVox。引入微小坐标变形网络来模拟粗略运动轨迹，并且时间信息在辐射网络中得到进一步增强。提出了一种多距离插值方法，并将其应用于体素特征来模拟小运动和大运动。我们的框架显着加速了动态辐射场的优化，同时保持高渲染质量。在合成场景和真实场景上进行实证评估。我们的 TiNeuVox 只需 8 分钟和 8 MB 存储成本即可完成训练，同时显示出与以前的动态 NeRF 方法相似甚至更好的渲染性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间感知神经体素的动态辐射场框架TiNeuVox，用于加速动态场景的三维重建与新视角图像合成。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法训练耗时且难以处理动态场景中的时间信息与多尺度运动建模问题，显式体素结构在动态场景应用中存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计时间感知体素特征表示，引入微型坐标变形网络建模粗运动轨迹，并通过多距离插值方法处理不同尺度的运动，增强时间信息建模能力。
AI.result: 在合成与真实场景中实现8分钟训练时长和8MB存储成本，渲染质量优于或媲美现有动态NeRF方法。
AI.conclusion: TiNeuVox通过时间感知体素与多尺度运动建模有效加速动态辐射场优化，在保持高质量渲染的同时显著降低计算与存储开销。

title: Learning Open Domain Multi-hop Search Using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习学习开放域多跳搜索
comment: Accepted for publication at the Structured and Unstructured Knowledge Integration (SUKI) workshop, held at NAACL-HLT 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the Structured and Unstructured Knowledge Integration (SUKI) workshop, held at NAACL-HLT 2022
abstract: We propose a method to teach an automated agent to learn how to search for multi-hop paths of relations between entities in an open domain. The method learns a policy for directing existing information retrieval and machine reading resources to focus on relevant regions of a corpus. The approach formulates the learning problem as a Markov decision process with a state representation that encodes the dynamics of the search process and a reward structure that minimizes the number of documents that must be processed while still finding multi-hop paths. We implement the method in an actor-critic reinforcement learning algorithm and evaluate it on a dataset of search problems derived from a subset of English Wikipedia. The algorithm finds a family of policies that succeeds in extracting the desired information while processing fewer documents compared to several baseline heuristic algorithms.
summary: We propose a method to teach an automated agent to learn how to search for multi-hop paths of relations between entities in an open domain. The method learns a policy for directing existing information retrieval and machine reading resources to focus on relevant regions of a corpus. The approach formulates the learning problem as a Markov decision process with a state representation that encodes the dynamics of the search process and a reward structure that minimizes the number of documents that must be processed while still finding multi-hop paths. We implement the method in an actor-critic reinforcement learning algorithm and evaluate it on a dataset of search problems derived from a subset of English Wikipedia. The algorithm finds a family of policies that succeeds in extracting the desired information while processing fewer documents compared to several baseline heuristic algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法来教自动化代理学习如何搜索开放域中实体之间关系的多跳路径。该方法学习一种策略，用于引导现有的信息检索和机器阅读资源关注语料库的相关区域。该方法将学习问题表述为马尔可夫决策过程，其状态表示对搜索过程的动态进行编码，奖励结构可最大限度地减少必须处理的文档数量，同时仍能找到多跳路径。我们在演员评论家强化学习算法中实现该方法，并在源自英语维基百科子集的搜索问题数据集上对其进行评估。与几种基线启发式算法相比，该算法找到了一系列策略，可以成功提取所需信息，同时处理更少的文档。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，用于在开放领域中学习多跳实体关系搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有信息检索和机器阅读方法在处理多跳关系时效率低下，需减少文档处理量并准确提取多跳路径。
AI.method: 将搜索问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用状态表示搜索动态和奖励结构优化文档处理量，使用actor-critic算法实现。
AI.result: 在维基百科子集数据集上，算法相比基线方法能以更少文档处理量成功提取多跳路径。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习策略有效提升多跳搜索效率，验证了该方法在信息检索中的潜力。

search_text: Learning Open Domain Multi-hop Search Using Reinforcement Learning 使用强化学习学习开放域多跳搜索 We propose a method to teach an automated agent to learn how to search for multi-hop paths of relations between entities in an open domain. The method learns a policy for directing existing information retrieval and machine reading resources to focus on relevant regions of a corpus. The approach formulates the learning problem as a Markov decision process with a state representation that encodes the dynamics of the search process and a reward structure that minimizes the number of documents that must be processed while still finding multi-hop paths. We implement the method in an actor-critic reinforcement learning algorithm and evaluate it on a dataset of search problems derived from a subset of English Wikipedia. The algorithm finds a family of policies that succeeds in extracting the desired information while processing fewer documents compared to several baseline heuristic algorithms. 我们提出了一种方法来教自动化代理学习如何搜索开放域中实体之间关系的多跳路径。该方法学习一种策略，用于引导现有的信息检索和机器阅读资源关注语料库的相关区域。该方法将学习问题表述为马尔可夫决策过程，其状态表示对搜索过程的动态进行编码，奖励结构可最大限度地减少必须处理的文档数量，同时仍能找到多跳路径。我们在演员评论家强化学习算法中实现该方法，并在源自英语维基百科子集的搜索问题数据集上对其进行评估。与几种基线启发式算法相比，该算法找到了一系列策略，可以成功提取所需信息，同时处理更少的文档。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，用于在开放领域中学习多跳实体关系搜索。 Enrique Noriega-Atala,Mihai Surdeanu,Clayton T. Morrison cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xinya Ji,Hang Zhou,Kaisiyuan Wang,Qianyi Wu,Wayne Wu,Feng Xu,Xun Cao
title: EAMM: One-Shot Emotional Talking Face via Audio-Based Emotion-Aware Motion Model
title_zh: EAMM：通过基于音频的情感感知运动模型实现一次性情感说话面部
comment: Accepted by SIGGRAPH 2022 Conference Proceedings. For demo video and codes, see https://jixinya.github.io/projects/EAMM/
comments: Accepted by SIGGRAPH 2022 Conference Proceedings. For demo video and codes, see https://jixinya.github.io/projects/EAMM/
abstract: Although significant progress has been made to audio-driven talking face generation, existing methods either neglect facial emotion or cannot be applied to arbitrary subjects. In this paper, we propose the Emotion-Aware Motion Model (EAMM) to generate one-shot emotional talking faces by involving an emotion source video. Specifically, we first propose an Audio2Facial-Dynamics module, which renders talking faces from audio-driven unsupervised zero- and first-order key-points motion. Then through exploring the motion model's properties, we further propose an Implicit Emotion Displacement Learner to represent emotion-related facial dynamics as linearly additive displacements to the previously acquired motion representations. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that by incorporating the results from both modules, our method can generate satisfactory talking face results on arbitrary subjects with realistic emotion patterns.
summary: Although significant progress has been made to audio-driven talking face generation, existing methods either neglect facial emotion or cannot be applied to arbitrary subjects. In this paper, we propose the Emotion-Aware Motion Model (EAMM) to generate one-shot emotional talking faces by involving an emotion source video. Specifically, we first propose an Audio2Facial-Dynamics module, which renders talking faces from audio-driven unsupervised zero- and first-order key-points motion. Then through exploring the motion model's properties, we further propose an Implicit Emotion Displacement Learner to represent emotion-related facial dynamics as linearly additive displacements to the previously acquired motion representations. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that by incorporating the results from both modules, our method can generate satisfactory talking face results on arbitrary subjects with realistic emotion patterns.
abstract_zh: 尽管音频驱动的说话面部生成已经取得了重大进展，但现有方法要么忽略面部情感，要么不能应用于任意主体。在本文中，我们提出了情感感知运动模型（EAMM），通过涉及情感源视频来生成一次性情感说话面孔。具体来说，我们首先提出了一个 Audio2Facial-Dynamics 模块，该模块从音频驱动的无监督零阶和一阶关键点运动中渲染说话的面孔。然后，通过探索运动模型的属性，我们进一步提出了一种隐式情绪位移学习器，将与情绪相关的面部动态表示为先前获取的运动表示的线性相加位移。综合实验表明，通过结合两个模块的结果，我们的方法可以对具有真实情感模式的任意受试者生成令人满意的说话面孔结果。

AI.tldr: 提出EAMM模型，通过音频驱动生成任意主体的具有真实情感模式的一次性说话人脸。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成说话人脸时忽视面部情绪或无法应用于任意主体，需解决情感表达与个性化生成的矛盾。
AI.method: 提出Audio2Facial-Dynamics模块和Implicit Emotion Displacement Learner，分别生成基础面部运动和情绪相关位移，结合实现情感驱动生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能在任意主体上生成具有真实情感模式的高质量说话人脸。
AI.conclusion: EAMM通过结合音频驱动运动与情绪位移学习，有效解决了情感表达与个性化生成的难题。

title: Multi-Object Grasping -- Types and Taxonomy
title_zh: 多对象抓取——类型和分类
abstract: This paper proposes 12 multi-object grasps (MOGs) types from a human and robot grasping data set. The grasp types are then analyzed and organized into a MOG taxonomy. This paper first presents three MOG data collection setups: a human finger tracking setup for multi-object grasping demonstrations, a real system with Barretthand, UR5e arm, and a MOG algorithm, a simulation system with the same settings as the real system. Then the paper describes a novel stochastic grasping routine designed based on a biased random walk to explore the robotic hand's configuration space for feasible MOGs. Based on observations in both the human demonstrations and robotic MOG solutions, this paper proposes 12 MOG types in two groups: shape-based types and function-based types. The new MOG types are compared using six characteristics and then compiled into a taxonomy. This paper then introduces the observed MOG type combinations and shows examples of 16 different combinations.
summary: This paper proposes 12 multi-object grasps (MOGs) types from a human and robot grasping data set. The grasp types are then analyzed and organized into a MOG taxonomy. This paper first presents three MOG data collection setups: a human finger tracking setup for multi-object grasping demonstrations, a real system with Barretthand, UR5e arm, and a MOG algorithm, a simulation system with the same settings as the real system. Then the paper describes a novel stochastic grasping routine designed based on a biased random walk to explore the robotic hand's configuration space for feasible MOGs. Based on observations in both the human demonstrations and robotic MOG solutions, this paper proposes 12 MOG types in two groups: shape-based types and function-based types. The new MOG types are compared using six characteristics and then compiled into a taxonomy. This paper then introduces the observed MOG type combinations and shows examples of 16 different combinations.
abstract_zh: 本文从人类和机器人抓取数据集中提出了 12 种多对象抓取 (MOG) 类型。然后对抓取类型进行分析并组织成 MOG 分类法。本文首先介绍了三种 MOG 数据收集设置：用于多目标抓取演示的人类手指跟踪设置、带有 Barretthand、UR5e 手臂和 MOG 算法的真实系统、与真实系统具有相同设置的模拟系统。然后，本文描述了一种基于偏置随机游走设计的新颖的随机抓取例程，以探索可行 MOG 的机械手配置空间。基于对人类演示和机器人 MOG 解决方案的观察，本文提出了 12 种 MOG 类型，分为两组：基于形状的类型和基于功能的类型。新的 MOG 类型使用六个特征进行比较，然后编译成分类法。然后本文介绍了观察到的 MOG 类型组合，并展示了 16 种不同组合的示例。

AI.tldr: 提出并分类12种多物体抓取类型，建立其分类体系
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对多物体抓取类型的系统分类，需通过人类和机器人数据建立分类体系
AI.method: 采用三种数据收集设置（人类演示、实际机器人系统、模拟系统）及基于有偏随机游走的抓取算法，分析并分类抓取类型
AI.result: 提出12种多物体抓取类型，基于形状和功能分类，比较六种特征并建立分类体系，展示16种组合示例
AI.conclusion: 该分类体系为多物体抓取算法设计及机器人应用提供了理论基础和参考

title: Going Beyond One-Hot Encoding in Classification: Can Human Uncertainty Improve Model Performance?
title_zh: 超越分类中的 One-Hot 编码：人类的不确定性能否提高模型性能？
abstract: Technological and computational advances continuously drive forward the broad field of deep learning. In recent years, the derivation of quantities describing theuncertainty in the prediction - which naturally accompanies the modeling process - has sparked general interest in the deep learning community. Often neglected in the machine learning setting is the human uncertainty that influences numerous labeling processes. As the core of this work, label uncertainty is explicitly embedded into the training process via distributional labels. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on image classification with a remote sensing data set that contains multiple label votes by domain experts for each image: The incorporation of label uncertainty helps the model to generalize better to unseen data and increases model performance. Similar to existing calibration methods, the distributional labels lead to better-calibrated probabilities, which in turn yield more certain and trustworthy predictions.
summary: Technological and computational advances continuously drive forward the broad field of deep learning. In recent years, the derivation of quantities describing theuncertainty in the prediction - which naturally accompanies the modeling process - has sparked general interest in the deep learning community. Often neglected in the machine learning setting is the human uncertainty that influences numerous labeling processes. As the core of this work, label uncertainty is explicitly embedded into the training process via distributional labels. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on image classification with a remote sensing data set that contains multiple label votes by domain experts for each image: The incorporation of label uncertainty helps the model to generalize better to unseen data and increases model performance. Similar to existing calibration methods, the distributional labels lead to better-calibrated probabilities, which in turn yield more certain and trustworthy predictions.
abstract_zh: 技术和计算的进步不断推动深度学习的广阔领域向前发展。近年来，描述预测不确定性的量的推导（自然伴随着建模过程）引起了深度学习社区的普遍兴趣。在机器学习环境中经常被忽视的是影响众多标签过程的人类不确定性。作为这项工作的核心，标签不确定性通过分布标签明确嵌入到训练过程中。我们使用遥感数据集证明了我们的图像分类方法的有效性，该遥感数据集包含领域专家对每个图像的多个标签投票：标签不确定性的结合有助于模型更好地泛化到未见过的数据并提高模型性能。与现有的校准方法类似，分布标签会带来更好的校准概率，从而产生更确定和更值得信赖的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用人类标注不确定性改进分类模型性能的方法，通过在训练中嵌入分布标签以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统分类任务中独热编码忽视了人类标注过程中的不确定性，而这种不确定性可能影响模型性能，需探索其有效利用方式。
AI.method: 通过引入分布标签将人类标注的不确定性显式嵌入训练过程，利用遥感数据集进行图像分类实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 模型在遥感数据集上表现出更优的泛化能力和性能，分布标签使概率校准更准确，预测结果更可靠。
AI.conclusion: 结合人类不确定性信息可有效提升分类模型性能，为未来模型设计提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种利用人类标注不确定性改进分类模型性能的方法，通过在训练中嵌入分布标签以提升模型泛化能力。
motivation: 传统分类任务中独热编码忽视了人类标注过程中的不确定性，而这种不确定性可能影响模型性能，需探索其有效利用方式。
method: 通过引入分布标签将人类标注的不确定性显式嵌入训练过程，利用遥感数据集进行图像分类实验验证方法有效性。
result: 模型在遥感数据集上表现出更优的泛化能力和性能，分布标签使概率校准更准确，预测结果更可靠。
conclusion: 结合人类不确定性信息可有效提升分类模型性能，为未来模型设计提供新思路。
search_text: Going Beyond One-Hot Encoding in Classification: Can Human Uncertainty Improve Model Performance? 超越分类中的 One-Hot 编码：人类的不确定性能否提高模型性能？ Technological and computational advances continuously drive forward the broad field of deep learning. In recent years, the derivation of quantities describing theuncertainty in the prediction - which naturally accompanies the modeling process - has sparked general interest in the deep learning community. Often neglected in the machine learning setting is the human uncertainty that influences numerous labeling processes. As the core of this work, label uncertainty is explicitly embedded into the training process via distributional labels. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on image classification with a remote sensing data set that contains multiple label votes by domain experts for each image: The incorporation of label uncertainty helps the model to generalize better to unseen data and increases model performance. Similar to existing calibration methods, the distributional labels lead to better-calibrated probabilities, which in turn yield more certain and trustworthy predictions. 技术和计算的进步不断推动深度学习的广阔领域向前发展。近年来，描述预测不确定性的量的推导（自然伴随着建模过程）引起了深度学习社区的普遍兴趣。在机器学习环境中经常被忽视的是影响众多标签过程的人类不确定性。作为这项工作的核心，标签不确定性通过分布标签明确嵌入到训练过程中。我们使用遥感数据集证明了我们的图像分类方法的有效性，该遥感数据集包含领域专家对每个图像的多个标签投票：标签不确定性的结合有助于模型更好地泛化到未见过的数据并提高模型性能。与现有的校准方法类似，分布标签会带来更好的校准概率，从而产生更确定和更值得信赖的预测。 本文提出一种利用人类标注不确定性改进分类模型性能的方法，通过在训练中嵌入分布标签以提升模型泛化能力。 Christoph Koller,Göran Kauermann,Xiao Xiang Zhu cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Pooling Revisited: Your Receptive Field is Suboptimal
title_zh: 重新审视池化：你的感受野不是最优的
abstract: The size and shape of the receptive field determine how the network aggregates local information and affect the overall performance of a model considerably. Many components in a neural network, such as kernel sizes and strides for convolution and pooling operations, influence the configuration of a receptive field. However, they still rely on hyperparameters, and the receptive fields of existing models result in suboptimal shapes and sizes. Hence, we propose a simple yet effective Dynamically Optimized Pooling operation, referred to as DynOPool, which optimizes the scale factors of feature maps end-to-end by learning the desirable size and shape of its receptive field in each layer. Any kind of resizing modules in a deep neural network can be replaced by the operations with DynOPool at a minimal cost. Also, DynOPool controls the complexity of a model by introducing an additional loss term that constrains computational cost. Our experiments show that the models equipped with the proposed learnable resizing module outperform the baseline networks on multiple datasets in image classification and semantic segmentation.
summary: The size and shape of the receptive field determine how the network aggregates local information and affect the overall performance of a model considerably. Many components in a neural network, such as kernel sizes and strides for convolution and pooling operations, influence the configuration of a receptive field. However, they still rely on hyperparameters, and the receptive fields of existing models result in suboptimal shapes and sizes. Hence, we propose a simple yet effective Dynamically Optimized Pooling operation, referred to as DynOPool, which optimizes the scale factors of feature maps end-to-end by learning the desirable size and shape of its receptive field in each layer. Any kind of resizing modules in a deep neural network can be replaced by the operations with DynOPool at a minimal cost. Also, DynOPool controls the complexity of a model by introducing an additional loss term that constrains computational cost. Our experiments show that the models equipped with the proposed learnable resizing module outperform the baseline networks on multiple datasets in image classification and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 感受野的大小和形状决定了网络如何聚合局部信息并显着影响模型的整体性能。神经网络中的许多组件（例如卷积和池化操作的内核大小和步幅）都会影响感受野的配置。然而，它们仍然依赖于超参数，并且现有模型的感受野导致形状和尺寸不理想。因此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的动态优化池操作，称为 DynOPool，它通过学习每层感受野的所需大小和形状来端到端优化特征图的比例因子。深度神经网络中任何类型的调整模块大小都可以用 DynOPool 的操作以最小的成本替换。此外，DynOPool 通过引入限制计算成本的额外损失项来控制模型的复杂性。我们的实验表明，配备所提出的可学习调整大小模块的模型在图像分类和语义分割的多个数据集上优于基线网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态优化池化操作DynOPool，通过端到端学习优化感受野的尺寸和形状，提升图像分类和语义分割任务的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络模型的感受野配置依赖超参数，导致形状和尺寸次优，限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 设计可学习的DynOPool模块，端到端优化各层感受野的尺度因子，并引入额外损失项控制计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，配备DynOPool的模型在多个数据集的图像分类和语义分割任务中优于基线网络。
AI.conclusion: 动态优化感受野的池化操作能有效提升模型性能，且通过计算成本约束保持模型复杂度可控。

authors_text: Xiaohan Ding,Honghao Chen,Xiangyu Zhang,Kaiqi Huang,Jungong Han,Guiguang Ding
title: Re-parameterizing Your Optimizers rather than Architectures
title_zh: 重新参数化您的优化器而不是架构
abstract: The well-designed structures in neural networks reflect the prior knowledge incorporated into the models. However, though different models have various priors, we are used to training them with model-agnostic optimizers such as SGD. In this paper, we propose to incorporate model-specific prior knowledge into optimizers by modifying the gradients according to a set of model-specific hyper-parameters. Such a methodology is referred to as Gradient Re-parameterization, and the optimizers are named RepOptimizers. For the extreme simplicity of model structure, we focus on a VGG-style plain model and showcase that such a simple model trained with a RepOptimizer, which is referred to as RepOpt-VGG, performs on par with or better than the recent well-designed models. From a practical perspective, RepOpt-VGG is a favorable base model because of its simple structure, high inference speed and training efficiency. Compared to Structural Re-parameterization, which adds priors into models via constructing extra training-time structures, RepOptimizers require no extra forward/backward computations and solve the problem of quantization. We hope to spark further research beyond the realms of model structure design. Code and models \url{https://github.com/DingXiaoH/RepOptimizers}.
summary: The well-designed structures in neural networks reflect the prior knowledge incorporated into the models. However, though different models have various priors, we are used to training them with model-agnostic optimizers such as SGD. In this paper, we propose to incorporate model-specific prior knowledge into optimizers by modifying the gradients according to a set of model-specific hyper-parameters. Such a methodology is referred to as Gradient Re-parameterization, and the optimizers are named RepOptimizers. For the extreme simplicity of model structure, we focus on a VGG-style plain model and showcase that such a simple model trained with a RepOptimizer, which is referred to as RepOpt-VGG, performs on par with or better than the recent well-designed models. From a practical perspective, RepOpt-VGG is a favorable base model because of its simple structure, high inference speed and training efficiency. Compared to Structural Re-parameterization, which adds priors into models via constructing extra training-time structures, RepOptimizers require no extra forward/backward computations and solve the problem of quantization. We hope to spark further research beyond the realms of model structure design. Code and models \url{https://github.com/DingXiaoH/RepOptimizers}.
abstract_zh: 神经网络中精心设计的结构反映了模型中纳入的先验知识。然而，尽管不同的模型有不同的先验，但我们习惯于使用与模型无关的优化器（例如 SGD）来训练它们。在本文中，我们建议通过根据一组特定于模型的超参数修改梯度，将特定于模型的先验知识纳入优化器中。这种方法称为梯度重新参数化，优化器称为 RepOptimizers。为了使模型结构极其简单，我们专注于 VGG 式的普通模型，并展示了使用 RepOptimizer 训练的这种简单模型（称为 RepOpt-VGG）的性能与最近精心设计的模型相当或更好。从实用角度来看，RepOpt-VGG 结构简单、推理速度快、训练效率高，是一种良好的基础模型。与结构重新参数化（通过构建额外的训练时间结构将先验添加到模型中）相比，RepOptimizers 不需要额外的前向/后向计算并解决了量化问题。我们希望激发模型结构设计领域之外的进一步研究。代码和模型\url{https://github.com/DingXiaoH/RepOptimizers}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RepOptimizers的新优化方法，通过在优化器中引入模型特定的先验知识来改进训练过程。
AI.motivation: 虽然神经网络的结构设计包含了先验知识，但传统的模型无关优化器如SGD无法充分利用这些先验信息。因此，本文旨在通过优化器设计来整合模型特定的先验知识。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种梯度重参数化方法，通过修改梯度并引入模型特定的超参数来设计RepOptimizers。该方法不增加额外的计算开销，并在VGG风格的简单模型上进行了验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用RepOptimizers训练的RepOpt-VGG模型在性能上可以与或优于当前先进的设计模型，同时具有更高的推理速度和训练效率。
AI.conclusion: RepOptimizers提供了一种新的方法，通过优化器设计引入模型先验知识，为未来的研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Kuang-Huei Lee,Ofir Nachum,Mengjiao Yang,Lisa Lee,Daniel Freeman,Winnie Xu,Sergio Guadarrama,Ian Fischer,Eric Jang,Henryk Michalewski,Igor Mordatch
title: Multi-Game Decision Transformers
title_zh: 多博弈决策转换器
comment: NeurIPS 2022. 24 pages, 16 figures. Additional information, videos and code can be seen at https://sites.google.com/view/multi-game-transformers
comments: NeurIPS 2022. 24 pages, 16 figures. Additional information, videos and code can be seen at https://sites.google.com/view/multi-game-transformers
abstract: A longstanding goal of the field of AI is a method for learning a highly capable, generalist agent from diverse experience. In the subfields of vision and language, this was largely achieved by scaling up transformer-based models and training them on large, diverse datasets. Motivated by this progress, we investigate whether the same strategy can be used to produce generalist reinforcement learning agents. Specifically, we show that a single transformer-based model - with a single set of weights - trained purely offline can play a suite of up to 46 Atari games simultaneously at close-to-human performance. When trained and evaluated appropriately, we find that the same trends observed in language and vision hold, including scaling of performance with model size and rapid adaptation to new games via fine-tuning. We compare several approaches in this multi-game setting, such as online and offline RL methods and behavioral cloning, and find that our Multi-Game Decision Transformer models offer the best scalability and performance. We release the pre-trained models and code to encourage further research in this direction.
summary: A longstanding goal of the field of AI is a method for learning a highly capable, generalist agent from diverse experience. In the subfields of vision and language, this was largely achieved by scaling up transformer-based models and training them on large, diverse datasets. Motivated by this progress, we investigate whether the same strategy can be used to produce generalist reinforcement learning agents. Specifically, we show that a single transformer-based model - with a single set of weights - trained purely offline can play a suite of up to 46 Atari games simultaneously at close-to-human performance. When trained and evaluated appropriately, we find that the same trends observed in language and vision hold, including scaling of performance with model size and rapid adaptation to new games via fine-tuning. We compare several approaches in this multi-game setting, such as online and offline RL methods and behavioral cloning, and find that our Multi-Game Decision Transformer models offer the best scalability and performance. We release the pre-trained models and code to encourage further research in this direction.
abstract_zh: 人工智能领域的一个长期目标是找到一种从不同经验中学习能力强、通才的智能体的方法。在视觉和语言的子领域，这主要是通过扩展基于 Transformer 的模型并在大型、多样化的数据集上训练它们来实现的。受这一进展的激励，我们研究是否可以使用相同的策略来生成通用强化学习代理。具体来说，我们表明，一个基于 Transformer 的模型（具有一组权重）完全离线训练，可以同时玩一套最多 46 个 Atari 游戏，并且性能接近人类。经过适当的训练和评估后，我们发现在语言和视觉方面观察到的趋势相同，包括性能随模型大小的变化以及通过微调快速适应新游戏。我们比较了这种多游戏环境中的几种方法，例如在线和离线 RL 方法以及行为克隆，并发现我们的多游戏决策转换器模型提供了最佳的可扩展性和性能。我们发布预训练的模型和代码以鼓励在这个方向上的进一步研究。

AI.motivation: 受自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域通过大规模数据训练通用模型的启发，探索是否可通过类似策略构建通用强化学习代理。
AI.method: 开发多游戏决策Transformer模型，使用单一权重集离线训练，对比在线强化学习、行为克隆等方法，验证模型可扩展性与适应性。
AI.result: 模型在46个Atari游戏中实现接近人类表现，验证了模型规模与性能正相关，且可通过微调快速适应新游戏，优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 证明Transformer架构在强化学习领域具备可扩展性，释放预训练模型与代码以推动通用智能体研究。

search_text: Multi-Game Decision Transformers 多博弈决策转换器 A longstanding goal of the field of AI is a method for learning a highly capable, generalist agent from diverse experience. In the subfields of vision and language, this was largely achieved by scaling up transformer-based models and training them on large, diverse datasets. Motivated by this progress, we investigate whether the same strategy can be used to produce generalist reinforcement learning agents. Specifically, we show that a single transformer-based model - with a single set of weights - trained purely offline can play a suite of up to 46 Atari games simultaneously at close-to-human performance. When trained and evaluated appropriately, we find that the same trends observed in language and vision hold, including scaling of performance with model size and rapid adaptation to new games via fine-tuning. We compare several approaches in this multi-game setting, such as online and offline RL methods and behavioral cloning, and find that our Multi-Game Decision Transformer models offer the best scalability and performance. We release the pre-trained models and code to encourage further research in this direction. 人工智能领域的一个长期目标是找到一种从不同经验中学习能力强、通才的智能体的方法。在视觉和语言的子领域，这主要是通过扩展基于 Transformer 的模型并在大型、多样化的数据集上训练它们来实现的。受这一进展的激励，我们研究是否可以使用相同的策略来生成通用强化学习代理。具体来说，我们表明，一个基于 Transformer 的模型（具有一组权重）完全离线训练，可以同时玩一套最多 46 个 Atari 游戏，并且性能接近人类。经过适当的训练和评估后，我们发现在语言和视觉方面观察到的趋势相同，包括性能随模型大小的变化以及通过微调快速适应新游戏。我们比较了这种多游戏环境中的几种方法，例如在线和离线 RL 方法以及行为克隆，并发现我们的多游戏决策转换器模型提供了最佳的可扩展性和性能。我们发布预训练的模型和代码以鼓励在这个方向上的进一步研究。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多游戏决策模型，通过离线训练使单一模型在多个Atari游戏中达到接近人类水平的性能。 Kuang-Huei Lee,Ofir Nachum,Mengjiao Yang,Lisa Lee,Daniel Freeman,Winnie Xu,Sergio Guadarrama,Ian Fischer,Eric Jang,Henryk Michalewski,Igor Mordatch cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Conformal Credal Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 共形信条自我监督学习
comment: 26 pages, 5 figures, 10 tables, to be published at the 12th Symposium on Conformal and Probabilistic Prediction with Applications (COPA 2023)
comments: 26 pages, 5 figures, 10 tables, to be published at the 12th Symposium on Conformal and Probabilistic Prediction with Applications (COPA 2023)
abstract: In semi-supervised learning, the paradigm of self-training refers to the idea of learning from pseudo-labels suggested by the learner itself. Across various domains, corresponding methods have proven effective and achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, pseudo-labels typically stem from ad-hoc heuristics, relying on the quality of the predictions though without guaranteeing their validity. One such method, so-called credal self-supervised learning, maintains pseudo-supervision in the form of sets of (instead of single) probability distributions over labels, thereby allowing for a flexible yet uncertainty-aware labeling. Again, however, there is no justification beyond empirical effectiveness. To address this deficiency, we make use of conformal prediction, an approach that comes with guarantees on the validity of set-valued predictions. As a result, the construction of credal sets of labels is supported by a rigorous theoretical foundation, leading to better calibrated and less error-prone supervision for unlabeled data. Along with this, we present effective algorithms for learning from credal self-supervision. An empirical study demonstrates excellent calibration properties of the pseudo-supervision, as well as the competitiveness of our method on several benchmark datasets.
summary: In semi-supervised learning, the paradigm of self-training refers to the idea of learning from pseudo-labels suggested by the learner itself. Across various domains, corresponding methods have proven effective and achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, pseudo-labels typically stem from ad-hoc heuristics, relying on the quality of the predictions though without guaranteeing their validity. One such method, so-called credal self-supervised learning, maintains pseudo-supervision in the form of sets of (instead of single) probability distributions over labels, thereby allowing for a flexible yet uncertainty-aware labeling. Again, however, there is no justification beyond empirical effectiveness. To address this deficiency, we make use of conformal prediction, an approach that comes with guarantees on the validity of set-valued predictions. As a result, the construction of credal sets of labels is supported by a rigorous theoretical foundation, leading to better calibrated and less error-prone supervision for unlabeled data. Along with this, we present effective algorithms for learning from credal self-supervision. An empirical study demonstrates excellent calibration properties of the pseudo-supervision, as well as the competitiveness of our method on several benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 在半监督学习中，自训练范式是指从学习者本身提出的伪标签中学习的思想。在各个领域，相应的方法已被证明是有效的并实现了最先进的性能。然而，伪标签通常源于临时启发法，依赖于预测的质量，但不保证其有效性。其中一种方法，即所谓的 credal 自监督学习，以标签上的一组（而不是单个）概率分布的形式维持伪监督，从而允许灵活但不确定性感知的标签。然而，除了经验有效性之外，没有任何理由可以证明这一点。为了解决这个缺陷，我们利用保形预测，这是一种保证集值预测有效性的方法。因此，信用标签集的构建得到了严格的理论基础的支持，从而对未标记数据进行更好的校准和更少出错的监督。除此之外，我们还提出了从信任自我监督中学习的有效算法。实证研究证明了伪监督的出色校准特性，以及我们的方法在多个基准数据集上的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于符合预测理论的可信自监督学习方法，通过构建概率分布集来提升半监督学习中伪标签的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法依赖启发式伪标签生成，缺乏理论保证导致校准性和误差控制不足，亟需理论支撑的不确定性建模方法。
AI.method: 结合符合预测理论与credal集框架，通过置信度评分生成带理论保证的标签分布集，并设计对应学习算法实现不确定性感知的自监督学习。
AI.result: 实验显示方法在多个基准数据集上表现出优越的校准性能和竞争力，伪监督机制具有更可靠的误差边界控制能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次将符合预测理论引入credal自监督学习，为半监督学习提供了兼具理论严谨性与实践效果的新型伪标签生成范式。

title: VLUE: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Evaluating Vision-Language Models
title_zh: VLUE：用于评估视觉语言模型的多任务基准
abstract: Recent advances in vision-language pre-training (VLP) have demonstrated impressive performance in a range of vision-language (VL) tasks. However, there exist several challenges for measuring the community's progress in building general multi-modal intelligence. First, most of the downstream VL datasets are annotated using raw images that are already seen during pre-training, which may result in an overestimation of current VLP models' generalization ability. Second, recent VLP work mainly focuses on absolute performance but overlooks the efficiency-performance trade-off, which is also an important indicator for measuring progress. To this end, we introduce the Vision-Language Understanding Evaluation (VLUE) benchmark, a multi-task multi-dimension benchmark for evaluating the generalization capabilities and the efficiency-performance trade-off (``Pareto SOTA'') of VLP models. We demonstrate that there is a sizable generalization gap for all VLP models when testing on out-of-distribution test sets annotated on images from a more diverse distribution that spreads across cultures. Moreover, we find that measuring the efficiency-performance trade-off of VLP models leads to complementary insights for several design choices of VLP. We release the VLUE benchmark to promote research on building vision-language models that generalize well to more diverse images and concepts unseen during pre-training, and are practical in terms of efficiency-performance trade-off.
summary: Recent advances in vision-language pre-training (VLP) have demonstrated impressive performance in a range of vision-language (VL) tasks. However, there exist several challenges for measuring the community's progress in building general multi-modal intelligence. First, most of the downstream VL datasets are annotated using raw images that are already seen during pre-training, which may result in an overestimation of current VLP models' generalization ability. Second, recent VLP work mainly focuses on absolute performance but overlooks the efficiency-performance trade-off, which is also an important indicator for measuring progress. To this end, we introduce the Vision-Language Understanding Evaluation (VLUE) benchmark, a multi-task multi-dimension benchmark for evaluating the generalization capabilities and the efficiency-performance trade-off (``Pareto SOTA'') of VLP models. We demonstrate that there is a sizable generalization gap for all VLP models when testing on out-of-distribution test sets annotated on images from a more diverse distribution that spreads across cultures. Moreover, we find that measuring the efficiency-performance trade-off of VLP models leads to complementary insights for several design choices of VLP. We release the VLUE benchmark to promote research on building vision-language models that generalize well to more diverse images and concepts unseen during pre-training, and are practical in terms of efficiency-performance trade-off.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练（VLP）的最新进展在一系列视觉语言（VL）任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，衡量社区在构建通用多模态智能方面的进展存在一些挑战。首先，大多数下游 VL 数据集都是使用预训练期间已经看到的原始图像进行注释的，这可能会导致对当前 VLP 模型泛化能力的高估。其次，近期的VLP工作主要关注绝对绩效，而忽视了效率与绩效的权衡，而这也是衡量进展的重要指标。为此，我们引入了视觉语言理解评估（VLUE）基准，这是一个多任务多维度基准，用于评估 VLP 模型的泛化能力和效率与性能权衡（“Pareto SOTA”）。我们证明，在对来自跨文化的更多样化分布的图像进行注释的分布外测试集进行测试时，所有 VLP 模型都存在相当大的泛化差距。此外，我们发现衡量 VLP 模型的效率与性能权衡可以为 VLP 的几种设计选择提供补充见解。我们发布 VLUE 基准测试是为了促进构建视觉语言模型的研究，这些模型可以很好地泛化到预训练期间未见过的更多样化的图像和概念，并且在效率与性能权衡方面具有实用性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出VLUE基准测试，用于评估视觉-语言预训练模型（VLP）在多样化数据上的泛化能力和效率-性能权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言任务数据集多使用预训练阶段已见的图像，导致模型泛化能力被高估；同时研究过度关注绝对性能，忽视了效率与性能的平衡。
AI.method: 构建包含跨文化多样化图像的基准测试，设计多任务多维度评估框架，分析模型在分布外数据上的表现及效率-性能帕累托最优解。
AI.result: 发现所有VLP模型在跨文化分布外数据上存在显著泛化差距，且效率-性能权衡分析为模型设计提供了互补性见解。
AI.conclusion: VLUE基准推动了面向多样化未见图像和概念的通用视觉-语言模型研究，并强调了效率与性能平衡的重要性。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文提出VLUE基准测试，用于评估视觉-语言预训练模型（VLP）在多样化数据上的泛化能力和效率-性能权衡。

search_text: VLUE: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Evaluating Vision-Language Models VLUE：用于评估视觉语言模型的多任务基准 Recent advances in vision-language pre-training (VLP) have demonstrated impressive performance in a range of vision-language (VL) tasks. However, there exist several challenges for measuring the community's progress in building general multi-modal intelligence. First, most of the downstream VL datasets are annotated using raw images that are already seen during pre-training, which may result in an overestimation of current VLP models' generalization ability. Second, recent VLP work mainly focuses on absolute performance but overlooks the efficiency-performance trade-off, which is also an important indicator for measuring progress. To this end, we introduce the Vision-Language Understanding Evaluation (VLUE) benchmark, a multi-task multi-dimension benchmark for evaluating the generalization capabilities and the efficiency-performance trade-off (``Pareto SOTA'') of VLP models. We demonstrate that there is a sizable generalization gap for all VLP models when testing on out-of-distribution test sets annotated on images from a more diverse distribution that spreads across cultures. Moreover, we find that measuring the efficiency-performance trade-off of VLP models leads to complementary insights for several design choices of VLP. We release the VLUE benchmark to promote research on building vision-language models that generalize well to more diverse images and concepts unseen during pre-training, and are practical in terms of efficiency-performance trade-off. 视觉语言预训练（VLP）的最新进展在一系列视觉语言（VL）任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，衡量社区在构建通用多模态智能方面的进展存在一些挑战。首先，大多数下游 VL 数据集都是使用预训练期间已经看到的原始图像进行注释的，这可能会导致对当前 VLP 模型泛化能力的高估。其次，近期的VLP工作主要关注绝对绩效，而忽视了效率与绩效的权衡，而这也是衡量进展的重要指标。为此，我们引入了视觉语言理解评估（VLUE）基准，这是一个多任务多维度基准，用于评估 VLP 模型的泛化能力和效率与性能权衡（“Pareto SOTA”）。我们证明，在对来自跨文化的更多样化分布的图像进行注释的分布外测试集进行测试时，所有 VLP 模型都存在相当大的泛化差距。此外，我们发现衡量 VLP 模型的效率与性能权衡可以为 VLP 的几种设计选择提供补充见解。我们发布 VLUE 基准测试是为了促进构建视觉语言模型的研究，这些模型可以很好地泛化到预训练期间未见过的更多样化的图像和概念，并且在效率与性能权衡方面具有实用性。 该论文提出VLUE基准测试，用于评估视觉-语言预训练模型（VLP）在多样化数据上的泛化能力和效率-性能权衡。 Wangchunshu Zhou,Yan Zeng,Shizhe Diao,Xinsong Zhang cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: RankSim: Ranking Similarity Regularization for Deep Imbalanced Regression
title_zh: RankSim：深度不平衡回归的排名相似性正则化
abstract: Data imbalance, in which a plurality of the data samples come from a small proportion of labels, poses a challenge in training deep neural networks. Unlike classification, in regression the labels are continuous, potentially boundless, and form a natural ordering. These distinct features of regression call for new techniques that leverage the additional information encoded in label-space relationships. This paper presents the RankSim (ranking similarity) regularizer for deep imbalanced regression, which encodes an inductive bias that samples that are closer in label space should also be closer in feature space. In contrast to recent distribution smoothing based approaches, RankSim captures both nearby and distant relationships: for a given data sample, RankSim encourages the sorted list of its neighbors in label space to match the sorted list of its neighbors in feature space. RankSim is complementary to conventional imbalanced learning techniques, including re-weighting, two-stage training, and distribution smoothing, and lifts the state-of-the-art performance on three imbalanced regression benchmarks: IMDB-WIKI-DIR, AgeDB-DIR, and STS-B-DIR.
summary: Data imbalance, in which a plurality of the data samples come from a small proportion of labels, poses a challenge in training deep neural networks. Unlike classification, in regression the labels are continuous, potentially boundless, and form a natural ordering. These distinct features of regression call for new techniques that leverage the additional information encoded in label-space relationships. This paper presents the RankSim (ranking similarity) regularizer for deep imbalanced regression, which encodes an inductive bias that samples that are closer in label space should also be closer in feature space. In contrast to recent distribution smoothing based approaches, RankSim captures both nearby and distant relationships: for a given data sample, RankSim encourages the sorted list of its neighbors in label space to match the sorted list of its neighbors in feature space. RankSim is complementary to conventional imbalanced learning techniques, including re-weighting, two-stage training, and distribution smoothing, and lifts the state-of-the-art performance on three imbalanced regression benchmarks: IMDB-WIKI-DIR, AgeDB-DIR, and STS-B-DIR.
abstract_zh: 数据不平衡，即多个数据样本来自一小部分标签，给训练深度神经网络带来了挑战。与分类不同，回归中的标签是连续的、可能是无限的，并且形成自然的排序。回归的这些独特特征需要利用标签空间关系中编码的附加信息的新技术。本文提出了用于深度不平衡回归的 RankSim（排名相似性）正则化器，它编码了一种归纳偏差，即在标签空间中更接近的样本在特征空间中也应该更接近。与最近基于分布平滑的方法相比，RankSim 捕获邻近和遥远的关系：对于给定的数据样本，RankSim 鼓励标签空间中其邻居的排序列表与其特征空间中邻居的排序列表相匹配。 RankSim 是对传统不平衡学习技术的补充，包括重新加权、两阶段训练和分布平滑，并提升了三个不平衡回归基准的最新性能：IMDB-WIKI-DIR、AgeDB-DIR 和 STS-B-DIR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RankSim正则化方法，解决深度不平衡回归问题，通过标签空间与特征空间的排序相似性约束提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 回归任务中标签连续且存在自然排序关系，但现有不平衡学习方法多针对分类任务，难以有效利用标签空间的顺序信息。
AI.method: 设计RankSim正则化项，强制要求标签空间邻近样本在特征空间中也应保持邻近关系，同时兼容重加权、两阶段训练等传统技术。
AI.result: 在IMDB-WIKI-DIR、AgeDB-DIR和STS-B-DIR三个基准数据集上达到当时最先进的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: RankSim通过挖掘标签排序先验信息，为深度不平衡回归提供了有效解决方案，且与现有方法具有良好的兼容性。

title: Few-Shot Adaptation of Pre-Trained Networks for Domain Shift
title_zh: 预训练网络的小样本适应域转移
abstract: Deep networks are prone to performance degradation when there is a domain shift between the source (training) data and target (test) data. Recent test-time adaptation methods update batch normalization layers of pre-trained source models deployed in new target environments with streaming data to mitigate such performance degradation. Although such methods can adapt on-the-fly without first collecting a large target domain dataset, their performance is dependent on streaming conditions such as mini-batch size and class-distribution, which can be unpredictable in practice. In this work, we propose a framework for few-shot domain adaptation to address the practical challenges of data-efficient adaptation. Specifically, we propose a constrained optimization of feature normalization statistics in pre-trained source models supervised by a small support set from the target domain. Our method is easy to implement and improves source model performance with as few as one sample per class for classification tasks. Extensive experiments on 5 cross-domain classification and 4 semantic segmentation datasets show that our method achieves more accurate and reliable performance than test-time adaptation, while not being constrained by streaming conditions.
summary: Deep networks are prone to performance degradation when there is a domain shift between the source (training) data and target (test) data. Recent test-time adaptation methods update batch normalization layers of pre-trained source models deployed in new target environments with streaming data to mitigate such performance degradation. Although such methods can adapt on-the-fly without first collecting a large target domain dataset, their performance is dependent on streaming conditions such as mini-batch size and class-distribution, which can be unpredictable in practice. In this work, we propose a framework for few-shot domain adaptation to address the practical challenges of data-efficient adaptation. Specifically, we propose a constrained optimization of feature normalization statistics in pre-trained source models supervised by a small support set from the target domain. Our method is easy to implement and improves source model performance with as few as one sample per class for classification tasks. Extensive experiments on 5 cross-domain classification and 4 semantic segmentation datasets show that our method achieves more accurate and reliable performance than test-time adaptation, while not being constrained by streaming conditions.
abstract_zh: 当源（训练）数据和目标（测试）数据之间存在域转移时，深度网络很容易出现性能下降。最近的测试时适应方法使用流数据更新部署在新目标环境中的预训练源模型的批量归一化层，以减轻这种性能下降。尽管此类方法可以在不首先收集大型目标域数据集的情况下即时适应，但它们的性能取决于流条件，例如小批量大小和类分布，这在实践中可能是不可预测的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个少镜头域适应的框架，以解决数据高效适应的实际挑战。具体来说，我们提出了在由目标域的小型支持集监督的预训练源模型中对特征归一化统计进行约束优化。我们的方法易于实现，并且在分类任务中每类只需一个样本即可提高源模型性能。对 5 个跨域分类和 4 个语义分割数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法比测试时间自适应实现了更准确、更可靠的性能，同时不受流条件的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种少样本领域适应框架，通过约束优化预训练模型的特征归一化统计量，解决领域迁移时性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法依赖流数据的批量大小和类别分布等条件，实际应用中这些条件难以预测，导致性能不稳定。
AI.method: 利用目标域的小规模支持集监督，对预训练模型的特征归一化统计量进行约束优化，实现数据高效的领域适应。
AI.result: 在5个分类和4个分割数据集上，该方法在准确性和可靠性上优于测试时适应方法，且不受流数据条件限制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的少样本适应框架有效解决了领域迁移中的数据高效适应挑战，适用于实际部署场景。

Specifically, we propose a constrained optimization of feature normalization statistics in pre-trained source models supervised by a small support set from the target domain. Our method is easy to implement and improves source model performance with as few as one sample per class for classification tasks. Extensive experiments on 5 cross-domain classification and 4 semantic segmentation datasets show that our method achieves more accurate and reliable performance than test-time adaptation, while not being constrained by streaming conditions. 当源（训练）数据和目标（测试）数据之间存在域转移时，深度网络很容易出现性能下降。最近的测试时适应方法使用流数据更新部署在新目标环境中的预训练源模型的批量归一化层，以减轻这种性能下降。尽管此类方法可以在不首先收集大型目标域数据集的情况下即时适应，但它们的性能取决于流条件，例如小批量大小和类分布，这在实践中可能是不可预测的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个少镜头域适应的框架，以解决数据高效适应的实际挑战。具体来说，我们提出了在由目标域的小型支持集监督的预训练源模型中对特征归一化统计进行约束优化。我们的方法易于实现，并且在分类任务中每类只需一个样本即可提高源模型性能。对 5 个跨域分类和 4 个语义分割数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法比测试时间自适应实现了更准确、更可靠的性能，同时不受流条件的限制。 本文提出一种少样本领域适应框架，通过约束优化预训练模型的特征归一化统计量，解决领域迁移时性能下降的问题。 Wenyu Zhang,Li Shen,Wanyue Zhang,Chuan-Sheng Foo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Townim Chowdhury,Ali Cheraghian,Sameera Ramasinghe,Sahar Ahmadi,Morteza Saberi,Shafin Rahman
title: Few-shot Class-incremental Learning for 3D Point Cloud Objects
title_zh: 3D 点云对象的少样本类增量学习
abstract: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) aims to incrementally fine-tune a model (trained on base classes) for a novel set of classes using a few examples without forgetting the previous training. Recent efforts address this problem primarily on 2D images. However, due to the advancement of camera technology, 3D point cloud data has become more available than ever, which warrants considering FSCIL on 3D data. This paper addresses FSCIL in the 3D domain. In addition to well-known issues of catastrophic forgetting of past knowledge and overfitting of few-shot data, 3D FSCIL can bring newer challenges. For example, base classes may contain many synthetic instances in a realistic scenario. In contrast, only a few real-scanned samples (from RGBD sensors) of novel classes are available in incremental steps. Due to the data variation from synthetic to real, FSCIL endures additional challenges, degrading performance in later incremental steps. We attempt to solve this problem using Microshapes (orthogonal basis vectors) by describing any 3D objects using a pre-defined set of rules. It supports incremental training with few-shot examples minimizing synthetic to real data variation. We propose new test protocols for 3D FSCIL using popular synthetic datasets (ModelNet and ShapeNet) and 3D real-scanned datasets (ScanObjectNN and CO3D). By comparing state-of-the-art methods, we establish the effectiveness of our approach in the 3D domain.
summary: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) aims to incrementally fine-tune a model (trained on base classes) for a novel set of classes using a few examples without forgetting the previous training. Recent efforts address this problem primarily on 2D images. However, due to the advancement of camera technology, 3D point cloud data has become more available than ever, which warrants considering FSCIL on 3D data. For example, base classes may contain many synthetic instances in a realistic scenario. In contrast, only a few real-scanned samples (from RGBD sensors) of novel classes are available in incremental steps. Due to the data variation from synthetic to real, FSCIL endures additional challenges, degrading performance in later incremental steps. We attempt to solve this problem using Microshapes (orthogonal basis vectors) by describing any 3D objects using a pre-defined set of rules. It supports incremental training with few-shot examples minimizing synthetic to real data variation. We propose new test protocols for 3D FSCIL using popular synthetic datasets (ModelNet and ShapeNet) and 3D real-scanned datasets (ScanObjectNN and CO3D). By comparing state-of-the-art methods, we establish the effectiveness of our approach in the 3D domain.
abstract_zh: 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）旨在使用一些示例逐步微调一组新颖的类的模型（在基类上训练），而不会忘记之前的训练。最近的努力主要在 2D 图像上解决这个问题。然而，由于相机技术的进步，3D 点云数据变得比以往任何时候都更容易获得，这值得考虑在 3D 数据上使用 FSCIL。本文讨论 3D 域中的 FSCIL。除了众所周知的过去知识的灾难性遗忘和少数样本数据的过度拟合问题之外，3D FSCIL 还可以带来新的挑战。例如，在现实场景中，基类可能包含许多合成实例。相比之下，增量步骤中只有少数新类别的实际扫描样本（来自 RGBD 传感器）可用。由于合成数据与真实数据之间存在差异，FSCIL 面临着额外的挑战，从而降低了后续增量步骤中的性能。我们尝试使用微形状（正交基向量）通过使用一组预定义的规则描述任何 3D 对象来解决这个问题。它支持通过少量样本进行增量训练，最大限度地减少合成数据与真实数据的变化。我们使用流行的合成数据集（ModelNet 和 ShapeNet）和 3D 真实扫描数据集（ScanObjectNN 和 CO3D）提出 3D FSCIL 的新测试协议。通过比较最先进的方法，我们确定了我们的方法在 3D 领域的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了3D点云对象的少样本类别增量学习（FSCIL）问题，旨在解决在增量学习过程中模型遗忘旧知识和新类过拟合的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着3D点云数据的普及，现有针对2D图像的FSCIL方法难以处理合成数据与真实扫描数据之间的差异，导致增量学习性能下降。
AI.method: 提出基于Microshapes（正交基向量）的方法，通过预定义规则描述3D对象以减少数据差异，并设计新的测试协议结合合成数据集（ModelNet、ShapeNet）和真实数据集（ScanObjectNN、CO3D）进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在3D FSCIL任务中优于现有方法，有效缓解了合成与真实数据间的性能退化问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的Microshapes方法为3D点云的少样本增量学习提供了有效解决方案，验证了其在处理数据差异和保持模型性能方面的优势。

authors_text: Rolandos Alexandros Potamias,Alexandros Neofytou,Kyriaki-Margarita Bintsi,Stefanos Zafeiriou
title: GraphWalks: Efficient Shape Agnostic Geodesic Shortest Path Estimation
title_zh: GraphWalks：高效的形状不可知测地线最短路径估计
abstract: Geodesic paths and distances are among the most popular intrinsic properties of 3D surfaces. Traditionally, geodesic paths on discrete polygon surfaces were computed using shortest path algorithms, such as Dijkstra. However, such algorithms have two major limitations. They are non-differentiable which limits their direct usage in learnable pipelines and they are considerably time demanding. To address such limitations and alleviate the computational burden, we propose a learnable network to approximate geodesic paths. The proposed method is comprised by three major components: a graph neural network that encodes node positions in a high dimensional space, a path embedding that describes previously visited nodes and a point classifier that selects the next point in the path. The proposed method provides efficient approximations of the shortest paths and geodesic distances estimations. Given that all of the components of our method are fully differentiable, it can be directly plugged into any learnable pipeline as well as customized under any differentiable constraint. We extensively evaluate the proposed method with several qualitative and quantitative experiments.
summary: Geodesic paths and distances are among the most popular intrinsic properties of 3D surfaces. Traditionally, geodesic paths on discrete polygon surfaces were computed using shortest path algorithms, such as Dijkstra. However, such algorithms have two major limitations. They are non-differentiable which limits their direct usage in learnable pipelines and they are considerably time demanding. To address such limitations and alleviate the computational burden, we propose a learnable network to approximate geodesic paths. The proposed method is comprised by three major components: a graph neural network that encodes node positions in a high dimensional space, a path embedding that describes previously visited nodes and a point classifier that selects the next point in the path. The proposed method provides efficient approximations of the shortest paths and geodesic distances estimations. Given that all of the components of our method are fully differentiable, it can be directly plugged into any learnable pipeline as well as customized under any differentiable constraint. We extensively evaluate the proposed method with several qualitative and quantitative experiments.
abstract_zh: 测地线路径和距离是 3D 表面最流行的固有属性之一。传统上，离散多边形表面上的测地路径是使用最短路径算法（例如 Dijkstra）计算的。然而，此类算法有两个主要局限性。它们是不可微分的，这限制了它们在可学习管道中的直接使用，并且它们需要相当多的时间。为了解决这些限制并减轻计算负担，我们提出了一种可学习的网络来近似测地线路径。所提出的方法由三个主要组件组成：对高维空间中的节点位置进行编码的图神经网络、描述先前访问过的节点的路径嵌入以及选择路径中下一个点的点分类器。所提出的方法提供了最短路径和测地距离估计的有效近似。鉴于我们方法的所有组件都是完全可微的，它可以直接插入任何可学习的管道中，也可以在任何可微的约束下进行定制。我们通过几次定性和定量实验对所提出的方法进行了广泛的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GraphWalks的可学习网络，用于高效估计3D表面的测地最短路径，克服传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统测地路径计算方法（如Dijkstra算法）存在非微分性和计算耗时两大缺陷，限制了其在可学习流程中的应用。
AI.method: 方法包含三个核心组件：图神经网络编码节点位置、路径嵌入描述已访问节点、点分类器选择路径下一步节点，所有组件均为全微分结构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能高效近似最短路径和测地距离，且可无缝集成到任意可学习流程中并适配微分约束。
AI.conclusion: GraphWalks通过端到端可微框架实现了测地路径估计的高效性与灵活性，为几何处理任务提供了新思路。

title: The Devil is in the Pose: Ambiguity-free 3D Rotation-invariant Learning via Pose-aware Convolution
title_zh: 魔鬼就在姿势中：通过姿势感知卷积进行无歧义 3D 旋转不变学习
abstract: Rotation-invariant (RI) 3D deep learning methods suffer performance degradation as they typically design RI representations as input that lose critical global information comparing to 3D coordinates. Most state-of-the-arts address it by incurring additional blocks or complex global representations in a heavy and ineffective manner. In this paper, we reveal that the global information loss stems from an unexplored pose information loss problem, which can be solved more efficiently and effectively as we only need to restore more lightweight local pose in each layer, and the global information can be hierarchically aggregated in the deep networks without extra efforts. To address this problem, we develop a Pose-aware Rotation Invariant Convolution (i.e., PaRI-Conv), which dynamically adapts its kernels based on the relative poses. To implement it, we propose an Augmented Point Pair Feature (APPF) to fully encode the RI relative pose information, and a factorized dynamic kernel for pose-aware kernel generation, which can further reduce the computational cost and memory burden by decomposing the kernel into a shared basis matrix and a pose-aware diagonal matrix. Extensive experiments on shape classification and part segmentation tasks show that our PaRI-Conv surpasses the state-of-the-art RI methods while being more compact and efficient.
summary: Rotation-invariant (RI) 3D deep learning methods suffer performance degradation as they typically design RI representations as input that lose critical global information comparing to 3D coordinates. Most state-of-the-arts address it by incurring additional blocks or complex global representations in a heavy and ineffective manner. In this paper, we reveal that the global information loss stems from an unexplored pose information loss problem, which can be solved more efficiently and effectively as we only need to restore more lightweight local pose in each layer, and the global information can be hierarchically aggregated in the deep networks without extra efforts. To address this problem, we develop a Pose-aware Rotation Invariant Convolution (i.e., PaRI-Conv), which dynamically adapts its kernels based on the relative poses. To implement it, we propose an Augmented Point Pair Feature (APPF) to fully encode the RI relative pose information, and a factorized dynamic kernel for pose-aware kernel generation, which can further reduce the computational cost and memory burden by decomposing the kernel into a shared basis matrix and a pose-aware diagonal matrix. Extensive experiments on shape classification and part segmentation tasks show that our PaRI-Conv surpasses the state-of-the-art RI methods while being more compact and efficient.
abstract_zh: 旋转不变 (RI) 3D 深度学习方法的性能会下降，因为它们通常将 RI 表示设计为输入，与 3D 坐标相比会丢失关键的全局信息。大多数最先进的技术通过以繁重且无效的方式引入额外的块或复杂的全局表示来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们揭示了全局信息丢失源于一个未探索的姿势信息丢失问题，该问题可以更有效地解决，因为我们只需要在每一层中恢复更轻量级的局部姿势，并且全局信息可以在深层网络中分层聚合，而无需额外的努力。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种姿势感知旋转不变卷积（即 PaRI-Conv），它根据相对姿势动态调整其内核。为了实现它，我们提出了一个增强点对特征（APPF）来完全编码RI相对姿态信息，以及一个用于姿态感知内核生成的分解动态内核，它可以通过将内核分解为共享基础矩阵和姿态感知对角矩阵来进一步减少计算成本和内存负担。关于形状分类和零件分割任务的大量实验表明，我们的 PaRI-Conv 超越了最先进的 RI 方法，同时更加紧凑和高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于姿态感知卷积的3D旋转不变学习方法，以解决现有方法因丢失全局信息而导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有旋转不变3D学习方法通过设计RI表示丢失了关键全局信息，而现有解决方案通过增加复杂模块效率低下，需更高效地恢复局部姿态信息并分层聚合全局信息。
AI.method: 开发了PaRI-Conv，通过Augmented Point Pair Feature编码相对姿态信息，并采用分解动态内核（共享基矩阵+姿态感知对角矩阵）降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在形状分类和部分分割任务中，PaRI-Conv优于现有RI方法，且更紧凑高效。
AI.conclusion: 通过姿态感知卷积有效解决姿态信息丢失问题，实现了高效且性能优越的3D旋转不变学习。
