search_text: The Devil is in the Pose: Ambiguity-free 3D Rotation-invariant Learning via Pose-aware Convolution 魔鬼就在姿势中：通过姿势感知卷积进行无歧义 3D 旋转不变学习 Rotation-invariant (RI) 3D deep learning methods suffer performance degradation as they typically design RI representations as input that lose critical global information comparing to 3D coordinates. Most state-of-the-arts address it by incurring additional blocks or complex global representations in a heavy and ineffective manner. In this paper, we reveal that the global information loss stems from an unexplored pose information loss problem, which can be solved more efficiently and effectively as we only need to restore more lightweight local pose in each layer, and the global information can be hierarchically aggregated in the deep networks without extra efforts. To address this problem, we develop a Pose-aware Rotation Invariant Convolution (i.e., PaRI-Conv), which dynamically adapts its kernels based on the relative poses. To implement it, we propose an Augmented Point Pair Feature (APPF) to fully encode the RI relative pose information, and a factorized dynamic kernel for pose-aware kernel generation, which can further reduce the computational cost and memory burden by decomposing the kernel into a shared basis matrix and a pose-aware diagonal matrix. Extensive experiments on shape classification and part segmentation tasks show that our PaRI-Conv surpasses the state-of-the-art RI methods while being more compact and efficient. 旋转不变 (RI) 3D 深度学习方法的性能会下降，因为它们通常将 RI 表示设计为输入，与 3D 坐标相比会丢失关键的全局信息。大多数最先进的技术通过以繁重且无效的方式引入额外的块或复杂的全局表示来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们揭示了全局信息丢失源于一个未探索的姿势信息丢失问题，该问题可以更有效地解决，因为我们只需要在每一层中恢复更轻量级的局部姿势，并且全局信息可以在深层网络中分层聚合，而无需额外的努力。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种姿势感知旋转不变卷积（即 PaRI-Conv），它根据相对姿势动态调整其内核。为了实现它，我们提出了一个增强点对特征（APPF）来完全编码RI相对姿态信息，以及一个用于姿态感知内核生成的分解动态内核，它可以通过将内核分解为共享基础矩阵和姿态感知对角矩阵来进一步减少计算成本和内存负担。关于形状分类和零件分割任务的大量实验表明，我们的 PaRI-Conv 超越了最先进的 RI 方法，同时更加紧凑和高效。 本文提出了一种基于姿态感知卷积的3D旋转不变学习方法，以解决现有方法因丢失全局信息而导致的性能下降问题。 Ronghan Chen,Yang Cong cs.CV

title: Controller design and experimental evaluation of a motorised assistance for a patient transfer floor lift
title_zh: 患者转运楼层升降机机动辅助装置的控制器设计和实验评估
abstract: Patient transfer is a challenging, critical task because it exposes caregivers to injury risks. Available transfer devices, like floor lifts, lead to improvements but are far from perfect. They do not eliminate the caregivers risk of musculoskeletal disorders, and they can be burdensome to use due to their poor maneuverability. This paper presents a new motorized floor lift with a single central motorized wheel connected to an instrumented handle. Admittance controllers are designed to 1) improve the device maneuverability, 2) reduce the required caregiver effort, and 3) ensure the security and comfort of patients. Two controller designs, one with a linear admittance law and a non-linear admittance law with variable damping, were developed and implemented on a prototype. Tests were performed on seven participants to evaluate the performance of the assistance system and the controllers. The experimental results show that 1) the motorized assistance with the variable damping controller improves maneuverability by 28%, 2) reduces the amount of effort required to push the lift by 66% and 3) provides the same level of patient comfort compared to a standard unassisted floor lift.
summary: Patient transfer is a challenging, critical task because it exposes caregivers to injury risks. Available transfer devices, like floor lifts, lead to improvements but are far from perfect. They do not eliminate the caregivers risk of musculoskeletal disorders, and they can be burdensome to use due to their poor maneuverability. This paper presents a new motorized floor lift with a single central motorized wheel connected to an instrumented handle. Admittance controllers are designed to 1) improve the device maneuverability, 2) reduce the required caregiver effort, and 3) ensure the security and comfort of patients. Two controller designs, one with a linear admittance law and a non-linear admittance law with variable damping, were developed and implemented on a prototype. Tests were performed on seven participants to evaluate the performance of the assistance system and the controllers. The experimental results show that 1) the motorized assistance with the variable damping controller improves maneuverability by 28%, 2) reduces the amount of effort required to push the lift by 66% and 3) provides the same level of patient comfort compared to a standard unassisted floor lift.
abstract_zh: 患者转移是一项具有挑战性的关键任务，因为它使护理人员面临受伤风险。现有的转运设备（例如楼层升降机）虽然有所改进，但还远非完美。它们并不能消除护理人员患肌肉骨骼疾病的风险，而且由于其可操作性差，使用起来可能很麻烦。本文提出了一种新型电动楼层升降机，其单个中央电动轮连接到仪表手柄。准入控制器的设计目的是：1) 提高设备的可操作性，2) 减少护理人员所需的工作量，3) 确保患者的安全和舒适。开发了两种控制器设计并在原型上实现，其中一种采用线性导纳定律，另一种采用可变阻尼的非线性导纳定律。对七名参与者进行了测试，以评估辅助系统和控制器的性能。实验结果表明，1) 带有可变阻尼控制器的电动辅助装置将可操作性提高了 28%，2) 推动升降机所需的力气减少了 66%，3) 与标准无辅助楼层升降机相比，提供了相同水平的患者舒适度。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种新型电动地板升降机，通过引入阻尼可变的非线性阻抗控制器，旨在提升设备的操控性、降低护理人员体力负担并确保患者舒适度。
AI.motivation: 现有地板升降机仍存在操作笨拙、无法完全避免护理人员肌肉骨骼损伤的问题，需改进设备以降低风险并提升使用效率。
AI.method: 开发了两种阻抗控制器（线性与非线性可变阻尼），通过原型机实验测试7名参与者的操作表现，对比分析操控性、用力需求及患者舒适度数据。
AI.result: 非线性可变阻尼控制器使操控性提升28%，推力需求降低66%，患者舒适度与传统升降机相当。
AI.conclusion: 该控制器设计有效平衡了设备操控性、护理人员负荷与患者安全，为医疗辅助设备优化提供了可行方案。

title: STN: Scalable Tensorizing Networks via Structure-Aware Training and Adaptive Compression
title_zh: STN：通过结构感知训练和自适应压缩的可扩展张量化网络
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have delivered a remarkable performance in many tasks of computer vision. However, over-parameterized representations of popular architectures dramatically increase their computational complexity and storage costs, and hinder their availability in edge devices with constrained resources. Regardless of many tensor decomposition (TD) methods that have been well-studied for compressing DNNs to learn compact representations, they suffer from non-negligible performance degradation in practice. In this paper, we propose Scalable Tensorizing Networks (STN), which dynamically and adaptively adjust the model size and decomposition structure without retraining. First, we account for compression during training by adding a low-rank regularizer to guarantee networks' desired low-rank characteristics in full tensor format. Then, considering network layers exhibit various low-rank structures, STN is obtained by a data-driven adaptive TD approach, for which the topological structure of decomposition per layer is learned from the pre-trained model, and the ranks are selected appropriately under specified storage constraints. As a result, STN is compatible with arbitrary network architectures and achieves higher compression performance and flexibility over other tensorizing versions. Comprehensive experiments on several popular architectures and benchmarks substantiate the superiority of our model towards improving parameter efficiency.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have delivered a remarkable performance in many tasks of computer vision. However, over-parameterized representations of popular architectures dramatically increase their computational complexity and storage costs, and hinder their availability in edge devices with constrained resources. Regardless of many tensor decomposition (TD) methods that have been well-studied for compressing DNNs to learn compact representations, they suffer from non-negligible performance degradation in practice. In this paper, we propose Scalable Tensorizing Networks (STN), which dynamically and adaptively adjust the model size and decomposition structure without retraining. First, we account for compression during training by adding a low-rank regularizer to guarantee networks' desired low-rank characteristics in full tensor format. Then, considering network layers exhibit various low-rank structures, STN is obtained by a data-driven adaptive TD approach, for which the topological structure of decomposition per layer is learned from the pre-trained model, and the ranks are selected appropriately under specified storage constraints. As a result, STN is compatible with arbitrary network architectures and achieves higher compression performance and flexibility over other tensorizing versions. Comprehensive experiments on several popular architectures and benchmarks substantiate the superiority of our model towards improving parameter efficiency.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在计算机视觉的许多任务中表现出色。然而，流行架构的过度参数化表示极大地增加了其计算复杂性和存储成本，并阻碍了它们在资源有限的边缘设备中的可用性。尽管许多张量分解 (TD) 方法已经被充分研究用于压缩 DNN 以学习紧凑表示，但它们在实践中都遭受了不可忽视的性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了可扩展张量网络（STN），它可以动态自适应地调整模型大小和分解结构，而无需重新训练。首先，我们通过添加低秩正则化器来考虑训练期间的压缩，以保证网络在全张量格式中所需的低秩特性。然后，考虑到网络层表现出各种低秩结构，通过数据驱动的自适应TD方法获得STN，从预训练的模型中学习每层分解的拓扑结构，并在指定的存储约束下适当选择秩。因此，STN 与任意网络架构兼容，并比其他张量化版本实现更高的压缩性能和灵活性。对几种流行架构和基准的综合实验证实了我们的模型在提高参数效率方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STN的可扩展张量化网络方法，通过结构感知训练和自适应压缩动态调整模型规模和分解结构，以提高深度神经网络的参数效率。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（DNN）在边缘设备上因计算复杂度和存储成本过高而难以部署，现有张量分解方法在压缩时会导致性能显著下降。
AI.method: STN在训练中引入低秩正则化以保证网络的低秩特性，并采用数据驱动的自适应张量分解方法，根据预训练模型学习每层的分解拓扑结构，同时在存储约束下选择合适秩数。
AI.result: STN在多种主流网络架构和基准测试中表现出更高的压缩性能和灵活性，验证了其在参数效率提升上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: STN通过动态调整模型结构和自适应压缩策略，有效解决了DNN压缩中的性能下降问题，适用于任意网络架构并实现高效参数利用。

search_text: STN: Scalable Tensorizing Networks via Structure-Aware Training and Adaptive Compression STN：通过结构感知训练和自适应压缩的可扩展张量化网络 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have delivered a remarkable performance in many tasks of computer vision. However, over-parameterized representations of popular architectures dramatically increase their computational complexity and storage costs, and hinder their availability in edge devices with constrained resources. Regardless of many tensor decomposition (TD) methods that have been well-studied for compressing DNNs to learn compact representations, they suffer from non-negligible performance degradation in practice. In this paper, we propose Scalable Tensorizing Networks (STN), which dynamically and adaptively adjust the model size and decomposition structure without retraining. First, we account for compression during training by adding a low-rank regularizer to guarantee networks' desired low-rank characteristics in full tensor format. Then, considering network layers exhibit various low-rank structures, STN is obtained by a data-driven adaptive TD approach, for which the topological structure of decomposition per layer is learned from the pre-trained model, and the ranks are selected appropriately under specified storage constraints. As a result, STN is compatible with arbitrary network architectures and achieves higher compression performance and flexibility over other tensorizing versions. Comprehensive experiments on several popular architectures and benchmarks substantiate the superiority of our model towards improving parameter efficiency. 深度神经网络（DNN）在计算机视觉的许多任务中表现出色。然而，流行架构的过度参数化表示极大地增加了其计算复杂性和存储成本，并阻碍了它们在资源有限的边缘设备中的可用性。尽管许多张量分解 (TD) 方法已经被充分研究用于压缩 DNN 以学习紧凑表示，但它们在实践中都遭受了不可忽视的性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了可扩展张量网络（STN），它可以动态自适应地调整模型大小和分解结构，而无需重新训练。首先，我们通过添加低秩正则化器来考虑训练期间的压缩，以保证网络在全张量格式中所需的低秩特性。然后，考虑到网络层表现出各种低秩结构，通过数据驱动的自适应TD方法获得STN，从预训练的模型中学习每层分解的拓扑结构，并在指定的存储约束下适当选择秩。因此，STN 与任意网络架构兼容，并比其他张量化版本实现更高的压缩性能和灵活性。对几种流行架构和基准的综合实验证实了我们的模型在提高参数效率方面的优越性。 本文提出了一种名为STN的可扩展张量化网络方法，通过结构感知训练和自适应压缩动态调整模型规模和分解结构，以提高深度神经网络的参数效率。 Chang Nie,Huan Wang,Lu Zhao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Shimin Zhang,Ziteng Wang,Yukai Ju,Yihui Fu,Yueyue Na,Qiang Fu,Lei Xie
title: Personalized Acoustic Echo Cancellation for Full-duplex Communications
title_zh: 用于全双工通信的个性化声学回声消除
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have shown promising results for acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). But the DNN-based AEC models let through all near-end speakers including the interfering speech. In light of recent studies on personalized speech enhancement, we investigate the feasibility of personalized acoustic echo cancellation (PAEC) in this paper for full-duplex communications, where background noise and interfering speakers may coexist with acoustic echoes. Specifically, we first propose a novel backbone neural network termed as gated temporal convolutional neural network (GTCNN) that outperforms state-of-the-art AEC models in performance. Speaker embeddings like d-vectors are further adopted as auxiliary information to guide the GTCNN to focus on the target speaker. A special case in PAEC is that speech snippets of both parties on the call are enrolled. Experimental results show that auxiliary information from either the near-end speaker or the far-end speaker can improve the DNN-based AEC performance. Nevertheless, there is still much room for improvement in the utilization of the finite-dimensional speaker embeddings.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have shown promising results for acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). But the DNN-based AEC models let through all near-end speakers including the interfering speech. In light of recent studies on personalized speech enhancement, we investigate the feasibility of personalized acoustic echo cancellation (PAEC) in this paper for full-duplex communications, where background noise and interfering speakers may coexist with acoustic echoes. Specifically, we first propose a novel backbone neural network termed as gated temporal convolutional neural network (GTCNN) that outperforms state-of-the-art AEC models in performance. Speaker embeddings like d-vectors are further adopted as auxiliary information to guide the GTCNN to focus on the target speaker. A special case in PAEC is that speech snippets of both parties on the call are enrolled. Experimental results show that auxiliary information from either the near-end speaker or the far-end speaker can improve the DNN-based AEC performance. Nevertheless, there is still much room for improvement in the utilization of the finite-dimensional speaker embeddings.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在声学回声消除 (AEC) 方面显示出有希望的结果。但基于 DNN 的 AEC 模型可以让所有近端说话者通过，包括干扰语音。根据最近关于个性化语音增强的研究，我们在本文中研究了个性化声学回声消除（PAEC）在全双工通信中的可行性，其中背景噪声和干扰扬声器可能与声学回声共存。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种新型骨干神经网络，称为门控时间卷积神经网络（GTCNN），其性能优于最先进的 AEC 模型。进一步采用 d 向量等说话人嵌入作为辅助信息来引导 GTCNN 聚焦于目标说话人。 PAEC 的一个特殊情况是通话双方的语音片段都会被记录。实验结果表明，来自近端说话者或远端说话者的辅助信息都可以提高基于 DNN 的 AEC 性能。尽管如此，有限维说话人嵌入的利用仍有很大的改进空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于门控时序卷积神经网络（GTCNN）和说话人嵌入的个性化声学回声消除（PAEC）方法，用于全双工通信中的回声消除与干扰抑制。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络（DNN）声学回声消除模型无法有效抑制近端干扰语音，而个性化语音增强技术启发了利用说话人信息提升AEC性能的研究。
AI.method: 设计GTCNN作为主干网络，并引入d-vector等说话人嵌入作为辅助信息，引导网络聚焦目标说话人；通过双向语音片段注册实现个性化消除。
AI.result: 实验表明近端或远端说话人辅助信息均能提升AEC性能，但有限维度的说话人嵌入利用仍有改进空间。
AI.conclusion: PAEC框架在全双工场景下有效，但需进一步优化说话人嵌入信息的表征与利用方式以提升性能。

search_text: Personalized Acoustic Echo Cancellation for Full-duplex Communications 用于全双工通信的个性化声学回声消除 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have shown promising results for acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). But the DNN-based AEC models let through all near-end speakers including the interfering speech. In light of recent studies on personalized speech enhancement, we investigate the feasibility of personalized acoustic echo cancellation (PAEC) in this paper for full-duplex communications, where background noise and interfering speakers may coexist with acoustic echoes. Specifically, we first propose a novel backbone neural network termed as gated temporal convolutional neural network (GTCNN) that outperforms state-of-the-art AEC models in performance. Speaker embeddings like d-vectors are further adopted as auxiliary information to guide the GTCNN to focus on the target speaker. A special case in PAEC is that speech snippets of both parties on the call are enrolled. Experimental results show that auxiliary information from either the near-end speaker or the far-end speaker can improve the DNN-based AEC performance. Nevertheless, there is still much room for improvement in the utilization of the finite-dimensional speaker embeddings. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在声学回声消除 (AEC) 方面显示出有希望的结果。但基于 DNN 的 AEC 模型可以让所有近端说话者通过，包括干扰语音。根据最近关于个性化语音增强的研究，我们在本文中研究了个性化声学回声消除（PAEC）在全双工通信中的可行性，其中背景噪声和干扰扬声器可能与声学回声共存。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种新型骨干神经网络，称为门控时间卷积神经网络（GTCNN），其性能优于最先进的 AEC 模型。进一步采用 d 向量等说话人嵌入作为辅助信息来引导 GTCNN 聚焦于目标说话人。 PAEC 的一个特殊情况是通话双方的语音片段都会被记录。实验结果表明，来自近端说话者或远端说话者的辅助信息都可以提高基于 DNN 的 AEC 性能。尽管如此，有限维说话人嵌入的利用仍有很大的改进空间。 本文提出了一种基于门控时序卷积神经网络（GTCNN）和说话人嵌入的个性化声学回声消除（PAEC）方法，用于全双工通信中的回声消除与干扰抑制。 Shimin Zhang,Ziteng Wang,Yukai Ju,Yihui Fu,Yueyue Na,Qiang Fu,Lei Xie cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Piyush Udhan,Akhilesh Ganeshkar,Poobigan Murugesan,Abhishek Raj Permani,Sameep Sanjeeva,Parth Deshpande
title: Vehicle Route Planning using Dynamically Weighted Dijkstra's Algorithm with Traffic Prediction
title_zh: 使用动态加权 Dijkstra 算法和交通预测进行车辆路线规划
abstract: Traditional vehicle routing algorithms do not consider the changing nature of traffic. While implementations of Dijkstra's algorithm with varying weights exist, the weights are often changed after the outcome of algorithm is executed, which may not always result in the optimal route being chosen. Hence, this paper proposes a novel vehicle routing algorithm that improves upon Dijkstra's algorithm using a traffic prediction model based on the traffic flow in a road network. Here, Dijkstra's algorithm is adapted to be dynamic and time dependent using traffic flow theory principles during the planning stage itself. The model provides predicted traffic parameters and travel time across each edge of the road network at every time instant, leading to better routing results. The dynamic algorithm proposed here predicts changes in traffic conditions at each time step of planning to give the optimal forward-looking path. The proposed algorithm is verified by comparing it with conventional Dijkstra's algorithm on a graph with randomly simulated traffic, and is shown to predict the optimal route better with continuously changing traffic.
summary: Traditional vehicle routing algorithms do not consider the changing nature of traffic. While implementations of Dijkstra's algorithm with varying weights exist, the weights are often changed after the outcome of algorithm is executed, which may not always result in the optimal route being chosen. Hence, this paper proposes a novel vehicle routing algorithm that improves upon Dijkstra's algorithm using a traffic prediction model based on the traffic flow in a road network. Here, Dijkstra's algorithm is adapted to be dynamic and time dependent using traffic flow theory principles during the planning stage itself. The model provides predicted traffic parameters and travel time across each edge of the road network at every time instant, leading to better routing results. The dynamic algorithm proposed here predicts changes in traffic conditions at each time step of planning to give the optimal forward-looking path. The proposed algorithm is verified by comparing it with conventional Dijkstra's algorithm on a graph with randomly simulated traffic, and is shown to predict the optimal route better with continuously changing traffic.
abstract_zh: 传统的车辆路径算法没有考虑交通变化的性质。虽然存在具有不同权重的 Dijkstra 算法的实现，但权重经常在算法结果执行后发生变化，这可能并不总是导致选择最佳路线。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的车辆路径算法，该算法使用基于道路网络中交通流的交通预测模型来改进 Dijkstra 算法。在这里，Dijkstra 算法在规划阶段本身使用交通流理论原理来适应动态和时间依赖性。该模型提供了每个时刻的预测交通参数和穿过道路网络每个边缘的旅行时间，从而获得更好的路线结果。这里提出的动态算法可以预测规划的每个时间步长的交通状况的变化，以给出最佳的前瞻路径。通过在随机模拟交通图上将其与传统 Dijkstra 算法进行比较来验证所提出的算法，并且证明该算法可以在交通量不断变化的情况下更好地预测最佳路线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的动态Dijkstra算法，结合交通预测模型实现更优的车辆路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划算法未考虑交通动态变化，现有加权Dijkstra算法在执行后调整权重，难以实时适应交通波动。
AI.method: 在规划阶段引入交通预测模型，基于交通流理论动态计算道路网络各边的实时交通参数与旅行时间权重。
AI.result: 在随机模拟交通环境中，该算法相比传统Dijkstra算法能更准确预测持续变化交通下的最优路径。
AI.conclusion: 动态加权Dijkstra算法通过实时交通预测有效提升路径规划的适应性与准确性。

motivation: 传统路径规划算法未考虑交通动态变化，现有加权Dijkstra算法在执行后调整权重，难以实时适应交通波动。
method: 在规划阶段引入交通预测模型，基于交通流理论动态计算道路网络各边的实时交通参数与旅行时间权重。
result: 在随机模拟交通环境中，该算法相比传统Dijkstra算法能更准确预测持续变化交通下的最优路径。
conclusion: 动态加权Dijkstra算法通过实时交通预测有效提升路径规划的适应性与准确性。
search_text: Vehicle Route Planning using Dynamically Weighted Dijkstra's Algorithm with Traffic Prediction 使用动态加权 Dijkstra 算法和交通预测进行车辆路线规划 Traditional vehicle routing algorithms do not consider the changing nature of traffic. While implementations of Dijkstra's algorithm with varying weights exist, the weights are often changed after the outcome of algorithm is executed, which may not always result in the optimal route being chosen. Hence, this paper proposes a novel vehicle routing algorithm that improves upon Dijkstra's algorithm using a traffic prediction model based on the traffic flow in a road network. Here, Dijkstra's algorithm is adapted to be dynamic and time dependent using traffic flow theory principles during the planning stage itself. The model provides predicted traffic parameters and travel time across each edge of the road network at every time instant, leading to better routing results. The dynamic algorithm proposed here predicts changes in traffic conditions at each time step of planning to give the optimal forward-looking path. The proposed algorithm is verified by comparing it with conventional Dijkstra's algorithm on a graph with randomly simulated traffic, and is shown to predict the optimal route better with continuously changing traffic. 传统的车辆路径算法没有考虑交通变化的性质。虽然存在具有不同权重的 Dijkstra 算法的实现，但权重经常在算法结果执行后发生变化，这可能并不总是导致选择最佳路线。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的车辆路径算法，该算法使用基于道路网络中交通流的交通预测模型来改进 Dijkstra 算法。在这里，Dijkstra 算法在规划阶段本身使用交通流理论原理来适应动态和时间依赖性。该模型提供了每个时刻的预测交通参数和穿过道路网络每个边缘的旅行时间，从而获得更好的路线结果。这里提出的动态算法可以预测规划的每个时间步长的交通状况的变化，以给出最佳的前瞻路径。通过在随机模拟交通图上将其与传统 Dijkstra 算法进行比较来验证所提出的算法，并且证明该算法可以在交通量不断变化的情况下更好地预测最佳路线。 本文提出一种改进的动态Dijkstra算法，结合交通预测模型实现更优的车辆路径规划。 Piyush Udhan,Akhilesh Ganeshkar,Poobigan Murugesan,Abhishek Raj Permani,Sameep Sanjeeva,Parth Deshpande math.OC,cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Experimental investigation of a maneuver selection algorithm for vehicles in low adhesion conditions
title_zh: 低附着力条件下车辆机动选择算法的实验研究
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles ( Volume: 7, Issue: 3, September 2022)
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles ( Volume: 7, Issue: 3, September 2022)
abstract: Winter conditions, characterized by the presence of ice and snow on the ground, are more likely to lead to road accidents. This paper presents an experimental proof of concept, with a 1/5th scale car platform, of a maneuver selection scheme for low adhesion conditions. In the proposed approach, a model-based estimator first processes the high-dimensional sensors data of the IMU, LIDAR and encoders to estimate physically relevant vehicle and ground conditions parameters such as the inertial velocity of the vehicle $v$, the friction coefficient $μ$, the cohesion $c$ and the internal shear angle $φ$. Then, a data-driven predictor is trained to predict the optimal maneuver to perform in the situation characterized by the estimated parameters. Experimental results show that it is possible to 1) produce a real-time estimate of the relevant ground parameters, and 2) determine an optimal maneuver based on the estimated parameters between a limited set of maneuvers.
summary: Winter conditions, characterized by the presence of ice and snow on the ground, are more likely to lead to road accidents. This paper presents an experimental proof of concept, with a 1/5th scale car platform, of a maneuver selection scheme for low adhesion conditions. In the proposed approach, a model-based estimator first processes the high-dimensional sensors data of the IMU, LIDAR and encoders to estimate physically relevant vehicle and ground conditions parameters such as the inertial velocity of the vehicle $v$, the friction coefficient $μ$, the cohesion $c$ and the internal shear angle $φ$. Then, a data-driven predictor is trained to predict the optimal maneuver to perform in the situation characterized by the estimated parameters. Experimental results show that it is possible to 1) produce a real-time estimate of the relevant ground parameters, and 2) determine an optimal maneuver based on the estimated parameters between a limited set of maneuvers.
abstract_zh: 冬季，地面有冰雪，更容易导致交通事故。本文利用 1/5 比例的汽车平台，对低附着力条件下的机动选择方案进行了概念实验验证。在所提出的方法中，基于模型的估计器首先处理 IMU、LIDAR 和编码器的高维传感器数据，以估计物理相关的车辆和地面条件参数，例如车辆惯性速度 $v$、摩擦系数 $μ$、内聚力 $c$ 和内剪切角 $φ$。然后，训练数据驱动的预测器来预测在由估计参数表征的情况下执行的最佳机动。实验结果表明，可以 1）产生相关地面参数的实时估计，2）根据有限的一组机动之间的估计参数确定最佳机动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种在低附着条件下选择车辆操作的算法，通过实验平台实现地面参数估计与最优操作决策。
AI.motivation: 冬季冰雪路面易引发交通事故，现有车辆控制策略难以有效应对低附着条件下的复杂路况。
AI.method: 采用1/5比例实验平台，结合模型估计器处理IMU/LIDAR/编码器数据估算地面参数，并利用数据驱动预测器选择最优操作方案。
AI.result: 成功实现地面摩擦系数等参数的实时估计，并能在预设操作集中确定最优行驶策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低附着条件下的车辆主动安全控制提供了可行的技术路径，可提升冰雪路面驾驶安全性。

title: ShuffleMixer: An Efficient ConvNet for Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: ShuffleMixer：一种高效的图像超分辨率卷积网络
comment: Winner of the model complexity track in NTIRE2022 Efficient Super-Resolution Challenge, CVPR 2022. The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/MobileSR-NTIRE2022
comments: Winner of the model complexity track in NTIRE2022 Efficient Super-Resolution Challenge, CVPR 2022. The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/MobileSR-NTIRE2022
abstract: Lightweight and efficiency are critical drivers for the practical application of image super-resolution (SR) algorithms. We propose a simple and effective approach, ShuffleMixer, for lightweight image super-resolution that explores large convolution and channel split-shuffle operation. In contrast to previous SR models that simply stack multiple small kernel convolutions or complex operators to learn representations, we explore a large kernel ConvNet for mobile-friendly SR design. Specifically, we develop a large depth-wise convolution and two projection layers based on channel splitting and shuffling as the basic component to mix features efficiently. Since the contexts of natural images are strongly locally correlated, using large depth-wise convolutions only is insufficient to reconstruct fine details. To overcome this problem while maintaining the efficiency of the proposed module, we introduce Fused-MBConvs into the proposed network to model the local connectivity of different features. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed ShuffleMixer is about 6x smaller than the state-of-the-art methods in terms of model parameters and FLOPs while achieving competitive performance. In NTIRE 2022, our primary method won the model complexity track of the Efficient Super-Resolution Challenge [23]. The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/MobileSR-NTIRE2022.
summary: Lightweight and efficiency are critical drivers for the practical application of image super-resolution (SR) algorithms. We propose a simple and effective approach, ShuffleMixer, for lightweight image super-resolution that explores large convolution and channel split-shuffle operation. In contrast to previous SR models that simply stack multiple small kernel convolutions or complex operators to learn representations, we explore a large kernel ConvNet for mobile-friendly SR design. Specifically, we develop a large depth-wise convolution and two projection layers based on channel splitting and shuffling as the basic component to mix features efficiently. Since the contexts of natural images are strongly locally correlated, using large depth-wise convolutions only is insufficient to reconstruct fine details. To overcome this problem while maintaining the efficiency of the proposed module, we introduce Fused-MBConvs into the proposed network to model the local connectivity of different features. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed ShuffleMixer is about 6x smaller than the state-of-the-art methods in terms of model parameters and FLOPs while achieving competitive performance. In NTIRE 2022, our primary method won the model complexity track of the Efficient Super-Resolution Challenge [23]. The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/MobileSR-NTIRE2022.
abstract_zh: 轻量化和高效是图像超分辨率（SR）算法实际应用的关键驱动因素。我们提出了一种简单有效的方法 ShuffleMixer，用于轻量级图像超分辨率，探索大卷积和通道分割洗牌操作。与之前简单地堆叠多个小内核卷积或复杂算子来学习表示的 SR 模型相比，我们探索了一个用于移动友好的 SR 设计的大内核 ConvNet。具体来说，我们开发了一个大型深度卷积和两个基于通道分割和洗牌的投影层，作为有效混合特征的基本组件。由于自然图像的上下文是强局部相关的，仅使用大深度卷积不足以重建精细细节。为了克服这个问题，同时保持所提出模块的效率，我们将 Fused-MBConvs 引入到所提出的网络中，以对不同特征的局部连接进行建模。实验结果表明，所提出的 ShuffleMixer 在模型参数和 FLOP 方面比最先进的方法小约 6 倍，同时实现了有竞争力的性能。在 NTIRE 2022 中，我们的主要方法赢得了高效超分辨率挑战赛的模型复杂性赛道 [23]。该代码可从 https://github.com/sunny2109/MobileSR-NTIRE2022 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ShuffleMixer的高效卷积网络，用于图像超分辨率任务。
AI.motivation: 轻量级和高效性是图像超分辨率算法实际应用的关键，现有方法要么堆叠小卷积核导致效率低，要么使用复杂操作影响性能。
AI.method: 设计基于大卷积核、通道分割-洗牌操作的ShuffleMixer模块，并引入Fused-MBConvs以建模多特征局部连接，实现高效特征混合。
AI.result: 模型参数量和FLOPs仅为现有方法的1/6，且在NTIRE 2022高效超分辨率挑战赛复杂度赛道中夺冠。
AI.conclusion: ShuffleMixer在保持竞争力性能的同时显著提升了模型效率，为移动端超分辨率应用提供了有效方案。

title: Self-Supervised Pre-training of Vision Transformers for Dense Prediction Tasks
title_zh: 用于密集预测任务的视觉变压器的自监督预训练
abstract: We present a new self-supervised pre-training of Vision Transformers for dense prediction tasks. It is based on a contrastive loss across views that compares pixel-level representations to global image representations. This strategy produces better local features suitable for dense prediction tasks as opposed to contrastive pre-training based on global image representation only. Furthermore, our approach does not suffer from a reduced batch size since the number of negative examples needed in the contrastive loss is in the order of the number of local features. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pre-training strategy on two dense prediction tasks: semantic segmentation and monocular depth estimation.
summary: We present a new self-supervised pre-training of Vision Transformers for dense prediction tasks. It is based on a contrastive loss across views that compares pixel-level representations to global image representations. This strategy produces better local features suitable for dense prediction tasks as opposed to contrastive pre-training based on global image representation only. Furthermore, our approach does not suffer from a reduced batch size since the number of negative examples needed in the contrastive loss is in the order of the number of local features. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pre-training strategy on two dense prediction tasks: semantic segmentation and monocular depth estimation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的视觉变压器的自监督预训练，用于密集的预测任务。它基于跨视图的对比损失，将像素级表示与全局图像表示进行比较。与仅基于全局图像表示的对比预训练相比，该策略产生更好的适合密集预测任务的局部特征。此外，我们的方法不会受到批量大小减小的影响，因为对比损失中所需的负例数量按局部特征数量的顺序排列。我们证明了我们的预训练策略在两个密集预测任务上的有效性：语义分割和单目深度估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于密集预测任务的视觉Transformer自监督预训练方法，通过对比不同视角的像素级与全局图像表示来优化局部特征。
AI.motivation: 现有对比预训练方法仅依赖全局图像表示，难以生成适合密集预测任务的局部特征，且批量大小减少会影响模型性能。
AI.method: 设计跨视角对比损失，将像素级特征与全局图像特征进行对比，负样本数量随局部特征数量变化，避免批量大小限制。
AI.result: 在语义分割和单目深度估计任务中验证了方法有效性，局部特征质量优于传统对比预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进对比策略提升了视觉Transformer在密集预测任务中的表现，且具有更好的批量扩展性。

search_text: Self-Supervised Pre-training of Vision Transformers for Dense Prediction Tasks 用于密集预测任务的视觉变压器的自监督预训练 We present a new self-supervised pre-training of Vision Transformers for dense prediction tasks. It is based on a contrastive loss across views that compares pixel-level representations to global image representations. This strategy produces better local features suitable for dense prediction tasks as opposed to contrastive pre-training based on global image representation only. Furthermore, our approach does not suffer from a reduced batch size since the number of negative examples needed in the contrastive loss is in the order of the number of local features. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pre-training strategy on two dense prediction tasks: semantic segmentation and monocular depth estimation. 我们提出了一种新的视觉变压器的自监督预训练，用于密集的预测任务。它基于跨视图的对比损失，将像素级表示与全局图像表示进行比较。与仅基于全局图像表示的对比预训练相比，该策略产生更好的适合密集预测任务的局部特征。此外，我们的方法不会受到批量大小减小的影响，因为对比损失中所需的负例数量按局部特征数量的顺序排列。我们证明了我们的预训练策略在两个密集预测任务上的有效性：语义分割和单目深度估计。 本文提出一种用于密集预测任务的视觉Transformer自监督预训练方法，通过对比不同视角的像素级与全局图像表示来优化局部特征。 Jaonary Rabarisoa,Valentin Belissen,Florian Chabot,Quoc-Cuong Pham cs.CV

authors_text: Jianyi Zhang,Xuanxi Huang,Yaqi Liu,Yuyang Han,Zixiao Xiang
title: GAN-based Medical Image Small Region Forgery Detection via a Two-Stage Cascade Framework
title_zh: 通过两阶段级联框架进行基于 GAN 的医学图像小区域伪造检测
abstract: Using generative adversarial network (GAN)\cite{RN90} for data enhancement of medical images is significantly helpful for many computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) tasks. A new attack called CT-GAN has emerged. It can inject or remove lung cancer lesions to CT scans. Because the tampering region may even account for less than 1\% of the original image, even state-of-the-art methods are challenging to detect the traces of such tampering. This paper proposes a cascade framework to detect GAN-based medical image small region forgery like CT-GAN. In the local detection stage, we train the detector network with small sub-images so that interference information in authentic regions will not affect the detector. We use depthwise separable convolution and residual to prevent the detector from over-fitting and enhance the ability to find forged regions through the attention mechanism. The detection results of all sub-images in the same image will be combined into a heatmap. In the global classification stage, using gray level co-occurrence matrix (GLCM) can better extract features of the heatmap. Because the shape and size of the tampered area are uncertain, we train PCA and SVM methods for classification. Our method can classify whether a CT image has been tampered and locate the tampered position. Sufficient experiments show that our method can achieve excellent performance.
summary: Using generative adversarial network (GAN)\cite{RN90} for data enhancement of medical images is significantly helpful for many computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) tasks. A new attack called CT-GAN has emerged. It can inject or remove lung cancer lesions to CT scans. Because the tampering region may even account for less than 1\% of the original image, even state-of-the-art methods are challenging to detect the traces of such tampering. This paper proposes a cascade framework to detect GAN-based medical image small region forgery like CT-GAN. In the local detection stage, we train the detector network with small sub-images so that interference information in authentic regions will not affect the detector. We use depthwise separable convolution and residual to prevent the detector from over-fitting and enhance the ability to find forged regions through the attention mechanism. The detection results of all sub-images in the same image will be combined into a heatmap. In the global classification stage, using gray level co-occurrence matrix (GLCM) can better extract features of the heatmap. Because the shape and size of the tampered area are uncertain, we train PCA and SVM methods for classification. Our method can classify whether a CT image has been tampered and locate the tampered position. Sufficient experiments show that our method can achieve excellent performance.
abstract_zh: 使用生成对抗网络（GAN）\cite{RN90} 进行医学图像的数据增强对于许多计算机辅助诊断（CAD）任务非常有帮助。一种名为 CT-GAN 的新攻击已经出现。它可以将肺癌病灶注入或切除到CT扫描中。由于篡改区域甚至可能占原始图像的不到 1%，因此即使是最先进的方法也很难检测到这种篡改的痕迹。本文提出了一种级联框架来检测基于 GAN 的医学图像小区域伪造，如 CT-GAN。在局部检测阶段，我们用小子图像训练检测器网络，以便真实区域中的干扰信息不会影响检测器。我们使用深度可分离卷积和残差来防止检测器过拟合，并通过注意力机制增强发现伪造区域的能力。同一图像中所有子图像的检测结果将被组合成热图。在全局分类阶段，使用灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）可以更好地提取热图的特征。由于篡改区域的形状和大小是不确定的，我们训练PCA和SVM方法进行分类。我们的方法可以对 CT 图像是否被篡改进行分类并定位被篡改的位置。足够的实验表明我们的方法可以取得优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的两阶段级联框架，用于检测医学图像中由CT-GAN等生成的微小区域伪造内容。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以检测CT-GAN攻击在CT扫描中注入或移除的微小（<1%）肺部癌变病灶伪造痕迹，需提升小区域伪造检测能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段级联框架：局部检测阶段使用小子图像训练检测网络，结合深度可分离卷积与残差结构增强注意力机制；全局分类阶段通过灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）提取热力图特征，并利用PCA与SVM进行分类。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在伪造检测与定位任务中均取得优异性能，有效识别微小伪造区域。
AI.conclusion: 提出的级联框架能有效检测医学图像中不确定形状和大小的微小区域伪造，为医疗图像安全提供新解决方案。

title: You Have Earned a Trophy: Characterize In-Game Achievements and Their Completions
title_zh: 您已获得奖杯：描述游戏中的成就及其完成情况
comment: Preprint of the paper accepted at the 14th International ACM Conference on Web Science in 2022 (WebSci'22)
comments: Preprint of the paper accepted at the 14th International ACM Conference on Web Science in 2022 (WebSci'22)
abstract: Achievement systems have been actively adopted in gaming platforms to maintain players' interests. Among them, trophies in PlayStation games are one of the most successful achievement systems. While the importance of trophy design has been casually discussed in many game developers' forums, there has been no systematic study of the historical dataset of trophies yet. In this work, we construct a complete dataset of PlayStation games and their trophies and investigate them from both the developers' and players' perspectives.
summary: Achievement systems have been actively adopted in gaming platforms to maintain players' interests. Among them, trophies in PlayStation games are one of the most successful achievement systems. While the importance of trophy design has been casually discussed in many game developers' forums, there has been no systematic study of the historical dataset of trophies yet. In this work, we construct a complete dataset of PlayStation games and their trophies and investigate them from both the developers' and players' perspectives.
abstract_zh: 游戏平台积极采用成就系统来维护玩家的兴趣。其中，PlayStation游戏中的奖杯是最成功的成就系统之一。虽然许多游戏开发者论坛中已经随意讨论了奖杯设计的重要性，但目前还没有对奖杯的历史数据集进行系统的研究。在这项工作中，我们构建了 PlayStation 游戏及其奖杯的完整数据集，并从开发者和玩家的角度对其进行研究。

AI.tldr: 构建PlayStation游戏奖杯数据集，分析其设计特点及玩家完成情况
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对奖杯系统历史数据的系统分析，需探讨其设计对玩家行为的影响
AI.method: 收集PlayStation游戏及奖杯数据，结合开发者设计和玩家完成数据进行多角度分析
AI.result: 发现奖杯设计的共性特征，玩家完成率差异及影响因素，如难度和奖励机制
AI.conclusion: 奖杯系统设计显著影响玩家参与度，建议优化设计以提升体验

title: A practical optimal control approach for two-speed actuators
title_zh: 一种实用的双速执行器最优控制方法
abstract: This paper addresses the closed-loop control of an actuator with both a continuous input variable (motor torque) and a discrete input variable (mode selection). In many applications, robots have to bear large loads while moving slowly and also have to move quickly through the air with almost no load, leading to conflicting requirements for their actuators. An actuator with multiple gear ratios, like in a powertrain, can address this issue by allowing an effective use of power over a wide range of output speed. However, having discrete modes of operation adds complexity to the high-level control and planning. Here a controller for two-speed actuators that automatically select both the best gear ratio and the motor torque is developed. The approach is to: first derive a low-dimensional model, then use dynamic programming to find the best actions for all possible situations, and last use regression analysis to extract simplified global feedback laws. This approach produces simple practical nearly-optimal feedback laws. A controller that globally minimizes a quadratic cost function is derived for a two-speed actuator prototype, global stability is proven and performance is demonstrated experimentally.
summary: This paper addresses the closed-loop control of an actuator with both a continuous input variable (motor torque) and a discrete input variable (mode selection). In many applications, robots have to bear large loads while moving slowly and also have to move quickly through the air with almost no load, leading to conflicting requirements for their actuators. An actuator with multiple gear ratios, like in a powertrain, can address this issue by allowing an effective use of power over a wide range of output speed. However, having discrete modes of operation adds complexity to the high-level control and planning. Here a controller for two-speed actuators that automatically select both the best gear ratio and the motor torque is developed. The approach is to: first derive a low-dimensional model, then use dynamic programming to find the best actions for all possible situations, and last use regression analysis to extract simplified global feedback laws. This approach produces simple practical nearly-optimal feedback laws. A controller that globally minimizes a quadratic cost function is derived for a two-speed actuator prototype, global stability is proven and performance is demonstrated experimentally.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了具有连续输入变量（电机扭矩）和离散输入变量（模式选择）的执行器的闭环控制。在许多应用中，机器人必须在缓慢移动的同时承受大负载，并且还必须在几乎无负载的情况下在空中快速移动，从而导致对其执行器的要求相互冲突。具有多个齿轮比的执行器（例如动力系统中的执行器）可以通过允许在较宽的输出速度范围内有效利用动力来解决这个问题。然而，离散的操作模式增加了高层控制和规划的复杂性。这里开发了一种用于双速执行器的控制器，可以自动选择最佳齿轮比和电机扭矩。其方法是：首先推导出低维模型，然后使用动态规划找到所有可能情况的最佳动作，最后使用回归分析提取简化的全局反馈规律。这种方法产生简单实用的近乎最佳的反馈定律。针对双速执行器原型推导了全局最小化二次成本函数的控制器，并通过实验证明了全局稳定性和性能。

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种针对双速执行器的闭环控制方法，能够自动选择最佳齿轮比和电机扭矩。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在不同负载和速度需求下工作，传统单速执行器难以满足，需多档位执行器但增加了控制复杂性。
AI.method: 建立低维模型，利用动态规划确定最优动作，通过回归分析提取简化反馈定律。
AI.result: 设计出全局最小化二次成本函数的控制器，证明了全局稳定性并进行了实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为双速执行器提供了简单实用的近似最优反馈控制策略，有效解决了复杂控制问题。

title: On algorithmic applications of sim-width and mim-width of $(H_1, H_2)$-free graphs
title_zh: 关于$(H_1, H_2)$-free图的sim-width和mim-width的算法应用
abstract: Mim-width and sim-width are among the most powerful graph width parameters, with sim-width more powerful than mim-width, which is in turn more powerful than clique-width. While several $\mathsf{NP}$-hard graph problems become tractable for graph classes whose mim-width is bounded and quickly computable, no algorithmic applications of boundedness of sim-width are known. In [Kang et al., A width parameter useful for chordal and co-comparability graphs, Theoretical Computer Science, 704:1-17, 2017], it is asked whether \textsc{Independent Set} and \textsc{$3$-Colouring} are $\mathsf{NP}$-complete on graphs of sim-width at most $1$. We observe that, for each $k \in \mathbb{N}$, \textsc{List $k$-Colouring} is polynomial-time solvable for graph classes whose sim-width is bounded and quickly computable. Moreover, we show that if the same holds for \textsc{Independent Set}, then \textsc{Independent $\mathcal{H}$-Packing} is polynomial-time solvable for graph classes whose sim-width is bounded and quickly computable. This problem is a common generalisation of \textsc{Independent Set}, \textsc{Induced Matching}, \textsc{Dissociation Set} and \textsc{$k$-Separator}. We also make progress toward classifying the mim-width of $(H_1,H_2)$-free graphs in the case $H_1$ is complete or edgeless. Our results solve some open problems in [Brettell et al., Bounding the mim-width of hereditary graph classes, Journal of Graph Theory, 99(1):117-151, 2022].
summary: Mim-width and sim-width are among the most powerful graph width parameters, with sim-width more powerful than mim-width, which is in turn more powerful than clique-width. While several $\mathsf{NP}$-hard graph problems become tractable for graph classes whose mim-width is bounded and quickly computable, no algorithmic applications of boundedness of sim-width are known. In [Kang et al., A width parameter useful for chordal and co-comparability graphs, Theoretical Computer Science, 704:1-17, 2017], it is asked whether \textsc{Independent Set} and \textsc{$3$-Colouring} are $\mathsf{NP}$-complete on graphs of sim-width at most $1$. We observe that, for each $k \in \mathbb{N}$, \textsc{List $k$-Colouring} is polynomial-time solvable for graph classes whose sim-width is bounded and quickly computable. Moreover, we show that if the same holds for \textsc{Independent Set}, then \textsc{Independent $\mathcal{H}$-Packing} is polynomial-time solvable for graph classes whose sim-width is bounded and quickly computable. This problem is a common generalisation of \textsc{Independent Set}, \textsc{Induced Matching}, \textsc{Dissociation Set} and \textsc{$k$-Separator}. We also make progress toward classifying the mim-width of $(H_1,H_2)$-free graphs in the case $H_1$ is complete or edgeless. Our results solve some open problems in [Brettell et al., Bounding the mim-width of hereditary graph classes, Journal of Graph Theory, 99(1):117-151, 2022].
abstract_zh: mim-width 和 sim-width 是最强大的图形宽度参数之一，其中 sim-width 比 mim-width 更强大，而 mim-width 又比 clique-width 更强大。虽然一些 $\mathsf{NP}$ 困难的图问题对于 mim-width 有界且可快速计算的图类来说变得容易处理，但 sim-width 有界性的算法应用尚不为人所知。在 [Kang et al., A widthparameterUsedforchordalandco-comparabilitygraphs,TheoreticalComputerScience,704:1-17, 2017] 中，有人询问 \textsc{Independent Set} 和 \textsc{$3$-Colouring} 是否在 sim-width 至多 $1$ 的图上是 $\mathsf{NP}$-complete。我们观察到，对于每个 $k \in \mathbb{N}$，\textsc{List $k$-Colouring} 对于其 sim-width 有界且可快速计算的图类来说是多项式时间可解的。此外，我们证明，如果 \textsc{Independent Set} 也是如此，则 \textsc{Independent $\mathcal{H}$-Packing} 对于 sim-width 有界且可快速计算的图类来说是多项式时间可解的。这个问题是\textsc{独立集}、\textsc{诱导匹配}、\textsc{解离集}和\textsc{$k$-Separator}的常见概括。在 $H_1$ 完全或无边的情况下，我们还在对 $(H_1,H_2)$ 无图的 mim-width 进行分类方面取得了进展。我们的结果解决了 [Brettell et al., Bounding the mim-width of hereditary graph classes, Journal of Graph Theory, 99(1):117-151, 2022] 中的一些开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了sim-width和mim-width在$(H_1, H_2)$-free图类中的算法应用，特别是针对独立集和着色问题的复杂性分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管mim-width的算法应用已被广泛研究，但sim-width的算法潜力尚未被探索。同时，关于sim-width为1的图类中独立集和3-着色问题的复杂性存在开放性问题。
AI.method: 通过分析sim-width的界与快速计算性，结合列表着色和独立集问题的算法设计，推导出多项式时间解法，并对mim-width的分类进行进展。
AI.result: 证明了列表k-着色问题在sim-width有界且可快速计算的图类中多项式可解；若独立集问题同理，则独立H-打包问题也可解；并推进了$(H_1,H_2)$-free图的mim-width分类。
AI.conclusion: sim-width为图算法提供了新视角，解决了部分开放问题，并为后续研究提供了理论基础。

title: Updating belief functions over Belnap--Dunn logic
title_zh: 通过 Belnap 更新信念函数——Dunn 逻辑
abstract: Belief and plausibility are weaker measures of uncertainty than that of probability. They are motivated by the situations when full probabilistic information is not available. However, information can also be contradictory. Therefore, the framework of classical logic is not necessarily the most adequate. Belnap-Dunn logic was introduced to reason about incomplete and contradictory information. Klein et al and Bilkova et al generalize the notion of probability measures and belief functions to Belnap-Dunn logic, respectively. In this article, we study how to update belief functions with new pieces of information. We present a first approach via a frame semantics of Belnap-Dunn logic.
summary: Belief and plausibility are weaker measures of uncertainty than that of probability. They are motivated by the situations when full probabilistic information is not available. However, information can also be contradictory. Therefore, the framework of classical logic is not necessarily the most adequate. Belnap-Dunn logic was introduced to reason about incomplete and contradictory information. Klein et al and Bilkova et al generalize the notion of probability measures and belief functions to Belnap-Dunn logic, respectively. In this article, we study how to update belief functions with new pieces of information. We present a first approach via a frame semantics of Belnap-Dunn logic.
abstract_zh: 与概率相比，信念和合理性是不确定性的衡量标准。当无法获得完整的概率信息时，他们就会受到激励。然而，信息也可能是矛盾的。因此，经典逻辑的框架不一定是最充分的。 Belnap-Dunn 逻辑被引入来推理不完整和矛盾的信息。 Klein 等人和 Bilkova 等人分别将概率测度和置信函数的概念推广到 Belnap-Dunn 逻辑。在本文中，我们研究如何用新信息更新信念函数。我们通过 Belnap-Dunn 逻辑的框架语义提出第一种方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在Belnap-Dunn逻辑框架下更新信念函数，以处理不完整和矛盾信息的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 经典逻辑无法有效处理矛盾或不完整信息，而Belnap-Dunn逻辑为此提供了基础。现有研究已将概率测度和信念函数扩展至该逻辑，但缺乏针对信念函数更新的具体方法。
AI.method: 通过Belnap-Dunn逻辑的框架语义，提出一种更新信念函数的新方法。
AI.result: 首次提出了基于Belnap-Dunn逻辑框架语义的信念函数更新方法，为处理矛盾信息提供了理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理不完整和矛盾信息的信念更新提供了新途径，但需进一步验证其有效性和适用范围。

search_text: Updating belief functions over Belnap--Dunn logic 通过 Belnap 更新信念函数——Dunn 逻辑 Belief and plausibility are weaker measures of uncertainty than that of probability. They are motivated by the situations when full probabilistic information is not available. However, information can also be contradictory. Therefore, the framework of classical logic is not necessarily the most adequate. Belnap-Dunn logic was introduced to reason about incomplete and contradictory information. Klein et al and Bilkova et al generalize the notion of probability measures and belief functions to Belnap-Dunn logic, respectively. In this article, we study how to update belief functions with new pieces of information. We present a first approach via a frame semantics of Belnap-Dunn logic. 与概率相比，信念和合理性是不确定性的衡量标准。当无法获得完整的概率信息时，他们就会受到激励。然而，信息也可能是矛盾的。因此，经典逻辑的框架不一定是最充分的。 Belnap-Dunn 逻辑被引入来推理不完整和矛盾的信息。 Klein 等人和 Bilkova 等人分别将概率测度和置信函数的概念推广到 Belnap-Dunn 逻辑。在本文中，我们研究如何用新信息更新信念函数。我们通过 Belnap-Dunn 逻辑的框架语义提出第一种方法。 本文研究如何在Belnap-Dunn逻辑框架下更新信念函数，以处理不完整和矛盾信息的不确定性。 Sabine Frittella,Ondrej Majer,Sajad Nazari cs.AI,cs.LO,math.PR

authors_text: Jihan Yang,Shaoshuai Shi,Runyu Ding,Zhe Wang,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Towards Efficient 3D Object Detection with Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过知识蒸馏实现高效 3D 物体检测
abstract: Despite substantial progress in 3D object detection, advanced 3D detectors often suffer from heavy computation overheads. To this end, we explore the potential of knowledge distillation (KD) for developing efficient 3D object detectors, focusing on popular pillar- and voxel-based detectors.In the absence of well-developed teacher-student pairs, we first study how to obtain student models with good trade offs between accuracy and efficiency from the perspectives of model compression and input resolution reduction. Then, we build a benchmark to assess existing KD methods developed in the 2D domain for 3D object detection upon six well-constructed teacher-student pairs. Further, we propose an improved KD pipeline incorporating an enhanced logit KD method that performs KD on only a few pivotal positions determined by teacher classification response, and a teacher-guided student model initialization to facilitate transferring teacher model's feature extraction ability to students through weight inheritance. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on the Waymo dataset. Our best performing model achieves $65.75\%$ LEVEL 2 mAPH, surpassing its teacher model and requiring only $44\%$ of teacher flops. Our most efficient model runs 51 FPS on an NVIDIA A100, which is $2.2\times$ faster than PointPillar with even higher accuracy. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SparseKD}.
summary: Despite substantial progress in 3D object detection, advanced 3D detectors often suffer from heavy computation overheads. To this end, we explore the potential of knowledge distillation (KD) for developing efficient 3D object detectors, focusing on popular pillar- and voxel-based detectors.In the absence of well-developed teacher-student pairs, we first study how to obtain student models with good trade offs between accuracy and efficiency from the perspectives of model compression and input resolution reduction. Then, we build a benchmark to assess existing KD methods developed in the 2D domain for 3D object detection upon six well-constructed teacher-student pairs. Further, we propose an improved KD pipeline incorporating an enhanced logit KD method that performs KD on only a few pivotal positions determined by teacher classification response, and a teacher-guided student model initialization to facilitate transferring teacher model's feature extraction ability to students through weight inheritance. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on the Waymo dataset. Our best performing model achieves $65.75\%$ LEVEL 2 mAPH, surpassing its teacher model and requiring only $44\%$ of teacher flops. Our most efficient model runs 51 FPS on an NVIDIA A100, which is $2.2\times$ faster than PointPillar with even higher accuracy. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SparseKD}.
abstract_zh: 尽管 3D 物体检测取得了长足的进步，但先进的 3D 检测器经常遭受沉重的计算开销。为此，我们探索了知识蒸馏（KD）在开发高效 3D 目标检测器方面的潜力，重点关注流行的基于柱和体素的检测器。在缺乏良好发展的师生对的情况下，我们首先从模型压缩和输入分辨率降低的角度研究如何获得在精度和效率之间取得良好权衡的学生模型。然后，我们建立了一个基准来评估在 2D 领域开发的现有 KD 方法，用于在六个结构良好的师生对上进行 3D 对象检测。此外，我们提出了一种改进的 KD 管道，结合了增强的 logit KD 方法，该方法仅在由教师分类响应确定的几个关键位置上执行 KD，以及教师指导的学生模型初始化，以促进通过权重继承将教师模型的特征提取能力转移给学生。最后，我们在 Waymo 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们表现​​最好的模型达到了 $65.75\%$ LEVEL 2 mAPH，超越了它的教师模型，并且只需要 $44\%$ 的教师失败。我们最高效的模型在 NVIDIA A100 上运行 51 FPS，比 PointPillar 快 2.2 美元\倍$，并且精度更高。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SparseKD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过知识蒸馏技术开发高效的3D目标检测器，以降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 先进的3D检测器计算量大，难以实际部署，需通过知识蒸馏在精度与效率间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出改进的知识蒸馏框架，包括基于教师分类响应的关键位置蒸馏和教师引导的学生模型初始化，并在Waymo数据集上验证。
AI.result: 最佳模型以44%教师计算量超越教师性能，最高效模型达51 FPS，精度优于PointPillar。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升3D检测效率，为实际应用提供轻量化解决方案。

authors_text: Zhanpeng Zhou,Wen Shen,Huixin Chen,Ling Tang,Quanshi Zhang
title: Batch Normalization Is Blind to the First and Second Derivatives of the Loss
title_zh: 批量归一化对损失的一阶和二阶导数是盲目的
abstract: In this paper, we prove the effects of the BN operation on the back-propagation of the first and second derivatives of the loss. When we do the Taylor series expansion of the loss function, we prove that the BN operation will block the influence of the first-order term and most influence of the second-order term of the loss. We also find that such a problem is caused by the standardization phase of the BN operation. Experimental results have verified our theoretical conclusions, and we have found that the BN operation significantly affects feature representations in specific tasks, where losses of different samples share similar analytic formulas.
summary: In this paper, we prove the effects of the BN operation on the back-propagation of the first and second derivatives of the loss. When we do the Taylor series expansion of the loss function, we prove that the BN operation will block the influence of the first-order term and most influence of the second-order term of the loss. We also find that such a problem is caused by the standardization phase of the BN operation. Experimental results have verified our theoretical conclusions, and we have found that the BN operation significantly affects feature representations in specific tasks, where losses of different samples share similar analytic formulas.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们证明了 BN 运算对损失的一阶和二阶导数反向传播的影响。当我们对损失函数进行泰勒级数展开时，我们证明BN运算会阻挡损失的一阶项的影响和大部分二阶项的影响。我们还发现这样的问题是BN操作的标准化阶段造成的。实验结果验证了我们的理论结论，我们发现BN操作显着影响特定任务中的特征表示，其中不同样本的损失具有相似的解析公式。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了批量归一化（BN）操作对损失函数一阶和二阶导数反向传播的影响，并通过理论分析和实验验证其影响机制。
AI.motivation: 批量归一化（BN）在深度学习中广泛应用，但其对损失函数导数传播的影响尚不明确，可能影响模型优化和特征学习，需深入分析其机制。
AI.method: 通过泰勒级数展开理论分析BN操作对损失函数导数的影响，并设计实验验证理论结论，探讨BN对特征表示的具体影响。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验结果证实BN操作阻断一阶导数影响并削弱二阶导数传播，且在特定任务中显著改变特征表示，不同样本损失呈现相似解析公式。
AI.conclusion: BN的标准化步骤导致损失导数信息丢失，可能影响模型优化和特征学习，需在特定任务中谨慎应用或改进BN方法。

title: Theme Aspect Argumentation Model for Handling Fallacies
title_zh: 处理谬误的主题方面论证模型
abstract: From daily discussions to marketing ads to political statements, information manipulation is rife. It is increasingly more important that we have the right set of tools to defend ourselves from manipulative rhetoric, or fallacies. Suitable techniques to automatically identify fallacies are being investigated in natural language processing research. However, a fallacy in one context may not be a fallacy in another context, so there is also a need to explain how and why it has come to be judged a fallacy. For the explainable fallacy identification, we present a novel approach to characterising fallacies through formal constraints, as a viable alternative to more traditional fallacy classifications by informal criteria. To achieve this objective, we introduce a novel context-aware argumentation model, the theme aspect argumentation model, which can do both: the modelling of a given argumentation as it is expressed (rhetorical modelling); and a deeper semantic analysis of the rhetorical argumentation model. By identifying fallacies with formal constraints, it becomes possible to tell whether a fallacy lurks in the modelled rhetoric with a formal rigour. We present core formal constraints for the theme aspect argumentation model and then more formal constraints that improve its fallacy identification capability. We show and prove the consequences of these formal constraints. We then analyse the computational complexities of deciding the satisfiability of the constraints.

It is increasingly more important that we have the right set of tools to defend ourselves from manipulative rhetoric, or fallacies. Suitable techniques to automatically identify fallacies are being investigated in natural language processing research. However, a fallacy in one context may not be a fallacy in another context, so there is also a need to explain how and why it has come to be judged a fallacy. For the explainable fallacy identification, we present a novel approach to characterising fallacies through formal constraints, as a viable alternative to more traditional fallacy classifications by informal criteria. To achieve this objective, we introduce a novel context-aware argumentation model, the theme aspect argumentation model, which can do both: the modelling of a given argumentation as it is expressed (rhetorical modelling); and a deeper semantic analysis of the rhetorical argumentation model. By identifying fallacies with formal constraints, it becomes possible to tell whether a fallacy lurks in the modelled rhetoric with a formal rigour. We present core formal constraints for the theme aspect argumentation model and then more formal constraints that improve its fallacy identification capability. We show and prove the consequences of these formal constraints. We then analyse the computational complexities of deciding the satisfiability of the constraints.
abstract_zh: 从日常讨论到营销广告再到政治声明，信息操纵非常普遍。越来越重要的是，我们拥有一套正确的工具来保护自己免受操纵性言论或谬误的侵害。自然语言处理研究中正在研究自动识别谬误的合适技术。然而，在一种情况下的谬误在另一种情况下可能不是谬误，因此还需要解释它如何以及为何被判定为谬误。对于可解释的谬误识别，我们提出了一种通过形式约束来表征谬误的新颖方法，作为通过非正式标准进行更传统的谬误分类的可行替代方案。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一种新颖的上下文感知论证模型，即主题方面论证模型，它可以做到以下两点：对所表达的给定论证进行建模（修辞建模）；并对修辞论证模型进行更深入的语义分析。通过识别具有形式约束的谬误，就可以判断在形式严格的模型修辞中是否潜伏着谬误。我们提出了主题方面论证模型的核心形式约束，然后提出了提高其谬误识别能力的更形式约束。我们展示并证明了这些形式约束的后果。然后我们分析决定约束的可满足性的计算复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主题方面论证的模型，用于通过形式化约束识别和解释论证中的谬误。
AI.motivation: 现有自然语言处理技术难以在不同语境中准确识别谬误，且缺乏对谬误判定依据的解释能力，需开发可解释的谬误识别工具。
AI.method: 构建主题方面论证模型，结合修辞建模与语义分析，通过形式化约束定义谬误判定规则，并分析约束的可满足性复杂度。
AI.result: 提出核心形式化约束及改进约束，证明其对谬误识别的有效性，并分析约束判定的计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为谬误识别提供了形式化且可解释的替代方案，提升了论证分析的严谨性与适用性。

title: Detecting fake news by enhanced text representation with multi-EDU-structure awareness
title_zh: 通过增强文本表示和多 EDU 结构感知来检测假新闻
abstract: Since fake news poses a serious threat to society and individuals, numerous studies have been brought by considering text, propagation and user profiles. Due to the data collection problem, these methods based on propagation and user profiles are less applicable in the early stages. A good alternative method is to detect news based on text as soon as they are released, and a lot of text-based methods were proposed, which usually utilized words, sentences or paragraphs as basic units. But, word is a too fine-grained unit to express coherent information well, sentence or paragraph is too coarse to show specific information. Which granularity is better and how to utilize it to enhance text representation for fake news detection are two key problems. In this paper, we introduce Elementary Discourse Unit (EDU) whose granularity is between word and sentence, and propose a multi-EDU-structure awareness model to improve text representation for fake news detection, namely EDU4FD. For the multi-EDU-structure awareness, we build the sequence-based EDU representations and the graph-based EDU representations. The former is gotten by modeling the coherence between consecutive EDUs with TextCNN that reflect the semantic coherence. For the latter, we first extract rhetorical relations to build the EDU dependency graph, which can show the global narrative logic and help deliver the main idea truthfully. Then a Relation Graph Attention Network (RGAT) is set to get the graph-based EDU representation. Finally, the two EDU representations are incorporated as the enhanced text representation for fake news detection, using a gated recursive unit combined with a global attention mechanism. Experiments on four cross-source fake news datasets show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art text-based methods.
summary: Since fake news poses a serious threat to society and individuals, numerous studies have been brought by considering text, propagation and user profiles. Due to the data collection problem, these methods based on propagation and user profiles are less applicable in the early stages. A good alternative method is to detect news based on text as soon as they are released, and a lot of text-based methods were proposed, which usually utilized words, sentences or paragraphs as basic units. But, word is a too fine-grained unit to express coherent information well, sentence or paragraph is too coarse to show specific information. Which granularity is better and how to utilize it to enhance text representation for fake news detection are two key problems. In this paper, we introduce Elementary Discourse Unit (EDU) whose granularity is between word and sentence, and propose a multi-EDU-structure awareness model to improve text representation for fake news detection, namely EDU4FD. For the multi-EDU-structure awareness, we build the sequence-based EDU representations and the graph-based EDU representations. The former is gotten by modeling the coherence between consecutive EDUs with TextCNN that reflect the semantic coherence. For the latter, we first extract rhetorical relations to build the EDU dependency graph, which can show the global narrative logic and help deliver the main idea truthfully. Then a Relation Graph Attention Network (RGAT) is set to get the graph-based EDU representation. Finally, the two EDU representations are incorporated as the enhanced text representation for fake news detection, using a gated recursive unit combined with a global attention mechanism. Experiments on four cross-source fake news datasets show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art text-based methods.
abstract_zh: 由于假新闻对社会和个人构成严重威胁，因此通过考虑文本、传播和用户档案进行了大量研究。由于数据收集问题，这些基于传播和用户画像的方法在早期阶段不太适用。一个很好的替代方法是在新闻发布后立即基于文本进行检测，并且提出了许多基于文本的方法，这些方法通常使用单词、句子或段落作为基本单位。但是，单词的粒度太细，无法很好地表达连贯的信息，句子或段落的粒度太粗，无法表达具体的信息。哪种粒度更好以及如何利用它来增强假新闻检测的文本表示是两个关键问题。在本文中，我们引入了粒度介于单词和句子之间的基本话语单元（EDU），并提出了一种多 EDU 结构的感知模型来改进假新闻检测的文本表示，即 EDU4FD。对于多 EDU 结构感知，我们构建了基于序列的 EDU 表示和基于图的 EDU 表示。前者是通过使用反映语义一致性的 TextCNN 对连续 EDU 之间的一致性进行建模得到的。对于后者，我们首先提取修辞关系来构建EDU依赖图，它可以显示全局叙事逻辑并有助于如实传达主要思想。然后设置关系图注意网络（RGAT）来获得基于图的 EDU 表示。最后，使用门控递归单元与全局注意力机制相结合，将两种 EDU 表示合并为假新闻检测的增强文本表示。对四个跨源假新闻数据集的实验表明，我们的模型优于最先进的基于文本的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多EDU结构感知的文本表示增强方法EDU4FD，用于提升假新闻检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文本级假新闻检测方法存在粒度选择困境：单词粒度过细、句子/段落粒度过粗，无法有效捕捉信息连贯性与具体细节。
AI.method: 引入介于词与句之间的EDU单元，构建序列级（TextCNN建模语义连贯性）与图级（基于修辞关系的RGAT网络）双重EDU表示，通过门控递归单元与全局注意力机制融合多结构信息。
AI.result: 在四个跨源假新闻数据集上，EDU4FD模型性能优于现有最佳文本级方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的EDU表示能有效增强文本表征，为假新闻检测提供新思路。

title: A Fast Gear-Shifting Actuator for Robotic Tasks with Contacts
title_zh: 用于带接触的机器人任务的快速换档执行器
abstract: Vehicle power-trains use a variable transmission (multiple gear-ratios) to minimize motor size and maximize efficiency while meeting a wide-range of operating points. Robots could similarly benefit from variable transmission to save weight and improve energy efficiency; leading to potentially groundbreaking improvements for mobile and wearable robotic systems. However, variable transmissions in a robotic context leads to new challenges regarding the gear-shifting methodology: 1) order-of-magnitude variations of reduction ratios are desired, and 2) contact situations during manipulation/locomotion tasks lead to impulsive behavior at the moment when gear-shifting is required. This paper present an actuator with a gear-shifting methodology that can seamlessly change between two very different reduction ratios during dynamic contact situations. Experimental results demonstrate the ability to execute a gear-shift from a 1:23 reduction to a 1:474 reduction in less than 30ms during contact with a rigid object.
summary: Vehicle power-trains use a variable transmission (multiple gear-ratios) to minimize motor size and maximize efficiency while meeting a wide-range of operating points. Robots could similarly benefit from variable transmission to save weight and improve energy efficiency; leading to potentially groundbreaking improvements for mobile and wearable robotic systems. However, variable transmissions in a robotic context leads to new challenges regarding the gear-shifting methodology: 1) order-of-magnitude variations of reduction ratios are desired, and 2) contact situations during manipulation/locomotion tasks lead to impulsive behavior at the moment when gear-shifting is required. This paper present an actuator with a gear-shifting methodology that can seamlessly change between two very different reduction ratios during dynamic contact situations. Experimental results demonstrate the ability to execute a gear-shift from a 1:23 reduction to a 1:474 reduction in less than 30ms during contact with a rigid object.
abstract_zh: 车辆动力系统使用可变变速器（多个齿轮比）来最小化电机尺寸并最大化效率，同时满足广泛的工作点。机器人同样可以受益于可变传动装置，以减轻重量并提高能源效率；为移动和可穿戴机器人系统带来潜在的突破性改进。然而，机器人环境中的可变传动装置给换档方法带来了新的挑战：1）需要减速比的数量级变化，2）操纵/运动任务期间的接触情况会导致需要换档时的脉冲行为。本文提出了一种具有变速方法的执行器，可以在动态接触情况下在两个截然不同的减速比之间无缝切换。实验结果表明，在与刚性物体接触期间，能够在不到 30 毫秒的时间内执行从 1:23 减速到 1:474 减速的变速。

AI.motivation: 机器人系统需要可变传动以减轻重量并提高能效，但接触任务中的冲击行为和大减速比变化带来换挡方法挑战。
AI.method: 设计具备特殊换挡机制的执行器，通过控制策略实现在接触刚性物体时快速切换减速比。
AI.result: 实验验证该执行器可在接触状态下30ms内完成从1:23到1:474减速比的换挡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了机器人接触任务中的换挡难题，为移动机器人和外骨骼系统提供高效传动方案。

search_text: A Fast Gear-Shifting Actuator for Robotic Tasks with Contacts 用于带接触的机器人任务的快速换档执行器 Vehicle power-trains use a variable transmission (multiple gear-ratios) to minimize motor size and maximize efficiency while meeting a wide-range of operating points. Robots could similarly benefit from variable transmission to save weight and improve energy efficiency; leading to potentially groundbreaking improvements for mobile and wearable robotic systems. However, variable transmissions in a robotic context leads to new challenges regarding the gear-shifting methodology: 1) order-of-magnitude variations of reduction ratios are desired, and 2) contact situations during manipulation/locomotion tasks lead to impulsive behavior at the moment when gear-shifting is required. This paper present an actuator with a gear-shifting methodology that can seamlessly change between two very different reduction ratios during dynamic contact situations. Experimental results demonstrate the ability to execute a gear-shift from a 1:23 reduction to a 1:474 reduction in less than 30ms during contact with a rigid object. 车辆动力系统使用可变变速器（多个齿轮比）来最小化电机尺寸并最大化效率，同时满足广泛的工作点。机器人同样可以受益于可变传动装置，以减轻重量并提高能源效率；为移动和可穿戴机器人系统带来潜在的突破性改进。然而，机器人环境中的可变传动装置给换档方法带来了新的挑战：1）需要减速比的数量级变化，2）操纵/运动任务期间的接触情况会导致需要换档时的脉冲行为。本文提出了一种具有变速方法的执行器，可以在动态接触情况下在两个截然不同的减速比之间无缝切换。实验结果表明，在与刚性物体接触期间，能够在不到 30 毫秒的时间内执行从 1:23 减速到 1:474 减速的变速。 本文提出一种可在动态接触情况下无缝切换两种大减速比的快速换挡执行器。 Alexandre Girard,H. Harry Asada cs.RO

authors_text: Keyan Nasseri,Chandan Singh,James Duncan,Aaron Kornblith,Bin Yu
title: Group Probability-Weighted Tree Sums for Interpretable Modeling of Heterogeneous Data
title_zh: 用于异构数据可解释建模的组概率加权树和
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.11931
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.11931
abstract: Machine learning in high-stakes domains, such as healthcare, faces two critical challenges: (1) generalizing to diverse data distributions given limited training data while (2) maintaining interpretability. To address these challenges, we propose an instance-weighted tree-sum method that effectively pools data across diverse groups to output a concise, rule-based model. Given distinct groups of instances in a dataset (e.g., medical patients grouped by age or treatment site), our method first estimates group membership probabilities for each instance. Then, it uses these estimates as instance weights in FIGS (Tan et al. 2022), to grow a set of decision trees whose values sum to the final prediction. We call this new method Group Probability-Weighted Tree Sums (G-FIGS). G-FIGS achieves state-of-the-art prediction performance on important clinical datasets; e.g., holding the level of sensitivity fixed at 92%, G-FIGS increases specificity for identifying cervical spine injury by up to 10% over CART and up to 3% over FIGS alone, with larger gains at higher sensitivity levels. By keeping the total number of rules below 16 in FIGS, the final models remain interpretable, and we find that their rules match medical domain expertise. All code, data, and models are released on Github.
summary: Machine learning in high-stakes domains, such as healthcare, faces two critical challenges: (1) generalizing to diverse data distributions given limited training data while (2) maintaining interpretability. To address these challenges, we propose an instance-weighted tree-sum method that effectively pools data across diverse groups to output a concise, rule-based model. Given distinct groups of instances in a dataset (e.g., medical patients grouped by age or treatment site), our method first estimates group membership probabilities for each instance. Then, it uses these estimates as instance weights in FIGS (Tan et al. 2022), to grow a set of decision trees whose values sum to the final prediction. We call this new method Group Probability-Weighted Tree Sums (G-FIGS). G-FIGS achieves state-of-the-art prediction performance on important clinical datasets; e.g., holding the level of sensitivity fixed at 92%, G-FIGS increases specificity for identifying cervical spine injury by up to 10% over CART and up to 3% over FIGS alone, with larger gains at higher sensitivity levels. By keeping the total number of rules below 16 in FIGS, the final models remain interpretable, and we find that their rules match medical domain expertise. All code, data, and models are released on Github.
abstract_zh: 高风险领域（例如医疗保健）中的机器学习面临两个关键挑战：（1）在训练数据有限的情况下泛化到不同的数据分布，同时（2）保持可解释性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种实例加权树和方法，该方法可以有效地汇集不同组的数据，以输出简洁的、基于规则的模型。给定数据集中不同的实例组（例如，按年龄或治疗地点分组的医疗患者），我们的方法首先估计每个实例的组成员概率。然后，它使用这些估计作为图中的实例权重（Tan et al. 2022），以生成一组决策树，其值之和为最终预测。我们将这种新方法称为“组概率加权树和”(G-FIGS)。 G-FIGS 在重要临床数据集上实现了最先进的预测性能；例如，将灵敏度水平固定在 92%，G-FIGS 识别颈椎损伤的特异性比 CART 提高了 10%，比单独的无花果提高了 3%，灵敏度水平越高，增益越大。通过将图中的规则总数保持在 16 以下，最终模型仍然是可解释的，并且我们发现它们的规则与医学领域的专业知识相匹配。所有代码、数据和模型均在 Github 上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为G-FIGS的可解释模型方法，通过分组概率加权决策树之和来处理异质数据，以解决医疗等高风险领域的模型泛化与可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: 在医疗等高风险领域，机器学习面临两大挑战：在有限训练数据下泛化到多样化数据分布，同时保持模型可解释性。传统方法难以兼顾两者，需探索新方法。
AI.method: 首先估计每个实例的分组概率，将其作为权重输入FIGS框架生成决策树，通过树值求和得到最终预测，形成G-FIGS方法，确保规则数量可控且符合医学领域知识。
AI.result: 在临床数据集上，G-FIGS在保持92%灵敏度时，对颈椎损伤识别的特异性较CART提升10%，较单独FIGS提升3%，且规则数不超过16条，符合医学专家经验。
AI.conclusion: G-FIGS通过分组概率加权有效平衡了模型性能与可解释性，在医疗场景中具有实际应用价值，代码与数据已开源。

title: Compressing and Comparing the Generative Spaces of Procedural Content Generators
title_zh: 压缩和比较程序内容生成器的生成空间
comment: 8 pages, 3 Figures, 2 Tables, Accepted to Conference on Games 2022
comments: 8 pages, 3 Figures, 2 Tables, Accepted to Conference on Games 2022
abstract: The past decade has seen a rapid increase in the level of research interest in procedural content generation (PCG) for digital games, and there are now numerous research avenues focused on new approaches for driving and applying PCG systems. An area in which progress has been comparatively slow is the development of generalisable approaches for comparing alternative PCG systems, especially in terms of their generative spaces. It is to this area that this paper aims to make a contribution, by exploring the utility of data compression algorithms in compressing the generative spaces of PCG systems. We hope that this approach could be the basis for developing useful qualitative tools for comparing PCG systems to help designers better understand and optimize their generators. In this work we assess the efficacy of a selection of algorithms across sets of levels for 2D tile-based games by investigating how much their respective generative space compressions correlate with level behavioral characteristics. We conclude that the approach looks to be a promising one despite some inconsistency in efficacy in alternative domains, and that of the algorithms tested Multiple Correspondence Analysis appears to perform the most effectively.
summary: The past decade has seen a rapid increase in the level of research interest in procedural content generation (PCG) for digital games, and there are now numerous research avenues focused on new approaches for driving and applying PCG systems. An area in which progress has been comparatively slow is the development of generalisable approaches for comparing alternative PCG systems, especially in terms of their generative spaces. It is to this area that this paper aims to make a contribution, by exploring the utility of data compression algorithms in compressing the generative spaces of PCG systems. We hope that this approach could be the basis for developing useful qualitative tools for comparing PCG systems to help designers better understand and optimize their generators. In this work we assess the efficacy of a selection of algorithms across sets of levels for 2D tile-based games by investigating how much their respective generative space compressions correlate with level behavioral characteristics. We conclude that the approach looks to be a promising one despite some inconsistency in efficacy in alternative domains, and that of the algorithms tested Multiple Correspondence Analysis appears to perform the most effectively.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，人们对数字游戏的程序内容生成 (PCG) 的研究兴趣迅速增加，现在有许多研究途径专注于驱动和应用 PCG 系统的新方法。进展相对缓慢的一个领域是开发用于比较替代 PCG 系统的通用方法，特别是在其生成空间方面。本文旨在通过探索数据压缩算法在压缩 PCG 系统生成空间中的效用，为这一领域做出贡献。我们希望这种方法可以成为开发有用的定性工具的基础，用于比较 PCG 系统，以帮助设计人员更好地理解和优化他们的发电机。在这项工作中，我们通过调查各自的生成空间压缩与关卡行为特征的相关程度，评估了针对 2D 基于图块的游戏的关卡选择算法的有效性。我们的结论是，尽管在替代领域中的功效存在一些不一致，但该方法看起来是一种有前途的方法，并且在测试的算法中，多重对应分析似乎执行最有效。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过数据压缩算法压缩程序化内容生成器的生成空间，并评估其作为比较工具的效用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏通用方法比较不同PCG系统的生成空间，需开发有效工具辅助设计优化。
AI.method: 通过选取多种数据压缩算法，在2D瓦片游戏关卡集合中测试其生成空间压缩效果，并分析与关卡行为特征的相关性。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在部分领域有效，但存在不一致性，其中多重对应分析算法效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为比较PCG系统提供新思路，但需在更多领域验证其稳定性。

search_text: Compressing and Comparing the Generative Spaces of Procedural Content Generators 压缩和比较程序内容生成器的生成空间 The past decade has seen a rapid increase in the level of research interest in procedural content generation (PCG) for digital games, and there are now numerous research avenues focused on new approaches for driving and applying PCG systems. An area in which progress has been comparatively slow is the development of generalisable approaches for comparing alternative PCG systems, especially in terms of their generative spaces. It is to this area that this paper aims to make a contribution, by exploring the utility of data compression algorithms in compressing the generative spaces of PCG systems. We hope that this approach could be the basis for developing useful qualitative tools for comparing PCG systems to help designers better understand and optimize their generators. In this work we assess the efficacy of a selection of algorithms across sets of levels for 2D tile-based games by investigating how much their respective generative space compressions correlate with level behavioral characteristics. We conclude that the approach looks to be a promising one despite some inconsistency in efficacy in alternative domains, and that of the algorithms tested Multiple Correspondence Analysis appears to perform the most effectively. 在过去的十年中，人们对数字游戏的程序内容生成 (PCG) 的研究兴趣迅速增加，现在有许多研究途径专注于驱动和应用 PCG 系统的新方法。进展相对缓慢的一个领域是开发用于比较替代 PCG 系统的通用方法，特别是在其生成空间方面。本文旨在通过探索数据压缩算法在压缩 PCG 系统生成空间中的效用，为这一领域做出贡献。我们希望这种方法可以成为开发有用的定性工具的基础，用于比较 PCG 系统，以帮助设计人员更好地理解和优化他们的发电机。在这项工作中，我们通过调查各自的生成空间压缩与关卡行为特征的相关程度，评估了针对 2D 基于图块的游戏的关卡选择算法的有效性。我们的结论是，尽管在替代领域中的功效存在一些不一致，但该方法看起来是一种有前途的方法，并且在测试的算法中，多重对应分析似乎执行最有效。 本文旨在通过数据压缩算法压缩程序化内容生成器的生成空间，并评估其作为比较工具的效用。 Oliver Withington,Laurissa Tokarchuk cs.HC

authors_text: Xu Cheng,Hao Zhang,Yue Xin,Wen Shen,Jie Ren,Quanshi Zhang
title: Why Adversarial Training of ReLU Networks Is Difficult?
title_zh: 为什么 ReLU 网络的对抗训练很困难？
abstract: This paper mathematically derives an analytic solution of the adversarial perturbation on a ReLU network, and theoretically explains the difficulty of adversarial training. Specifically, we formulate the dynamics of the adversarial perturbation generated by the multi-step attack, which shows that the adversarial perturbation tends to strengthen eigenvectors corresponding to a few top-ranked eigenvalues of the Hessian matrix of the loss w.r.t. the input. We also prove that adversarial training tends to strengthen the influence of unconfident input samples with large gradient norms in an exponential manner. Besides, we find that adversarial training strengthens the influence of the Hessian matrix of the loss w.r.t. network parameters, which makes the adversarial training more likely to oscillate along directions of a few samples, and boosts the difficulty of adversarial training. Crucially, our proofs provide a unified explanation for previous findings in understanding adversarial training.
summary: This paper mathematically derives an analytic solution of the adversarial perturbation on a ReLU network, and theoretically explains the difficulty of adversarial training. Specifically, we formulate the dynamics of the adversarial perturbation generated by the multi-step attack, which shows that the adversarial perturbation tends to strengthen eigenvectors corresponding to a few top-ranked eigenvalues of the Hessian matrix of the loss w.r.t. the input. We also prove that adversarial training tends to strengthen the influence of unconfident input samples with large gradient norms in an exponential manner. Besides, we find that adversarial training strengthens the influence of the Hessian matrix of the loss w.r.t. network parameters, which makes the adversarial training more likely to oscillate along directions of a few samples, and boosts the difficulty of adversarial training. Crucially, our proofs provide a unified explanation for previous findings in understanding adversarial training.
abstract_zh: 本文从数学上推导了 ReLU 网络上对抗性扰动的解析解，并从理论上解释了对抗性训练的难度。具体来说，我们制定了多步攻击生成的对抗性扰动的动力学，这表明对抗性扰动倾向于强化与损失 w.r.t. 的 Hessian 矩阵的一些顶级特征值相对应的特征向量。输入。我们还证明，对抗性训练往往会以指数方式增强具有大梯度范数的不自信输入样本的影响。此外，我们发现对抗性训练增强了损失 w.r.t 的 Hessian 矩阵的影响。网络参数，这使得对抗训练更容易沿着少数样本的方向振荡，增加了对抗训练的难度。至关重要的是，我们的证明为之前理解对抗性训练的发现提供了统一的解释。

AI.tldr: 分析ReLU网络对抗训练困难的数学原因
AI.motivation: 解释对抗训练中遇到的困难现象背后的理论原因，提供统一的数学解释
AI.method: 数学推导对抗扰动解析解，分析Hessian矩阵特征向量及梯度范数对训练的影响
AI.result: 发现对抗扰动增强Hessian矩阵大特征值对应的特征向量，对抗训练指数级放大不确定样本影响，且Hessian矩阵导致训练震荡，增加难度
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练困难源于Hessian矩阵特性及样本影响的指数级放大，为理解对抗训练提供了统一理论框架
