authors_text: Jie Chen,Weiqi Liu,Zhizhong Huang,Junbin Gao,Junping Zhang,Jian Pu
title: Universal Deep GNNs: Rethinking Residual Connection in GNNs from a Path Decomposition Perspective for Preventing the Over-smoothing
title_zh: 通用深度 GNN：从路径分解的角度重新思考 GNN 中的残差连接以防止过度平滑
abstract: The performance of GNNs degrades as they become deeper due to the over-smoothing. Among all the attempts to prevent over-smoothing, residual connection is one of the promising methods due to its simplicity. However, recent studies have shown that GNNs with residual connections only slightly slow down the degeneration. The reason why residual connections fail in GNNs is still unknown. In this paper, we investigate the forward and backward behavior of GNNs with residual connections from a novel path decomposition perspective. We find that the recursive aggregation of the median length paths from the binomial distribution of residual connection paths dominates output representation, resulting in over-smoothing as GNNs go deeper. Entangled propagation and weight matrices cause gradient smoothing and prevent GNNs with residual connections from optimizing to the identity mapping. Based on these findings, we present a Universal Deep GNNs (UDGNN) framework with cold-start adaptive residual connections (DRIVE) and feedforward modules. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which achieves state-of-the-art results over non-smooth heterophily datasets by simply stacking standard GNNs.
summary: The performance of GNNs degrades as they become deeper due to the over-smoothing. Among all the attempts to prevent over-smoothing, residual connection is one of the promising methods due to its simplicity. However, recent studies have shown that GNNs with residual connections only slightly slow down the degeneration. The reason why residual connections fail in GNNs is still unknown. In this paper, we investigate the forward and backward behavior of GNNs with residual connections from a novel path decomposition perspective. We find that the recursive aggregation of the median length paths from the binomial distribution of residual connection paths dominates output representation, resulting in over-smoothing as GNNs go deeper. Entangled propagation and weight matrices cause gradient smoothing and prevent GNNs with residual connections from optimizing to the identity mapping. Based on these findings, we present a Universal Deep GNNs (UDGNN) framework with cold-start adaptive residual connections (DRIVE) and feedforward modules. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which achieves state-of-the-art results over non-smooth heterophily datasets by simply stacking standard GNNs.
abstract_zh: 由于过度平滑，GNN 的性能随着深度的加深而降低。在所有防止过度平滑的尝试中，残余连接由于其简单性而成为最有前途的方法之一。然而，最近的研究表明，具有残差连接的 GNN 仅能稍微减缓退化速度。 GNN 中残差连接失败的原因仍然未知。在本文中，我们从新颖的路径分解角度研究了具有残差连接的 GNN 的前向和后向行为。我们发现，残差连接路径二项式分布的中值长度路径的递归聚合主导了输出表示，导致随着 GNN 更深层次的过度平滑。纠缠的传播和权重矩阵会导致梯度平滑，并阻止具有残差连接的 GNN 优化恒等映射。基于这些发现，我们提出了一个具有冷启动自适应残差连接 (DRIVE) 和前馈模块的通用深度 GNN (UDGNN) 框架。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性，该方法通过简单地堆叠标准 GNN，在非平滑异质数据集上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用深度图神经网络（UDGNN）框架，通过重新思考残差连接的路径分解机制，解决图神经网络（GNN）因深度增加导致的过平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 现有残差连接在GNN中仅能轻微缓解过平滑，其失效原因尚未明确，需从路径传播角度分析并设计更有效的深度GNN结构。
AI.method: 从路径分解视角分析残差连接的正向/反向传播，发现中位数长度路径的递归聚合导致过平滑，提出结合冷启动自适应残差连接（DRIVE）与前馈模块的UDGNN框架。
AI.result: 在非平滑异质性数据集上，UDGNN通过简单堆叠标准GNN实现SOTA性能，有效缓解过平滑问题。
AI.conclusion: UDGNN通过路径分解视角揭示残差连接失效机理，为设计高效深层GNN提供新思路与通用框架。

authors_text: Linjie Xu,Jorge Hurtado-Grueso,Dominic Jeurissen,Diego Perez Liebana,Alexander Dockhorn
title: Elastic Monte Carlo Tree Search with State Abstraction for Strategy Game Playing
title_zh: 用于策略游戏的具有状态抽象的弹性蒙特卡罗树搜索
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures; Published on IEEE Conference on Games 2022
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures; Published on IEEE Conference on Games 2022
abstract: Strategy video games challenge AI agents with their combinatorial search space caused by complex game elements. State abstraction is a popular technique that reduces the state space complexity. However, current state abstraction methods for games depend on domain knowledge, making their application to new games expensive. State abstraction methods that require no domain knowledge are studied extensively in the planning domain. However, no evidence shows they scale well with the complexity of strategy games. In this paper, we propose Elastic MCTS, an algorithm that uses state abstraction to play strategy games. In Elastic MCTS, the nodes of the tree are clustered dynamically, first grouped together progressively by state abstraction, and then separated when an iteration threshold is reached. The elastic changes benefit from efficient searching brought by state abstraction but avoid the negative influence of using state abstraction for the whole search. To evaluate our method, we make use of the general strategy games platform Stratega to generate scenarios of varying complexity. Results show that Elastic MCTS outperforms MCTS baselines with a large margin, while reducing the tree size by a factor of $10$. Code can be found at: https://github.com/egg-west/Stratega
summary: Strategy video games challenge AI agents with their combinatorial search space caused by complex game elements. State abstraction is a popular technique that reduces the state space complexity. However, current state abstraction methods for games depend on domain knowledge, making their application to new games expensive. State abstraction methods that require no domain knowledge are studied extensively in the planning domain. However, no evidence shows they scale well with the complexity of strategy games. In this paper, we propose Elastic MCTS, an algorithm that uses state abstraction to play strategy games. In Elastic MCTS, the nodes of the tree are clustered dynamically, first grouped together progressively by state abstraction, and then separated when an iteration threshold is reached. The elastic changes benefit from efficient searching brought by state abstraction but avoid the negative influence of using state abstraction for the whole search. To evaluate our method, we make use of the general strategy games platform Stratega to generate scenarios of varying complexity. Results show that Elastic MCTS outperforms MCTS baselines with a large margin, while reducing the tree size by a factor of $10$. Code can be found at: https://github.com/egg-west/Stratega
abstract_zh: 策略视频游戏通过复杂的游戏元素引起的组合搜索空间来挑战人工智能代理。状态抽象是一种降低状态空间复杂性的流行技术。然而，当前的游戏状态抽象方法依赖于领域知识，使得它们在新游戏中的应用成本高昂。不需要领域知识的状态抽象方法在规划领域得到了广泛的研究。然而，没有证据表明它们可以很好地适应策略游戏的复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了 Elastic MCTS，一种使用状态抽象来玩策略游戏的算法。在 Elastic MCTS 中，树的节点是动态聚集的，首先通过状态抽象逐步分组在一起，然后在达到迭代阈值时分离。弹性变化受益于状态抽象带来的高效搜索，同时避免了使用状态抽象对整个搜索带来的负面影响。为了评估我们的方法，我们利用通用策略游戏平台 Stratega 来生成不同复杂度的场景。结果表明，Elastic MCTS 的性能大幅优于 MCTS 基线，同时将树大小减小了 10 倍。代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/egg-west/Stratega

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Elastic MCTS的算法，通过动态状态抽象技术提升策略类游戏AI的搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有状态抽象方法依赖领域知识，难以适应新游戏且未验证其在复杂策略游戏中的扩展性。
AI.method: 通过动态聚类MCTS树节点，先按状态抽象逐步分组，达到迭代阈值后分离，平衡抽象效率与搜索精度。
AI.result: 在Stratega平台测试中，Elastic MCTS相较基线方法性能提升显著，树规模缩减10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需领域知识即可实现高效状态抽象，为复杂策略游戏AI提供了可扩展解决方案。

title: Towards Supporting Intelligence in 5G/6G Core Networks: NWDAF Implementation and Initial Analysis
title_zh: 迈向支持 5G/6G 核心网络智能化：NWDAF 实施和初步分析
abstract: Wireless networks, in the fifth-generation and beyond, must support diverse network applications which will support the numerous and demanding connections of today's and tomorrow's devices. Requirements such as high data rates, low latencies, and reliability are crucial considerations and artificial intelligence is incorporated to achieve these requirements for a large number of connected devices. Specifically, intelligent methods and frameworks for advanced analysis are employed by the 5G Core Network Data Analytics Function (NWDAF) to detect patterns and ascribe detailed action information to accommodate end users and improve network performance. To this end, the work presented in this paper incorporates a functional NWDAF into a 5G network developed using open source software. Furthermore, an analysis of the network data collected by the NWDAF and the valuable insights which can be drawn from it have been presented with detailed Network Function interactions. An example application of such insights used for intelligent network management is outlined. Finally, the expected limitations of 5G networks are discussed as motivation for the development of 6G networks.
summary: Wireless networks, in the fifth-generation and beyond, must support diverse network applications which will support the numerous and demanding connections of today's and tomorrow's devices. Requirements such as high data rates, low latencies, and reliability are crucial considerations and artificial intelligence is incorporated to achieve these requirements for a large number of connected devices. Specifically, intelligent methods and frameworks for advanced analysis are employed by the 5G Core Network Data Analytics Function (NWDAF) to detect patterns and ascribe detailed action information to accommodate end users and improve network performance. To this end, the work presented in this paper incorporates a functional NWDAF into a 5G network developed using open source software. Furthermore, an analysis of the network data collected by the NWDAF and the valuable insights which can be drawn from it have been presented with detailed Network Function interactions. An example application of such insights used for intelligent network management is outlined. Finally, the expected limitations of 5G networks are discussed as motivation for the development of 6G networks.
abstract_zh: 第五代及以后的无线网络必须支持多样化的网络应用，这些应用将支持当今和未来设备的大量且高要求的连接。高数据速率、低延迟和可靠性等要求是至关重要的考虑因素，并结合人工智能来满足大量连接设备的这些要求。具体来说，5G 核心网络数据分析功能 (NWDAF) 采用用于高级分析的智能方法和框架来检测模式并归属详细的操作信息，以适应最终用户并提高网络性能。为此，本文提出的工作将功能性 NWDAF 纳入使用开源软件开发的 5G 网络中。此外，还通过详细的网络功能交互对 NWDAF 收集的网络数据进行了分析，并从中得出了宝贵的见解。概述了此类见解用于智能网络管理的示例应用。最后，讨论了 5G 网络的预期局限性，作为 6G 网络发展的动力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过实现5G核心网络中的NWDAF功能，并分析其收集的网络数据，探索人工智能在支持5G/6G网络智能管理中的应用。
AI.motivation: 5G网络需满足高数据速率、低延迟等需求，但存在性能瓶颈，需通过人工智能技术提升网络效率，并为6G发展提供基础。
AI.method: 基于开源软件构建5G网络环境，集成NWDAF功能模块，收集并分析网络数据，结合网络功能交互生成智能管理应用案例。
AI.result: 验证了NWDAF在模式识别与网络优化中的潜力，展示了数据驱动的智能决策案例，并指出现有5G架构的局限性。
AI.conclusion: NWDAF的AI能力可提升5G网络性能，但6G需进一步突破现有技术限制以满足未来更复杂的网络需求。

title: OOD Link Prediction Generalization Capabilities of Message-Passing GNNs in Larger Test Graphs
title_zh: 较大测试图中消息传递 GNN 的 OOD 链路预测泛化能力
abstract: This work provides the first theoretical study on the ability of graph Message Passing Neural Networks (gMPNNs) -- such as Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) -- to perform inductive out-of-distribution (OOD) link prediction tasks, where deployment (test) graph sizes are larger than training graphs. We first prove non-asymptotic bounds showing that link predictors based on permutation-equivariant (structural) node embeddings obtained by gMPNNs can converge to a random guess as test graphs get larger. We then propose a theoretically-sound gMPNN that outputs structural pairwise (2-node) embeddings and prove non-asymptotic bounds showing that, as test graphs grow, these embeddings converge to embeddings of a continuous function that retains its ability to predict links OOD. Empirical results on random graphs show agreement with our theoretical results.
summary: This work provides the first theoretical study on the ability of graph Message Passing Neural Networks (gMPNNs) -- such as Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) -- to perform inductive out-of-distribution (OOD) link prediction tasks, where deployment (test) graph sizes are larger than training graphs. We first prove non-asymptotic bounds showing that link predictors based on permutation-equivariant (structural) node embeddings obtained by gMPNNs can converge to a random guess as test graphs get larger. We then propose a theoretically-sound gMPNN that outputs structural pairwise (2-node) embeddings and prove non-asymptotic bounds showing that, as test graphs grow, these embeddings converge to embeddings of a continuous function that retains its ability to predict links OOD. Empirical results on random graphs show agreement with our theoretical results.
abstract_zh: 这项工作首次对图消息传递神经网络 (gMPNN)（例如图神经网络 (GNN)）执行归纳分布外 (OOD) 链路预测任务的能力进行了理论研究，其中部署（测试）图大小大于训练图。我们首先证明非渐近边界，表明当测试图变大时，基于 gMPNN 获得的排列等变（结构）节点嵌入的链接预测器可以收敛到随机猜测。然后，我们提出了一个理论上合理的 gMPNN，它输出结构成对（2 节点）嵌入，并证明非渐近边界，表明随着测试图的增长，这些嵌入收敛到连续函数的嵌入，该函数保留了预测链接 OOD 的能力。随机图的经验结果与我们的理论结果一致。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了消息传递图神经网络（gMPNNs）在更大测试图中的分布外（OOD）链接预测泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分分析测试图规模大于训练图时gMPNNs的泛化性能，而实际应用中测试图可能显著更大，导致模型退化。
AI.method: 理论分析非渐近界证明传统嵌入方法的局限性，并提出输出结构化成对嵌入的gMPNN，证明其嵌入收敛于保留OOD预测能力的连续函数。
AI.result: 随机图实验验证理论结论，显示新方法在更大测试图中保持链接预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 传统gMPNNs在测试图增大时泛化能力有限，而结构化嵌入方法可有效提升OOD预测性能，为鲁棒GNN设计提供理论指导。

motivation: 现有研究未充分分析测试图规模大于训练图时gMPNNs的泛化性能，而实际应用中测试图可能显著更大，导致模型退化。
method: 理论分析非渐近界证明传统嵌入方法的局限性，并提出输出结构化成对嵌入的gMPNN，证明其嵌入收敛于保留OOD预测能力的连续函数。
result: 随机图实验验证理论结论，显示新方法在更大测试图中保持链接预测能力。
conclusion: 传统gMPNNs在测试图增大时泛化能力有限，而结构化嵌入方法可有效提升OOD预测性能，为鲁棒GNN设计提供理论指导。
search_text: OOD Link Prediction Generalization Capabilities of Message-Passing GNNs in Larger Test Graphs 较大测试图中消息传递 GNN 的 OOD 链路预测泛化能力 This work provides the first theoretical study on the ability of graph Message Passing Neural Networks (gMPNNs) -- such as Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) -- to perform inductive out-of-distribution (OOD) link prediction tasks, where deployment (test) graph sizes are larger than training graphs. We first prove non-asymptotic bounds showing that link predictors based on permutation-equivariant (structural) node embeddings obtained by gMPNNs can converge to a random guess as test graphs get larger. We then propose a theoretically-sound gMPNN that outputs structural pairwise (2-node) embeddings and prove non-asymptotic bounds showing that, as test graphs grow, these embeddings converge to embeddings of a continuous function that retains its ability to predict links OOD. Empirical results on random graphs show agreement with our theoretical results. 这项工作首次对图消息传递神经网络 (gMPNN)（例如图神经网络 (GNN)）执行归纳分布外 (OOD) 链路预测任务的能力进行了理论研究，其中部署（测试）图大小大于训练图。我们首先证明非渐近边界，表明当测试图变大时，基于 gMPNN 获得的排列等变（结构）节点嵌入的链接预测器可以收敛到随机猜测。然后，我们提出了一个理论上合理的 gMPNN，它输出结构成对（2 节点）嵌入，并证明非渐近边界，表明随着测试图的增长，这些嵌入收敛到连续函数的嵌入，该函数保留了预测链接 OOD 的能力。随机图的经验结果与我们的理论结果一致。 本文探讨了消息传递图神经网络（gMPNNs）在更大测试图中的分布外（OOD）链接预测泛化能力。 Yangze Zhou,Gitta Kutyniok,Bruno Ribeiro cs.LG,cs.AI,math.NA,stat.ML

title: Robotic grasp detection based on Transformer
title_zh: 基于Transformer的机器人抓取检测
abstract: Grasp detection in a cluttered environment is still a great challenge for robots. Currently, the Transformer mechanism has been successfully applied to visual tasks, and its excellent ability of global context information extraction provides a feasible way to improve the performance of robotic grasp detection in cluttered scenes. However, the insufficient inductive bias ability of the original Transformer model requires large-scale datasets training, which is difficult to obtain for grasp detection. In this paper, we propose a grasp detection model based on encoder-decoder structure. The encoder uses a Transformer network to extract global context information. The decoder uses a fully convolutional neural network to improve the inductive bias capability of the model and combine features extracted by the encoder to predict the final grasp configuration. Experiments on the VMRD dataset demonstrate that our model performs much better in overlapping object scenes. Meanwhile, on the Cornell Grasp dataset, our approach achieves an accuracy of 98.1%, which is comparable with state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: Grasp detection in a cluttered environment is still a great challenge for robots. Currently, the Transformer mechanism has been successfully applied to visual tasks, and its excellent ability of global context information extraction provides a feasible way to improve the performance of robotic grasp detection in cluttered scenes. However, the insufficient inductive bias ability of the original Transformer model requires large-scale datasets training, which is difficult to obtain for grasp detection. In this paper, we propose a grasp detection model based on encoder-decoder structure. The encoder uses a Transformer network to extract global context information. The decoder uses a fully convolutional neural network to improve the inductive bias capability of the model and combine features extracted by the encoder to predict the final grasp configuration. Experiments on the VMRD dataset demonstrate that our model performs much better in overlapping object scenes. Meanwhile, on the Cornell Grasp dataset, our approach achieves an accuracy of 98.1%, which is comparable with state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 杂乱环境中的抓取检测对于机器人来说仍然是一个巨大的挑战。目前，Transformer机制已成功应用于视觉任务，其出色的全局上下文信息提取能力为提高杂乱场景中机器人抓取检测的性能提供了可行的途径。然而，原始Transformer模型的归纳偏置能力不足，需要大规模数据集训练，这对于抓取检测来说很难获得。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于编码器-解码器结构的抓取检测模型。编码器使用 Transformer 网络来提取全局上下文信息。解码器使用全卷积神经网络来提高模型的归纳偏置能力，并结合编码器提取的特征来预测最终的抓取配置。 VMRD 数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型在重叠对象场景中表现更好。同时，在 Cornell Grasp 数据集上，我们的方法达到了 98.1% 的准确率，与最先进的算法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于编码器-解码器结构的机械臂抓取检测模型，利用Transformer提取全局上下文信息并结合全卷积网络提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer归纳偏置能力不足需依赖大规模数据，而抓取检测数据获取困难，需设计更高效模型结构。
AI.method: 编码器采用Transformer网络提取全局特征，解码器使用全卷积网络增强归纳偏置并融合编码器特征预测抓取姿态。
AI.result: 在VMRD数据集上重叠物体场景表现优异，在Cornell数据集上达到98.1%准确率，与先进算法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过结构创新有效提升了杂乱场景抓取检测性能，为小样本场景提供了可行解决方案。

title: Proper Posture: Designing Posture Feedback Across Musical Instruments
title_zh: 正确的姿势：设计跨乐器的姿势反馈
comment: CHI 22, Workshop "Intelligent Music Interfaces: When Interactive Assistance and Augmentation Meet Musical Instruments"
comments: CHI 22, Workshop "Intelligent Music Interfaces: When Interactive Assistance and Augmentation Meet Musical Instruments"
abstract: There is a recommended body posture and hand position for playing every musical instrument, allowing efficient and quick movements without blockage. Due to humans' limited cognitive capabilities, they struggle to concentrate on several things simultaneously and thus sometimes lose the correct position while playing their instrument. Incorrect positions when playing an instrument can lead to injuries and movement disorders in the long run. Previous work in HCI mainly focused on developing systems to assist in learning an instrument. However, the design space for posture correction when playing a musical instrument has not yet been explored. In this position paper, we present our vision of providing subtle vibrotactile or thermal feedback to guide the focus of attention back to the correct posture when playing a musical instrument. We discuss our concept with a focus on motion recognition and feedback modalities. Finally, we outline the next steps for future research.
summary: There is a recommended body posture and hand position for playing every musical instrument, allowing efficient and quick movements without blockage. Due to humans' limited cognitive capabilities, they struggle to concentrate on several things simultaneously and thus sometimes lose the correct position while playing their instrument. Incorrect positions when playing an instrument can lead to injuries and movement disorders in the long run. Previous work in HCI mainly focused on developing systems to assist in learning an instrument. However, the design space for posture correction when playing a musical instrument has not yet been explored. In this position paper, we present our vision of providing subtle vibrotactile or thermal feedback to guide the focus of attention back to the correct posture when playing a musical instrument. We discuss our concept with a focus on motion recognition and feedback modalities. Finally, we outline the next steps for future research.
abstract_zh: 演奏每种乐器时都有推荐的身体姿势和手部位置，可实现高效、快速的移动而不会出现阻塞。由于人类认知能力有限，他们很难同时专注于几件事，因此有时在演奏乐器时会失去正确的位置。从长远来看，演奏乐器时不正确的位置可能会导致受伤和运动障碍。之前在人机交互方面的工作主要集中在开发辅助学习乐器的系统。然而，演奏乐器时的姿势矫正的设计空间尚未被探索。在这份立场文件中，我们提出了我们的愿景，即提供微妙的振动触觉或热反馈，以引导注意力的焦点回到演奏乐器时的正确姿势。我们讨论我们的概念，重点是动作识别和反馈方式。最后，我们概述了未来研究的后续步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种通过触觉或热反馈帮助音乐演奏者保持正确姿势的系统，以解决演奏过程中因姿势错误导致的伤害问题。
AI.motivation: 人类在演奏乐器时难以同时关注多个任务，容易导致姿势错误，长期可能引发损伤。现有研究主要聚焦于乐器学习辅助，缺乏针对姿势矫正的探索。
AI.method: 提出利用振动或热反馈技术，结合运动识别与反馈模态，引导演奏者注意力回归正确姿势，并讨论相关设计概念。
AI.result: 提出了姿势矫正反馈系统的初步构想，明确了未来研究方向，但尚未进行实证验证。
AI.conclusion: 通过探索触觉/热反馈模态，可为音乐演奏姿势矫正提供创新方案，需进一步研究其有效性与适用性。

title: CHALLENGER: Training with Attribution Maps
title_zh: CHALLENGER：使用归因图进行培训
abstract: We show that utilizing attribution maps for training neural networks can improve regularization of models and thus increase performance. Regularization is key in deep learning, especially when training complex models on relatively small datasets. In order to understand inner workings of neural networks, attribution methods such as Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP) have been extensively studied, particularly for interpreting the relevance of input features. We introduce Challenger, a module that leverages the explainable power of attribution maps in order to manipulate particularly relevant input patterns. Therefore, exposing and subsequently resolving regions of ambiguity towards separating classes on the ground-truth data manifold, an issue that arises particularly when training models on rather small datasets. Our Challenger module increases model performance through building more diverse filters within the network and can be applied to any input data domain. We demonstrate that our approach results in substantially better classification as well as calibration performance on datasets with only a few samples up to datasets with thousands of samples. In particular, we show that our generic domain-independent approach yields state-of-the-art results in vision, natural language processing and on time series tasks.
summary: We show that utilizing attribution maps for training neural networks can improve regularization of models and thus increase performance. Regularization is key in deep learning, especially when training complex models on relatively small datasets. In order to understand inner workings of neural networks, attribution methods such as Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP) have been extensively studied, particularly for interpreting the relevance of input features. We introduce Challenger, a module that leverages the explainable power of attribution maps in order to manipulate particularly relevant input patterns. Therefore, exposing and subsequently resolving regions of ambiguity towards separating classes on the ground-truth data manifold, an issue that arises particularly when training models on rather small datasets. Our Challenger module increases model performance through building more diverse filters within the network and can be applied to any input data domain. We demonstrate that our approach results in substantially better classification as well as calibration performance on datasets with only a few samples up to datasets with thousands of samples. In particular, we show that our generic domain-independent approach yields state-of-the-art results in vision, natural language processing and on time series tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们表明，利用归因图训练神经网络可以改善模型的正则化，从而提高性能。正则化是深度学习的关键，尤其是在相对较小的数据集上训练复杂模型时。为了理解神经网络的内部工作原理，诸如分层相关性传播（LRP）之类的归因方法已被广泛研究，特别是用于解释输入特征的相关性。我们引入了 Challenger，这个模块利用归因图的可解释能力来操纵特别相关的输入模式。因此，暴露并随后解决在真实数据流形上分离类别的模糊区域，这是一个在相当小的数据集上训练模型时尤其会出现的问题。我们的挑战者模块通过在网络内构建更多样化的过滤器来提高模型性能，并且可以应用于任何输入数据域。我们证明，我们的方法可以在只有少数样本的数据集到具有数千个样本的数据集上带来更好的分类和校准性能。特别是，我们展示了我们的通用的独立于领域的方法在视觉、自然语言处理和时间序列任务方面产生了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过归因图训练神经网络以提升正则化效果和模型性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习中正则化对小数据集训练至关重要，而归因方法可解释输入特征相关性，但未被有效用于训练优化。
AI.method: 引入Challenger模块，利用归因图（如LRP）调整关键输入模式，增强网络滤波器多样性并解决类别间模糊区域。
AI.result: 在少量样本到数千样本的数据集上，分类和校准性能显著提升，在视觉、NLP和时间序列任务中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: Challenger模块通过归因图增强模型鲁棒性，其领域无关性使方法具有广泛适用性。

search_text: CHALLENGER: Training with Attribution Maps CHALLENGER：使用归因图进行培训 We show that utilizing attribution maps for training neural networks can improve regularization of models and thus increase performance. Regularization is key in deep learning, especially when training complex models on relatively small datasets. In order to understand inner workings of neural networks, attribution methods such as Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP) have been extensively studied, particularly for interpreting the relevance of input features. We introduce Challenger, a module that leverages the explainable power of attribution maps in order to manipulate particularly relevant input patterns. Therefore, exposing and subsequently resolving regions of ambiguity towards separating classes on the ground-truth data manifold, an issue that arises particularly when training models on rather small datasets. Our Challenger module increases model performance through building more diverse filters within the network and can be applied to any input data domain. We demonstrate that our approach results in substantially better classification as well as calibration performance on datasets with only a few samples up to datasets with thousands of samples. In particular, we show that our generic domain-independent approach yields state-of-the-art results in vision, natural language processing and on time series tasks. 我们表明，利用归因图训练神经网络可以改善模型的正则化，从而提高性能。正则化是深度学习的关键，尤其是在相对较小的数据集上训练复杂模型时。为了理解神经网络的内部工作原理，诸如分层相关性传播（LRP）之类的归因方法已被广泛研究，特别是用于解释输入特征的相关性。我们引入了 Challenger，这个模块利用归因图的可解释能力来操纵特别相关的输入模式。因此，暴露并随后解决在真实数据流形上分离类别的模糊区域，这是一个在相当小的数据集上训练模型时尤其会出现的问题。我们的挑战者模块通过在网络内构建更多样化的过滤器来提高模型性能，并且可以应用于任何输入数据域。我们证明，我们的方法可以在只有少数样本的数据集到具有数千个样本的数据集上带来更好的分类和校准性能。特别是，我们展示了我们的通用的独立于领域的方法在视觉、自然语言处理和时间序列任务方面产生了最先进的结果。 本文提出通过归因图训练神经网络以提升正则化效果和模型性能。 Christian Tomani,Daniel Cremers cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Di Jin,Luzhi Wang,Yizhen Zheng,Xiang Li,Fei Jiang,Wei Lin,Shirui Pan
title: CGMN: A Contrastive Graph Matching Network for Self-Supervised Graph Similarity Learning
title_zh: CGMN：用于自监督图相似性学习的对比图匹配网络
abstract: Graph similarity learning refers to calculating the similarity score between two graphs, which is required in many realistic applications, such as visual tracking, graph classification, and collaborative filtering. As most of the existing graph neural networks yield effective graph representations of a single graph, little effort has been made for jointly learning two graph representations and calculating their similarity score. In addition, existing unsupervised graph similarity learning methods are mainly clustering-based, which ignores the valuable information embodied in graph pairs. To this end, we propose a contrastive graph matching network (CGMN) for self-supervised graph similarity learning in order to calculate the similarity between any two input graph objects. Specifically, we generate two augmented views for each graph in a pair respectively. Then, we employ two strategies, namely cross-view interaction and cross-graph interaction, for effective node representation learning. The former is resorted to strengthen the consistency of node representations in two views. The latter is utilized to identify node differences between different graphs. Finally, we transform node representations into graph-level representations via pooling operations for graph similarity computation. We have evaluated CGMN on eight real-world datasets, and the experiment results show that the proposed new approach is superior to the state-of-the-art methods in graph similarity learning downstream tasks.
summary: Graph similarity learning refers to calculating the similarity score between two graphs, which is required in many realistic applications, such as visual tracking, graph classification, and collaborative filtering. As most of the existing graph neural networks yield effective graph representations of a single graph, little effort has been made for jointly learning two graph representations and calculating their similarity score. In addition, existing unsupervised graph similarity learning methods are mainly clustering-based, which ignores the valuable information embodied in graph pairs. To this end, we propose a contrastive graph matching network (CGMN) for self-supervised graph similarity learning in order to calculate the similarity between any two input graph objects. Specifically, we generate two augmented views for each graph in a pair respectively. Then, we employ two strategies, namely cross-view interaction and cross-graph interaction, for effective node representation learning. The former is resorted to strengthen the consistency of node representations in two views. The latter is utilized to identify node differences between different graphs. Finally, we transform node representations into graph-level representations via pooling operations for graph similarity computation. We have evaluated CGMN on eight real-world datasets, and the experiment results show that the proposed new approach is superior to the state-of-the-art methods in graph similarity learning downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 图相似度学习是指计算两个图之间的相似度分数，这在许多实际应用中都是必需的，例如视觉跟踪、图分类和协同过滤。由于大多数现有的图神经网络都能产生单个图的有效图表示，因此在联合学习两个图表示并计算它们的相似度得分方面付出的努力很少。此外，现有的无监督图相似度学习方法主要是基于聚类的，忽略了图对所体现的有价值的信息。为此，我们提出了一种用于自监督图相似度学习的对比图匹配网络（CGMN），以计算任意两个输入图对象之间的相似度。具体来说，我们分别为一对中的每个图生成两个增强视图。然后，我们采用两种策略，即跨视图交互和跨图交互，来进行有效的节点表示学习。前者是为了加强两个视图中节点表示的一致性。后者用于识别不同图之间的节点差异。最后，我们通过池化操作将节点表示转换为图级表示以进行图相似度计算。我们在八个真实数据集上评估了 CGMN，实验结果表明，所提出的新方法优于图相似性学习下游任务中最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督图相似性学习方法CGMN，通过对比学习框架计算任意两个输入图的相似度。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络主要关注单图表示学习，缺乏对图对联合表示学习和相似度计算的研究；无监督方法多基于聚类，未能有效利用图对信息。
AI.method: 生成图对的两个增强视图，采用跨视图交互增强节点表示一致性，跨图交互识别图间差异，通过池化操作生成图级表示进行相似度计算。
AI.result: 在八个真实数据集上的实验表明，CGMN在图相似性学习下游任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CGMN通过对比学习有效捕捉图结构信息，为自监督图相似性学习提供了新思路。

title: Improved Algorithms for Bandit with Graph Feedback via Regret Decomposition
title_zh: 通过遗憾分解改进带有图反馈的 Bandit 算法
abstract: The problem of bandit with graph feedback generalizes both the multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem and the learning with expert advice problem by encoding in a directed graph how the loss vector can be observed in each round of the game. The mini-max regret is closely related to the structure of the feedback graph and their connection is far from being fully understood. We propose a new algorithmic framework for the problem based on a partition of the feedback graph. Our analysis reveals the interplay between various parts of the graph by decomposing the regret to the sum of the regret caused by small parts and the regret caused by their interaction. As a result, our algorithm can be viewed as an interpolation and generalization of the optimal algorithms for MAB and learning with expert advice. Our framework unifies previous algorithms for both strongly observable graphs and weakly observable graphs, resulting in improved and optimal regret bounds on a wide range of graph families including graphs of bounded degree and strongly observable graphs with a few corrupted arms.
summary: The problem of bandit with graph feedback generalizes both the multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem and the learning with expert advice problem by encoding in a directed graph how the loss vector can be observed in each round of the game. The mini-max regret is closely related to the structure of the feedback graph and their connection is far from being fully understood. We propose a new algorithmic framework for the problem based on a partition of the feedback graph. Our analysis reveals the interplay between various parts of the graph by decomposing the regret to the sum of the regret caused by small parts and the regret caused by their interaction. As a result, our algorithm can be viewed as an interpolation and generalization of the optimal algorithms for MAB and learning with expert advice. Our framework unifies previous algorithms for both strongly observable graphs and weakly observable graphs, resulting in improved and optimal regret bounds on a wide range of graph families including graphs of bounded degree and strongly observable graphs with a few corrupted arms.
abstract_zh: 图反馈老虎机问题通过在有向图中编码如何在每轮游戏中观察到损失向量，概括了多臂老虎机（MAB）问题和专家建议学习问题。最小最大遗憾与反馈图的结构密切相关，并且它们之间的联系还远未被完全理解。我们针对该问题提出了一种基于反馈图分区的新算法框架。我们的分析通过将遗憾分解为小部分引起的遗憾和它们相互作用引起的遗憾之和，揭示了图的各个部分之间的相互作用。因此，我们的算法可以被视为 MAB 最佳算法的插值和概括以及专家建议的学习。我们的框架统一了先前强可观察图和弱可观察图的算法，从而在各种图族上实现了改进和最佳的后悔边界，包括有界度图和具有一些损坏臂的强可观察图。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于反馈图划分的新算法框架，通过遗憾分解来改进带图反馈的强盗问题算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法对反馈图结构的利用不足，导致遗憾界未达最优，需更有效的方法。
AI.method: 通过将反馈图划分为子图，并分解遗憾为各子图及交互部分的总和，设计统一算法框架。
AI.result: 在多种图家族（如度数有界图、强可观测图）中取得更优的遗憾界，并统一了不同场景的算法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了图结构与遗憾的关系，为带图反馈的强盗问题提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

The mini-max regret is closely related to the structure of the feedback graph and their connection is far from being fully understood. We propose a new algorithmic framework for the problem based on a partition of the feedback graph. Our analysis reveals the interplay between various parts of the graph by decomposing the regret to the sum of the regret caused by small parts and the regret caused by their interaction. As a result, our algorithm can be viewed as an interpolation and generalization of the optimal algorithms for MAB and learning with expert advice. Our framework unifies previous algorithms for both strongly observable graphs and weakly observable graphs, resulting in improved and optimal regret bounds on a wide range of graph families including graphs of bounded degree and strongly observable graphs with a few corrupted arms. 图反馈老虎机问题通过在有向图中编码如何在每轮游戏中观察到损失向量，概括了多臂老虎机（MAB）问题和专家建议学习问题。最小最大遗憾与反馈图的结构密切相关，并且它们之间的联系还远未被完全理解。我们针对该问题提出了一种基于反馈图分区的新算法框架。我们的分析通过将遗憾分解为小部分引起的遗憾和它们相互作用引起的遗憾之和，揭示了图的各个部分之间的相互作用。因此，我们的算法可以被视为 MAB 最佳算法的插值和概括以及专家建议的学习。我们的框架统一了先前强可观察图和弱可观察图的算法，从而在各种图族上实现了改进和最佳的后悔边界，包括有界度图和具有一些损坏臂的强可观察图。 提出一种基于反馈图划分的新算法框架，通过遗憾分解来改进带图反馈的强盗问题算法。 Yuchen He,Chihao Zhang cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Bingxin Zhou,Xuebin Zheng,Yu Guang Wang,Ming Li,Junbin Gao
title: Embedding Graphs on Grassmann Manifold
title_zh: 在 Grassmann 流形上嵌入图
abstract: Learning efficient graph representation is the key to favorably addressing downstream tasks on graphs, such as node or graph property prediction. Given the non-Euclidean structural property of graphs, preserving the original graph data's similarity relationship in the embedded space needs specific tools and a similarity metric. This paper develops a new graph representation learning scheme, namely EGG, which embeds approximated second-order graph characteristics into a Grassmann manifold. The proposed strategy leverages graph convolutions to learn hidden representations of the corresponding subspace of the graph, which is then mapped to a Grassmann point of a low dimensional manifold through truncated singular value decomposition (SVD). The established graph embedding approximates denoised correlationship of node attributes, as implemented in the form of a symmetric matrix space for Euclidean calculation. The effectiveness of EGG is demonstrated using both clustering and classification tasks at the node level and graph level. It outperforms baseline models on various benchmarks.
summary: Learning efficient graph representation is the key to favorably addressing downstream tasks on graphs, such as node or graph property prediction. Given the non-Euclidean structural property of graphs, preserving the original graph data's similarity relationship in the embedded space needs specific tools and a similarity metric. This paper develops a new graph representation learning scheme, namely EGG, which embeds approximated second-order graph characteristics into a Grassmann manifold. The proposed strategy leverages graph convolutions to learn hidden representations of the corresponding subspace of the graph, which is then mapped to a Grassmann point of a low dimensional manifold through truncated singular value decomposition (SVD). The established graph embedding approximates denoised correlationship of node attributes, as implemented in the form of a symmetric matrix space for Euclidean calculation. The effectiveness of EGG is demonstrated using both clustering and classification tasks at the node level and graph level. It outperforms baseline models on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 学习高效的图表示是顺利解决图下游任务（例如节点或图属性预测）的关键。考虑到图的非欧几里得结构特性，在嵌入空间中保留原始图数据的相似关系需要特定的工具和相似度度量。本文开发了一种新的图表示学习方案，即EGG，它将近似的二阶图特征嵌入到格拉斯曼流形中。所提出的策略利用图卷积来学习图的相应子空间的隐藏表示，然后通过截断奇异值分解（SVD）将其映射到低维流形的格拉斯曼点。所建立的图嵌入近似于节点属性的去噪相关性，以用于欧几里得计算的对称矩阵空间的形式实现。 EGG 的有效性通过节点级别和图级别的聚类和分类任务来证明。它在各种基准上都优于基准模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EGG的新方法，通过将近似的二阶图特征嵌入到Grassmann流形中，以实现高效的图表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统图表示方法难以有效保留非欧几里得结构下的相似性关系，需要特定工具和度量来提升下游任务性能。
AI.method: 利用图卷积学习图的子空间表示，通过截断奇异值分解（SVD）将其映射到低维Grassmann流形，并通过对称矩阵空间实现欧几里得计算。
AI.result: 在节点级和图级的聚类与分类任务中，EGG在多个基准数据集上优于现有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: EGG通过流形嵌入有效捕捉图结构与节点属性关系，为图表示学习提供了新思路。

title: On the External Validity of Average-Case Analyses of Graph Algorithms
title_zh: 论图算法平均情况分析的外部有效性
abstract: The number one criticism of average-case analysis is that we do not actually know the probability distribution of real-world inputs. Thus, analyzing an algorithm on some random model has no implications for practical performance. At its core, this criticism doubts the existence of external validity, i.e., it assumes that algorithmic behavior on the somewhat simple and clean models does not translate beyond the models to practical performance real-world input. With this paper, we provide a first step towards studying the question of external validity systematically. To this end, we evaluate the performance of six graph algorithms on a collection of 2740 sparse real-world networks depending on two properties; the heterogeneity (variance in the degree distribution) and locality (tendency of edges to connect vertices that are already close). We compare this with the performance on generated networks with varying locality and heterogeneity. We find that the performance in the idealized setting of network models translates surprisingly well to real-world networks. Moreover, heterogeneity and locality appear to be the core properties impacting the performance of many graph algorithms.
summary: The number one criticism of average-case analysis is that we do not actually know the probability distribution of real-world inputs. Thus, analyzing an algorithm on some random model has no implications for practical performance. At its core, this criticism doubts the existence of external validity, i.e., it assumes that algorithmic behavior on the somewhat simple and clean models does not translate beyond the models to practical performance real-world input. With this paper, we provide a first step towards studying the question of external validity systematically. To this end, we evaluate the performance of six graph algorithms on a collection of 2740 sparse real-world networks depending on two properties; the heterogeneity (variance in the degree distribution) and locality (tendency of edges to connect vertices that are already close). We compare this with the performance on generated networks with varying locality and heterogeneity. We find that the performance in the idealized setting of network models translates surprisingly well to real-world networks. Moreover, heterogeneity and locality appear to be the core properties impacting the performance of many graph algorithms.
abstract_zh: 对平均情况分析的第一个批评是我们实际上并不知道现实世界输入的概率分布。因此，在某些随机模型上分析算法对实际性能没有影响。从本质上讲，这种批评怀疑外部有效性的存在，即它假设稍微简单和干净的模型上的算法行为不会转化为超出模型的实际性能现实世界的输入。通过这篇论文，我们为系统地研究外部效度问题迈出了第一步。为此，我们根据两个属性在 2740 个稀疏现实网络的集合上评估六种图算法的性能；异质性（度分布的方差）和局部性（边连接已经接近的顶点的倾向）。我们将其与具有不同局部性和异构性的生成网络的性能进行比较。我们发现网络模型的理想化设置中的性能令人惊讶地很好地转化为现实世界的网络。此外，异构性和局部性似乎是影响许多图算法性能的核心属性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图算法平均情况分析的外部效度，通过比较理想化网络模型与真实世界网络的性能，验证理论分析对实际应用的指导意义。
AI.motivation: 平均情况分析常被批评无法反映真实输入分布，导致理论结果与实际性能脱节。本文旨在系统研究该问题，验证理想化模型是否能有效预测真实网络中的算法表现。
AI.method: 在2740个真实稀疏网络和生成网络上测试六种图算法，分析异质性（度分布方差）和局部性（边连接邻近节点倾向）对性能的影响，并对比不同模型间的性能差异。
AI.result: 理想化模型的性能预测与真实网络表现高度吻合，异质性和局部性被证实为影响多数图算法性能的核心因素。
AI.conclusion: 平均情况分析具备外部效度，异质性与局部性是连接理论模型与实际应用的关键桥梁，为算法设计提供可依赖的理论依据。

title: A Transistor Operations Model for Deep Learning Energy Consumption Scaling Law
title_zh: 用于深度学习能耗缩放定律的晶体管操作模型
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) has transformed the automation of a wide range of industries and finds increasing ubiquity in society. The high complexity of DL models and its widespread adoption has led to global energy consumption doubling every 3-4 months. Currently, the relationship between the DL model configuration and energy consumption is not well established. At a general computational energy model level, there is both strong dependency to both the hardware architecture (e.g. generic processors with different configuration of inner components- CPU and GPU, programmable integrated circuits - FPGA), as well as different interacting energy consumption aspects (e.g., data movement, calculation, control). At the DL model level, we need to translate non-linear activation functions and its interaction with data into calculation tasks. Current methods mainly linearize nonlinear DL models to approximate its theoretical FLOPs and MACs as a proxy for energy consumption. Yet, this is inaccurate (est. 93\% accuracy) due to the highly nonlinear nature of many convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for example. In this paper, we develop a bottom-level Transistor Operations (TOs) method to expose the role of non-linear activation functions and neural network structure in energy consumption. We translate a range of feedforward and CNN models into ALU calculation tasks and then TO steps. This is then statistically linked to real energy consumption values via a regression model for different hardware configurations and data sets. We show that our proposed TOs method can achieve a 93.61% - 99.51% precision in predicting its energy consumption.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) has transformed the automation of a wide range of industries and finds increasing ubiquity in society. The high complexity of DL models and its widespread adoption has led to global energy consumption doubling every 3-4 months. Currently, the relationship between the DL model configuration and energy consumption is not well established. At a general computational energy model level, there is both strong dependency to both the hardware architecture (e.g. generic processors with different configuration of inner components- CPU and GPU, programmable integrated circuits - FPGA), as well as different interacting energy consumption aspects (e.g., data movement, calculation, control). At the DL model level, we need to translate non-linear activation functions and its interaction with data into calculation tasks. Current methods mainly linearize nonlinear DL models to approximate its theoretical FLOPs and MACs as a proxy for energy consumption. Yet, this is inaccurate (est. 93\% accuracy) due to the highly nonlinear nature of many convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for example. In this paper, we develop a bottom-level Transistor Operations (TOs) method to expose the role of non-linear activation functions and neural network structure in energy consumption. We translate a range of feedforward and CNN models into ALU calculation tasks and then TO steps. This is then statistically linked to real energy consumption values via a regression model for different hardware configurations and data sets. We show that our proposed TOs method can achieve a 93.61% - 99.51% precision in predicting its energy consumption.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 改变了众多行业的自动化，并在社会中日益普及。深度学习模型的高度复杂性及其广泛采用导致全球能源消耗每 3-4 个月翻一番。目前，深度学习模型配置与能耗之间的关系尚未建立。在一般计算能量模型层面，对硬件架构（例如具有不同内部组件配置的通用处理器 - CPU 和 GPU、可编程集成电路 - FPGA）以及不同的交互能耗方面（例如数据移动、计算、控制）都具有很强的依赖性。在深度学习模型层面，我们需要将非线性激活函数及其与数据的交互转化为计算任务。当前的方法主要是对非线性深度学习模型进行线性化，以近似其理论 FLOP 和 MAC 作为能耗的代理。然而，由于许多卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的高度非线性特性，这是不准确的（估计准确率为 93%）。在本文中，我们开发了一种底层晶体管操作（TO）方法来揭示非线性激活函数和神经网络结构在能耗中的作用。我们将一系列前馈和 CNN 模型转化为 ALU 计算任务，然后转化为 TO 步骤。然后，通过针对不同硬件配置和数据集的回归模型，将其与实际能耗值进行统计关联。我们表明，我们提出的 TOs 方法在预测其能耗方面可以达到 93.61% - 99.51% 的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于晶体管操作（TOs）的深度学习能效预测模型，以更精确地量化神经网络的能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过线性化非线性模型估算能效（如FLOPs/MACS），但对卷积神经网络等非线性结构误差高达93%，无法准确反映实际能耗。
AI.method: 将前馈网络和CNN转化为ALU计算任务及晶体管操作步骤，结合不同硬件配置和数据集的回归模型建立能耗统计关联。
AI.result: 提出的TOs方法在多硬件平台和数据集上实现93.61%-99.51%的能耗预测精度，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 晶体管操作模型能有效揭示非线性激活函数与网络结构对能耗的影响，为深度学习能效优化提供理论依据。

search_text: A Transistor Operations Model for Deep Learning Energy Consumption Scaling Law 用于深度学习能耗缩放定律的晶体管操作模型 Deep Learning (DL) has transformed the automation of a wide range of industries and finds increasing ubiquity in society. The high complexity of DL models and its widespread adoption has led to global energy consumption doubling every 3-4 months. Currently, the relationship between the DL model configuration and energy consumption is not well established. At a general computational energy model level, there is both strong dependency to both the hardware architecture (e.g. generic processors with different configuration of inner components- CPU and GPU, programmable integrated circuits - FPGA), as well as different interacting energy consumption aspects (e.g., data movement, calculation, control). At the DL model level, we need to translate non-linear activation functions and its interaction with data into calculation tasks. Current methods mainly linearize nonlinear DL models to approximate its theoretical FLOPs and MACs as a proxy for energy consumption. Yet, this is inaccurate (est. 93\% accuracy) due to the highly nonlinear nature of many convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for example. In this paper, we develop a bottom-level Transistor Operations (TOs) method to expose the role of non-linear activation functions and neural network structure in energy consumption. We translate a range of feedforward and CNN models into ALU calculation tasks and then TO steps. This is then statistically linked to real energy consumption values via a regression model for different hardware configurations and data sets. We show that our proposed TOs method can achieve a 93.61% - 99.51% precision in predicting its energy consumption. 深度学习 (DL) 改变了众多行业的自动化，并在社会中日益普及。深度学习模型的高度复杂性及其广泛采用导致全球能源消耗每 3-4 个月翻一番。目前，深度学习模型配置与能耗之间的关系尚未建立。在一般计算能量模型层面，对硬件架构（例如具有不同内部组件配置的通用处理器 - CPU 和 GPU、可编程集成电路 - FPGA）以及不同的交互能耗方面（例如数据移动、计算、控制）都具有很强的依赖性。在深度学习模型层面，我们需要将非线性激活函数及其与数据的交互转化为计算任务。当前的方法主要是对非线性深度学习模型进行线性化，以近似其理论 FLOP 和 MAC 作为能耗的代理。然而，由于许多卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的高度非线性特性，这是不准确的（估计准确率为 93%）。在本文中，我们开发了一种底层晶体管操作（TO）方法来揭示非线性激活函数和神经网络结构在能耗中的作用。我们将一系列前馈和 CNN 模型转化为 ALU 计算任务，然后转化为 TO 步骤。然后，通过针对不同硬件配置和数据集的回归模型，将其与实际能耗值进行统计关联。我们表明，我们提出的 TOs 方法在预测其能耗方面可以达到 93.61% - 99.51% 的精度。 本文提出一种基于晶体管操作（TOs）的深度学习能效预测模型，以更精确地量化神经网络的能耗。 Chen Li,Antonios Tsourdos,Weisi Guo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.AR

title: Deblurring Photographs of Characters Using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络对人物照片进行去模糊处理
abstract: In this paper, we present our approach for the Helsinki Deblur Challenge (HDC2021). The task of this challenge is to deblur images of characters without knowing the point spread function (PSF). The organizers provided a dataset of pairs of sharp and blurred images. Our method consists of three steps: First, we estimate a warping transformation of the images to align the sharp images with the blurred ones. Next, we estimate the PSF using a quasi-Newton method. The estimated PSF allows to generate additional pairs of sharp and blurred images. Finally, we train a deep convolutional neural network to reconstruct the sharp images from the blurred images. Our method is able to successfully reconstruct images from the first 10 stages of the HDC 2021 data. Our code is available at https://github.com/hhu-machine-learning/hdc2021-psfnn.
summary: In this paper, we present our approach for the Helsinki Deblur Challenge (HDC2021). The task of this challenge is to deblur images of characters without knowing the point spread function (PSF). The organizers provided a dataset of pairs of sharp and blurred images. Our method consists of three steps: First, we estimate a warping transformation of the images to align the sharp images with the blurred ones. Next, we estimate the PSF using a quasi-Newton method. The estimated PSF allows to generate additional pairs of sharp and blurred images. Finally, we train a deep convolutional neural network to reconstruct the sharp images from the blurred images. Our method is able to successfully reconstruct images from the first 10 stages of the HDC 2021 data. Our code is available at https://github.com/hhu-machine-learning/hdc2021-psfnn.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了赫尔辛基去模糊挑战赛 (HDC2021) 的方法。此挑战的任务是在不知道点扩散函数 (PSF) 的情况下对字符图像进行去模糊。组织者提供了一组清晰和模糊图像对的数据集。我们的方法包括三个步骤：首先，我们估计图像的扭曲变换，以将清晰图像与模糊图像对齐。接下来，我们使用拟牛顿法估计 PSF。估计的 PSF 允许生成额外的清晰和模糊图像对。最后，我们训练深度卷积神经网络来从模糊图像中重建清晰图像。我们的方法能够成功地从 HDC 2021 数据的前 10 个阶段重建图像。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hhu-machine-learning/hdc2021-psfnn 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的字符图像去模糊方法，用于解决Helsinki Deblur Challenge 2021任务。
AI.motivation: 在无点扩散函数（PSF）先验知识的情况下，如何有效恢复字符图像的清晰版本是该挑战赛的核心问题。
AI.method: 方法分为三步：首先通过图像配准对齐清晰与模糊图像，其次使用拟牛顿法估计PSF以生成更多训练样本，最后训练卷积神经网络实现模糊图像到清晰图像的重建。
AI.result: 该方法成功重建了HDC2021数据集前10阶段的图像，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 结合图像配准、PSF估计与深度学习的方法在字符图像去模糊任务中表现出有效性。

authors_text: Fatima Ezzahra Airod,Mattia Merluzzi,Paolo Di Lorenzo,Emilio Calvanese Strinati
title: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface Aided Mobile Edge Computing over Intermittent mmWave Links
title_zh: 通过间歇毫米波链路的可重构智能表面辅助移动边缘计算
abstract: The advent of Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) in wireless communication networks unlocks the way to support high frequency radio access (e.g. in millimeter wave) while overcoming their sensitivity to the presence of deep fading and blockages. In support of this vision, this work exhibits the forward-looking perception of using RIS to enhance the connectivity of the communication links in edge computing scenarios, to support computation offloading services. We consider a multi-user MIMO system, and we formulate a long-term optimization problem aiming to ensure a bounded end-to-end delay with the minimum users average transmit power, by jointly selecting uplink user precoding, RIS reflectivity parameters, and computation resources at a mobile edge host. Thanks to the marriage of Lyapunov stochastic optimization, projected gradient techniques and convex optimization, the problem is efficiently solved in a per-slot basis, requiring only the observation of instantaneous realizations of time-varying radio channels and task arrivals, and that of communication and computing buffers. Numerical simulations show the effectiveness of our method and the benefits of the RIS, in striking the best trade-off between power consumption and delay for different blocking conditions, also when different levels of channel knowledge are assumed.
summary: The advent of Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) in wireless communication networks unlocks the way to support high frequency radio access (e.g. in millimeter wave) while overcoming their sensitivity to the presence of deep fading and blockages. In support of this vision, this work exhibits the forward-looking perception of using RIS to enhance the connectivity of the communication links in edge computing scenarios, to support computation offloading services. We consider a multi-user MIMO system, and we formulate a long-term optimization problem aiming to ensure a bounded end-to-end delay with the minimum users average transmit power, by jointly selecting uplink user precoding, RIS reflectivity parameters, and computation resources at a mobile edge host. Thanks to the marriage of Lyapunov stochastic optimization, projected gradient techniques and convex optimization, the problem is efficiently solved in a per-slot basis, requiring only the observation of instantaneous realizations of time-varying radio channels and task arrivals, and that of communication and computing buffers. Numerical simulations show the effectiveness of our method and the benefits of the RIS, in striking the best trade-off between power consumption and delay for different blocking conditions, also when different levels of channel knowledge are assumed.
abstract_zh: 无线通信网络中可重构智能表面（RIS）的出现开启了支持高频无线电接入（例如毫米波）的方式，同时克服了它们对深度衰落和阻塞存在的敏感性。为了支持这一愿景，这项工作展现了利用RIS增强边缘计算场景中通信链路的连通性、支持计算卸载服务的前瞻性认知。我们考虑多用户 MIMO 系统，并制定长期优化问题，旨在通过联合选择上行链路用户预编码、RIS 反射率参数和移动边缘主机的计算资源，确保具有最小用户平均发射功率的有界端到端延迟。由于李亚普诺夫随机优化、投影梯度技术和凸优化的结合，该问题在每个时隙的基础上得到有效解决，只需要观察时变无线电信道和任务到达的瞬时实现，以及通信和计算缓冲区的瞬时实现。数值模拟显示了我们的方法的有效性和 RIS 的优势，在不同阻塞条件下以及假设不同水平的信道知识时，在功耗和延迟之间实现最佳权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可重构智能表面（RIS）的移动边缘计算优化框架，通过联合设计上行预编码、RIS反射参数和计算资源分配，降低毫米波通信中的端到端延迟并减少用户平均发射功率。
AI.motivation: 毫米波通信虽具备高带宽优势，但易受障碍物和深度衰落影响，而移动边缘计算需要低时延和高效资源管理，传统方法难以兼顾可靠性与能耗效率。
AI.method: 结合Lyapunov随机优化、投影梯度技术和凸优化方法，设计时隙级动态优化算法，仅需实时观测信道状态、任务到达及缓冲区信息即可实现联合优化。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了RIS在不同阻挡场景下的有效性，证明该方法能在不同信道状态知识水平下实现功率消耗与延迟的最优权衡。
AI.conclusion: RIS技术显著提升毫米波边缘计算的可靠性，所提优化方法为动态无线环境下的资源分配提供了高效解决方案，具有实际部署价值。

ai_content_json.result: 数值仿真验证了RIS在不同阻挡场景下的有效性，证明该方法能在不同信道状态知识水平下实现功率消耗与延迟的最优权衡。
ai_content_json.conclusion: RIS技术显著提升毫米波边缘计算的可靠性，所提优化方法为动态无线环境下的资源分配提供了高效解决方案，具有实际部署价值。

search_text: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface Aided Mobile Edge Computing over Intermittent mmWave Links 通过间歇毫米波链路的可重构智能表面辅助移动边缘计算 The advent of Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) in wireless communication networks unlocks the way to support high frequency radio access (e.g. in millimeter wave) while overcoming their sensitivity to the presence of deep fading and blockages. In support of this vision, this work exhibits the forward-looking perception of using RIS to enhance the connectivity of the communication links in edge computing scenarios, to support computation offloading services. We consider a multi-user MIMO system, and we formulate a long-term optimization problem aiming to ensure a bounded end-to-end delay with the minimum users average transmit power, by jointly selecting uplink user precoding, RIS reflectivity parameters, and computation resources at a mobile edge host. Thanks to the marriage of Lyapunov stochastic optimization, projected gradient techniques and convex optimization, the problem is efficiently solved in a per-slot basis, requiring only the observation of instantaneous realizations of time-varying radio channels and task arrivals, and that of communication and computing buffers. Numerical simulations show the effectiveness of our method and the benefits of the RIS, in striking the best trade-off between power consumption and delay for different blocking conditions, also when different levels of channel knowledge are assumed. 无线通信网络中可重构智能表面（RIS）的出现开启了支持高频无线电接入（例如毫米波）的方式，同时克服了它们对深度衰落和阻塞存在的敏感性。为了支持这一愿景，这项工作展现了利用RIS增强边缘计算场景中通信链路的连通性、支持计算卸载服务的前瞻性认知。我们考虑多用户 MIMO 系统，并制定长期优化问题，旨在通过联合选择上行链路用户预编码、RIS 反射率参数和移动边缘主机的计算资源，确保具有最小用户平均发射功率的有界端到端延迟。由于李亚普诺夫随机优化、投影梯度技术和凸优化的结合，该问题在每个时隙的基础上得到有效解决，只需要观察时变无线电信道和任务到达的瞬时实现，以及通信和计算缓冲区的瞬时实现。数值模拟显示了我们的方法的有效性和 RIS 的优势，在不同阻塞条件下以及假设不同水平的信道知识时，在功耗和延迟之间实现最佳权衡。 本文提出一种基于可重构智能表面（RIS）的移动边缘计算优化框架，通过联合设计上行预编码、RIS反射参数和计算资源分配，降低毫米波通信中的端到端延迟并减少用户平均发射功率。 Fatima Ezzahra Airod,Mattia Merluzzi,Paolo Di Lorenzo,Emilio Calvanese Strinati cs.IT,cs.ET

authors_text: Hao Wang,Ziyu Zhan,Futai Hu,Yuan Meng,Zeqi Liu,Xing Fu,Qiang Liu
title: Intelligent optoelectronic processor for orbital angular momentum spectrum measurement
title_zh: 用于轨道角动量谱测量的智能光电处理器
abstract: Orbital angular momentum (OAM) detection underpins almost all aspects of vortex beams' advances such as communication and quantum analogy. Conventional schemes are frustrated by low speed, complicated system, limited detection range. Here, we devise an intelligent processor composed of photonic and electronic neurons for OAM spectrum measurement in a fast, accurate and direct manner. Specifically, optical layers extract invisible topological charge information from incoming light and a shallow electronic layer predicts the exact spectrum. The integration of optical-computing promises us a compact single-shot system with high speed and energy efficiency, neither necessitating reference wave nor repetitive steps. Importantly, our processor is endowed with salient generalization ability and robustness against diverse structured light and adverse effects. We further raise a universal model interpretation paradigm to reveal the underlying physical mechanisms in the hybrid processor, as distinct from conventional 'black-box' networks. Such interpretation algorithm can improve the detection efficiency. We also complete the theory of optoelectronic network enabling its efficient training. This work not only contributes to the explorations on OAM physics and applications, and also broadly inspires the advanced links between intelligent computing and physical effects.
summary: Orbital angular momentum (OAM) detection underpins almost all aspects of vortex beams' advances such as communication and quantum analogy. Conventional schemes are frustrated by low speed, complicated system, limited detection range. Here, we devise an intelligent processor composed of photonic and electronic neurons for OAM spectrum measurement in a fast, accurate and direct manner. Specifically, optical layers extract invisible topological charge information from incoming light and a shallow electronic layer predicts the exact spectrum. The integration of optical-computing promises us a compact single-shot system with high speed and energy efficiency, neither necessitating reference wave nor repetitive steps. Importantly, our processor is endowed with salient generalization ability and robustness against diverse structured light and adverse effects. We further raise a universal model interpretation paradigm to reveal the underlying physical mechanisms in the hybrid processor, as distinct from conventional 'black-box' networks. Such interpretation algorithm can improve the detection efficiency. We also complete the theory of optoelectronic network enabling its efficient training. This work not only contributes to the explorations on OAM physics and applications, and also broadly inspires the advanced links between intelligent computing and physical effects.
abstract_zh: 轨道角动量 (OAM) 检测支撑着涡旋光束进步的几乎所有方面，例如通信和量子类比。传统方案因速度慢、系统复杂、检测范围有限而受挫。在这里，我们设计了一种由光子和电子神经元组成的智能处理器，用于快速、准确和直接的 OAM 频谱测量。具体来说，光学层从入射光中提取不可见的拓扑电荷信息，浅电子层则预测准确的光谱。光计算的集成为我们提供了一个紧凑的单次系统，具有高速和高能效，既不需要参考波，也不需要重复步骤。重要的是，我们的处理器具有显着的泛化能力和针对不同结构光和不利影响的鲁棒性。我们进一步提出了一种通用模型解释范式，以揭示混合处理器中的底层物理机制，与传统的“黑盒”网络不同。这样的解释算法可以提高检测效率。我们还完成了光电网络的理论，使其能够进行有效的训练。这项工作不仅有助于OAM物理和应用的探索，也广泛启发了智能计算和物理效应之间的高级联系。

AI.tldr: 开发一种智能光电处理器，用于快速准确测量轨道角动量（OAM）光谱，克服传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统OAM检测方法存在速度慢、系统复杂、检测范围有限等问题，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 结合光子神经元与电子神经元，光学层提取拓扑电荷信息，电子层预测光谱；无需参考波和重复步骤，引入模型解释范式及光电网络训练理论。
AI.result: 实现高速、单次拍摄的紧凑系统，具备强鲁棒性与泛化能力，检测效率提升并建立光电网络理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 推动OAM物理研究与应用，为智能计算与物理效应融合提供新范式。

authors_text: Shuwei Shao,Zhongcai Pei,Weihai Chen,Xingming Wu,Zhong Liu
title: Learnable Patchmatch and Self-Teaching for Multi-Frame Depth Estimation in Monocular Endoscopy
title_zh: 单目内窥镜中多帧深度估计的可学习补丁匹配和自学
abstract: This work delves into unsupervised monocular depth estimation in endoscopy, which leverages adjacent frames to establish a supervisory signal during the training phase. For many clinical applications, e.g., surgical navigation, temporally correlated frames are also available at test time. Due to the lack of depth clues, making full use of the temporal correlation among multiple video frames at both phases is crucial for accurate depth estimation. However, several challenges in endoscopic scenes, such as low and homogeneous textures and inter-frame brightness fluctuations, limit the performance gain from the temporal correlation. To fully exploit it, we propose a novel unsupervised multi-frame monocular depth estimation model. The proposed model integrates a learnable patchmatch module to adaptively increase the discriminative ability in regions with low and homogeneous textures, and enforces cross-teaching and self-teaching consistencies to provide efficacious regularizations towards brightness fluctuations. Furthermore, as a byproduct of the self-teaching paradigm, the proposed model is able to improve the depth predictions when more frames are input at test time. We conduct detailed experiments on multiple datasets, including SCARED, EndoSLAM, Hamlyn and SERV-CT. The experimental results indicate that our model exceeds the state-of-the-art competitors. The source code and trained models will be publicly available upon the acceptance.
summary: This work delves into unsupervised monocular depth estimation in endoscopy, which leverages adjacent frames to establish a supervisory signal during the training phase. For many clinical applications, e.g., surgical navigation, temporally correlated frames are also available at test time. Due to the lack of depth clues, making full use of the temporal correlation among multiple video frames at both phases is crucial for accurate depth estimation. However, several challenges in endoscopic scenes, such as low and homogeneous textures and inter-frame brightness fluctuations, limit the performance gain from the temporal correlation. To fully exploit it, we propose a novel unsupervised multi-frame monocular depth estimation model. The proposed model integrates a learnable patchmatch module to adaptively increase the discriminative ability in regions with low and homogeneous textures, and enforces cross-teaching and self-teaching consistencies to provide efficacious regularizations towards brightness fluctuations. Furthermore, as a byproduct of the self-teaching paradigm, the proposed model is able to improve the depth predictions when more frames are input at test time. We conduct detailed experiments on multiple datasets, including SCARED, EndoSLAM, Hamlyn and SERV-CT. The experimental results indicate that our model exceeds the state-of-the-art competitors. The source code and trained models will be publicly available upon the acceptance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作深入研究了内窥镜检查中的无监督单目深度估计，它利用相邻帧在训练阶段建立监督信号。对于许多临床应用，例如手术导航，时间相关帧在测试时也可用。由于缺乏深度线索，充分利用两个阶段的多个视频帧之间的时间相关性对于准确的深度估计至关重要。然而，内窥镜场景中的一些挑战，例如低且均匀的纹理以及帧间亮度波动，限制了时间相关性的性能增益。为了充分利用它，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督多帧单目深度估计模型。该模型集成了可学习的补丁匹配模块，以自适应地提高低纹理和均匀纹理区域的辨别能力，并强制交叉教学和自教学的一致性，以提供针对亮度波动的有效正则化。此外，作为自教学范式的副产品，所提出的模型能够在测试时输入更多帧时改进深度预测。我们在多个数据集上进行了详细的实验，包括 SCARED、EndoSLAM、Hamlyn 和 SERV-CT。实验结果表明我们的模型超过了最先进的竞争对手。源代码和经过训练的模型将在接受后公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督多帧单目深度估计模型，用于内窥镜场景，通过利用时序相关性提升深度估计精度。
AI.motivation: 内窥镜场景中低纹理和亮度波动导致传统方法难以有效利用时序信息，而临床应用需要准确的深度估计以支持手术导航等任务。
AI.method: 设计可学习的Patchmatch模块增强低纹理区域判别能力，并通过交叉教学与自教学一致性约束应对亮度波动，同时支持测试时多帧输入提升预测效果。
AI.result: 在SCARED、EndoSLAM等数据集上优于现有最优方法，代码与模型将公开。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了内窥镜深度估计中的时序利用难题，在低纹理与亮度变化场景下显著提升性能，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Learnable Patchmatch and Self-Teaching for Multi-Frame Depth Estimation in Monocular Endoscopy 单目内窥镜中多帧深度估计的可学习补丁匹配和自学 This work delves into unsupervised monocular depth estimation in endoscopy, which leverages adjacent frames to establish a supervisory signal during the training phase. For many clinical applications, e.g., surgical navigation, temporally correlated frames are also available at test time. Due to the lack of depth clues, making full use of the temporal correlation among multiple video frames at both phases is crucial for accurate depth estimation. However, several challenges in endoscopic scenes, such as low and homogeneous textures and inter-frame brightness fluctuations, limit the performance gain from the temporal correlation. To fully exploit it, we propose a novel unsupervised multi-frame monocular depth estimation model. The proposed model integrates a learnable patchmatch module to adaptively increase the discriminative ability in regions with low and homogeneous textures, and enforces cross-teaching and self-teaching consistencies to provide efficacious regularizations towards brightness fluctuations. Furthermore, as a byproduct of the self-teaching paradigm, the proposed model is able to improve the depth predictions when more frames are input at test time. We conduct detailed experiments on multiple datasets, including SCARED, EndoSLAM, Hamlyn and SERV-CT. The experimental results indicate that our model exceeds the state-of-the-art competitors. The source code and trained models will be publicly available upon the acceptance. 这项工作深入研究了内窥镜检查中的无监督单目深度估计，它利用相邻帧在训练阶段建立监督信号。对于许多临床应用，例如手术导航，时间相关帧在测试时也可用。由于缺乏深度线索，充分利用两个阶段的多个视频帧之间的时间相关性对于准确的深度估计至关重要。然而，内窥镜场景中的一些挑战，例如低且均匀的纹理以及帧间亮度波动，限制了时间相关性的性能增益。为了充分利用它，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督多帧单目深度估计模型。该模型集成了可学习的补丁匹配模块，以自适应地提高低纹理和均匀纹理区域的辨别能力，并强制交叉教学和自教学的一致性，以提供针对亮度波动的有效正则化。此外，作为自教学范式的副产品，所提出的模型能够在测试时输入更多帧时改进深度预测。我们在多个数据集上进行了详细的实验，包括 SCARED、EndoSLAM、Hamlyn 和 SERV-CT。实验结果表明我们的模型超过了最先进的竞争对手。源代码和经过训练的模型将在接受后公开。 本文提出一种无监督多帧单目深度估计模型，用于内窥镜场景，通过利用时序相关性提升深度估计精度。 Shuwei Shao,Zhongcai Pei,Weihai Chen,Xingming Wu,Zhong Liu cs.CV

title: Symbol Emergence as Inter-personal Categorization with Head-to-head Latent Word
title_zh: 符号的出现作为人与人之间的分类与头对头的潜在词
abstract: In this study, we propose a head-to-head type (H2H-type) inter-personal multimodal Dirichlet mixture (Inter-MDM) by modifying the original Inter-MDM, which is a probabilistic generative model that represents the symbol emergence between two agents as multiagent multimodal categorization. A Metropolis--Hastings method-based naming game based on the Inter-MDM enables two agents to collaboratively perform multimodal categorization and share signs with a solid mathematical foundation of convergence. However, the conventional Inter-MDM presumes a tail-to-tail connection across a latent word variable, causing inflexibility of the further extension of Inter-MDM for modeling a more complex symbol emergence. Therefore, we propose herein a head-to-head type (H2H-type) Inter-MDM that treats a latent word variable as a child node of an internal variable of each agent in the same way as many prior studies of multimodal categorization. On the basis of the H2H-type Inter-MDM, we propose a naming game in the same way as the conventional Inter-MDM. The experimental results show that the H2H-type Inter-MDM yields almost the same performance as the conventional Inter-MDM from the viewpoint of multimodal categorization and sign sharing.
summary: In this study, we propose a head-to-head type (H2H-type) inter-personal multimodal Dirichlet mixture (Inter-MDM) by modifying the original Inter-MDM, which is a probabilistic generative model that represents the symbol emergence between two agents as multiagent multimodal categorization. A Metropolis--Hastings method-based naming game based on the Inter-MDM enables two agents to collaboratively perform multimodal categorization and share signs with a solid mathematical foundation of convergence. However, the conventional Inter-MDM presumes a tail-to-tail connection across a latent word variable, causing inflexibility of the further extension of Inter-MDM for modeling a more complex symbol emergence. Therefore, we propose herein a head-to-head type (H2H-type) Inter-MDM that treats a latent word variable as a child node of an internal variable of each agent in the same way as many prior studies of multimodal categorization. On the basis of the H2H-type Inter-MDM, we propose a naming game in the same way as the conventional Inter-MDM. The experimental results show that the H2H-type Inter-MDM yields almost the same performance as the conventional Inter-MDM from the viewpoint of multimodal categorization and sign sharing.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们通过修改原始Inter-MDM，提出了一种头对头型（H2H型）人际多模态狄利克雷混合（Inter-MDM），它是一种概率生成模型，将两个主体之间的符号出现表示为多主体多模态分类。基于 Inter-MDM 的 Metropolis-Hastings 方法命名游戏使两个代理能够协作执行多模式分类并共享具有坚实的收敛数学基础的符号。然而，传统的Inter-MDM假设潜在词变量之间存在尾对尾连接，导致Inter-MDM进一步扩展以建模更复杂的符号出现时缺乏灵活性。因此，我们在此提出了一种头对头型（H2H型）Inter-MDM，其将潜在词变量视为每个代理的内部变量的子节点，就像许多先前的多模态分类研究一样。在H2H型Inter-MDM的基础上，我们提出了与传统Inter-MDM相同的命名游戏。实验结果表明，从多模态分类和符号共享的角度来看，H2H型Inter-MDM的性能与传统Inter-MDM几乎相同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种头对头（H2H-type）的跨人际多模态狄利克雷混合模型（Inter-MDM），用于改进符号涌现的建模方法。
AI.motivation: 传统Inter-MDM模型采用尾对尾连接方式，导致在建模复杂符号涌现时灵活性不足，需改进模型结构以支持更复杂的场景。
AI.method: 通过将潜藏词变量作为每个智能体内部变量的子节点，构建H2H-type Inter-MDM，并基于该模型设计命名游戏算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，H2H-type Inter-MDM在多模态分类和符号共享任务中表现与传统模型基本一致。
AI.conclusion: H2H-type结构提升了模型扩展性，同时保持了与传统方法相当的性能，为复杂符号涌现研究提供了新思路。

title: An Efficient Modern Baseline for FloodNet VQA
title_zh: FloodNet VQA 的高效现代基准
abstract: Designing efficient and reliable VQA systems remains a challenging problem, more so in the case of disaster management and response systems. In this work, we revisit fundamental combination methods like concatenation, addition and element-wise multiplication with modern image and text feature abstraction models. We design a simple and efficient system which outperforms pre-existing methods on the FloodNet dataset and achieves state-of-the-art performance. This simplified system requires significantly less training and inference time than modern VQA architectures. We also study the performance of various backbones and report their consolidated results. Code is available at https://github.com/sahilkhose/floodnet_vqa.
summary: Designing efficient and reliable VQA systems remains a challenging problem, more so in the case of disaster management and response systems. In this work, we revisit fundamental combination methods like concatenation, addition and element-wise multiplication with modern image and text feature abstraction models. We design a simple and efficient system which outperforms pre-existing methods on the FloodNet dataset and achieves state-of-the-art performance. This simplified system requires significantly less training and inference time than modern VQA architectures. We also study the performance of various backbones and report their consolidated results. Code is available at https://github.com/sahilkhose/floodnet_vqa.
abstract_zh: 设计高效、可靠的 VQA 系统仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，对于灾害管理和响应系统来说更是如此。在这项工作中，我们重新审视了现代图像和文本特征抽象模型的基本组合方法，例如串联、加法和逐元素乘法。我们设计了一个简单而高效的系统，其性能优于 FloodNet 数据集上现有的方法，并实现了最先进的性能。与现代 VQA 架构相比，这种简化的系统所需的训练和推理时间明显减少。我们还研究了各种骨干网的性能并报告了它们的综合结果。代码可在 https://github.com/sahilkhose/floodnet_vqa 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为FloodNet视觉问答（VQA）任务设计一个高效且可靠的基准系统，以提升灾害管理中的响应效率。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA系统在灾害场景下存在效率不足的问题，需在保证性能的同时降低计算成本。
AI.method: 基于拼接、相加等基础组合方式，结合现代图像与文本特征提取模型，构建轻量级架构并验证不同主干网络效果。
AI.result: 在FloodNet数据集上超越现有方法，达到SOTA性能，训练与推理时间显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 简单架构可有效平衡效率与性能，为灾害相关VQA任务提供可行方案。

title: Scalable Multi-Agent Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 可扩展的基于多智能体模型的强化学习
abstract: Recent Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) literature has been largely focused on Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) paradigm. CTDE has been a dominant approach for both cooperative and mixed environments due to its capability to efficiently train decentralized policies. While in mixed environments full autonomy of the agents can be a desirable outcome, cooperative environments allow agents to share information to facilitate coordination. Approaches that leverage this technique are usually referred as communication methods, as full autonomy of agents is compromised for better performance. Although communication approaches have shown impressive results, they do not fully leverage this additional information during training phase. In this paper, we propose a new method called MAMBA which utilizes Model-Based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) to further leverage centralized training in cooperative environments. We argue that communication between agents is enough to sustain a world model for each agent during execution phase while imaginary rollouts can be used for training, removing the necessity to interact with the environment. These properties yield sample efficient algorithm that can scale gracefully with the number of agents. We empirically confirm that MAMBA achieves good performance while reducing the number of interactions with the environment up to an orders of magnitude compared to Model-Free state-of-the-art approaches in challenging domains of SMAC and Flatland.
summary: Recent Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) literature has been largely focused on Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) paradigm. CTDE has been a dominant approach for both cooperative and mixed environments due to its capability to efficiently train decentralized policies. While in mixed environments full autonomy of the agents can be a desirable outcome, cooperative environments allow agents to share information to facilitate coordination. Approaches that leverage this technique are usually referred as communication methods, as full autonomy of agents is compromised for better performance. Although communication approaches have shown impressive results, they do not fully leverage this additional information during training phase. In this paper, we propose a new method called MAMBA which utilizes Model-Based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) to further leverage centralized training in cooperative environments. We argue that communication between agents is enough to sustain a world model for each agent during execution phase while imaginary rollouts can be used for training, removing the necessity to interact with the environment. These properties yield sample efficient algorithm that can scale gracefully with the number of agents. We empirically confirm that MAMBA achieves good performance while reducing the number of interactions with the environment up to an orders of magnitude compared to Model-Free state-of-the-art approaches in challenging domains of SMAC and Flatland.
abstract_zh: 最近的多智能体强化学习（MARL）文献主要集中在分散执行（CTDE）范式的集中训练上。 CTDE 一直是合作和混合环境的主要方法，因为它能够有效地培训去中心化政策。虽然在混合环境中，代理的完全自治可能是理想的结果，但合作环境允许代理共享信息以促进协调。利用这种技术的方法通常被称为通信方法，因为为了获得更好的性能，代理的完全自主权受到了损害。尽管沟通方法已显示出令人印象深刻的结果，但它们在培训阶段并未充分利用这些附加信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 MAMBA 的新方法，它利用基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）来进一步利用协作环境中的集中训练。我们认为，代理之间的通信足以在执行阶段维持每个代理的世界模型，而想象的推出可用于培训，消除与环境交互的必要性。这些属性产生了样本有效的算法，可以随着代理的数量优雅地扩展。我们凭经验证实，与 SMAC 和 Flatland 等具有挑战性的领域中的无模型最先进方法相比，MAMBA 实现了良好的性能，同时将与环境的交互次数减少了一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的多智能体强化学习方法MAMBA，通过利用集中式训练和分散式执行（CTDE）框架，在合作环境中提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有通信方法在合作环境中未能充分利用训练阶段的额外信息，导致样本效率低下，而模型基于方法可减少与环境的交互次数。
AI.method: MAMBA通过构建智能体的想象回滚（imaginary rollouts）和世界模型，在训练阶段无需与环境交互，仅依赖通信信息进行集中式训练。
AI.result: 在SMAC和Flatland等复杂环境中，MAMBA相比无模型方法减少了高达数量级的环境交互次数，同时保持了良好的性能。

search_text: Scalable Multi-Agent Model-Based Reinforcement Learning 可扩展的基于多智能体模型的强化学习 Recent Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) literature has been largely focused on Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) paradigm. CTDE has been a dominant approach for both cooperative and mixed environments due to its capability to efficiently train decentralized policies. While in mixed environments full autonomy of the agents can be a desirable outcome, cooperative environments allow agents to share information to facilitate coordination. Approaches that leverage this technique are usually referred as communication methods, as full autonomy of agents is compromised for better performance. Although communication approaches have shown impressive results, they do not fully leverage this additional information during training phase. In this paper, we propose a new method called MAMBA which utilizes Model-Based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) to further leverage centralized training in cooperative environments. We argue that communication between agents is enough to sustain a world model for each agent during execution phase while imaginary rollouts can be used for training, removing the necessity to interact with the environment. These properties yield sample efficient algorithm that can scale gracefully with the number of agents. We empirically confirm that MAMBA achieves good performance while reducing the number of interactions with the environment up to an orders of magnitude compared to Model-Free state-of-the-art approaches in challenging domains of SMAC and Flatland. 最近的多智能体强化学习（MARL）文献主要集中在分散执行（CTDE）范式的集中训练上。 CTDE 一直是合作和混合环境的主要方法，因为它能够有效地培训去中心化政策。虽然在混合环境中，代理的完全自治可能是理想的结果，但合作环境允许代理共享信息以促进协调。利用这种技术的方法通常被称为通信方法，因为为了获得更好的性能，代理的完全自主权受到了损害。尽管沟通方法已显示出令人印象深刻的结果，但它们在培训阶段并未充分利用这些附加信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 MAMBA 的新方法，它利用基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）来进一步利用协作环境中的集中训练。我们认为，代理之间的通信足以在执行阶段维持每个代理的世界模型，而想象的推出可用于培训，消除与环境交互的必要性。这些属性产生了样本有效的算法，可以随着代理的数量优雅地扩展。我们凭经验证实，与 SMAC 和 Flatland 等具有挑战性的领域中的无模型最先进方法相比，MAMBA 实现了良好的性能，同时将与环境的交互次数减少了一个数量级。 本文提出了一种基于模型的多智能体强化学习方法MAMBA，通过利用集中式训练和分散式执行（CTDE）框架，在合作环境中提升样本效率。 Vladimir Egorov,Aleksei Shpilman cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Gene selection from microarray expression data: A Multi-objective PSO with adaptive K-nearest neighborhood
title_zh: 从微阵列表达数据中进行基因选择：具有自适应 K 最近邻的多目标 PSO
abstract: Cancer detection is one of the key research topics in the medical field. Accurate detection of different cancer types is valuable in providing better treatment facilities and risk minimization for patients. This paper deals with the classification problem of human cancer diseases by using gene expression data. It is presented a new methodology to analyze microarray datasets and efficiently classify cancer diseases. The new method first employs Signal to Noise Ratio (SNR) to find a list of a small subset of non-redundant genes. Then, after normalization, it is used Multi-Objective Particle Swarm Optimization (MOPSO) for feature selection and employed Adaptive K-Nearest Neighborhood (KNN) for cancer disease classification. This method improves the classification accuracy of cancer classification by reducing the number of features. The proposed methodology is evaluated by classifying cancer diseases in five cancer datasets. The results are compared with the most recent approaches, which increases the classification accuracy in each dataset.
summary: Cancer detection is one of the key research topics in the medical field. This method improves the classification accuracy of cancer classification by reducing the number of features. The proposed methodology is evaluated by classifying cancer diseases in five cancer datasets. The results are compared with the most recent approaches, which increases the classification accuracy in each dataset.
abstract_zh: 癌症检测是医学领域的重点研究课题之一。准确检测不同的癌症类型对于为患者提供更好的治疗设施和最小化风险具有重要意义。本文利用基因表达数据处理人类癌症疾病的分类问题。它提出了一种分析微阵列数据集和有效分类癌症疾病的新方法。新方法首先利用信噪比（SNR）来查找一小部分非冗余基因的列表。然后，在归一化之后，使用多目标粒子群优化（MOPSO）进行特征选择，并使用自适应K最近邻（KNN）进行癌症疾病分类。该方法通过减少特征数量来提高癌症分类的分类准确性。通过对五个癌症数据集中的癌症疾病进行分类来评估所提出的方法。将结果与最新的方法进行比较，这提高了每个数据集的分类准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合信号噪声比(SNR)、多目标粒子群优化(MOPSO)和自适应K近邻分类器的方法，用于提高癌症分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统癌症分类方法在特征选择和分类精度上存在不足，需通过优化特征子集和分类算法提升检测效果。
AI.method: 首先用SNR筛选非冗余基因，再通过MOPSO进行特征选择，最后采用自适应K近邻算法进行癌症分类。
AI.result: 在五个癌症数据集上验证，相比最新方法分类准确率均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过特征优化和分类器改进，有效提高了癌症分类性能，具有实际应用价值。
