title: Protein Structure and Sequence Generation with Equivariant Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
title_zh: 使用等变去噪扩散概率模型的蛋白质结构和序列生成
abstract: Proteins are macromolecules that mediate a significant fraction of the cellular processes that underlie life. An important task in bioengineering is designing proteins with specific 3D structures and chemical properties which enable targeted functions. To this end, we introduce a generative model of both protein structure and sequence that can operate at significantly larger scales than previous molecular generative modeling approaches. The model is learned entirely from experimental data and conditions its generation on a compact specification of protein topology to produce a full-atom backbone configuration as well as sequence and side-chain predictions. We demonstrate the quality of the model via qualitative and quantitative analysis of its samples. Videos of sampling trajectories are available at https://nanand2.github.io/proteins .
summary: Proteins are macromolecules that mediate a significant fraction of the cellular processes that underlie life. An important task in bioengineering is designing proteins with specific 3D structures and chemical properties which enable targeted functions. To this end, we introduce a generative model of both protein structure and sequence that can operate at significantly larger scales than previous molecular generative modeling approaches. The model is learned entirely from experimental data and conditions its generation on a compact specification of protein topology to produce a full-atom backbone configuration as well as sequence and side-chain predictions. We demonstrate the quality of the model via qualitative and quantitative analysis of its samples. Videos of sampling trajectories are available at https://nanand2.github.io/proteins .
abstract_zh: 蛋白质是介导生命基础细胞过程的重要部分的大分子。生物工程的一项重要任务是设计具有特定 3D 结构和化学性质的蛋白质，以实现目标功能。为此，我们引入了蛋白质结构和序列的生成模型，该模型可以比以前的分子生成建模方法在更大的规模上运行。该模型完全从实验数据中学习，并根据蛋白质拓扑的紧凑规范来生成其生成，以产生全原子主链配置以及序列和侧链预测。我们通过对其样本进行定性和定量分析来证明模型的质量。采样轨迹的视频可在 https://nanand2.github.io/ Proteins 上找到。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于等变去噪扩散概率模型的蛋白质结构和序列生成方法。
AI.motivation: 为了设计具有特定三维结构和化学性质的蛋白质，以实现目标功能，需要更高效的生成模型。
AI.method: 提出一种等变去噪扩散概率模型，从实验数据中学习，基于蛋白质拓扑条件生成完整原子骨架、序列和侧链预测。
AI.result: 通过定性和定量分析验证了生成样本的质量，展示了模型在蛋白质结构和序列生成上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在生成规模和质量上优于现有方法，为蛋白质设计提供了新的工具，推动生物工程发展。

title: A Fundamental Probabilistic Fuzzy Logic Framework Suitable for Causal Reasoning
title_zh: 适用于因果推理的基本概率模糊逻辑框架
comment: 60 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, 2 links to Github
comments: 60 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, 2 links to Github
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a fundamental framework to create a bridge between Probability Theory and Fuzzy Logic. Indeed, our theory formulates a random experiment of selecting crisp elements with the criterion of having a certain fuzzy attribute. To do so, we associate some specific crisp random variables to the random experiment. Then, several formulas are presented, which make it easier to compute different conditional probabilities and expected values of these random variables. Also, we provide measure theoretical basis for our probabilistic fuzzy logic framework. Note that in our theory, the probability density functions of continuous distributions which come from the aforementioned random variables include the Dirac delta function as a term. Further, we introduce an application of our theory in Causal Inference.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a fundamental framework to create a bridge between Probability Theory and Fuzzy Logic. Indeed, our theory formulates a random experiment of selecting crisp elements with the criterion of having a certain fuzzy attribute. To do so, we associate some specific crisp random variables to the random experiment. Then, several formulas are presented, which make it easier to compute different conditional probabilities and expected values of these random variables. Also, we provide measure theoretical basis for our probabilistic fuzzy logic framework. Note that in our theory, the probability density functions of continuous distributions which come from the aforementioned random variables include the Dirac delta function as a term. Further, we introduce an application of our theory in Causal Inference.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一个在概率论和模糊逻辑之间架起桥梁的基本框架。事实上，我们的理论制定了一个随机实验，以具有特定模糊属性为标准来选择清晰元素。为此，我们将一些特定的随机变量与随机实验相关联。然后，提出了几个公式，可以更容易地计算这些随机变量的不同条件概率和期望值。此外，我们为我们的概率模糊逻辑框架提供了测量理论基础。请注意，在我们的理论中，来自上述随机变量的连续分布的概率密度函数包括狄拉克δ函数作为一项。此外，我们介绍了我们的理论在因果推理中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将概率论与模糊逻辑结合的基础性框架，用于因果推理。
AI.motivation: 传统概率论与模糊逻辑在处理不确定性问题时存在局限，需构建统一框架以支持更精确的因果推理。
AI.method: 通过定义带有模糊属性的随机实验，关联清晰随机变量并推导条件概率公式，结合测度理论构建框架，引入狄拉克δ函数处理连续分布。
AI.result: 建立了概率模糊逻辑理论体系，并成功应用于因果推断场景，提供了计算条件概率和期望值的公式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效融合了概率论与模糊逻辑，为复杂系统的因果分析提供了新的数学工具和理论基础。

search_text: A Fundamental Probabilistic Fuzzy Logic Framework Suitable for Causal Reasoning 适用于因果推理的基本概率模糊逻辑框架 In this paper, we introduce a fundamental framework to create a bridge between Probability Theory and Fuzzy Logic. Indeed, our theory formulates a random experiment of selecting crisp elements with the criterion of having a certain fuzzy attribute. To do so, we associate some specific crisp random variables to the random experiment. Then, several formulas are presented, which make it easier to compute different conditional probabilities and expected values of these random variables. Also, we provide measure theoretical basis for our probabilistic fuzzy logic framework. Note that in our theory, the probability density functions of continuous distributions which come from the aforementioned random variables include the Dirac delta function as a term. Further, we introduce an application of our theory in Causal Inference. 在本文中，我们介绍了一个在概率论和模糊逻辑之间架起桥梁的基本框架。事实上，我们的理论制定了一个随机实验，以具有特定模糊属性为标准来选择清晰元素。为此，我们将一些特定的随机变量与随机实验相关联。然后，提出了几个公式，可以更容易地计算这些随机变量的不同条件概率和期望值。此外，我们为我们的概率模糊逻辑框架提供了测量理论基础。请注意，在我们的理论中，来自上述随机变量的连续分布的概率密度函数包括狄拉克δ函数作为一项。此外，我们介绍了我们的理论在因果推理中的应用。 本文提出了一种将概率论与模糊逻辑结合的基础性框架，用于因果推理。 Amir Saki,Usef Faghihi cs.LO,cs.AI,math.PR

title: Task-Prior Conditional Variational Auto-Encoder for Few-Shot Image Classification
title_zh: 用于少样本图像分类的任务优先条件变分自动编码器
comment: few-shot leanring, meta learning, transducitve learning, imgae classification
comments: few-shot leanring, meta learning, transducitve learning, imgae classification
abstract: Transductive methods always outperform inductive methods in few-shot image classification scenarios. However, the existing few-shot methods contain a latent condition: the number of samples in each class is the same, which may be unrealistic. To cope with those cases where the query shots of each class are nonuniform (i.e. nonuniform few-shot learning), we propose a Task-Prior Conditional Variational Auto-Encoder model named TP-VAE, conditioned on support shots and constrained by a task-level prior regularization. Our method obtains high performance in the more challenging nonuniform few-shot scenarios. Moreover, our method outperforms the state-of-the-art in a wide range of standard few-shot image classification scenarios. Among them, the accuracy of 1-shot increased by about 3\%.
summary: Transductive methods always outperform inductive methods in few-shot image classification scenarios. However, the existing few-shot methods contain a latent condition: the number of samples in each class is the same, which may be unrealistic. To cope with those cases where the query shots of each class are nonuniform (i.e. nonuniform few-shot learning), we propose a Task-Prior Conditional Variational Auto-Encoder model named TP-VAE, conditioned on support shots and constrained by a task-level prior regularization. Our method obtains high performance in the more challenging nonuniform few-shot scenarios. Moreover, our method outperforms the state-of-the-art in a wide range of standard few-shot image classification scenarios. Among them, the accuracy of 1-shot increased by about 3\%.
abstract_zh: 在少镜头图像分类场景中，传导方法总是优于归纳方法。然而，现有的few-shot方法包含一个潜在条件：每个类中的样本数量相同，这可能是不现实的。为了应对每个类别的查询镜头不均匀的情况（即非均匀的少镜头学习），我们提出了一种名为 TP-VAE 的任务先验条件变分自动编码器模型，以支持镜头为条件并受到任务级先验正则化的约束。我们的方法在更具挑战性的非均匀小样本场景中获得了高性能。此外，我们的方法在各种标准的少样本图像分类场景中都优于最先进的方法。其中，1发准确率提升约3%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于任务先验的条件变分自编码器（TP-VAE），用于解决非均匀少样本图像分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分类方法隐含假设每个类别的样本数量相同，但实际场景中查询样本可能不均匀，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计TP-VAE模型，以支持样本为条件，结合任务级先验正则化约束，处理非均匀样本分布。
AI.result: 在非均匀少样本场景中表现优异，且在标准基准测试中1-shot准确率提升约3%。
AI.conclusion: TP-VAE通过任务先验约束有效解决了非均匀样本问题，在多种少样本分类任务中优于现有方法。

title: CompleteDT: Point Cloud Completion with Dense Augment Inference Transformers
title_zh: CompleteDT：使用密集增强推理变压器完成点云
comment: Submitted to International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
comments: Submitted to International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
abstract: Point cloud completion task aims to predict the missing part of incomplete point clouds and generate complete point clouds with details. In this paper, we propose a novel point cloud completion network, namely CompleteDT. Specifically, features are learned from point clouds with different resolutions, which is sampled from the incomplete input, and are converted to a series of \textit{spots} based on the geometrical structure. Then, the Dense Relation Augment Module (DRA) based on the transformer is proposed to learn features within \textit{spots} and consider the correlation among these \textit{spots}. The DRA consists of Point Local-Attention Module (PLA) and Point Dense Multi-Scale Attention Module (PDMA), where the PLA captures the local information within the local \textit{spots} by adaptively measuring weights of neighbors and the PDMA exploits the global relationship between these \textit{spots} in a multi-scale densely connected manner. Lastly, the complete shape is predicted from \textit{spots} by the Multi-resolution Point Fusion Module (MPF), which gradually generates complete point clouds from \textit{spots}, and updates \textit{spots} based on these generated point clouds. Experimental results show that, because the DRA based on the transformer can learn the expressive features from the incomplete input and the MPF can fully explore these feature to predict the complete input, our method largely outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Point cloud completion task aims to predict the missing part of incomplete point clouds and generate complete point clouds with details. In this paper, we propose a novel point cloud completion network, namely CompleteDT. Specifically, features are learned from point clouds with different resolutions, which is sampled from the incomplete input, and are converted to a series of \textit{spots} based on the geometrical structure. Then, the Dense Relation Augment Module (DRA) based on the transformer is proposed to learn features within \textit{spots} and consider the correlation among these \textit{spots}. The DRA consists of Point Local-Attention Module (PLA) and Point Dense Multi-Scale Attention Module (PDMA), where the PLA captures the local information within the local \textit{spots} by adaptively measuring weights of neighbors and the PDMA exploits the global relationship between these \textit{spots} in a multi-scale densely connected manner. Lastly, the complete shape is predicted from \textit{spots} by the Multi-resolution Point Fusion Module (MPF), which gradually generates complete point clouds from \textit{spots}, and updates \textit{spots} based on these generated point clouds. Experimental results show that, because the DRA based on the transformer can learn the expressive features from the incomplete input and the MPF can fully explore these feature to predict the complete input, our method largely outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 点云补全任务旨在预测不完整点云的缺失部分并生成具有细节的完整点云。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的点云补全网络，即CompleteDT。具体来说，从不同分辨率的点云中学习特征，这些点云是从不完整的输入中采样的，并根据几何结构转换为一系列 \textit{spots} 。然后，提出了基于变压器的密集关系增强模块（DRA）来学习\textit{spots}内的特征并考虑这些\textit{spots}之间的相关性。 DRA 由点局部注意模块（PLA）和点密集多尺度注意模块（PDMA）组成，其中 PLA 通过自适应测量邻居的权重来捕获局部 \textit{spots} 内的局部信息，而 PDMA 以多尺度密集连接的方式利用这些 \textit{spots} 之间的全局关系。最后，多分辨率点融合模块（MPF）根据\textit{spots}预测完整的形状，逐渐从\textit{spots}生成完整的点云，并根据这些生成的点云更新\textit{spots}。实验结果表明，由于基于 Transformer 的 DRA 可以从不完整的输入中学习表达特征，并且 MPF 可以充分探索这些特征来预测完整的输入，因此我们的方法在很大程度上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密集增强推理变换器的点云补全方法CompleteDT，通过多尺度特征学习与关系建模提升补全效果。
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法在捕捉局部细节与全局结构关系方面存在不足，难以生成高精度完整点云。
AI.method: 从多分辨率不完整点云中提取特征并转换为几何spots，设计DRA模块（含PLA局部注意力与PDMA多尺度密集注意力）建模spots间关系，最终通过MPF模块融合多尺度特征生成完整点云。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，补全点云的几何细节与结构完整性更优。
AI.conclusion: CompleteDT通过结合多尺度特征学习与密集关系建模，有效解决了点云补全中局部细节保留与全局结构重建的矛盾。

The DRA consists of Point Local-Attention Module (PLA) and Point Dense Multi-Scale Attention Module (PDMA), where the PLA captures the local information within the local \textit{spots} by adaptively measuring weights of neighbors and the PDMA exploits the global relationship between these \textit{spots} in a multi-scale densely connected manner. Lastly, the complete shape is predicted from \textit{spots} by the Multi-resolution Point Fusion Module (MPF), which gradually generates complete point clouds from \textit{spots}, and updates \textit{spots} based on these generated point clouds. Experimental results show that, because the DRA based on the transformer can learn the expressive features from the incomplete input and the MPF can fully explore these feature to predict the complete input, our method largely outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. 点云补全任务旨在预测不完整点云的缺失部分并生成具有细节的完整点云。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的点云补全网络，即CompleteDT。具体来说，从不同分辨率的点云中学习特征，这些点云是从不完整的输入中采样的，并根据几何结构转换为一系列 \textit{spots} 。然后，提出了基于变压器的密集关系增强模块（DRA）来学习\textit{spots}内的特征并考虑这些\textit{spots}之间的相关性。 DRA 由点局部注意模块（PLA）和点密集多尺度注意模块（PDMA）组成，其中 PLA 通过自适应测量邻居的权重来捕获局部 \textit{spots} 内的局部信息，而 PDMA 以多尺度密集连接的方式利用这些 \textit{spots} 之间的全局关系。最后，多分辨率点融合模块（MPF）根据\textit{spots}预测完整的形状，逐渐从\textit{spots}生成完整的点云，并根据这些生成的点云更新\textit{spots}。实验结果表明，由于基于 Transformer 的 DRA 可以从不完整的输入中学习表达特征，并且 MPF 可以充分探索这些特征来预测完整的输入，因此我们的方法在很大程度上优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于密集增强推理变换器的点云补全方法CompleteDT，通过多尺度特征学习与关系建模提升补全效果。 Jun Li,Shangwei Guo,Shaokun Han cs.CV

title: Combining E-Graphs with Abstract Interpretation
title_zh: 将电子图与抽象解释相结合
abstract: E-graphs are a data structure that compactly represents equivalent expressions. They are constructed via the repeated application of rewrite rules. Often in practical applications, conditional rewrite rules are crucial, but their application requires the detection - at the time the e-graph is being built - that a condition is valid in the domain of application. Detecting condition validity amounts to proving a property of the program. Abstract interpretation is a general method to learn such properties, traditionally used in static analysis tools. We demonstrate that abstract interpretation and e-graph analysis naturally reinforce each other through a tight integration because (i) the e-graph clustering of equivalent expressions induces natural precision refinement of abstractions and (ii) precise abstractions allow the application of deeper rewrite rules (and hence potentially even greater precision). We develop the theory behind this intuition and present an exemplar interval arithmetic implementation, which we apply to the FPBench suite.
summary: E-graphs are a data structure that compactly represents equivalent expressions. They are constructed via the repeated application of rewrite rules. Often in practical applications, conditional rewrite rules are crucial, but their application requires the detection - at the time the e-graph is being built - that a condition is valid in the domain of application. Detecting condition validity amounts to proving a property of the program. Abstract interpretation is a general method to learn such properties, traditionally used in static analysis tools. We demonstrate that abstract interpretation and e-graph analysis naturally reinforce each other through a tight integration because (i) the e-graph clustering of equivalent expressions induces natural precision refinement of abstractions and (ii) precise abstractions allow the application of deeper rewrite rules (and hence potentially even greater precision). We develop the theory behind this intuition and present an exemplar interval arithmetic implementation, which we apply to the FPBench suite.
abstract_zh: 电子图是一种紧凑地表示等价表达式的数据结构。它们是通过重复应用重写规则来构造的。通常在实际应用中，条件重写规则至关重要，但它们的应用需要在构建电子图时检测条件在应用程序域中是否有效。检测条件有效性相当于证明程序的属性。抽象解释是学习此类属性的通用方法，传统上用于静态分析工具。我们证明，抽象解释和电子图分析通过紧密集成自然地相互加强，因为（i）等效表达式的电子图聚类导致了抽象的自然精确细化，以及（ii）精确抽象允许应用更深入的重写规则（因此可能具有更高的精度）。我们开发了这种直觉背后的理论，并提出了一个示例区间算术实现，并将其应用于 FPBench 套件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将E图与抽象解释相结合，以提升程序分析的精度。
AI.motivation: 条件重写规则的应用需要验证条件有效性，而抽象解释能证明程序属性，两者结合可相互增强分析精度。
AI.method: 通过理论推导整合E图的等价表达式聚类与抽象解释的精度优化，并实现区间算术分析器。
AI.result: 开发了理论框架并实现区间算术分析器，成功应用于FPBench基准测试套件。
AI.conclusion: E图与抽象解释的紧密结合能有效提升程序分析的精度与重写规则的应用深度。

title: GMML is All you Need
title_zh: GMML 就是您所需要的
abstract: Vision transformers have generated significant interest in the computer vision community because of their flexibility in exploiting contextual information, whether it is sharply confined local, or long range global. However, they are known to be data hungry. This has motivated the research in self-supervised transformer pretraining, which does not need to decode the semantic information conveyed by labels to link it to the image properties, but rather focuses directly on extracting a concise representation of the image data that reflects the notion of similarity, and is invariant to nuisance factors. The key vehicle for the self-learning process used by the majority of self-learning methods is the generation of multiple views of the training data and the creation of pretext tasks which use these views to define the notion of image similarity, and data integrity. However, this approach lacks the natural propensity to extract contextual information. We propose group masked model learning (GMML), a self-supervised learning (SSL) mechanism for pretraining vision transformers with the ability to extract the contextual information present in all the concepts in an image. GMML achieves this by manipulating randomly groups of connected tokens, ensuingly covering a meaningful part of a semantic concept, and then recovering the hidden semantic information from the visible part of the concept. GMML implicitly introduces a novel data augmentation process. Unlike most of the existing SSL approaches, GMML does not require momentum encoder, nor rely on careful implementation details such as large batches and gradient stopping, which are all artefacts of most of the current self-supervised learning techniques. The source code is publicly available for the community to train on bigger corpora: https://github.com/Sara-Ahmed/GMML.
summary: Vision transformers have generated significant interest in the computer vision community because of their flexibility in exploiting contextual information, whether it is sharply confined local, or long range global. However, they are known to be data hungry. This has motivated the research in self-supervised transformer pretraining, which does not need to decode the semantic information conveyed by labels to link it to the image properties, but rather focuses directly on extracting a concise representation of the image data that reflects the notion of similarity, and is invariant to nuisance factors. The key vehicle for the self-learning process used by the majority of self-learning methods is the generation of multiple views of the training data and the creation of pretext tasks which use these views to define the notion of image similarity, and data integrity. However, this approach lacks the natural propensity to extract contextual information. We propose group masked model learning (GMML), a self-supervised learning (SSL) mechanism for pretraining vision transformers with the ability to extract the contextual information present in all the concepts in an image. GMML achieves this by manipulating randomly groups of connected tokens, ensuingly covering a meaningful part of a semantic concept, and then recovering the hidden semantic information from the visible part of the concept. GMML implicitly introduces a novel data augmentation process. Unlike most of the existing SSL approaches, GMML does not require momentum encoder, nor rely on careful implementation details such as large batches and gradient stopping, which are all artefacts of most of the current self-supervised learning techniques. The source code is publicly available for the community to train on bigger corpora: https://github.com/Sara-Ahmed/GMML.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器因其在利用上下文信息方面的灵活性而引起了计算机视觉界的极大兴趣，无论是严格限制的本地信息还是远程全局信息。然而，众所周知，他们非常需要数据。这激发了自监督变压器预训练的研究，它不需要解码标签传达的语义信息以将其与图像属性联系起来，而是直接专注于提取反映相似性概念的图像数据的简明表示，并且对干扰因素不变。大多数自学习方法使用的自学习过程的关键工具是生成训练数据的多个视图并创建借口任务，这些任务使用这些视图来定义图像相似性和数据完整性的概念。然而，这种方法缺乏提取上下文信息的自然倾向。我们提出了组屏蔽模型学习（GMML），这是一种自我监督学习（SSL）机制，用于预训练视觉变换器，能够提取图像中所有概念中存在的上下文信息。 GMML 通过随机操作连接标记组来实现此目的，从而覆盖语义概念的有意义部分，然后从概念的可见部分恢复隐藏的语义信息。 GMML 隐含地引入了一种新颖的数据增强过程。与大多数现有的 SSL 方法不同，GMML 不需要动量编码器，也不依赖于仔细的实现细节，例如大批量和梯度停止，这些都是当前大多数自监督学习技术的产物。源代码可供社区公开使用，以便在更大的语料库上进行训练：https://github.com/Sara-Ahmed/GMML。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GMML的自监督学习方法，用于预训练视觉Transformer，以有效提取图像中的上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 现有的自监督学习方法在提取图像上下文信息时存在局限性，且依赖复杂的实现细节（如动量编码器、大批次训练等），而GMML旨在解决这些问题并提升预训练效率。
AI.method: GMML通过随机屏蔽图像中语义概念的连续token组，迫使模型从可见部分恢复隐藏的语义信息，从而隐式引入数据增强过程，无需动量编码器或复杂实现细节。
AI.result: GMML在无需动量编码器、大批次训练等情况下实现了有效的视觉Transformer预训练，代码已开源供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: GMML为视觉Transformer的自监督预训练提供了一种新颖且高效的解决方案，简化了现有方法的复杂性并提升了上下文信息提取能力。

authors_text: Parinya Chalermsook,Chien-Chung Huang,Danupon Nanongkai,Thatchaphol Saranurak,Pattara Sukprasert,Sorrachai Yingchareonthawornchai
title: Approximating k-Edge-Connected Spanning Subgraphs via a Near-Linear Time LP Solver
title_zh: 通过近线性时间 LP 求解器逼近 k 边连接的生成子图
abstract: In the $k$-edge-connected spanning subgraph ($k$ECSS) problem, our goal is to compute a minimum-cost sub-network that is resilient against up to $k$ link failures: Given an $n$-node $m$-edge graph with a cost function on the edges, our goal is to compute a minimum-cost $k$-edge-connected spanning subgraph. This NP-hard problem generalizes the minimum spanning tree problem and is the "uniform case" of a much broader class of survival network design problems (SNDP). A factor of two has remained the best approximation ratio for polynomial-time algorithms for the whole class of SNDP, even for a special case of $2$ECSS. The fastest $2$-approximation algorithm is however rather slow, taking $O(mn k)$ time [Khuller, Vishkin, STOC'92]. A faster time complexity of $O(n^2)$ can be obtained, but with a higher approximation guarantee of $(2k-1)$ [Gabow, Goemans, Williamson, IPCO'93]. Our main contribution is an algorithm that $(1+ε)$-approximates the optimal fractional solution in $\tilde O(m/ε^2)$ time (independent of $k$), which can be turned into a $(2+ε)$ approximation algorithm that runs in time $\tilde O\left(\frac{m}{ε^2} + \frac{k^2n^{1.5}}{ε^2}\right)$ for (integral) $k$ECSS; this improves the running time of the aforementioned results while keeping the approximation ratio arbitrarily close to a factor of two.
summary: In the $k$-edge-connected spanning subgraph ($k$ECSS) problem, our goal is to compute a minimum-cost sub-network that is resilient against up to $k$ link failures: Given an $n$-node $m$-edge graph with a cost function on the edges, our goal is to compute a minimum-cost $k$-edge-connected spanning subgraph. This NP-hard problem generalizes the minimum spanning tree problem and is the "uniform case" of a much broader class of survival network design problems (SNDP). A factor of two has remained the best approximation ratio for polynomial-time algorithms for the whole class of SNDP, even for a special case of $2$ECSS. The fastest $2$-approximation algorithm is however rather slow, taking $O(mn k)$ time [Khuller, Vishkin, STOC'92]. A faster time complexity of $O(n^2)$ can be obtained, but with a higher approximation guarantee of $(2k-1)$ [Gabow, Goemans, Williamson, IPCO'93]. Our main contribution is an algorithm that $(1+ε)$-approximates the optimal fractional solution in $\tilde O(m/ε^2)$ time (independent of $k$), which can be turned into a $(2+ε)$ approximation algorithm that runs in time $\tilde O\left(\frac{m}{ε^2} + \frac{k^2n^{1.5}}{ε^2}\right)$ for (integral) $k$ECSS; this improves the running time of the aforementioned results while keeping the approximation ratio arbitrarily close to a factor of two.
abstract_zh: 在 $k$ 边连接的跨越子图 ($k$ECSS) 问题中，我们的目标是计算一个最小成本的子网络，该子网络能够抵抗高达 $k$ 的链路故障：给定一个 $n$ 节点 $m$ 边图，其边上有成本函数，我们的目标是计算一个最小成本的 $k$ 边连接的跨越子图。这个 NP 难问题概括了最小生成树问题，并且是更广泛的生存网络设计问题 (SNDP) 类别的“统一情况”。对于整个 SNDP 类，因子 2 仍然是多项式时间算法的最佳近似比，即使对于 $2$ECSS 的特殊情况也是如此。然而，最快的 2$ 近似算法相当慢，需要 $O(mn k)$ 时间 [Khuller, Vishkin, STOC'92]。可以获得 $O(n^2)$ 的更快时间复杂度，但具有 $(2k-1)$ 的更高近似保证[Gabow, Goemans, Williamson, IPCO'93]。我们的主要贡献是$(1+ε)$在$\tilde O(m/ε^2)$时间内（独立于$k$）逼近最优分数解的算法，该算法可以转化为在$\tilde O\left(\frac{m}{ε^2} + \frac{k^2n^{1.5}}{ε^2}\right)$时间内运行的$(2+ε)$逼近算法，用于（积分） $k$ECSS；这提高了上述结果的运行时间，同时保持近似率任意接近两倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近线性时间的线性规划求解方法，用于近似解决k边连通生成子图问题（kECSS），在保持近似比接近两倍的同时显著提升了算法效率。
AI.motivation: 现有kECSS问题的近似算法存在时间复杂度高或近似比差的矛盾，需在保证近似质量的前提下优化计算效率。
AI.method: 设计基于近线性时间线性规划求解器的算法，首先（1+ε）近似最优分数解，再转化为（2+ε）近似整数解，时间复杂度为O(m/ε²)和O(k²n^1.5/ε²)。
AI.result: 算法在保持近似比任意接近两倍的同时，将运行时间从O(mn k)和O(n²)改进为近线性时间，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合线性规划近似与高效求解技术，本文为kECSS问题提供了时间效率与近似质量兼顾的创新解决方案。

search_text: Approximating k-Edge-Connected Spanning Subgraphs via a Near-Linear Time LP Solver 通过近线性时间 LP 求解器逼近 k 边连接的生成子图 In the $k$-edge-connected spanning subgraph ($k$ECSS) problem, our goal is to compute a minimum-cost sub-network that is resilient against up to $k$ link failures: Given an $n$-node $m$-edge graph with a cost function on the edges, our goal is to compute a minimum-cost $k$-edge-connected spanning subgraph. This NP-hard problem generalizes the minimum spanning tree problem and is the "uniform case" of a much broader class of survival network design problems (SNDP). A factor of two has remained the best approximation ratio for polynomial-time algorithms for the whole class of SNDP, even for a special case of $2$ECSS. The fastest $2$-approximation algorithm is however rather slow, taking $O(mn k)$ time [Khuller, Vishkin, STOC'92]. A faster time complexity of $O(n^2)$ can be obtained, but with a higher approximation guarantee of $(2k-1)$ [Gabow, Goemans, Williamson, IPCO'93]. Our main contribution is an algorithm that $(1+ε)$-approximates the optimal fractional solution in $\tilde O(m/ε^2)$ time (independent of $k$), which can be turned into a $(2+ε)$ approximation algorithm that runs in time $\tilde O\left(\frac{m}{ε^2} + \frac{k^2n^{1.5}}{ε^2}\right)$ for (integral) $k$ECSS; this improves the running time of the aforementioned results while keeping the approximation ratio arbitrarily close to a factor of two. 在 $k$ 边连接的跨越子图 ($k$ECSS) 问题中，我们的目标是计算一个最小成本的子网络，该子网络能够抵抗高达 $k$ 的链路故障：给定一个 $n$ 节点 $m$ 边图，其边上有成本函数，我们的目标是计算一个最小成本的 $k$ 边连接的跨越子图。这个 NP 难问题概括了最小生成树问题，并且是更广泛的生存网络设计问题 (SNDP) 类别的“统一情况”。对于整个 SNDP 类，因子 2 仍然是多项式时间算法的最佳近似比，即使对于 $2$ECSS 的特殊情况也是如此。然而，最快的 2$ 近似算法相当慢，需要 $O(mn k)$ 时间 [Khuller, Vishkin, STOC'92]。可以获得 $O(n^2)$ 的更快时间复杂度，但具有 $(2k-1)$ 的更高近似保证[Gabow, Goemans, Williamson, IPCO'93]。我们的主要贡献是$(1+ε)$在$\tilde O(m/ε^2)$时间内（独立于$k$）逼近最优分数解的算法，该算法可以转化为在$\tilde O\left(\frac{m}{ε^2} + \frac{k^2n^{1.5}}{ε^2}\right)$时间内运行的$(2+ε)$逼近算法，用于（积分） $k$ECSS；这提高了上述结果的运行时间，同时保持近似率任意接近两倍。 本文提出了一种近线性时间的线性规划求解方法，用于近似解决k边连通生成子图问题（kECSS），在保持近似比接近两倍的同时显著提升了算法效率。 Parinya Chalermsook,Chien-Chung Huang,Danupon Nanongkai,Thatchaphol Saranurak,Pattara Sukprasert,Sorrachai Yingchareonthawornchai cs.DS

authors_text: Hanqi Wang,Xiaoguang Zhu,Tao Chen,Chengfang Li,Liang Song
title: Rethinking Saliency Map: An Context-aware Perturbation Method to Explain EEG-based Deep Learning Model
title_zh: 重新思考显着图：一种解释基于脑电图的深度学习模型的上下文感知扰动方法
abstract: Deep learning is widely used to decode the electroencephalogram (EEG) signal. However, there are few attempts to specifically investigate how to explain the EEG-based deep learning models. We conduct a review to summarize the existing works explaining the EEG-based deep learning model. Unfortunately, we find that there is no appropriate method to explain them. Based on the characteristic of EEG data, we suggest a context-aware perturbation method to generate a saliency map from the perspective of the raw EEG signal. Moreover, we also justify that the context information can be used to suppress the artifacts in the EEG-based deep learning model. In practice, some users might want a simple version of the explanation, which only indicates a few features as salient points. To this end, we propose an optional area limitation strategy to restrict the highlighted region. To validate our idea and make a comparison with the other methods, we select three representative EEG-based models to implement experiments on the emotional EEG dataset DEAP. The results of the experiments support the advantages of our method.
summary: Deep learning is widely used to decode the electroencephalogram (EEG) signal. However, there are few attempts to specifically investigate how to explain the EEG-based deep learning models. We conduct a review to summarize the existing works explaining the EEG-based deep learning model. Unfortunately, we find that there is no appropriate method to explain them. Based on the characteristic of EEG data, we suggest a context-aware perturbation method to generate a saliency map from the perspective of the raw EEG signal. Moreover, we also justify that the context information can be used to suppress the artifacts in the EEG-based deep learning model. In practice, some users might want a simple version of the explanation, which only indicates a few features as salient points. To this end, we propose an optional area limitation strategy to restrict the highlighted region. To validate our idea and make a comparison with the other methods, we select three representative EEG-based models to implement experiments on the emotional EEG dataset DEAP. The results of the experiments support the advantages of our method.
abstract_zh: 深度学习广泛用于解码脑电图（EEG）信号。然而，很少有人尝试专门研究如何解释基于脑电图的深度学习模型。我们进行回顾，总结解释基于脑电图的深度学习模型的现有工作。不幸的是，我们发现没有合适的方法来解释它们。基于脑电图数据的特点，我们提出了一种上下文感知扰动方法，从原始脑电图信号的角度生成显着性图。此外，我们还证明上下文信息可用于抑制基于脑电图的深度学习模型中的伪影。在实践中，一些用户可能需要一个简单版本的解释，仅指出一些功能作为要点。为此，我们提出了一种可选的区域限制策略来限制突出显示的区域。为了验证我们的想法并与其他方法进行比较，我们选择了三个代表性的基于脑电图的模型在情感脑电图数据集 DEAP 上进行实验。实验结果支持了我们方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文感知扰动的方法，用于生成解释EEG深度学习模型的显著性图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效解释EEG深度学习模型，且EEG数据存在噪声和伪影问题，需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析EEG数据特性，设计上下文感知扰动策略生成显著性图，并引入区域限制策略简化解释结果。
AI.result: 在DEAP数据集上对比实验验证了方法有效性，证明其能更好抑制伪影并突出关键特征。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结合上下文信息和区域限制，为EEG模型解释提供了更准确且简洁的显著性图生成方案。

authors_text: Shuxuan Guo,Yinlin Hu,Jose M. Alvarez,Mathieu Salzmann
title: Knowledge Distillation for 6D Pose Estimation by Aligning Distributions of Local Predictions
title_zh: 通过对齐局部预测的分布进行 6D 姿态估计的知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation facilitates the training of a compact student network by using a deep teacher one. While this has achieved great success in many tasks, it remains completely unstudied for image-based 6D object pose estimation. In this work, we introduce the first knowledge distillation method driven by the 6D pose estimation task. To this end, we observe that most modern 6D pose estimation frameworks output local predictions, such as sparse 2D keypoints or dense representations, and that the compact student network typically struggles to predict such local quantities precisely. Therefore, instead of imposing prediction-to-prediction supervision from the teacher to the student, we propose to distill the teacher's \emph{distribution} of local predictions into the student network, facilitating its training. Our experiments on several benchmarks show that our distillation method yields state-of-the-art results with different compact student models and for both keypoint-based and dense prediction-based architectures.
summary: Knowledge distillation facilitates the training of a compact student network by using a deep teacher one. While this has achieved great success in many tasks, it remains completely unstudied for image-based 6D object pose estimation. In this work, we introduce the first knowledge distillation method driven by the 6D pose estimation task. To this end, we observe that most modern 6D pose estimation frameworks output local predictions, such as sparse 2D keypoints or dense representations, and that the compact student network typically struggles to predict such local quantities precisely. Therefore, instead of imposing prediction-to-prediction supervision from the teacher to the student, we propose to distill the teacher's \emph{distribution} of local predictions into the student network, facilitating its training. Our experiments on several benchmarks show that our distillation method yields state-of-the-art results with different compact student models and for both keypoint-based and dense prediction-based architectures.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏有助于通过使用深度教师网络来训练紧凑的学生网络。虽然这在许多任务中取得了巨大的成功，但对于基于图像的 6D 物体姿态估计，它仍然完全未被研究。在这项工作中，我们介绍了第一个由 6D 位姿估计任务驱动的知识蒸馏方法。为此，我们观察到大多数现代 6D 姿态估计框架输出局部预测，例如稀疏的 2D 关键点或密集表示，而紧凑的学生网络通常难以精确预测此类局部量。因此，我们建议将教师的局部预测的 \emph{分布} 提炼到学生网络中，以方便其训练，而不是将教师对学生进行预测到预测的监督。我们在多个基准上的实验表明，我们的蒸馏方法可以通过不同的紧凑学生模型以及基于关键点和基于密集预测的架构产生最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的6D姿态估计方法，通过对齐局部预测的分布来训练紧凑的学生网络。
AI.motivation: 尽管知识蒸馏在许多任务中取得了成功，但在基于图像的6D物体姿态估计任务中尚未被研究。现代6D姿态估计框架通常输出局部预测，而紧凑的学生网络难以精确预测这些局部量。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种由6D姿态估计任务驱动的知识蒸馏方法，通过将教师网络的局部预测分布蒸馏到学生网络中，而不是直接进行预测到预测的监督。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该蒸馏方法在不同紧凑的学生模型和基于关键点及密集预测的架构上均取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将知识蒸馏应用于6D姿态估计任务，并通过分布对齐有效提升了学生网络的性能。

ai_content.conclusion: 本文首次将知识蒸馏应用于6D姿态估计任务，并通过分布对齐有效提升了学生网络的性能。

search_text: Knowledge Distillation for 6D Pose Estimation by Aligning Distributions of Local Predictions 通过对齐局部预测的分布进行 6D 姿态估计的知识蒸馏 Knowledge distillation facilitates the training of a compact student network by using a deep teacher one. While this has achieved great success in many tasks, it remains completely unstudied for image-based 6D object pose estimation. In this work, we introduce the first knowledge distillation method driven by the 6D pose estimation task. To this end, we observe that most modern 6D pose estimation frameworks output local predictions, such as sparse 2D keypoints or dense representations, and that the compact student network typically struggles to predict such local quantities precisely. Therefore, instead of imposing prediction-to-prediction supervision from the teacher to the student, we propose to distill the teacher's \emph{distribution} of local predictions into the student network, facilitating its training. Our experiments on several benchmarks show that our distillation method yields state-of-the-art results with different compact student models and for both keypoint-based and dense prediction-based architectures. 知识蒸馏有助于通过使用深度教师网络来训练紧凑的学生网络。虽然这在许多任务中取得了巨大的成功，但对于基于图像的 6D 物体姿态估计，它仍然完全未被研究。在这项工作中，我们介绍了第一个由 6D 位姿估计任务驱动的知识蒸馏方法。为此，我们观察到大多数现代 6D 姿态估计框架输出局部预测，例如稀疏的 2D 关键点或密集表示，而紧凑的学生网络通常难以精确预测此类局部量。因此，我们建议将教师的局部预测的 \emph{分布} 提炼到学生网络中，以方便其训练，而不是将教师对学生进行预测到预测的监督。我们在多个基准上的实验表明，我们的蒸馏方法可以通过不同的紧凑学生模型以及基于关键点和基于密集预测的架构产生最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的6D姿态估计方法，通过对齐局部预测的分布来训练紧凑的学生网络。 Shuxuan Guo,Yinlin Hu,Jose M. Alvarez,Mathieu Salzmann cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jinyi Wang,Zhaoyang Lyu,Dahua Lin,Bo Dai,Hongfei Fu
title: Guided Diffusion Model for Adversarial Purification
title_zh: 用于对抗性净化的引导扩散模型
abstract: With wider application of deep neural networks (DNNs) in various algorithms and frameworks, security threats have become one of the concerns. Adversarial attacks disturb DNN-based image classifiers, in which attackers can intentionally add imperceptible adversarial perturbations on input images to fool the classifiers. In this paper, we propose a novel purification approach, referred to as guided diffusion model for purification (GDMP), to help protect classifiers from adversarial attacks. The core of our approach is to embed purification into the diffusion denoising process of a Denoised Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), so that its diffusion process could submerge the adversarial perturbations with gradually added Gaussian noises, and both of these noises can be simultaneously removed following a guided denoising process. On our comprehensive experiments across various datasets, the proposed GDMP is shown to reduce the perturbations raised by adversarial attacks to a shallow range, thereby significantly improving the correctness of classification. GDMP improves the robust accuracy by 5%, obtaining 90.1% under PGD attack on the CIFAR10 dataset. Moreover, GDMP achieves 70.94% robustness on the challenging ImageNet dataset.
summary: With wider application of deep neural networks (DNNs) in various algorithms and frameworks, security threats have become one of the concerns. Adversarial attacks disturb DNN-based image classifiers, in which attackers can intentionally add imperceptible adversarial perturbations on input images to fool the classifiers. In this paper, we propose a novel purification approach, referred to as guided diffusion model for purification (GDMP), to help protect classifiers from adversarial attacks. The core of our approach is to embed purification into the diffusion denoising process of a Denoised Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), so that its diffusion process could submerge the adversarial perturbations with gradually added Gaussian noises, and both of these noises can be simultaneously removed following a guided denoising process. On our comprehensive experiments across various datasets, the proposed GDMP is shown to reduce the perturbations raised by adversarial attacks to a shallow range, thereby significantly improving the correctness of classification. GDMP improves the robust accuracy by 5%, obtaining 90.1% under PGD attack on the CIFAR10 dataset. Moreover, GDMP achieves 70.94% robustness on the challenging ImageNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络（DNN）在各种算法和框架中的广泛应用，安全威胁已成为人们关注的问题之一。对抗性攻击会干扰基于 DNN 的图像分类器，攻击者可以故意在输入图像上添加难以察觉的对抗性扰动来欺骗分类器。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的净化方法，称为净化引导扩散模型（GDMP），以帮助保护分类器免受对抗性攻击。我们方法的核心是将净化嵌入到去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）的扩散去噪过程中，使其扩散过程可以用逐渐添加的高斯噪声淹没对抗性扰动，并且在引导去噪过程后可以同时去除这两种噪声。在我们对各种数据集的综合实验中，所提出的 GDMP 被证明可以将对抗性攻击引起的扰动减少到较浅的范围，从而显着提高分类的正确性。 GDMP 将鲁棒精度提高了 5%，在 CIFAR10 数据集上的 PGD 攻击下获得了 90.1% 的鲁棒精度。此外，GDPP 在具有挑战性的 ImageNet 数据集上实现了 70.94% 的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于引导扩散模型的净化方法（GDMP），用于增强深度神经网络对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着深度神经网络应用的普及，对抗攻击带来的安全威胁日益突出，亟需有效的净化方法来抵御此类攻击。
AI.method: 将净化过程嵌入扩散去噪模型（DDPM）的扩散过程，通过逐步添加高斯噪声淹没对抗扰动，并采用引导去噪过程同时去除噪声与扰动。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10数据集上，GDMP在PGD攻击下将鲁棒准确率提升至90.1%（提升5%）；在ImageNet数据集上达到70.94%的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GDMP通过扩散模型有效抑制对抗扰动，显著提升分类正确率，为增强模型安全性提供了新思路。

search_text: Guided Diffusion Model for Adversarial Purification 用于对抗性净化的引导扩散模型 With wider application of deep neural networks (DNNs) in various algorithms and frameworks, security threats have become one of the concerns. Adversarial attacks disturb DNN-based image classifiers, in which attackers can intentionally add imperceptible adversarial perturbations on input images to fool the classifiers. In this paper, we propose a novel purification approach, referred to as guided diffusion model for purification (GDMP), to help protect classifiers from adversarial attacks. The core of our approach is to embed purification into the diffusion denoising process of a Denoised Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), so that its diffusion process could submerge the adversarial perturbations with gradually added Gaussian noises, and both of these noises can be simultaneously removed following a guided denoising process. On our comprehensive experiments across various datasets, the proposed GDMP is shown to reduce the perturbations raised by adversarial attacks to a shallow range, thereby significantly improving the correctness of classification. GDMP improves the robust accuracy by 5%, obtaining 90.1% under PGD attack on the CIFAR10 dataset. Moreover, GDMP achieves 70.94% robustness on the challenging ImageNet dataset. 随着深度神经网络（DNN）在各种算法和框架中的广泛应用，安全威胁已成为人们关注的问题之一。对抗性攻击会干扰基于 DNN 的图像分类器，攻击者可以故意在输入图像上添加难以察觉的对抗性扰动来欺骗分类器。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的净化方法，称为净化引导扩散模型（GDMP），以帮助保护分类器免受对抗性攻击。我们方法的核心是将净化嵌入到去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）的扩散去噪过程中，使其扩散过程可以用逐渐添加的高斯噪声淹没对抗性扰动，并且在引导去噪过程后可以同时去除这两种噪声。在我们对各种数据集的综合实验中，所提出的 GDMP 被证明可以将对抗性攻击引起的扰动减少到较浅的范围，从而显着提高分类的正确性。 GDMP 将鲁棒精度提高了 5%，在 CIFAR10 数据集上的 PGD 攻击下获得了 90.1% 的鲁棒精度。此外，GDPP 在具有挑战性的 ImageNet 数据集上实现了 70.94% 的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种基于引导扩散模型的净化方法（GDMP），用于增强深度神经网络对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。 Jinyi Wang,Zhaoyang Lyu,Dahua Lin,Bo Dai,Hongfei Fu cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Universally-Optimal Distributed Exact Min-Cut
title_zh: 通用最优分布式精确最小割
abstract: We present a universally-optimal distributed algorithm for the exact weighted min-cut. The algorithm is guaranteed to complete in $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$ rounds on every graph, recovering the recent result of Dory, Efron, Mukhopadhyay, and Nanongkai~[STOC'21], but runs much faster on structured graphs. Specifically, the algorithm completes in $\widetilde{O}(D)$ rounds on (weighted) planar graphs or, more generally, any (weighted) excluded-minor family. We obtain this result by designing an aggregation-based algorithm: each node receives only an aggregate of the messages sent to it. While somewhat restrictive, recent work shows any such black-box algorithm can be simulated on any minor of the communication network. Furthermore, we observe this also allows for the addition of (a small number of) arbitrarily-connected virtual nodes to the network. We leverage these capabilities to design a min-cut algorithm that is significantly simpler compared to prior distributed work. We hope this paper showcases how working within this paradigm yields simple-to-design and ultra-efficient distributed algorithms for global problems. Our main technical contribution is a distributed algorithm that, given any tree $T$, computes the minimum cut that $2$-respects $T$ (i.e., cuts at most $2$ edges of $T$) in universally near-optimal time. Moreover, our algorithm gives a \emph{deterministic} $\widetilde{O}(D)$-round 2-respecting cut solution for excluded-minor families and a \emph{deterministic} $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$-round solution for general graphs, the latter resolving a question of Dory, et al.~[STOC'21]
summary: We present a universally-optimal distributed algorithm for the exact weighted min-cut. The algorithm is guaranteed to complete in $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$ rounds on every graph, recovering the recent result of Dory, Efron, Mukhopadhyay, and Nanongkai~[STOC'21], but runs much faster on structured graphs. Specifically, the algorithm completes in $\widetilde{O}(D)$ rounds on (weighted) planar graphs or, more generally, any (weighted) excluded-minor family. We obtain this result by designing an aggregation-based algorithm: each node receives only an aggregate of the messages sent to it. While somewhat restrictive, recent work shows any such black-box algorithm can be simulated on any minor of the communication network. Furthermore, we observe this also allows for the addition of (a small number of) arbitrarily-connected virtual nodes to the network. We leverage these capabilities to design a min-cut algorithm that is significantly simpler compared to prior distributed work. We hope this paper showcases how working within this paradigm yields simple-to-design and ultra-efficient distributed algorithms for global problems. Our main technical contribution is a distributed algorithm that, given any tree $T$, computes the minimum cut that $2$-respects $T$ (i.e., cuts at most $2$ edges of $T$) in universally near-optimal time. Moreover, our algorithm gives a \emph{deterministic} $\widetilde{O}(D)$-round 2-respecting cut solution for excluded-minor families and a \emph{deterministic} $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$-round solution for general graphs, the latter resolving a question of Dory, et al.~[STOC'21]
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于精确加权最小割的通用最优分布式算法。该算法保证在每个图上在 $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$ 轮内完成，恢复 Dory、Efron、Mukhopadhyay 和 Nanongkai~[STOC'21] 的最新结果，但在结构化图上运行速度要快得多。具体来说，该算法在（加权）平面图或更一般地任何（加权）排除次要族上以 $\widetilde{O}(D)$ 轮完成。我们通过设计基于聚合的算法来获得此结果：每个节点仅接收发送给它的消息的聚合。虽然有些限制，但最近的工作表明任何此类黑盒算法都可以在通信网络的任何次要网络上进行模拟。此外，我们观察到这还允许向网络添加（少量）任意连接的虚拟节点。我们利用这些功能来设计一个最小割算法，与之前的分布式工作相比，该算法要简单得多。我们希望本文展示了如何在这种范式中工作，为全球问题产生设计简单且超高效的分布式算法。我们的主要技术贡献是一种分布式算法，给定任何树 $T$，在普遍接近最佳的时间内计算 $2$ 尊重 $T$ 的最小切割（即，切割 $T$ 的最多 $2$ 边）。此外，我们的算法给出了排除次要族的 \emph{确定性} $\widetilde{O}(D)$-round 2-respecting 割解和一般图的 \emph{definistic} $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$-round 解，后者解决了 Dory 等人的问题~[STOC'21]

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用最优的分布式精确最小割算法，能够在各种图结构中以近似最优时间完成计算。
AI.motivation: 分布式网络中需要高效解决全局问题，传统算法在复杂图结构上效率不足，需设计更优的分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 基于聚合消息机制设计算法，结合树结构的2-边尊重割技术，并利用虚拟节点扩展网络能力。
AI.result: 在一般图中实现O(D + √n)轮复杂度，在平面图等结构化图中达到O(D)轮，解决了STOC'21提出的问题。
AI.conclusion: 该范式简化了分布式算法设计，为全局问题提供了高效且易实现的解决方案。

The algorithm is guaranteed to complete in $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$ rounds on every graph, recovering the recent result of Dory, Efron, Mukhopadhyay, and Nanongkai~[STOC'21], but runs much faster on structured graphs. Specifically, the algorithm completes in $\widetilde{O}(D)$ rounds on (weighted) planar graphs or, more generally, any (weighted) excluded-minor family. We obtain this result by designing an aggregation-based algorithm: each node receives only an aggregate of the messages sent to it. While somewhat restrictive, recent work shows any such black-box algorithm can be simulated on any minor of the communication network. Furthermore, we observe this also allows for the addition of (a small number of) arbitrarily-connected virtual nodes to the network. We leverage these capabilities to design a min-cut algorithm that is significantly simpler compared to prior distributed work. We hope this paper showcases how working within this paradigm yields simple-to-design and ultra-efficient distributed algorithms for global problems. Our main technical contribution is a distributed algorithm that, given any tree $T$, computes the minimum cut that $2$-respects $T$ (i.e., cuts at most $2$ edges of $T$) in universally near-optimal time. Moreover, our algorithm gives a \emph{deterministic} $\widetilde{O}(D)$-round 2-respecting cut solution for excluded-minor families and a \emph{deterministic} $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$-round solution for general graphs, the latter resolving a question of Dory, et al.~[STOC'21] 我们提出了一种用于精确加权最小割的通用最优分布式算法。该算法保证在每个图上在 $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$ 轮内完成，恢复 Dory、Efron、Mukhopadhyay 和 Nanongkai~[STOC'21] 的最新结果，但在结构化图上运行速度要快得多。具体来说，该算法在（加权）平面图或更一般地任何（加权）排除次要族上以 $\widetilde{O}(D)$ 轮完成。我们通过设计基于聚合的算法来获得此结果：每个节点仅接收发送给它的消息的聚合。虽然有些限制，但最近的工作表明任何此类黑盒算法都可以在通信网络的任何次要网络上进行模拟。此外，我们观察到这还允许向网络添加（少量）任意连接的虚拟节点。我们利用这些功能来设计一个最小割算法，与之前的分布式工作相比，该算法要简单得多。我们希望本文展示了如何在这种范式中工作，为全球问题产生设计简单且超高效的分布式算法。我们的主要技术贡献是一种分布式算法，给定任何树 $T$，在普遍接近最佳的时间内计算 $2$ 尊重 $T$ 的最小切割（即，切割 $T$ 的最多 $2$ 边）。此外，我们的算法给出了排除次要族的 \emph{确定性} $\widetilde{O}(D)$-round 2-respecting 割解和一般图的 \emph{definistic} $\widetilde{O}(D + \sqrt{n})$-round 解，后者解决了 Dory 等人的问题~[STOC'21] 本文提出了一种通用最优的分布式精确最小割算法，能够在各种图结构中以近似最优时间完成计算。 Mohsen Ghaffari,Goran Zuzic cs.DS

title: PSNet: Fast Data Structuring for Hierarchical Deep Learning on Point Cloud
title_zh: PSNet：点云上分层深度学习的快速数据结构
abstract: In order to retain more feature information of local areas on a point cloud, local grouping and subsampling are the necessary data structuring steps in most hierarchical deep learning models. Due to the disorder nature of the points in a point cloud, the significant time cost may be consumed when grouping and subsampling the points, which consequently results in poor scalability. This paper proposes a fast data structuring method called PSNet (Point Structuring Net). PSNet transforms the spatial features of the points and matches them to the features of local areas in a point cloud. PSNet achieves grouping and sampling at the same time while the existing methods process sampling and grouping in two separate steps (such as using FPS plus kNN). PSNet performs feature transformation pointwise while the existing methods uses the spatial relationship among the points as the reference for grouping. Thanks to these features, PSNet has two important advantages: 1) the grouping and sampling results obtained by PSNet is stable and permutation invariant; and 2) PSNet can be easily parallelized. PSNet can replace the data structuring methods in the mainstream point cloud deep learning models in a plug-and-play manner. We have conducted extensive experiments. The results show that PSNet can improve the training and inference speed significantly while maintaining the model accuracy.
summary: In order to retain more feature information of local areas on a point cloud, local grouping and subsampling are the necessary data structuring steps in most hierarchical deep learning models. Due to the disorder nature of the points in a point cloud, the significant time cost may be consumed when grouping and subsampling the points, which consequently results in poor scalability. This paper proposes a fast data structuring method called PSNet (Point Structuring Net). PSNet transforms the spatial features of the points and matches them to the features of local areas in a point cloud. PSNet achieves grouping and sampling at the same time while the existing methods process sampling and grouping in two separate steps (such as using FPS plus kNN). PSNet performs feature transformation pointwise while the existing methods uses the spatial relationship among the points as the reference for grouping. Thanks to these features, PSNet has two important advantages: 1) the grouping and sampling results obtained by PSNet is stable and permutation invariant; and 2) PSNet can be easily parallelized. PSNet can replace the data structuring methods in the mainstream point cloud deep learning models in a plug-and-play manner. We have conducted extensive experiments. The results show that PSNet can improve the training and inference speed significantly while maintaining the model accuracy.
abstract_zh: 为了在点云上保留更多局部区域的特征信息，局部分组和子采样是大多数分层深度学习模型中必要的数据结构化步骤。由于点云中点的无序性，对点进行分组和二次采样时可能会消耗大量的时间成本，从而导致可扩展性较差。本文提出了一种快速数据结构化方法，称为PSNet（Point Structuring Net）。 PSNet 变换点的空间特征，并将其与点云中局部区域的特征进行匹配。 PSNet同时实现分组和采样，而现有方法分两个单独的步骤处理采样和分组（例如使用FPS加kNN）。 PSNet逐点进行特征变换，而现有方法使用点之间的空间关系作为分组的参考。得益于这些特性，PSNet具有两个重要的优点：1）PSNet获得的分组和采样结果是稳定的且排列不变的； 2）PSNet 可以轻松并行化。 PSNet可以即插即用的方式替代主流点云深度学习模型中的数据结构化方法。我们进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，PSNet 可以在保持模型精度的同时显着提高训练和推理速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PSNet方法，用于点云数据的快速结构化处理，以提升分层深度学习模型的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在点云分组和采样时需分步处理，导致计算耗时且难以扩展，PSNet旨在通过同时完成分组与采样以提高效率。
AI.method: PSNet通过点-wise特征变换将点云空间特征映射到局部区域，同步实现分组与采样，替代传统FPS+kNN的分步策略，并支持并行计算。
AI.result: 实验表明PSNet在保持模型精度的同时，显著提升了训练和推理速度。
AI.conclusion: PSNet作为一种即插即用的结构化方法，可有效替代现有方案，为点云深度学习提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Kaicheng Yu,Tang Tao,Hongwei Xie,Zhiwei Lin,Zhongwei Wu,Zhongyu Xia,Tingting Liang,Haiyang Sun,Jiong Deng,Dayang Hao,Yongtao Wang,Xiaodan Liang,Bing Wang
title: Benchmarking the Robustness of LiDAR-Camera Fusion for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 对用于 3D 物体检测的 LiDAR-相机融合的鲁棒性进行基准测试
comment: Technical report. The first three authors contribute equally
comments: Technical report. The first three authors contribute equally
abstract: There are two critical sensors for 3D perception in autonomous driving, the camera and the LiDAR. The camera provides rich semantic information such as color, texture, and the LiDAR reflects the 3D shape and locations of surrounding objects. People discover that fusing these two modalities can significantly boost the performance of 3D perception models as each modality has complementary information to the other. However, we observe that current datasets are captured from expensive vehicles that are explicitly designed for data collection purposes, and cannot truly reflect the realistic data distribution due to various reasons. To this end, we collect a series of real-world cases with noisy data distribution, and systematically formulate a robustness benchmark toolkit, that simulates these cases on any clean autonomous driving datasets. We showcase the effectiveness of our toolkit by establishing the robustness benchmark on two widely-adopted autonomous driving datasets, nuScenes and Waymo, then, to the best of our knowledge, holistically benchmark the state-of-the-art fusion methods for the first time. We observe that: i) most fusion methods, when solely developed on these data, tend to fail inevitably when there is a disruption to the LiDAR input; ii) the improvement of the camera input is significantly inferior to the LiDAR one. We further propose an efficient robust training strategy to improve the robustness of the current fusion method. The benchmark and code are available at https://github.com/kcyu2014/lidar-camera-robust-benchmark

The camera provides rich semantic information such as color, texture, and the LiDAR reflects the 3D shape and locations of surrounding objects. People discover that fusing these two modalities can significantly boost the performance of 3D perception models as each modality has complementary information to the other. However, we observe that current datasets are captured from expensive vehicles that are explicitly designed for data collection purposes, and cannot truly reflect the realistic data distribution due to various reasons. To this end, we collect a series of real-world cases with noisy data distribution, and systematically formulate a robustness benchmark toolkit, that simulates these cases on any clean autonomous driving datasets. We showcase the effectiveness of our toolkit by establishing the robustness benchmark on two widely-adopted autonomous driving datasets, nuScenes and Waymo, then, to the best of our knowledge, holistically benchmark the state-of-the-art fusion methods for the first time. We observe that: i) most fusion methods, when solely developed on these data, tend to fail inevitably when there is a disruption to the LiDAR input; ii) the improvement of the camera input is significantly inferior to the LiDAR one. We further propose an efficient robust training strategy to improve the robustness of the current fusion method. The benchmark and code are available at https://github.com/kcyu2014/lidar-camera-robust-benchmark
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶中的 3D 感知有两个关键传感器：摄像头和激光雷达。相机提供颜色、纹理等丰富的语义信息，激光雷达反映周围物体的 3D 形状和位置。人们发现，融合这两种模态可以显着提高 3D 感知模型的性能，因为每种模态都具有彼此互补的信息。然而，我们观察到，当前的数据集是从专门为数据收集目的而设计的昂贵车辆中捕获的，由于各种原因无法真实反映现实的数据分布。为此，我们收集了一系列具有噪声数据分布的真实案例，并系统地制定了鲁棒性基准工具包，在任何干净的自动驾驶数据集上模拟这些案例。我们通过在两个广泛采用的自动驾驶数据集 nuScenes 和 Waymo 上建立鲁棒性基准来展示我们工具包的有效性，然后，据我们所知，首次对最先进的融合方法进行整体基准测试。我们观察到：i）大多数融合方法仅根据这些数据开发时，当激光雷达输入​​中断时往往会不可避免地失败； ii）相机输入的提升明显逊色于激光雷达。我们进一步提出了一种有效的鲁棒训练策略来提高当前融合方法的鲁棒性。基准测试和代码可在 https://github.com/kcyu2014/lidar-camera-robust-benchmark 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于评估LiDAR-相机融合在3D目标检测中鲁棒性的基准工具包，并在nuScenes和Waymo数据集上进行了系统性测试。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集无法真实反映实际场景中的数据分布，导致LiDAR-相机融合方法的鲁棒性未被充分验证，需建立更贴近现实的评估基准。
AI.method: 收集真实噪声数据案例，构建模拟噪声的鲁棒性基准工具包，并在主流数据集上评估最新融合方法的性能。
AI.result: 发现多数融合方法在LiDAR输入受扰时表现显著下降，且相机输入优化效果远低于LiDAR；提出高效训练策略提升鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 现有融合方法对LiDAR依赖性强，鲁棒性不足，需通过新基准和训练策略进行改进以应对实际场景挑战。

We observe that: i) most fusion methods, when solely developed on these data, tend to fail inevitably when there is a disruption to the LiDAR input; ii) the improvement of the camera input is significantly inferior to the LiDAR one. We further propose an efficient robust training strategy to improve the robustness of the current fusion method. The benchmark and code are available at https://github.com/kcyu2014/lidar-camera-robust-benchmark 自动驾驶中的 3D 感知有两个关键传感器：摄像头和激光雷达。相机提供颜色、纹理等丰富的语义信息，激光雷达反映周围物体的 3D 形状和位置。人们发现，融合这两种模态可以显着提高 3D 感知模型的性能，因为每种模态都具有彼此互补的信息。然而，我们观察到，当前的数据集是从专门为数据收集目的而设计的昂贵车辆中捕获的，由于各种原因无法真实反映现实的数据分布。为此，我们收集了一系列具有噪声数据分布的真实案例，并系统地制定了鲁棒性基准工具包，在任何干净的自动驾驶数据集上模拟这些案例。我们通过在两个广泛采用的自动驾驶数据集 nuScenes 和 Waymo 上建立鲁棒性基准来展示我们工具包的有效性，然后，据我们所知，首次对最先进的融合方法进行整体基准测试。我们观察到：i）大多数融合方法仅根据这些数据开发时，当激光雷达输入​​中断时往往会不可避免地失败； ii）相机输入的提升明显逊色于激光雷达。我们进一步提出了一种有效的鲁棒训练策略来提高当前融合方法的鲁棒性。基准测试和代码可在 https://github.com/kcyu2014/lidar-camera-robust-benchmark 获取 该论文提出了一种用于评估LiDAR-相机融合在3D目标检测中鲁棒性的基准工具包，并在nuScenes和Waymo数据集上进行了系统性测试。 Kaicheng Yu,Tang Tao,Hongwei Xie,Zhiwei Lin,Zhongwei Wu,Zhongyu Xia,Tingting Liang,Haiyang Sun,Jiong Deng,Dayang Hao,Yongtao Wang,Xiaodan Liang,Bing Wang cs.CV

title: QB-II for Evaluating the Reliability of Binary-State Networks
title_zh: 用于评估二元状态网络可靠性的 QB-II
abstract: Current real-life applications of various networks such as utility (gas, water, electric, 4G/5G) networks, the Internet of Things, social networks, and supply chains. Reliability is one of the most popular tools for evaluating network performance. The fundamental structure of these networks is a binary state network. Distinctive methods have been proposed to efficiently assess binary-state network reliability. A new algorithm called QB-II (quick binary-addition tree algorithm II) is proposed to improve the efficiency of quick BAT, which is based on BAT and outperforms many algorithms. The proposed QB-II implements the shortest minimum cuts (MCs) to separate the entire BAT into main-BAT and sub-BATs, and the source-target matrix convolution products to connect these subgraphs intelligently to improve the efficiency. Twenty benchmark problems were used to validate the performance of the QB-II.
summary: Current real-life applications of various networks such as utility (gas, water, electric, 4G/5G) networks, the Internet of Things, social networks, and supply chains. Reliability is one of the most popular tools for evaluating network performance. The fundamental structure of these networks is a binary state network. Distinctive methods have been proposed to efficiently assess binary-state network reliability. A new algorithm called QB-II (quick binary-addition tree algorithm II) is proposed to improve the efficiency of quick BAT, which is based on BAT and outperforms many algorithms. The proposed QB-II implements the shortest minimum cuts (MCs) to separate the entire BAT into main-BAT and sub-BATs, and the source-target matrix convolution products to connect these subgraphs intelligently to improve the efficiency. Twenty benchmark problems were used to validate the performance of the QB-II.
abstract_zh: 当前各种网络的实际应用，例如公用事业（燃气、水、电力、4G/5G）网络、物联网、社交网络和供应链。可靠性是评估网络性能最流行的工具之一。这些网络的基本结构是二元状态网络。已经提出了独特的方法来有效评估二元状态网络的可靠性。为了提高快速BAT的效率，提出了一种新的算法QB-II（快速二叉加法树算法II），该算法基于BAT，性能优于许多算法。所提出的QB-II实现了最短最小割（MC）以将整个BAT分为主BAT和子BAT，并使用源-目标矩阵卷积积来智能地连接这些子图以提高效率。使用二十个基准问题来验证 QB-II 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为QB-II的算法，用于提高二元状态网络可靠性的评估效率。
AI.motivation: 现有网络可靠性评估方法在处理复杂网络时效率不足，需更高效的算法以应对实际应用需求。
AI.method: 通过将最小割集分割为子图并利用源-目标矩阵卷积连接子图，优化快速BAT算法的效率。
AI.result: 在20个基准问题测试中，QB-II算法表现优于现有多种方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: QB-II算法通过智能分割与连接子图显著提升了二元状态网络可靠性评估的效率。

authors_text: Xiaosong Zhang,Yunjie Tian,Wei Huang,Qixiang Ye,Qi Dai,Lingxi Xie,Qi Tian
title: HiViT: Hierarchical Vision Transformer Meets Masked Image Modeling
title_zh: HiViT：分层视觉转换器与蒙版图像建模的结合
abstract: Recently, masked image modeling (MIM) has offered a new methodology of self-supervised pre-training of vision transformers. A key idea of efficient implementation is to discard the masked image patches (or tokens) throughout the target network (encoder), which requires the encoder to be a plain vision transformer (e.g., ViT), albeit hierarchical vision transformers (e.g., Swin Transformer) have potentially better properties in formulating vision inputs. In this paper, we offer a new design of hierarchical vision transformers named HiViT (short for Hierarchical ViT) that enjoys both high efficiency and good performance in MIM. The key is to remove the unnecessary "local inter-unit operations", deriving structurally simple hierarchical vision transformers in which mask-units can be serialized like plain vision transformers. For this purpose, we start with Swin Transformer and (i) set the masking unit size to be the token size in the main stage of Swin Transformer, (ii) switch off inter-unit self-attentions before the main stage, and (iii) eliminate all operations after the main stage. Empirical studies demonstrate the advantageous performance of HiViT in terms of fully-supervised, self-supervised, and transfer learning. In particular, in running MAE on ImageNet-1K, HiViT-B reports a +0.6% accuracy gain over ViT-B and a 1.9$\times$ speed-up over Swin-B, and the performance gain generalizes to downstream tasks of detection and segmentation. Code will be made publicly available.
summary: Recently, masked image modeling (MIM) has offered a new methodology of self-supervised pre-training of vision transformers. A key idea of efficient implementation is to discard the masked image patches (or tokens) throughout the target network (encoder), which requires the encoder to be a plain vision transformer (e.g., ViT), albeit hierarchical vision transformers (e.g., Swin Transformer) have potentially better properties in formulating vision inputs. In this paper, we offer a new design of hierarchical vision transformers named HiViT (short for Hierarchical ViT) that enjoys both high efficiency and good performance in MIM. The key is to remove the unnecessary "local inter-unit operations", deriving structurally simple hierarchical vision transformers in which mask-units can be serialized like plain vision transformers. For this purpose, we start with Swin Transformer and (i) set the masking unit size to be the token size in the main stage of Swin Transformer, (ii) switch off inter-unit self-attentions before the main stage, and (iii) eliminate all operations after the main stage. Empirical studies demonstrate the advantageous performance of HiViT in terms of fully-supervised, self-supervised, and transfer learning. In particular, in running MAE on ImageNet-1K, HiViT-B reports a +0.6% accuracy gain over ViT-B and a 1.9$\times$ speed-up over Swin-B, and the performance gain generalizes to downstream tasks of detection and segmentation. Code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 最近，掩模图像建模（MIM）提供了一种视觉变换器自监督预训练的新方法。高效实现的一个关键思想是丢弃整个目标网络（编码器）中的屏蔽图像块（或标记），这要求编码器是普通视觉变换器（例如 ViT），尽管分层视觉变换器（例如 Swin Transformer）在制定视觉输入方面具有潜在更好的属性。在本文中，我们提供了一种新的分层视觉变压器设计，名为 HiViT（Hierarchical ViT 的缩写），它在 MIM 中具有高效率和良好的性能。关键是删除不必要的“局部单元间操作”，派生出结构简单的分层视觉变换器，其中掩模单元可以像普通视觉变换器一样被序列化。为此，我们从 Swin Transformer 开始，(i) 将掩蔽单元大小设置为 Swin Transformer 主阶段中的 token 大小，(ii) 在主阶段之前关闭单元间自注意力，(iii) 消除主阶段之后的所有操作。实证研究证明了 HiViT 在全监督、自监督和迁移学习方面的优势表现。特别是，在 ImageNet-1K 上运行 MAE 时，HiViT-B 比 ViT-B 提高了 0.6% 的准确度，比 Swin-B 提高了 1.9 倍的速度，并且性能增益可推广到检测和分割的下游任务。代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HiViT的层次化视觉Transformer架构，旨在提升掩码图像建模（MIM）中的效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管层次化视觉Transformer（如Swin Transformer）在处理视觉输入时具有优势，但现有MIM方法通常使用简单的ViT结构，导致层次化模型的潜力未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 基于Swin Transformer，通过调整掩码单元尺寸、关闭主阶段前的跨单元自注意力机制，并移除主阶段后的操作，设计出结构简化的HiViT。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，HiViT-B相比ViT-B准确率提升0.6%，相比Swin-B速度提升1.9倍，且在检测和分割任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: HiViT通过结构优化兼顾了层次化模型的优势与MIM的高效性，在多种任务中均取得显著性能提升。

title: Edge YOLO: Real-Time Intelligent Object Detection System Based on Edge-Cloud Cooperation in Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: Edge YOLO：自动驾驶汽车中基于边云协作的实时智能物体检测系统
abstract: Driven by the ever-increasing requirements of autonomous vehicles, such as traffic monitoring and driving assistant, deep learning-based object detection (DL-OD) has been increasingly attractive in intelligent transportation systems. However, it is difficult for the existing DL-OD schemes to realize the responsible, cost-saving, and energy-efficient autonomous vehicle systems due to low their inherent defects of low timeliness and high energy consumption. In this paper, we propose an object detection (OD) system based on edge-cloud cooperation and reconstructive convolutional neural networks, which is called Edge YOLO. This system can effectively avoid the excessive dependence on computing power and uneven distribution of cloud computing resources. Specifically, it is a lightweight OD framework realized by combining pruning feature extraction network and compression feature fusion network to enhance the efficiency of multi-scale prediction to the largest extent. In addition, we developed an autonomous driving platform equipped with NVIDIA Jetson for system-level verification. We experimentally demonstrate the reliability and efficiency of Edge YOLO on COCO2017 and KITTI data sets, respectively. According to COCO2017 standard datasets with a speed of 26.6 frames per second (FPS), the results show that the number of parameters in the entire network is only 25.67 MB, while the accuracy (mAP) is up to 47.3%.
summary: Driven by the ever-increasing requirements of autonomous vehicles, such as traffic monitoring and driving assistant, deep learning-based object detection (DL-OD) has been increasingly attractive in intelligent transportation systems. However, it is difficult for the existing DL-OD schemes to realize the responsible, cost-saving, and energy-efficient autonomous vehicle systems due to low their inherent defects of low timeliness and high energy consumption. In this paper, we propose an object detection (OD) system based on edge-cloud cooperation and reconstructive convolutional neural networks, which is called Edge YOLO. This system can effectively avoid the excessive dependence on computing power and uneven distribution of cloud computing resources. Specifically, it is a lightweight OD framework realized by combining pruning feature extraction network and compression feature fusion network to enhance the efficiency of multi-scale prediction to the largest extent. In addition, we developed an autonomous driving platform equipped with NVIDIA Jetson for system-level verification. We experimentally demonstrate the reliability and efficiency of Edge YOLO on COCO2017 and KITTI data sets, respectively. According to COCO2017 standard datasets with a speed of 26.6 frames per second (FPS), the results show that the number of parameters in the entire network is only 25.67 MB, while the accuracy (mAP) is up to 47.3%.
abstract_zh: 在交通监控和驾驶辅助等自动驾驶汽车需求不断增长的推动下，基于深度学习的目标检测（DL-OD）在智能交通系统中越来越有吸引力。然而，现有的DL-OD方案由于其时效性低、能耗高等固有缺陷，很难实现负责任、成本节约、节能的自动驾驶系统。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于边云协作和重构卷积神经网络的对象检测（OD）系统，称为Edge YOLO。该系统可以有效避免对算力的过度依赖以及云计算资源分布不均。具体来说，它是结合剪枝特征提取网络和压缩特征融合网络实现的轻量级OD框架，最大程度地提升多尺度预测的效率。此外，我们还开发了搭载NVIDIA Jetson的自动驾驶平台，进行系统级验证。我们分别在 COCO2017 和 KITTI 数据集上实验证明了 Edge YOLO 的可靠性和效率。根据速度为26.6帧/秒（FPS）的COCO2017标准数据集，结果显示整个网络的参数数量仅为25.67 MB，而准确率（mAP）高达47.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边缘-云协同的轻量级目标检测系统Edge YOLO，用于自动驾驶车辆的实时智能目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习目标检测方法存在实时性差、能耗高和计算依赖性强的问题，难以满足自动驾驶系统对成本、效率和可靠性的要求。
AI.method: 结合剪枝特征提取网络与压缩特征融合网络，构建轻量化检测框架，并通过NVIDIA Jetson平台进行系统级验证。
AI.result: 在COCO2017数据集上以26.6 FPS运行，模型参数仅25.67 MB，mAP达到47.3%，验证了系统可靠性与效率。
AI.conclusion: Edge YOLO通过边缘-云协同架构有效平衡了检测精度与计算效率，为自动驾驶提供了可行的实时目标检测解决方案。

search_text: Edge YOLO: Real-Time Intelligent Object Detection System Based on Edge-Cloud Cooperation in Autonomous Vehicles Edge YOLO：自动驾驶汽车中基于边云协作的实时智能物体检测系统 Driven by the ever-increasing requirements of autonomous vehicles, such as traffic monitoring and driving assistant, deep learning-based object detection (DL-OD) has been increasingly attractive in intelligent transportation systems. However, it is difficult for the existing DL-OD schemes to realize the responsible, cost-saving, and energy-efficient autonomous vehicle systems due to low their inherent defects of low timeliness and high energy consumption. In this paper, we propose an object detection (OD) system based on edge-cloud cooperation and reconstructive convolutional neural networks, which is called Edge YOLO. This system can effectively avoid the excessive dependence on computing power and uneven distribution of cloud computing resources. Specifically, it is a lightweight OD framework realized by combining pruning feature extraction network and compression feature fusion network to enhance the efficiency of multi-scale prediction to the largest extent. In addition, we developed an autonomous driving platform equipped with NVIDIA Jetson for system-level verification. We experimentally demonstrate the reliability and efficiency of Edge YOLO on COCO2017 and KITTI data sets, respectively. According to COCO2017 standard datasets with a speed of 26.6 frames per second (FPS), the results show that the number of parameters in the entire network is only 25.67 MB, while the accuracy (mAP) is up to 47.3%. 在交通监控和驾驶辅助等自动驾驶汽车需求不断增长的推动下，基于深度学习的目标检测（DL-OD）在智能交通系统中越来越有吸引力。然而，现有的DL-OD方案由于其时效性低、能耗高等固有缺陷，很难实现负责任、成本节约、节能的自动驾驶系统。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于边云协作和重构卷积神经网络的对象检测（OD）系统，称为Edge YOLO。该系统可以有效避免对算力的过度依赖以及云计算资源分布不均。具体来说，它是结合剪枝特征提取网络和压缩特征融合网络实现的轻量级OD框架，最大程度地提升多尺度预测的效率。此外，我们还开发了搭载NVIDIA Jetson的自动驾驶平台，进行系统级验证。我们分别在 COCO2017 和 KITTI 数据集上实验证明了 Edge YOLO 的可靠性和效率。根据速度为26.6帧/秒（FPS）的COCO2017标准数据集，结果显示整个网络的参数数量仅为25.67 MB，而准确率（mAP）高达47.3%。 本文提出了一种基于边缘-云协同的轻量级目标检测系统Edge YOLO，用于自动驾驶车辆的实时智能目标检测。 Siyuan Liang,Hao Wu cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Marco Pegoraro,Riccardo Marin,Arianna Rampini,Simone Melzi,Luca Cosmo,Emanuele Rodolà
title: Spectral Maps for Learning on Subgraphs
title_zh: 用于子图学习的谱图
abstract: In graph learning, maps between graphs and their subgraphs frequently arise. For instance, when coarsening or rewiring operations are present along the pipeline, one needs to keep track of the corresponding nodes between the original and modified graphs. Classically, these maps are represented as binary node-to-node correspondence matrices and used as-is to transfer node-wise features between the graphs. In this paper, we argue that simply changing this map representation can bring notable benefits to graph learning tasks. Drawing inspiration from recent progress in geometry processing, we introduce a spectral representation for maps that is easy to integrate into existing graph learning models. This spectral representation is a compact and straightforward plug-in replacement and is robust to topological changes of the graphs. Remarkably, the representation exhibits structural properties that make it interpretable, drawing an analogy with recent results on smooth manifolds. We demonstrate the benefits of incorporating spectral maps in graph learning pipelines, addressing scenarios where a node-to-node map is not well defined, or in the absence of exact isomorphism. Our approach bears practical benefits in knowledge distillation and hierarchical learning, where we show comparable or improved performance at a fraction of the computational cost.
summary: In graph learning, maps between graphs and their subgraphs frequently arise. For instance, when coarsening or rewiring operations are present along the pipeline, one needs to keep track of the corresponding nodes between the original and modified graphs. Classically, these maps are represented as binary node-to-node correspondence matrices and used as-is to transfer node-wise features between the graphs. In this paper, we argue that simply changing this map representation can bring notable benefits to graph learning tasks. Drawing inspiration from recent progress in geometry processing, we introduce a spectral representation for maps that is easy to integrate into existing graph learning models. This spectral representation is a compact and straightforward plug-in replacement and is robust to topological changes of the graphs. Remarkably, the representation exhibits structural properties that make it interpretable, drawing an analogy with recent results on smooth manifolds. We demonstrate the benefits of incorporating spectral maps in graph learning pipelines, addressing scenarios where a node-to-node map is not well defined, or in the absence of exact isomorphism. Our approach bears practical benefits in knowledge distillation and hierarchical learning, where we show comparable or improved performance at a fraction of the computational cost.
abstract_zh: 在图学习中，图及其子图之间的映射经常出现。例如，当沿着管道存在粗化或重新连线操作时，需要跟踪原始图和修改图之间的对应节点。传统上，这些映射被表示为二进制节点到节点对应矩阵，并按原样用于在图之间传输节点特征。在本文中，我们认为简单地改变这种图表示可以给图学习任务带来显着的好处。从几何处理的最新进展中汲取灵感，我们引入了一种易于集成到现有图形学习模型中的地图光谱表示形式。这种频谱表示是一种紧凑且简单的插件替代品，并且对图的拓扑变化具有鲁棒性。值得注意的是，该表示表现出使其可解释的结构特性，与光滑流形上的最新结果进行了类比。我们展示了将谱图合并到图学习管道中的好处，解决了节点到节点映射未明确定义或缺乏精确同构的情况。我们的方法在知识蒸馏和分层学习方面具有实际的好处，我们以一小部分计算成本展示了可比较或改进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于图学习中子图映射的谱表示方法。
AI.motivation: 在图学习中，图与其子图之间的映射通常用二进制节点对应矩阵表示，但这种方法在图拓扑结构变化时不够鲁棒，且难以处理节点到节点映射不明确或不存在精确同构的情况。
AI.method: 受几何处理领域最新进展的启发，本文引入了一种谱表示方法，用于表示图与子图之间的映射关系。该方法具有紧凑、易于集成到现有图学习模型中的特点，并且对图的拓扑变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在知识蒸馏和分层学习等场景中表现出色，相比传统方法在计算成本更低的情况下取得了相当或更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 谱映射方法为图学习提供了更鲁棒、可解释的映射表示，适用于多种图学习任务，特别是在节点映射不明确或不存在精确同构的情况下。

authors_text: Zhongzheng Ren,Aseem Agarwala,Bryan Russell,Alexander G. Schwing,Oliver Wang
title: Neural Volumetric Object Selection
title_zh: 神经体积对象选择
abstract: We introduce an approach for selecting objects in neural volumetric 3D representations, such as multi-plane images (MPI) and neural radiance fields (NeRF). Our approach takes a set of foreground and background 2D user scribbles in one view and automatically estimates a 3D segmentation of the desired object, which can be rendered into novel views. To achieve this result, we propose a novel voxel feature embedding that incorporates the neural volumetric 3D representation and multi-view image features from all input views. To evaluate our approach, we introduce a new dataset of human-provided segmentation masks for depicted objects in real-world multi-view scene captures. We show that our approach out-performs strong baselines, including 2D segmentation and 3D segmentation approaches adapted to our task.
summary: We introduce an approach for selecting objects in neural volumetric 3D representations, such as multi-plane images (MPI) and neural radiance fields (NeRF). Our approach takes a set of foreground and background 2D user scribbles in one view and automatically estimates a 3D segmentation of the desired object, which can be rendered into novel views. To achieve this result, we propose a novel voxel feature embedding that incorporates the neural volumetric 3D representation and multi-view image features from all input views. To evaluate our approach, we introduce a new dataset of human-provided segmentation masks for depicted objects in real-world multi-view scene captures. We show that our approach out-performs strong baselines, including 2D segmentation and 3D segmentation approaches adapted to our task.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种在神经体积 3D 表示中选择对象的方法，例如多平面图像 (MPI) 和神经辐射场 (NeRF)。我们的方法在一个视图中采用一组前景和背景 2D 用户涂鸦，并自动估计所需对象的 3D 分割，从而可以将其渲染为新颖的视图。为了实现这一结果，我们提出了一种新颖的体素特征嵌入，它结合了神经体积 3D 表示和来自所有输入视图的多视图图像特征。为了评估我们的方法，我们引入了一个新的人类提供的分割掩模数据集，用于现实世界多视图场景捕获中所描绘的对象。我们表明，我们的方法优于强大的基线，包括适合我们任务的 2D 分割和 3D 分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经体积3D表示的物体选择方法，通过单视角用户涂鸦生成可渲染的3D分割结果。
AI.motivation: 现有2D分割和3D分割方法难以准确处理多视角场景中的物体选择，需结合多视角信息实现更精确的3D分割。
AI.method: 提出结合神经体积3D表示与多视角图像特征的体素特征嵌入，利用用户提供的2D涂鸦进行3D分割估计。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上优于现有2D分割和适配的3D分割方法，能生成高质量的新视角渲染结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多视角场景下的物体选择问题，为神经体积表示的交互式编辑提供了新思路。

search_text: Neural Volumetric Object Selection 神经体积对象选择 We introduce an approach for selecting objects in neural volumetric 3D representations, such as multi-plane images (MPI) and neural radiance fields (NeRF). Our approach takes a set of foreground and background 2D user scribbles in one view and automatically estimates a 3D segmentation of the desired object, which can be rendered into novel views. To achieve this result, we propose a novel voxel feature embedding that incorporates the neural volumetric 3D representation and multi-view image features from all input views. To evaluate our approach, we introduce a new dataset of human-provided segmentation masks for depicted objects in real-world multi-view scene captures. We show that our approach out-performs strong baselines, including 2D segmentation and 3D segmentation approaches adapted to our task. 我们引入了一种在神经体积 3D 表示中选择对象的方法，例如多平面图像 (MPI) 和神经辐射场 (NeRF)。我们的方法在一个视图中采用一组前景和背景 2D 用户涂鸦，并自动估计所需对象的 3D 分割，从而可以将其渲染为新颖的视图。为了实现这一结果，我们提出了一种新颖的体素特征嵌入，它结合了神经体积 3D 表示和来自所有输入视图的多视图图像特征。为了评估我们的方法，我们引入了一个新的人类提供的分割掩模数据集，用于现实世界多视图场景捕获中所描绘的对象。我们表明，我们的方法优于强大的基线，包括适合我们任务的 2D 分割和 3D 分割方法。 本文提出一种基于神经体积3D表示的物体选择方法，通过单视角用户涂鸦生成可渲染的3D分割结果。 Zhongzheng Ren,Aseem Agarwala,Bryan Russell,Alexander G. Schwing,Oliver Wang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Huiping Zhuang,Zhenyu Weng,Hongxin Wei,Renchunzi Xie,Kar-Ann Toh,Zhiping Lin
title: ACIL: Analytic Class-Incremental Learning with Absolute Memorization and Privacy Protection
title_zh: ACIL：分析类-绝对记忆和隐私保护的增量学习
abstract: Class-incremental learning (CIL) learns a classification model with training data of different classes arising progressively. Existing CIL either suffers from serious accuracy loss due to catastrophic forgetting, or invades data privacy by revisiting used exemplars. Inspired by linear learning formulations, we propose an analytic class-incremental learning (ACIL) with absolute memorization of past knowledge while avoiding breaching of data privacy (i.e., without storing historical data). The absolute memorization is demonstrated in the sense that class-incremental learning using ACIL given present data would give identical results to that from its joint-learning counterpart which consumes both present and historical samples. This equality is theoretically validated. Data privacy is ensured since no historical data are involved during the learning process. Empirical validations demonstrate ACIL's competitive accuracy performance with near-identical results for various incremental task settings (e.g., 5-50 phases). This also allows ACIL to outperform the state-of-the-art methods for large-phase scenarios (e.g., 25 and 50 phases).
summary: Class-incremental learning (CIL) learns a classification model with training data of different classes arising progressively. Existing CIL either suffers from serious accuracy loss due to catastrophic forgetting, or invades data privacy by revisiting used exemplars. Inspired by linear learning formulations, we propose an analytic class-incremental learning (ACIL) with absolute memorization of past knowledge while avoiding breaching of data privacy (i.e., without storing historical data). The absolute memorization is demonstrated in the sense that class-incremental learning using ACIL given present data would give identical results to that from its joint-learning counterpart which consumes both present and historical samples. This equality is theoretically validated. Data privacy is ensured since no historical data are involved during the learning process. Empirical validations demonstrate ACIL's competitive accuracy performance with near-identical results for various incremental task settings (e.g., 5-50 phases). This also allows ACIL to outperform the state-of-the-art methods for large-phase scenarios (e.g., 25 and 50 phases).
abstract_zh: 类增量学习（CIL）通过逐步产生不同类的训练数据来学习分类模型。现有的 CIL 要么由于灾难性遗忘而遭受严重的准确性损失，要么通过重新访问使用的示例而侵犯数据隐私。受线性学习公式的启发，我们提出了一种分析类增量学习（ACIL），它可以绝对记忆过去的知识，同时避免侵犯数据隐私（即不存储历史数据）。绝对记忆的证明是，使用 ACIL 给定当前数据的类增量学习将给出与消耗当前样本和历史样本的联合学习对应物相同的结果。这种等式在理论上得到了验证。由于学习过程中不涉及历史数据，因此确保了数据隐私。实证验证证明了 ACIL 具有竞争力的准确性性能，对于各种增量任务设置（例如 5-50 个阶段），结果几乎相同。这也使得 ACIL 在大相场景（例如 25 相和 50 相）中表现优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出ACIL方法解决类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘和数据隐私问题
AI.motivation: 现有CIL方法存在准确率下降或隐私泄露问题，需兼顾记忆与隐私保护
AI.method: 基于线性学习理论，设计ACIL方法，在无需存储历史数据的情况下实现绝对记忆，并确保隐私
AI.result: 实验验证ACIL在多种增量任务中准确率接近联合学习，且在大阶段场景下优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: ACIL有效平衡了类增量学习的准确率与隐私保护，适用于大规模增量场景
