authors_text: Anna Wroblewska,Jozef Jasek,Bogdan Jastrzebski,Stanislaw Pawlak,Anna Grzywacz,Cheong Siew Ann,Tan Seng Chee,Tomasz Trzcinski,Janusz Holyst
title: A Deep Learning Approach for Automatic Detection of Qualitative Features of Lecturing
title_zh: 自动检测讲座定性特征的深度学习方法
abstract: Artificial Intelligence in higher education opens new possibilities for improving the lecturing process, such as enriching didactic materials, helping in assessing students' works or even providing directions to the teachers on how to enhance the lectures. We follow this research path, and in this work, we explore how an academic lecture can be assessed automatically by quantitative features. First, we prepare a set of qualitative features based on teaching practices and then annotate the dataset of academic lecture videos collected for this purpose. We then show how these features could be detected automatically using machine learning and computer vision techniques. Our results show the potential usefulness of our work.
summary: Artificial Intelligence in higher education opens new possibilities for improving the lecturing process, such as enriching didactic materials, helping in assessing students' works or even providing directions to the teachers on how to enhance the lectures. We follow this research path, and in this work, we explore how an academic lecture can be assessed automatically by quantitative features. First, we prepare a set of qualitative features based on teaching practices and then annotate the dataset of academic lecture videos collected for this purpose. We then show how these features could be detected automatically using machine learning and computer vision techniques. Our results show the potential usefulness of our work.
abstract_zh: 高等教育中的人工智能为改进教学过程开辟了新的可能性，例如丰富教学材料、帮助评估学生的作品，甚至为教师提供如何改进讲座的指导。我们遵循这个研究路径，在这项工作中，我们探索如何通过定量特征自动评估学术讲座。首先，我们根据教学实践准备一组定性特征，然后注释为此目的收集的学术讲座视频的数据集。然后，我们展示如何使用机器学习和计算机视觉技术自动检测这些特征。我们的结果显示了我们工作的潜在用处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的方法，用于自动检测学术讲座中的定性特征，以辅助教学评估与改进。
AI.motivation: 传统教学评估依赖主观判断，缺乏客观量化手段。通过AI技术自动提取讲座特征，可为教师提供数据驱动的教学优化建议。
AI.method: 基于教学实践定义定性特征集，构建标注数据集，采用机器学习与计算机视觉技术训练模型实现特征自动检测。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在自动检测讲座定性特征上的可行性，展示了其在教学评估中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了深度学习在自动分析教学行为中的有效性，为智能教育系统的开发提供了新思路。

authors_text: Julian Burghoff,Robin Chan,Hanno Gottschalk,Annika Muetze,Tobias Riedlinger,Matthias Rottmann,Marius Schubert
title: Uncertainty Quantification and Resource-Demanding Computer Vision Applications of Deep Learning
title_zh: 深度学习的不确定性量化和资源需求计算机视觉应用
abstract: Bringing deep neural networks (DNNs) into safety critical applications such as automated driving, medical imaging and finance, requires a thorough treatment of the model's uncertainties. Training deep neural networks is already resource demanding and so is also their uncertainty quantification. In this overview article, we survey methods that we developed to teach DNNs to be uncertain when they encounter new object classes. Additionally, we present training methods to learn from only a few labels with help of uncertainty quantification. Note that this is typically paid with a massive overhead in computation of an order of magnitude and more compared to ordinary network training. Finally, we survey our work on neural architecture search which is also an order of magnitude more resource demanding then ordinary network training.
summary: Bringing deep neural networks (DNNs) into safety critical applications such as automated driving, medical imaging and finance, requires a thorough treatment of the model's uncertainties. Training deep neural networks is already resource demanding and so is also their uncertainty quantification. In this overview article, we survey methods that we developed to teach DNNs to be uncertain when they encounter new object classes. Additionally, we present training methods to learn from only a few labels with help of uncertainty quantification. Note that this is typically paid with a massive overhead in computation of an order of magnitude and more compared to ordinary network training. Finally, we survey our work on neural architecture search which is also an order of magnitude more resource demanding then ordinary network training.
abstract_zh: 将深度神经网络 (DNN) 引入自动驾驶、医学成像和金融等安全关键应用中，需要彻底处理模型的不确定性。训练深度神经网络已经需要资源，其不确定性量化也是如此。在这篇概述文章中，我们调查了我们开发的用于教会 DNN 在遇到新对象类时不确定的方法。此外，我们还提出了借助不确定性量化仅从少数标签中学习的训练方法。请注意，与普通网络训练相比，这通常会带来一个数量级甚至更多的巨大计算开销。最后，我们调查了我们在神经架构搜索方面的工作，这也比普通网络训练需要更多的资源。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在安全关键型计算机视觉应用中不确定性量化的方法，并探讨了其高昂的计算资源需求。
AI.motivation: 安全关键领域（如自动驾驶、医疗影像）需要深度神经网络具备不确定性处理能力，但现有方法在计算资源消耗上存在显著挑战。
AI.method: 开发了使DNN在新类别下产生不确定性的训练方法、基于不确定性的少样本学习策略，以及资源消耗更高的神经架构搜索技术。
AI.result: 提出了不确定性量化与资源需求的关联性分析，验证了相关方法在安全关键场景下的可行性，但需付出数量级的计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性量化虽能提升模型可靠性，但其资源消耗问题亟待优化，未来需平衡性能与效率的新型算法设计。

search_text: Uncertainty Quantification and Resource-Demanding Computer Vision Applications of Deep Learning 深度学习的不确定性量化和资源需求计算机视觉应用 Bringing deep neural networks (DNNs) into safety critical applications such as automated driving, medical imaging and finance, requires a thorough treatment of the model's uncertainties. Training deep neural networks is already resource demanding and so is also their uncertainty quantification. In this overview article, we survey methods that we developed to teach DNNs to be uncertain when they encounter new object classes. Additionally, we present training methods to learn from only a few labels with help of uncertainty quantification. Note that this is typically paid with a massive overhead in computation of an order of magnitude and more compared to ordinary network training. Finally, we survey our work on neural architecture search which is also an order of magnitude more resource demanding then ordinary network training. 将深度神经网络 (DNN) 引入自动驾驶、医学成像和金融等安全关键应用中，需要彻底处理模型的不确定性。训练深度神经网络已经需要资源，其不确定性量化也是如此。在这篇概述文章中，我们调查了我们开发的用于教会 DNN 在遇到新对象类时不确定的方法。此外，我们还提出了借助不确定性量化仅从少数标签中学习的训练方法。请注意，与普通网络训练相比，这通常会带来一个数量级甚至更多的巨大计算开销。最后，我们调查了我们在神经架构搜索方面的工作，这也比普通网络训练需要更多的资源。 本文综述了深度学习在安全关键型计算机视觉应用中不确定性量化的方法，并探讨了其高昂的计算资源需求。 Julian Burghoff,Robin Chan,Hanno Gottschalk,Annika Muetze,Tobias Riedlinger,Matthias Rottmann,Marius Schubert cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Aijaz H. Lone,Arnab Ganguly,Selma Amara,Gobind Das,H. Fariborzi
title: Skyrmion-Magnetic Tunnel Junction Synapse with Mixed Synaptic Plasticity for Neuromorphic Computing
title_zh: 用于神经形态计算的具有混合突触可塑性的斯格明子磁隧道连接突触
abstract: Magnetic skyrmion-based data storage and unconventional computing devices have gained increasing attention due to their topological protection, small size, and low driving current. However, skyrmion creation, deletion, and motion are still being studied. In this study, we propose a skyrmion-based neuromorphic magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ) device with both long- and short-term plasticity (LTP and STP) (mixed synaptic plasticity). We showed that plasticity could be controlled by magnetic field, spin-orbit torque (SOT), and the voltage-controlled magnetic anisotropy (VCMA) switching mechanism. LTP depends on the skyrmion density and is manipulated by the SOT and magnetic field while STP is controlled by the VCMA. The LTP property of the device was utilized for static image recognition. By incorporating the STP feature, the device gained additional temporal filtering ability and could adapt to a dynamic environment. The skyrmions were conserved and confined to a nanotrack to minimize the skyrmion nucleation energy. The synapse device was trained and tested for emulating a deep neural network. We observed that when the skyrmion density was increased, the inference accuracy improved: 90% accuracy was achieved by the system at the highest density. We further demonstrated the dynamic environment learning and inference capabilities of the proposed device.
summary: Magnetic skyrmion-based data storage and unconventional computing devices have gained increasing attention due to their topological protection, small size, and low driving current. However, skyrmion creation, deletion, and motion are still being studied. In this study, we propose a skyrmion-based neuromorphic magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ) device with both long- and short-term plasticity (LTP and STP) (mixed synaptic plasticity). We showed that plasticity could be controlled by magnetic field, spin-orbit torque (SOT), and the voltage-controlled magnetic anisotropy (VCMA) switching mechanism. LTP depends on the skyrmion density and is manipulated by the SOT and magnetic field while STP is controlled by the VCMA. The LTP property of the device was utilized for static image recognition. By incorporating the STP feature, the device gained additional temporal filtering ability and could adapt to a dynamic environment. The skyrmions were conserved and confined to a nanotrack to minimize the skyrmion nucleation energy. The synapse device was trained and tested for emulating a deep neural network. We observed that when the skyrmion density was increased, the inference accuracy improved: 90% accuracy was achieved by the system at the highest density. We further demonstrated the dynamic environment learning and inference capabilities of the proposed device.
abstract_zh: 基于磁性斯格明子的数据存储和非常规计算设备由于其拓扑保护、小尺寸和低驱动电流而受到越来越多的关注。然而，斯格明子的产生、删除和运动仍在研究中。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于斯格明子的神经形态磁隧道结（MTJ）装置，具有长期和短期可塑性（LTP和STP）（混合突触可塑性）。我们证明了可塑性可以通过磁场、自旋轨道扭矩（SOT）和压控磁各向异性（VCMA）切换机制来控制。 LTP 取决于斯格明子密度，并由 SOT 和磁场控制，而 STP 则由 VCMA 控制。该器件的LTP特性被用于静态图像识别。通过结合 STP 功能，该设备获得了额外的时间过滤能力，并且可以适应动态环境。斯格明子被保存并限制在纳米轨道中，以最小化斯格明子成核能量。突触设备经过训练和测试，用于模拟深度神经网络。我们观察到，当斯格明子密度增加时，推理精度提高：系统在最高密度下实现了 90% 的精度。我们进一步展示了所提出设备的动态环境学习和推理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于磁斯格明子的混合突触可塑性神经形态计算器件，结合长时程增强（LTP）和短时程增强（STP）特性。
AI.motivation: 磁斯格明子因其拓扑保护和低能耗特性备受关注，但其创建、删除和运动控制仍需深入研究，传统突触器件难以同时实现动态环境适应性与静态图像识别。
AI.method: 通过磁场、自旋轨道转矩（SOT）和电压调控各向异性（VCMA）机制，实现对斯格明子密度（LTP）和突触权重（STP）的双重调控，并在纳米轨道中约束斯格明子以降低生成能。
AI.result: 器件在最高斯格明子密度下实现90%的静态图像识别准确率，并展示动态环境下的学习与推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该器件通过混合突触可塑性机制，为高效神经形态计算提供了新型硬件方案，具有低能耗和高适应性优势。

authors_text: Aijaz H. Lone,Selma Amara,Fernando Aguirre,Mario Lanza,H. Fariborzi
title: Skyrmion-based Leaky Integrate and Fire Neurons for Neuromorphic Applications
title_zh: 用于神经形态应用的基于斯格明子的漏积分和激发神经元
comment: Under review in Applied Physics Letters
comments: Under review in Applied Physics Letters
abstract: Spintronics is an important emerging technology for data storage and computation. In this field, magnetic skyrmion-based devices are attractive due to their small size and energy consumption. However, controlling the creation, deletion and motion of skyrmions is challenging. Here we propose a novel energy-efficient skyrmion-based device structure, and demonstrate its use as leaky integrate (LIF) and fire neuron for neuromorphic computing. Here we show that skyrmions can be confined by patterning the geometry of the free layer in a magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ), and demonstrate that the size of the skyrmion can be adjusted by applying pulsed voltage stresses. A spiking neural network (SNN) made of such skyrmion-based LIF neurons shows the capability of classifying images from the Modified National Institute of Standards and Technology (MNIST) dataset.
summary: Spintronics is an important emerging technology for data storage and computation. In this field, magnetic skyrmion-based devices are attractive due to their small size and energy consumption. However, controlling the creation, deletion and motion of skyrmions is challenging. Here we propose a novel energy-efficient skyrmion-based device structure, and demonstrate its use as leaky integrate (LIF) and fire neuron for neuromorphic computing. Here we show that skyrmions can be confined by patterning the geometry of the free layer in a magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ), and demonstrate that the size of the skyrmion can be adjusted by applying pulsed voltage stresses. A spiking neural network (SNN) made of such skyrmion-based LIF neurons shows the capability of classifying images from the Modified National Institute of Standards and Technology (MNIST) dataset.
abstract_zh: 自旋电子学是数据存储和计算的重要新兴技术。在这一领域，基于磁性斯格明子的器件因其尺寸小和能耗低而颇具吸引力。然而，控制斯格明子的产生、删除和运动具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种新型节能的基于斯格明子的设备结构，并演示了其作为漏积分（LIF）和火神经元用于神经形态计算的用途。在这里，我们展示了可以通过对磁隧道结（MTJ）中自由层的几何形状进行图案化来限制斯格明子，并证明可以通过施加脉冲电压应力来调整斯格明子的尺寸。由这种基于斯格明子的 LIF 神经元组成的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 显示了对来自修改后的国家标准与技术研究所 (MNIST) 数据集的图像进行分类的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于磁天体粒子的漏积分触发神经元结构，用于神经形态计算，并展示了其在图像分类任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 自旋电子学中的磁天体粒子具有尺寸小、能耗低的优势，但其生成、操控存在技术挑战，需开发新型神经形态计算方案。
AI.method: 通过磁隧道结自由层的几何图案设计约束天体粒子，并利用脉冲电压调控其尺寸，构建具有漏积分触发特性的神经元器件。
AI.result: 基于该神经元构建的脉冲神经网络成功完成了MNIST手写数字图像分类任务，验证了其计算能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为低功耗神经形态计算提供了新的物理实现路径，具有潜在应用价值。

A spiking neural network (SNN) made of such skyrmion-based LIF neurons shows the capability of classifying images from the Modified National Institute of Standards and Technology (MNIST) dataset. 自旋电子学是数据存储和计算的重要新兴技术。在这一领域，基于磁性斯格明子的器件因其尺寸小和能耗低而颇具吸引力。然而，控制斯格明子的产生、删除和运动具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种新型节能的基于斯格明子的设备结构，并演示了其作为漏积分（LIF）和火神经元用于神经形态计算的用途。在这里，我们展示了可以通过对磁隧道结（MTJ）中自由层的几何形状进行图案化来限制斯格明子，并证明可以通过施加脉冲电压应力来调整斯格明子的尺寸。由这种基于斯格明子的 LIF 神经元组成的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 显示了对来自修改后的国家标准与技术研究所 (MNIST) 数据集的图像进行分类的能力。 本文设计了一种基于磁天体粒子的漏积分触发神经元结构，用于神经形态计算，并展示了其在图像分类任务中的应用。 Aijaz H. Lone,Selma Amara,Fernando Aguirre,Mario Lanza,H. Fariborzi cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.ET

title: Adaptive color transfer from images to terrain visualizations
title_zh: 从图像到地形可视化的自适应颜色转换
abstract: Terrain mapping is not only dedicated to communicating how high or how steep a landscape is but can also help to narrate how we feel about a place. However, crafting effective and expressive hypsometric tints is challenging for both nonexperts and experts. In this paper, we present a two-step image-to-terrain color transfer method that can transfer color from arbitrary images to diverse terrain models. First, we present a new image color organization method that organizes discrete, irregular image colors into a continuous, regular color grid that facilitates a series of color operations, such as local and global searching, categorical color selection and sequential color interpolation. Second, we quantify a series of subjective concerns about elevation color crafting, such as "the lower, the higher" principle, color conventions, and aerial perspectives. We also define color similarity between image and terrain visualization with aesthetic quality. We then mathematically formulate image-to-terrain color transfer as a dual-objective optimization problem and offer a heuristic searching method to solve the problem. Finally, we compare elevation tints from our method with a standard color scheme on four test terrains. The evaluations show that the hypsometric tints from the proposed method can work as effectively as the standard scheme and that our tints are more visually favorable. We also showcase that our method can transfer emotion from image to terrain visualization.

However, crafting effective and expressive hypsometric tints is challenging for both nonexperts and experts. We also define color similarity between image and terrain visualization with aesthetic quality. abstract_zh: 地形图不仅致力于传达景观的高度或陡峭程度，还可以帮助描述我们对某个地方的感受。然而，制作有效且富有表现力的测压色调对于非专家和专家来说都具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种两步图像到地形颜色传输方法，可以将颜色从任意图像传输到不同的地形模型。首先，我们提出了一种新的图像颜色组织方法，将离散的、不规则的图像颜色组织成连续的、规则的颜色网格，有利于一系列颜色操作，例如局部和全局搜索、分类颜色选择和顺序颜色插值。其次，我们量化了关于立面色彩制作的一系列主观关注点，例如“越低越高”原则、色彩约定和空中视角。我们还定义了具有审美品质的图像和地形可视化之间的颜色相似性。然后，我们在数学上将图像到地形的颜色传递表示为双目标优化问题，并提供启发式搜索方法来解决该问题。最后，我们将我们的方法的高程色调与四个测试地形上的标准配色方案进行比较。评估表明，所提出的方法的测高色调可以与标准方案一样有效，并且我们的色调在视觉上更有利。我们还展示了我们的方法可以将情感从图像转移到地形可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将图像颜色自适应转移到地形可视化中的方法，以提升地形图的表达力和视觉效果。
AI.motivation: 传统等高线着色方案难以满足非专业和专业用户对地形可视化的情感表达需求，需探索更灵活的色彩映射方式。
AI.method: 采用两步法：1）将离散图像颜色组织为连续规则网格以支持色彩操作；2）通过双目标优化模型结合美学准则和主观色彩相似性度量，利用启发式搜索实现图像到地形的色彩迁移。
AI.result: 在四个测试地形中，新方法生成的等高线着色效果与标准方案相当，且视觉偏好度更高，成功实现了图像情感向地形可视化的迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为地形可视化提供了有效且具审美价值的色彩迁移方案，能够实现跨媒介的情感表达传递。

authors_text: Haokun Chen,Ahmed Frikha,Denis Krompass,Jindong Gu,Volker Tresp
title: FRAug: Tackling Federated Learning with Non-IID Features via Representation Augmentation
title_zh: FRAug：通过表示增强处理具有非独立同分布特征的联合学习
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a decentralized learning paradigm, in which multiple clients collaboratively train deep learning models without centralizing their local data, and hence preserve data privacy. Real-world applications usually involve a distribution shift across the datasets of the different clients, which hurts the generalization ability of the clients to unseen samples from their respective data distributions. In this work, we address the recently proposed feature shift problem where the clients have different feature distributions, while the label distribution is the same. We propose Federated Representation Augmentation (FRAug) to tackle this practical and challenging problem. Our approach generates synthetic client-specific samples in the embedding space to augment the usually small client datasets. For that, we train a shared generative model to fuse the clients knowledge learned from their different feature distributions. This generator synthesizes client-agnostic embeddings, which are then locally transformed into client-specific embeddings by Representation Transformation Networks (RTNets). By transferring knowledge across the clients, the generated embeddings act as a regularizer for the client models and reduce overfitting to the local original datasets, hence improving generalization. Our empirical evaluation on public benchmarks and a real-world medical dataset demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method, which substantially outperforms the current state-of-the-art FL methods for non-IID features, including PartialFed and FedBN.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a decentralized learning paradigm, in which multiple clients collaboratively train deep learning models without centralizing their local data, and hence preserve data privacy. Real-world applications usually involve a distribution shift across the datasets of the different clients, which hurts the generalization ability of the clients to unseen samples from their respective data distributions. In this work, we address the recently proposed feature shift problem where the clients have different feature distributions, while the label distribution is the same. We propose Federated Representation Augmentation (FRAug) to tackle this practical and challenging problem. Our approach generates synthetic client-specific samples in the embedding space to augment the usually small client datasets. For that, we train a shared generative model to fuse the clients knowledge learned from their different feature distributions. This generator synthesizes client-agnostic embeddings, which are then locally transformed into client-specific embeddings by Representation Transformation Networks (RTNets). By transferring knowledge across the clients, the generated embeddings act as a regularizer for the client models and reduce overfitting to the local original datasets, hence improving generalization. Our empirical evaluation on public benchmarks and a real-world medical dataset demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method, which substantially outperforms the current state-of-the-art FL methods for non-IID features, including PartialFed and FedBN.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一种去中心化学习范例，其中多个客户端协作训练深度学习模型，而不集中其本地数据，从而保护数据隐私。现实世界的应用程序通常涉及不同客户端的数据集之间的分布变化，这会损害客户端对各自数据分布中未见过的样本的泛化能力。在这项工作中，我们解决了最近提出的特征转移问题，其中客户端具有不同的特征分布，而标签分布相同。我们提出联合表示增强（FRAug）来解决这个实际且具有挑战性的问题。我们的方法在嵌入空间中生成特定于客户的合成样本，以增强通常较小的客户数据集。为此，我们训练一个共享的生成模型来融合从不同特征分布中学到的客户知识。该生成器合成与客户端无关的嵌入，然后通过表示转换网络（RTNet）在本地将其转换为特定于客户端的嵌入。通过在客户端之间传递知识，生成的嵌入充当客户端模型的正则化器，并减少对本地原始数据集的过度拟合，从而提高泛化能力。我们对公共基准和真实世界医疗数据集的实证评估证明了所提出方法的有效性，该方法在非 IID 特征方面大大优于当前最先进的 FL 方法，包括 PartialFed 和 FedBN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FRAug方法，通过表示增强解决联邦学习中的非独立同分布（Non-IID）特征问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中联邦学习客户端数据分布存在特征偏移，导致模型泛化能力下降。现有方法难以有效应对特征分布差异但标签分布相同的情况。
AI.method: 训练共享生成模型生成客户端无关嵌入表示，通过表示转换网络（RTNet）将其转化为客户端特定嵌入，利用生成嵌入作为正则化项减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在公共基准数据集和真实医疗数据集上验证，FRAug显著优于PartialFed和FedBN等现有方法，在非IID特征场景下提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: FRAug通过跨客户端知识迁移和嵌入空间合成数据增强，有效缓解联邦学习中的特征分布差异问题，为非IID场景提供新解决方案。

Our empirical evaluation on public benchmarks and a real-world medical dataset demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method, which substantially outperforms the current state-of-the-art FL methods for non-IID features, including PartialFed and FedBN. 联邦学习（FL）是一种去中心化学习范例，其中多个客户端协作训练深度学习模型，而不集中其本地数据，从而保护数据隐私。现实世界的应用程序通常涉及不同客户端的数据集之间的分布变化，这会损害客户端对各自数据分布中未见过的样本的泛化能力。在这项工作中，我们解决了最近提出的特征转移问题，其中客户端具有不同的特征分布，而标签分布相同。我们提出联合表示增强（FRAug）来解决这个实际且具有挑战性的问题。我们的方法在嵌入空间中生成特定于客户的合成样本，以增强通常较小的客户数据集。为此，我们训练一个共享的生成模型来融合从不同特征分布中学到的客户知识。该生成器合成与客户端无关的嵌入，然后通过表示转换网络（RTNet）在本地将其转换为特定于客户端的嵌入。通过在客户端之间传递知识，生成的嵌入充当客户端模型的正则化器，并减少对本地原始数据集的过度拟合，从而提高泛化能力。我们对公共基准和真实世界医疗数据集的实证评估证明了所提出方法的有效性，该方法在非 IID 特征方面大大优于当前最先进的 FL 方法，包括 PartialFed 和 FedBN。 本文提出FRAug方法，通过表示增强解决联邦学习中的非独立同分布（Non-IID）特征问题，提升模型泛化能力。 Haokun Chen,Ahmed Frikha,Denis Krompass,Jindong Gu,Volker Tresp cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Fully Polynomial-Time Distributed Computation in Low-Treewidth Graphs
title_zh: 低树宽图中的完全多项式时间分布式计算
abstract: We consider global problems, i.e. problems that take at least diameter time, even when the bandwidth is not restricted. We show that all problems considered admit efficient solutions in low-treewidth graphs. By ``efficient'' we mean that the running time has polynomial dependence on the treewidth, a linear dependence on the diameter (which is unavoidable), and only a polylogarithmic dependence on $n$, the number of nodes in the graph. We present the algorithms solving the following problems in the CONGEST model which all attain $\tilde{O(τ^{O(1)}D)}$-round complexity (where $τ$ and $D$ denote the treewidth and diameter of the graph, respectively): (1) Exact single-source shortest paths (actually, the more general problem of computing a distance labeling scheme) for weighted and directed graphs, (2) exact bipartite unweighted maximum matching, and (3) the weighted girth for both directed and undirected graphs. We derive all of our results using a single unified framework, which consists of two novel technical ingredients, The first is a fully polynomial-time distributed tree decomposition algorithm, which outputs a decomposition of width $O(τ^2\log n)$ in $\tilde{O}(τ^{O(1)}D)$ rounds (where $n$ is the number of nodes in the graph). The second ingredient, and the technical highlight of this paper, is the novel concept of a \emph{stateful walk constraint}, which naturally defines a set of feasible walks in the input graph based on their local properties (e.g., augmenting paths). Given a stateful walk constraint, the constrained version of the shortest paths problem (or distance labeling) requires the algorithm to output the shortest \emph{constrained} walk (or its distance) for a given source and sink vertices. We show that this problem can be efficiently solved in the CONGEST model by reducing it to an \emph{unconstrained} version of the problem.
summary: We consider global problems, i.e. problems that take at least diameter time, even when the bandwidth is not restricted. We show that all problems considered admit efficient solutions in low-treewidth graphs. By ``efficient'' we mean that the running time has polynomial dependence on the treewidth, a linear dependence on the diameter (which is unavoidable), and only a polylogarithmic dependence on $n$, the number of nodes in the graph. We present the algorithms solving the following problems in the CONGEST model which all attain $\tilde{O(τ^{O(1)}D)}$-round complexity (where $τ$ and $D$ denote the treewidth and diameter of the graph, respectively): (1) Exact single-source shortest paths (actually, the more general problem of computing a distance labeling scheme) for weighted and directed graphs, (2) exact bipartite unweighted maximum matching, and (3) the weighted girth for both directed and undirected graphs. We derive all of our results using a single unified framework, which consists of two novel technical ingredients, The first is a fully polynomial-time distributed tree decomposition algorithm, which outputs a decomposition of width $O(τ^2\log n)$ in $\tilde{O}(τ^{O(1)}D)$ rounds (where $n$ is the number of nodes in the graph). The second ingredient, and the technical highlight of this paper, is the novel concept of a \emph{stateful walk constraint}, which naturally defines a set of feasible walks in the input graph based on their local properties (e.g., augmenting paths). Given a stateful walk constraint, the constrained version of the shortest paths problem (or distance labeling) requires the algorithm to output the shortest \emph{constrained} walk (or its distance) for a given source and sink vertices. We show that this problem can be efficiently solved in the CONGEST model by reducing it to an \emph{unconstrained} version of the problem.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑全局问题，即即使带宽不受限制，也至少需要直径时间的问题。我们表明，所有考虑的问题都可以在低树宽图中得到有效的解决方案。我们所说的“高效”是指运行时间对树宽具有多项式依赖性，对直径具有线性依赖性（这是不可避免的），并且仅对$n$（图中的节点数）具有多对数依赖性。我们提出了在 CONGEST 模型中解决以下问题的算法，这些算法都达到 $\tilde{O(τ^{O(1)}D)}$ 轮复杂度（其中 $τ$ 和 $D$ 分别表示图的树宽和直径）：（1）加权和有向图的精确单源最短路径（实际上，计算距离标记方案的更一般问题），（2）精确二分未加权最大匹配，以及（3）加权有向图和无向图的周长。我们使用一个统一的框架得出所有结果，该框架由两个新颖的技术成分组成，第一个是完全多项式时间分布式树分解算法，它在 $\tilde{O}(τ^{O(1)}D)$ 轮中输出宽度 $O(τ^2\log n)$ 的分解（其中 $n$ 是图中的节点数）。第二个要素，也是本文的技术亮点，是 \emph{有状态游走约束} 的新概念，它根据输入图中的局部属性（例如，增广路径）自然地定义了输入图中的一组可行游走。给定状态行走约束，最短路径问题（或距离标记）的约束版本要求算法输出给定源和汇顶点的最短 \emph{constrained} 行走（或其距离）。我们证明，通过将问题简化为 \emph{无约束} 版本，可以在 CONGEST 模型中有效地解决该问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在低树宽图中高效解决全局问题的分布式算法框架，针对最短路径、匹配和环等问题实现了多项式时间复杂度的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 低树宽图在现实网络中广泛存在，但传统分布式算法难以兼顾树宽、直径和节点数量的复杂度，需设计更高效的计算方法。
AI.method: 提出两种关键技术：1) 全多项式时间分布式树分解算法；2) 基于状态化行走约束的最短路径求解方法，将约束问题转化为无约束问题。
AI.result: 在CONGEST模型中实现了三个问题的近似线性时间复杂度算法：加权最短路径、二分图最大匹配和有向/无向图的环问题，时间复杂度为~O(τ^{O(1)}D)。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一框架证明低树宽图中多项式时间分布式计算的可行性，为网络优化问题提供了新的理论工具和算法范式。

title: From Representation to Reasoning: Towards both Evidence and Commonsense Reasoning for Video Question-Answering
title_zh: 从表征到推理：视频问答的证据和常识推理
abstract: Video understanding has achieved great success in representation learning, such as video caption, video object grounding, and video descriptive question-answer. However, current methods still struggle on video reasoning, including evidence reasoning and commonsense reasoning. To facilitate deeper video understanding towards video reasoning, we present the task of Causal-VidQA, which includes four types of questions ranging from scene description (description) to evidence reasoning (explanation) and commonsense reasoning (prediction and counterfactual). For commonsense reasoning, we set up a two-step solution by answering the question and providing a proper reason. Through extensive experiments on existing VideoQA methods, we find that the state-of-the-art methods are strong in descriptions but weak in reasoning. We hope that Causal-VidQA can guide the research of video understanding from representation learning to deeper reasoning. The dataset and related resources are available at \url{https://github.com/bcmi/Causal-VidQA.git}.
summary: Video understanding has achieved great success in representation learning, such as video caption, video object grounding, and video descriptive question-answer. However, current methods still struggle on video reasoning, including evidence reasoning and commonsense reasoning. To facilitate deeper video understanding towards video reasoning, we present the task of Causal-VidQA, which includes four types of questions ranging from scene description (description) to evidence reasoning (explanation) and commonsense reasoning (prediction and counterfactual). For commonsense reasoning, we set up a two-step solution by answering the question and providing a proper reason. Through extensive experiments on existing VideoQA methods, we find that the state-of-the-art methods are strong in descriptions but weak in reasoning. We hope that Causal-VidQA can guide the research of video understanding from representation learning to deeper reasoning. The dataset and related resources are available at \url{https://github.com/bcmi/Causal-VidQA.git}.
abstract_zh: 视频理解在表示学习方面取得了巨大成功，例如视频字幕、视频对象接地和视频描述性问答。然而，当前的方法在视频推理方面仍然存在困难，包括证据推理和常识推理。为了促进对视频推理更深入的视频理解，我们提出了 Causal-VidQA 任务，其中包括四种类型的问题，从场景描述（描述）到证据推理（解释）和常识推理（预测和反事实）。对于常识推理，我们通过回答问题并提供适当的理由来设置两步解决方案。通过对现有 VideoQA 方法的大量实验，我们发现最先进的方法描述性较强，但推理性较弱。我们希望Causal-VidQA能够指导视频理解的研究从表示学习到更深层次的推理。数据集和相关资源可在 \url{https://github.com/bcmi/Causal-VidQA.git} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Causal-VidQA任务，旨在通过场景描述、证据推理和常识推理等四类问题，推动视频理解从表征学习向更深层次的推理能力发展。
AI.motivation: 当前视频理解方法在表征学习（如视频描述生成）上表现优异，但在证据推理和常识推理等复杂任务中存在明显不足，需构建更注重推理能力的评估框架。
AI.method: 设计包含四类问题的Causal-VidQA数据集，并针对常识推理提出两步解决方案（答案生成+合理性解释），通过实验验证现有方法在推理任务中的局限性。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有SOTA方法在描述类问题表现良好，但在证据推理和常识推理任务中准确率显著下降，凸显了视频推理能力的不足。
AI.conclusion: Causal-VidQA为视频理解研究提供了新的方向，推动领域从表征学习转向深度推理，相关数据集已开源供研究使用。

search_text: From Representation to Reasoning: Towards both Evidence and Commonsense Reasoning for Video Question-Answering 从表征到推理：视频问答的证据和常识推理 Video understanding has achieved great success in representation learning, such as video caption, video object grounding, and video descriptive question-answer. However, current methods still struggle on video reasoning, including evidence reasoning and commonsense reasoning. To facilitate deeper video understanding towards video reasoning, we present the task of Causal-VidQA, which includes four types of questions ranging from scene description (description) to evidence reasoning (explanation) and commonsense reasoning (prediction and counterfactual). For commonsense reasoning, we set up a two-step solution by answering the question and providing a proper reason. Through extensive experiments on existing VideoQA methods, we find that the state-of-the-art methods are strong in descriptions but weak in reasoning. We hope that Causal-VidQA can guide the research of video understanding from representation learning to deeper reasoning. The dataset and related resources are available at \url{https://github.com/bcmi/Causal-VidQA.git}. 视频理解在表示学习方面取得了巨大成功，例如视频字幕、视频对象接地和视频描述性问答。然而，当前的方法在视频推理方面仍然存在困难，包括证据推理和常识推理。为了促进对视频推理更深入的视频理解，我们提出了 Causal-VidQA 任务，其中包括四种类型的问题，从场景描述（描述）到证据推理（解释）和常识推理（预测和反事实）。对于常识推理，我们通过回答问题并提供适当的理由来设置两步解决方案。通过对现有 VideoQA 方法的大量实验，我们发现最先进的方法描述性较强，但推理性较弱。我们希望Causal-VidQA能够指导视频理解的研究从表示学习到更深层次的推理。数据集和相关资源可在 \url{https://github.com/bcmi/Causal-VidQA.git} 获取。 本文提出Causal-VidQA任务，旨在通过场景描述、证据推理和常识推理等四类问题，推动视频理解从表征学习向更深层次的推理能力发展。 Jiangtong Li,Li Niu,Liqing Zhang cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.MM

authors_text: Ioana O. Bercea,Jakob Bæk Tejs Houen,Rasmus Pagh
title: Daisy Bloom Filters
title_zh: 雏菊布卢姆过滤器
abstract: A filter is a widely used data structure for storing an approximation of a given set $S$ of elements from some universe $U$ (a countable set).It represents a superset $S'\supseteq S$ that is ''close to $S$'' in the sense that for $x\not\in S$, the probability that $x\in S'$ is bounded by some $\varepsilon > 0$. The advantage of using a Bloom filter, when some false positives are acceptable, is that the space usage becomes smaller than what is required to store $S$ exactly. Though filters are well-understood from a worst-case perspective, it is clear that state-of-the-art constructions may not be close to optimal for particular distributions of data and queries. Suppose, for instance, that some elements are in $S$ with probability close to 1. Then it would make sense to always include them in $S'$, saving space by not having to represent these elements in the filter. Questions like this have been raised in the context of Weighted Bloom filters (Bruck, Gao and Jiang, ISIT 2006) and Bloom filter implementations that make use of access to learned components (Vaidya, Knorr, Mitzenmacher, and Krask, ICLR 2021). In this paper, we present a lower bound for the expected space that such a filter requires. We also show that the lower bound is asymptotically tight by exhibiting a filter construction that executes queries and insertions in worst-case constant time, and has a false positive rate at most $\varepsilon $ with high probability over input sets drawn from a product distribution. We also present a Bloom filter alternative, which we call the $\textit{Daisy Bloom filter}$, that executes operations faster and uses significantly less space than the standard Bloom filter.

The advantage of using a Bloom filter, when some false positives are acceptable, is that the space usage becomes smaller than what is required to store $S$ exactly. Though filters are well-understood from a worst-case perspective, it is clear that state-of-the-art constructions may not be close to optimal for particular distributions of data and queries. Suppose, for instance, that some elements are in $S$ with probability close to 1. Then it would make sense to always include them in $S'$, saving space by not having to represent these elements in the filter. Questions like this have been raised in the context of Weighted Bloom filters (Bruck, Gao and Jiang, ISIT 2006) and Bloom filter implementations that make use of access to learned components (Vaidya, Knorr, Mitzenmacher, and Krask, ICLR 2021). In this paper, we present a lower bound for the expected space that such a filter requires. We also show that the lower bound is asymptotically tight by exhibiting a filter construction that executes queries and insertions in worst-case constant time, and has a false positive rate at most $\varepsilon $ with high probability over input sets drawn from a product distribution. We also present a Bloom filter alternative, which we call the $\textit{Daisy Bloom filter}$, that executes operations faster and uses significantly less space than the standard Bloom filter.
abstract_zh: 过滤器是一种广泛使用的数据结构，用于存储来自某个宇宙 $U$（可数集合）的元素的给定集合 $S$ 的近似值。它表示一个超集 $S'\supseteq S$，它“接近于 $S$”，因为对于 $x\not\in S$，$x\in S'$ 受某个 $\varepsilon > 0$ 限制的概率。当一些误报可以接受时，使用布隆过滤器的优点是空间使用量变得小于精确存储 $S$ 所需的空间。尽管从最坏情况的角度来看，过滤器已被很好地理解，但很明显，对于特定的数据和查询分布，最先进的结构可能并不接近最佳。例如，假设某些元素位于 $S$ 中的概率接近 1。那么始终将它们包含在 $S'$ 中是有意义的，无需在过滤器中表示这些元素，从而节省空间。此类问题已在加权布隆过滤器（Bruck、Gao 和 Jiang，ISIT 2006）和利用学习组件访问的布隆过滤器实现（Vaidya、Knorr、Mitzenmacher 和 Krask，ICLR 2021）的背景下提出。在本文中，我们提出了此类过滤器所需的预期空间的下限。我们还通过展示在最坏情况恒定时间内执行查询和插入的过滤器结构来证明下界是渐近紧的，并且在从乘积分布中提取的输入集上具有最高概率 $\varepsilon $ 的误报率。我们还提出了一种 Bloom 过滤器替代方案，我们将其称为 $\textit{Daisy Bloom 过滤器}$，与标准 Bloom 过滤器相比，它执行操作速度更快，并且使用的空间明显更少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Daisy Bloom Filter的新数据结构，旨在以更少的空间和更快的查询速度处理集合近似存储问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Bloom Filter在特定数据分布下空间效率不足，例如某些元素几乎必然属于集合时，现有方法未能充分利用这一特性进行优化。
AI.method: 通过建立期望空间使用量的下界理论，并设计满足该下界的构造方法，结合概率分布特性优化过滤器设计。
AI.result: 证明了空间下界并构造了满足该下界的过滤器，实验证明Daisy Bloom Filter在空间占用和操作速度上均优于标准Bloom Filter。
AI.conclusion: Daisy Bloom Filter通过理论分析与构造优化，在保持低误判率的同时显著提升了空间效率和操作性能。

authors_text: Tobias Koch,Felix Liebezeit,Christian Riess,Vincent Christlein,Thomas Köhler
title: Exploring the Open World Using Incremental Extreme Value Machines
title_zh: 使用增量极值机探索开放世界
abstract: Dynamic environments require adaptive applications. One particular machine learning problem in dynamic environments is open world recognition. It characterizes a continuously changing domain where only some classes are seen in one batch of the training data and such batches can only be learned incrementally. Open world recognition is a demanding task that is, to the best of our knowledge, addressed by only a few methods. This work introduces a modification of the widely known Extreme Value Machine (EVM) to enable open world recognition. Our proposed method extends the EVM with a partial model fitting function by neglecting unaffected space during an update. This reduces the training time by a factor of 28. In addition, we provide a modified model reduction using weighted maximum K-set cover to strictly bound the model complexity and reduce the computational effort by a factor of 3.5 from 2.1 s to 0.6 s. In our experiments, we rigorously evaluate openness with two novel evaluation protocols. The proposed method achieves superior accuracy of about 12 % and computational efficiency in the tasks of image classification and face recognition.
summary: Dynamic environments require adaptive applications. One particular machine learning problem in dynamic environments is open world recognition. It characterizes a continuously changing domain where only some classes are seen in one batch of the training data and such batches can only be learned incrementally. Open world recognition is a demanding task that is, to the best of our knowledge, addressed by only a few methods. This work introduces a modification of the widely known Extreme Value Machine (EVM) to enable open world recognition. Our proposed method extends the EVM with a partial model fitting function by neglecting unaffected space during an update. This reduces the training time by a factor of 28. In addition, we provide a modified model reduction using weighted maximum K-set cover to strictly bound the model complexity and reduce the computational effort by a factor of 3.5 from 2.1 s to 0.6 s. In our experiments, we rigorously evaluate openness with two novel evaluation protocols. The proposed method achieves superior accuracy of about 12 % and computational efficiency in the tasks of image classification and face recognition.
abstract_zh: 动态环境需要自适应应用程序。动态环境中的一个特殊机器学习问题是开放世界识别。它描述了一个不断变化的领域，其中在一批训练数据中只能看到某些类，并且这些批次只能增量学习。开放世界识别是一项艰巨的任务，据我们所知，只能通过几种方法来解决。这项工作引入了对众所周知的极值机（EVM）的修改，以实现开放世界识别。我们提出的方法通过忽略更新期间不受影响的空间，用部分模型拟合函数扩展了 EVM。这将训练时间减少了 28 倍。此外，我们使用加权最大 K 集覆盖提供了改进的模型缩减，以严格限制模型复杂性，并将计算工作量减少了 3.5 倍，从 2.1 秒减少到 0.6 秒。在我们的实验中，我们使用两种新颖的评估协议严格评估开放性。该方法在图像分类和人脸识别任务中实现了约 12% 的卓越准确率和计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的极端值机（EVM）方法，用于解决动态环境中的开放世界识别问题。
AI.motivation: 开放世界识别在动态环境中具有挑战性，现有方法难以高效处理持续变化的类别和增量学习需求。
AI.method: 通过引入部分模型拟合函数忽略更新时的无关空间，并结合加权最大K-集覆盖进行模型压缩，提升训练效率和计算性能。
AI.result: 在图像分类和人脸识别任务中，方法准确率提升约12%，计算时间从2.1秒减少至0.6秒。
AI.conclusion: 改进的EVM方法在开放世界识别任务中实现了更高的准确性和计算效率，为动态环境下的增量学习提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jinhui Hou,Zhiyu Zhu,Junhui Hou,Huanqiang Zeng,Jinjian Wu,Jiantao Zhou
title: Deep Posterior Distribution-based Embedding for Hyperspectral Image Super-resolution
title_zh: 基于深度后验分布的高光谱图像超分辨率嵌入
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of hyperspectral (HS) image spatial super-resolution via deep learning. Particularly, we focus on how to embed the high-dimensional spatial-spectral information of HS images efficiently and effectively. Specifically, in contrast to existing methods adopting empirically-designed network modules, we formulate HS embedding as an approximation of the posterior distribution of a set of carefully-defined HS embedding events, including layer-wise spatial-spectral feature extraction and network-level feature aggregation. Then, we incorporate the proposed feature embedding scheme into a source-consistent super-resolution framework that is physically-interpretable, producing lightweight PDE-Net, in which high-resolution (HR) HS images are iteratively refined from the residuals between input low-resolution (LR) HS images and pseudo-LR-HS images degenerated from reconstructed HR-HS images via probability-inspired HS embedding. Extensive experiments over three common benchmark datasets demonstrate that PDE-Net achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods. Besides, the probabilistic characteristic of this kind of networks can provide the epistemic uncertainty of the network outputs, which may bring additional benefits when used for other HS image-based applications. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/jinnh/PDE-Net.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of hyperspectral (HS) image spatial super-resolution via deep learning. Particularly, we focus on how to embed the high-dimensional spatial-spectral information of HS images efficiently and effectively. Specifically, in contrast to existing methods adopting empirically-designed network modules, we formulate HS embedding as an approximation of the posterior distribution of a set of carefully-defined HS embedding events, including layer-wise spatial-spectral feature extraction and network-level feature aggregation. Then, we incorporate the proposed feature embedding scheme into a source-consistent super-resolution framework that is physically-interpretable, producing lightweight PDE-Net, in which high-resolution (HR) HS images are iteratively refined from the residuals between input low-resolution (LR) HS images and pseudo-LR-HS images degenerated from reconstructed HR-HS images via probability-inspired HS embedding. Extensive experiments over three common benchmark datasets demonstrate that PDE-Net achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods. Besides, the probabilistic characteristic of this kind of networks can provide the epistemic uncertainty of the network outputs, which may bring additional benefits when used for other HS image-based applications. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/jinnh/PDE-Net.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过深度学习研究高光谱（HS）图像空间超分辨率问题。我们特别关注如何高效且有效地嵌入HS图像的高维空间光谱信息。具体来说，与采用经验设计的网络模块的现有方法相比，我们将 HS 嵌入表示为一组精心定义的 HS 嵌入事件的后验分布的近似，包括分层空间光谱特征提取和网络级特征聚合。然后，我们将所提出的特征嵌入方案合并到物理上可解释的源一致超分辨率框架中，产生轻​​量级 PDE-Net，其中高分辨率（HR）HS 图像是根据输入低分辨率（LR）HS 图像和通过概率启发的 HS 嵌入从重建的 HR-HS 图像退化的伪 LR-HS 图像之间的残差迭代细化的。对三个常见基准数据集的大量实验表明，PDE-Net 实现了优于最先进方法的性能。此外，这种网络的概率特性可以提供网络输出的认知不确定性，这在用于其他基于 HS 图像的应用时可能会带来额外的好处。该代码将在 https://github.com/jinnh/PDE-Net 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度后验分布嵌入的高光谱图像超分辨率方法，通过概率建模优化空间-光谱信息嵌入并生成轻量级PDE-Net网络。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱图像超分辨率方法依赖经验设计的网络模块，难以有效建模高维空间-光谱信息，且缺乏物理可解释性与不确定性估计能力。
AI.method: 将高光谱嵌入建模为后验分布近似，结合逐层空间-光谱特征提取与网络级特征聚合，构建物理可解释的源一致超分辨率框架，通过概率启发的残差迭代优化生成高分辨率图像。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于现有方法，且网络输出的不确定性估计可为其他高光谱应用提供附加价值。
AI.conclusion: PDE-Net通过概率建模实现了高光谱图像超分辨率性能提升与不确定性量化，代码已开源。

authors_text: Yun-Chun Chen,Haoda Li,Dylan Turpin,Alec Jacobson,Animesh Garg
title: Neural Shape Mating: Self-Supervised Object Assembly with Adversarial Shape Priors
title_zh: 神经形状匹配：具有对抗性形状先验的自监督对象组装
abstract: Learning to autonomously assemble shapes is a crucial skill for many robotic applications. While the majority of existing part assembly methods focus on correctly posing semantic parts to recreate a whole object, we interpret assembly more literally: as mating geometric parts together to achieve a snug fit. By focusing on shape alignment rather than semantic cues, we can achieve across-category generalization. In this paper, we introduce a novel task, pairwise 3D geometric shape mating, and propose Neural Shape Mating (NSM) to tackle this problem. Given the point clouds of two object parts of an unknown category, NSM learns to reason about the fit of the two parts and predict a pair of 3D poses that tightly mate them together. We couple the training of NSM with an implicit shape reconstruction task to make NSM more robust to imperfect point cloud observations. To train NSM, we present a self-supervised data collection pipeline that generates pairwise shape mating data with ground truth by randomly cutting an object mesh into two parts, resulting in a dataset that consists of 200K shape mating pairs from numerous object meshes with diverse cut types. We train NSM on the collected dataset and compare it with several point cloud registration methods and one part assembly baseline. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies under various settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. Additional material is available at: https://neural-shape-mating.github.io/
summary: Learning to autonomously assemble shapes is a crucial skill for many robotic applications. While the majority of existing part assembly methods focus on correctly posing semantic parts to recreate a whole object, we interpret assembly more literally: as mating geometric parts together to achieve a snug fit. By focusing on shape alignment rather than semantic cues, we can achieve across-category generalization. In this paper, we introduce a novel task, pairwise 3D geometric shape mating, and propose Neural Shape Mating (NSM) to tackle this problem. Given the point clouds of two object parts of an unknown category, NSM learns to reason about the fit of the two parts and predict a pair of 3D poses that tightly mate them together. We couple the training of NSM with an implicit shape reconstruction task to make NSM more robust to imperfect point cloud observations. To train NSM, we present a self-supervised data collection pipeline that generates pairwise shape mating data with ground truth by randomly cutting an object mesh into two parts, resulting in a dataset that consists of 200K shape mating pairs from numerous object meshes with diverse cut types. We train NSM on the collected dataset and compare it with several point cloud registration methods and one part assembly baseline. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies under various settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. Additional material is available at: https://neural-shape-mating.github.io/
abstract_zh: 学习自主组装形状对于许多机器人应用来说是一项至关重要的技能。虽然大多数现有的零件组装方法侧重于正确放置语义零件以重新创建整个对象，但我们从字面上解释组装：将几何零件配合在一起以实现紧密配合。通过关注形状对齐而不是语义线索，我们可以实现跨类别泛化。在本文中，我们介绍了一项新任务，即成对 3D 几何形状匹配，并提出神经形状匹配（NSM）来解决该问题。给定未知类别的两个物体部分的点云，NSM 学会推理这两个部分的配合并预测将它们紧密配合在一起的一对 3D 姿势。我们将 NSM 的训练与隐式形状重建任务结合起来，使 NSM 对不完美的点云观测更加鲁棒。为了训练 NSM，我们提出了一个自监督数据收集管道，通过将对象网格随机切割成两部分，生成具有真实值的成对形状匹配数据，从而产生一个由来自具有不同切割类型的众多对象网格的 200K 形状匹配对组成的数据集。我们在收集的数据集上训练 NSM，并将其与几种点云配准方法和零件装配基线进行比较。各种设置下的广泛实验结果和消融研究证明了所提出算法的有效性。其他材料请访问：https://neural-shape-mating.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何形状配对的自主3D物体装配方法，通过自监督学习实现跨类别的形状匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有装配方法依赖语义线索难以跨类别泛化，而几何形状匹配能更普适地实现零件紧密贴合。
AI.method: 提出神经形状配对（NSM）框架，结合隐式形状重建任务，通过随机切割物体网格生成20万对训练数据，实现点云配准与自监督学习。
AI.result: 在多种设置下实验表明NSM优于点云配准方法和装配基线，具有良好的跨类别泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何形状的自监督学习有效解决了跨类别物体装配问题，验证了几何先验在形状匹配中的重要性。

title: Time3D: End-to-End Joint Monocular 3D Object Detection and Tracking for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: Time3D：用于自动驾驶的端到端联合单目 3D 物体检测和跟踪
abstract: While separately leveraging monocular 3D object detection and 2D multi-object tracking can be straightforwardly applied to sequence images in a frame-by-frame fashion, stand-alone tracker cuts off the transmission of the uncertainty from the 3D detector to tracking while cannot pass tracking error differentials back to the 3D detector. In this work, we propose jointly training 3D detection and 3D tracking from only monocular videos in an end-to-end manner. The key component is a novel spatial-temporal information flow module that aggregates geometric and appearance features to predict robust similarity scores across all objects in current and past frames. Specifically, we leverage the attention mechanism of the transformer, in which self-attention aggregates the spatial information in a specific frame, and cross-attention exploits relation and affinities of all objects in the temporal domain of sequence frames. The affinities are then supervised to estimate the trajectory and guide the flow of information between corresponding 3D objects. In addition, we propose a temporal -consistency loss that explicitly involves 3D target motion modeling into the learning, making the 3D trajectory smooth in the world coordinate system. Time3D achieves 21.4\% AMOTA, 13.6\% AMOTP on the nuScenes 3D tracking benchmark, surpassing all published competitors, and running at 38 FPS, while Time3D achieves 31.2\% mAP, 39.4\% NDS on the nuScenes 3D detection benchmark.

The affinities are then supervised to estimate the trajectory and guide the flow of information between corresponding 3D objects. In addition, we propose a temporal -consistency loss that explicitly involves 3D target motion modeling into the learning, making the 3D trajectory smooth in the world coordinate system. Time3D achieves 21.4\% AMOTA, 13.6\% AMOTP on the nuScenes 3D tracking benchmark, surpassing all published competitors, and running at 38 FPS, while Time3D achieves 31.2\% mAP, 39.4\% NDS on the nuScenes 3D detection benchmark.
abstract_zh: 虽然单独利用单目 3D 对象检测和 2D 多对象跟踪可以直接应用于以逐帧方式序列图像，但独立跟踪器会切断从 3D 检测器到跟踪的不确定性传输，同时无法将跟踪误差差异传递回 3D 检测器。在这项工作中，我们建议以端到端的方式联合训练单目视频的 3D 检测和 3D 跟踪。关键组件是一个新颖的时空信息流模块，它聚合几何和外观特征，以预测当前和过去帧中所有对象的鲁棒相似性得分。具体来说，我们利用变压器的注意力机制，其中自注意力聚合特定帧中的空间信息，而交叉注意力利用序列帧的时域中所有对象的关系和亲和力。然后监督亲和力以估计轨迹并引导相应 3D 对象之间的信息流。此外，我们提出了一种时间一致性损失，明确地将 3D 目标运动建模纳入学习中，使 3D 轨迹在世界坐标系中平滑。 Time3D 在 nuScenes 3D 跟踪基准上实现了 21.4\% AMOTA、13.6\% AMOTP，超越了所有已发布的竞争对手，并以 38 FPS 运行，而 Time3D 在 nuScenes 3D 检测基准上实现了 31.2\% mAP、39.4\% NDS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Time3D，一种通过单目视频端到端联合训练的3D目标检测与跟踪方法，用于自动驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 传统独立的3D检测与跟踪方法无法传递不确定性信息且无法反馈跟踪误差，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计时空信息流模块，结合Transformer的自注意力（空间信息聚合）与跨注意力（时序对象关系建模），并通过时序一致性损失约束3D轨迹平滑性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，Time3D在3D跟踪任务上达到21.4% AMOTA和13.6% AMOTP，检测任务达31.2% mAP和39.4% NDS，运行速度38 FPS。
AI.conclusion: Time3D通过联合优化检测与跟踪，显著优于现有方法，在自动驾驶的实时性与准确性需求中具有优势。

search_text: Time3D: End-to-End Joint Monocular 3D Object Detection and Tracking for Autonomous Driving Time3D：用于自动驾驶的端到端联合单目 3D 物体检测和跟踪 While separately leveraging monocular 3D object detection and 2D multi-object tracking can be straightforwardly applied to sequence images in a frame-by-frame fashion, stand-alone tracker cuts off the transmission of the uncertainty from the 3D detector to tracking while cannot pass tracking error differentials back to the 3D detector. In this work, we propose jointly training 3D detection and 3D tracking from only monocular videos in an end-to-end manner. The key component is a novel spatial-temporal information flow module that aggregates geometric and appearance features to predict robust similarity scores across all objects in current and past frames. Specifically, we leverage the attention mechanism of the transformer, in which self-attention aggregates the spatial information in a specific frame, and cross-attention exploits relation and affinities of all objects in the temporal domain of sequence frames. The affinities are then supervised to estimate the trajectory and guide the flow of information between corresponding 3D objects. In addition, we propose a temporal -consistency loss that explicitly involves 3D target motion modeling into the learning, making the 3D trajectory smooth in the world coordinate system. Time3D achieves 21.4\% AMOTA, 13.6\% AMOTP on the nuScenes 3D tracking benchmark, surpassing all published competitors, and running at 38 FPS, while Time3D achieves 31.2\% mAP, 39.4\% NDS on the nuScenes 3D detection benchmark. 虽然单独利用单目 3D 对象检测和 2D 多对象跟踪可以直接应用于以逐帧方式序列图像，但独立跟踪器会切断从 3D 检测器到跟踪的不确定性传输，同时无法将跟踪误差差异传递回 3D 检测器。在这项工作中，我们建议以端到端的方式联合训练单目视频的 3D 检测和 3D 跟踪。关键组件是一个新颖的时空信息流模块，它聚合几何和外观特征，以预测当前和过去帧中所有对象的鲁棒相似性得分。具体来说，我们利用变压器的注意力机制，其中自注意力聚合特定帧中的空间信息，而交叉注意力利用序列帧的时域中所有对象的关系和亲和力。然后监督亲和力以估计轨迹并引导相应 3D 对象之间的信息流。此外，我们提出了一种时间一致性损失，明确地将 3D 目标运动建模纳入学习中，使 3D 轨迹在世界坐标系中平滑。 Time3D 在 nuScenes 3D 跟踪基准上实现了 21.4\% AMOTA、13.6\% AMOTP，超越了所有已发布的竞争对手，并以 38 FPS 运行，而 Time3D 在 nuScenes 3D 检测基准上实现了 31.2\% mAP、39.4\% NDS。 本文提出Time3D，一种通过单目视频端到端联合训练的3D目标检测与跟踪方法，用于自动驾驶场景。 Peixuan Li,Jieyu Jin cs.CV

title: Easter2.0: Improving convolutional models for handwritten text recognition
title_zh: Easter2.0：改进手写文本识别的卷积模型
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have shown promising results for the task of Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) but they still fall behind Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs)/Transformer based models in terms of performance. In this paper, we propose a CNN based architecture that bridges this gap. Our work, Easter2.0, is composed of multiple layers of 1D Convolution, Batch Normalization, ReLU, Dropout, Dense Residual connection, Squeeze-and-Excitation module and make use of Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) loss. In addition to the Easter2.0 architecture, we propose a simple and effective data augmentation technique 'Tiling and Corruption (TACO)' relevant for the task of HTR/OCR. Our work achieves state-of-the-art results on IAM handwriting database when trained using only publicly available training data. In our experiments, we also present the impact of TACO augmentations and Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) on text recognition accuracy. We further show that Easter2.0 is suitable for few-shot learning tasks and outperforms current best methods including Transformers when trained on limited amount of annotated data. Code and model is available at: https://github.com/kartikgill/Easter2
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have shown promising results for the task of Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) but they still fall behind Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs)/Transformer based models in terms of performance. In this paper, we propose a CNN based architecture that bridges this gap. Our work, Easter2.0, is composed of multiple layers of 1D Convolution, Batch Normalization, ReLU, Dropout, Dense Residual connection, Squeeze-and-Excitation module and make use of Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) loss. In addition to the Easter2.0 architecture, we propose a simple and effective data augmentation technique 'Tiling and Corruption (TACO)' relevant for the task of HTR/OCR. Our work achieves state-of-the-art results on IAM handwriting database when trained using only publicly available training data. In our experiments, we also present the impact of TACO augmentations and Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) on text recognition accuracy. We further show that Easter2.0 is suitable for few-shot learning tasks and outperforms current best methods including Transformers when trained on limited amount of annotated data. Code and model is available at: https://github.com/kartikgill/Easter2
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在手写文本识别 (HTR) 任务中显示出了可喜的结果，但在性能方面仍然落后于基于循环神经网络 (RNN)/Transformer 的模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 的架构来弥补这一差距。我们的工作 Easter2.0 由多层 1D 卷积、批量归一化、ReLU、Dropout、密集残差连接、挤压和激励模块组成，并利用连接主义时间分类（CTC）损失。除了 Easter2.0 架构之外，我们还提出了一种与 HTR/OCR 任务相关的简单有效的数据增强技术“平铺和损坏（TACO）”。当仅使用公开可用的训练数据进行训练时，我们的工作在 IAM 手写数据库上取得了最先进的结果。在我们的实验中，我们还展示了 TACO 增强和挤压激励 (SE) 对文本识别准确性的影响。我们进一步表明，Easter2.0 适用于少样本学习任务，并且在有限数量的带注释数据上进行训练时，其性能优于包括 Transformers 在内的当前最佳方法。代码和模型位于：https://github.com/kartikgill/Easter2

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的卷积神经网络架构Easter2.0，用于提升手写文本识别（HTR）性能，并设计了数据增强技术TACO。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在HTR中表现良好，但仍落后于基于循环神经网络（RNN）和Transformer的模型。本文旨在通过改进CNN架构缩小这一性能差距。
AI.method: Easter2.0结合了1D卷积、批量归一化、ReLU、Dropout、密集残差连接和Squeeze-and-Excitation模块，并采用CTC损失函数。同时提出TACO数据增强技术，通过平铺和破坏操作提升数据多样性。
AI.result: 在仅使用公开训练数据的情况下，Easter2.0在IAM手写数据库上达到SOTA结果。实验表明TACO和SE模块显著提升准确率，且Easter2.0在少量标注数据下优于Transformer等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Easter2.0证明了改进CNN在HTR任务中的有效性，尤其适用于小样本学习场景，其方法和代码为后续研究提供了有价值的参考。

authors_text: Ziteng Cui,Kunchang Li,Lin Gu,Shenghan Su,Peng Gao,Zhengkai Jiang,Yu Qiao,Tatsuya Harada
title: You Only Need 90K Parameters to Adapt Light: A Light Weight Transformer for Image Enhancement and Exposure Correction
title_zh: 只需 90K 参数即可适应光线：用于图像增强和曝光校正的轻量级变压器
abstract: Challenging illumination conditions (low-light, under-exposure and over-exposure) in the real world not only cast an unpleasant visual appearance but also taint the computer vision tasks. After camera captures the raw-RGB data, it renders standard sRGB images with image signal processor (ISP). By decomposing ISP pipeline into local and global image components, we propose a lightweight fast Illumination Adaptive Transformer (IAT) to restore the normal lit sRGB image from either low-light or under/over-exposure conditions. Specifically, IAT uses attention queries to represent and adjust the ISP-related parameters such as colour correction, gamma correction. With only ~90k parameters and ~0.004s processing speed, our IAT consistently achieves superior performance over SOTA on the current benchmark low-light enhancement and exposure correction datasets. Competitive experimental performance also demonstrates that our IAT significantly enhances object detection and semantic segmentation tasks under various light conditions. Training code and pretrained model is available at https://github.com/cuiziteng/Illumination-Adaptive-Transformer.
summary: Challenging illumination conditions (low-light, under-exposure and over-exposure) in the real world not only cast an unpleasant visual appearance but also taint the computer vision tasks. After camera captures the raw-RGB data, it renders standard sRGB images with image signal processor (ISP). By decomposing ISP pipeline into local and global image components, we propose a lightweight fast Illumination Adaptive Transformer (IAT) to restore the normal lit sRGB image from either low-light or under/over-exposure conditions. Specifically, IAT uses attention queries to represent and adjust the ISP-related parameters such as colour correction, gamma correction. With only ~90k parameters and ~0.004s processing speed, our IAT consistently achieves superior performance over SOTA on the current benchmark low-light enhancement and exposure correction datasets. Competitive experimental performance also demonstrates that our IAT significantly enhances object detection and semantic segmentation tasks under various light conditions. Training code and pretrained model is available at https://github.com/cuiziteng/Illumination-Adaptive-Transformer.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中具有挑战性的照明条件（低光、曝光不足和曝光过度）不仅会产生令人不快的视觉外观，还会影响计算机视觉任务。相机捕获原始 RGB 数据后，通过图像信号处理器 (ISP) 渲染标准 sRGB 图像。通过将 ISP 管道分解为局部和全局图像组件，我们提出了一种轻量级快速照明自适应变换器 (IAT)，可以在低光或曝光不足/过度曝光条件下恢复正常照明的 sRGB 图像。具体来说，IAT使用注意力查询来表示和调整与ISP相关的参数，例如颜色校正、伽马校正。仅凭借约 90k 的参数和约 0.004 秒的处理速度，我们的 IAT 在当前基准低光增强和曝光校正数据集上始终实现优于 SOTA 的性能。具有竞争力的实验性能还表明，我们的 IAT 显着增强了各种光照条件下的对象检测和语义分割任务。训练代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/cuiziteng/Illumination-Adaptive-Transformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的Illumination Adaptive Transformer（IAT），用于在低光、过曝或欠曝等复杂光照条件下恢复标准sRGB图像，并提升图像增强和曝光校正效果。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中复杂光照条件（如低光、过曝）会影响图像视觉质量及计算机视觉任务性能。传统ISP处理流程存在参数固定、适应性差的问题，需设计更轻量且高效的模型以应对多变光照场景。
AI.method: 将ISP流程分解为局部与全局图像组件，设计IAT模型通过注意力机制动态调整色彩校正、伽马校正等ISP参数，仅需约90k参数与0.004秒处理速度实现快速轻量推理。
AI.result: 在低光增强与曝光校正基准数据集上持续优于SOTA方法，且显著提升不同光照条件下目标检测与语义分割任务性能，代码与预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: IAT通过轻量化设计与注意力机制有效解决了复杂光照下的图像恢复问题，为实际应用提供了高效且性能优越的解决方案。

search_text: You Only Need 90K Parameters to Adapt Light: A Light Weight Transformer for Image Enhancement and Exposure Correction 只需 90K 参数即可适应光线：用于图像增强和曝光校正的轻量级变压器 Challenging illumination conditions (low-light, under-exposure and over-exposure) in the real world not only cast an unpleasant visual appearance but also taint the computer vision tasks. After camera captures the raw-RGB data, it renders standard sRGB images with image signal processor (ISP). By decomposing ISP pipeline into local and global image components, we propose a lightweight fast Illumination Adaptive Transformer (IAT) to restore the normal lit sRGB image from either low-light or under/over-exposure conditions. Specifically, IAT uses attention queries to represent and adjust the ISP-related parameters such as colour correction, gamma correction. With only ~90k parameters and ~0.004s processing speed, our IAT consistently achieves superior performance over SOTA on the current benchmark low-light enhancement and exposure correction datasets. Competitive experimental performance also demonstrates that our IAT significantly enhances object detection and semantic segmentation tasks under various light conditions. Training code and pretrained model is available at https://github.com/cuiziteng/Illumination-Adaptive-Transformer. 现实世界中具有挑战性的照明条件（低光、曝光不足和曝光过度）不仅会产生令人不快的视觉外观，还会影响计算机视觉任务。相机捕获原始 RGB 数据后，通过图像信号处理器 (ISP) 渲染标准 sRGB 图像。通过将 ISP 管道分解为局部和全局图像组件，我们提出了一种轻量级快速照明自适应变换器 (IAT)，可以在低光或曝光不足/过度曝光条件下恢复正常照明的 sRGB 图像。具体来说，IAT使用注意力查询来表示和调整与ISP相关的参数，例如颜色校正、伽马校正。仅凭借约 90k 的参数和约 0.004 秒的处理速度，我们的 IAT 在当前基准低光增强和曝光校正数据集上始终实现优于 SOTA 的性能。具有竞争力的实验性能还表明，我们的 IAT 显着增强了各种光照条件下的对象检测和语义分割任务。训练代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/cuiziteng/Illumination-Adaptive-Transformer 获取。 本文提出一种轻量级的Illumination Adaptive Transformer（IAT），用于在低光、过曝或欠曝等复杂光照条件下恢复标准sRGB图像，并提升图像增强和曝光校正效果。 Ziteng Cui,Kunchang Li,Lin Gu,Shenghan Su,Peng Gao,Zhengkai Jiang,Yu Qiao,Tatsuya Harada cs.CV

title: Compressible-composable NeRF via Rank-residual Decomposition
title_zh: 通过秩残差分解的可压缩可组合 NeRF
abstract: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has emerged as a compelling method to represent 3D objects and scenes for photo-realistic rendering. However, its implicit representation causes difficulty in manipulating the models like the explicit mesh representation. Several recent advances in NeRF manipulation are usually restricted by a shared renderer network, or suffer from large model size. To circumvent the hurdle, in this paper, we present an explicit neural field representation that enables efficient and convenient manipulation of models. To achieve this goal, we learn a hybrid tensor rank decomposition of the scene without neural networks. Motivated by the low-rank approximation property of the SVD algorithm, we propose a rank-residual learning strategy to encourage the preservation of primary information in lower ranks. The model size can then be dynamically adjusted by rank truncation to control the levels of detail, achieving near-optimal compression without extra optimization. Furthermore, different models can be arbitrarily transformed and composed into one scene by concatenating along the rank dimension. The growth of storage cost can also be mitigated by compressing the unimportant objects in the composed scene. We demonstrate that our method is able to achieve comparable rendering quality to state-of-the-art methods, while enabling extra capability of compression and composition. Code will be made available at https://github.com/ashawkey/CCNeRF.
summary: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has emerged as a compelling method to represent 3D objects and scenes for photo-realistic rendering. However, its implicit representation causes difficulty in manipulating the models like the explicit mesh representation. Several recent advances in NeRF manipulation are usually restricted by a shared renderer network, or suffer from large model size. To circumvent the hurdle, in this paper, we present an explicit neural field representation that enables efficient and convenient manipulation of models. To achieve this goal, we learn a hybrid tensor rank decomposition of the scene without neural networks. Motivated by the low-rank approximation property of the SVD algorithm, we propose a rank-residual learning strategy to encourage the preservation of primary information in lower ranks. The model size can then be dynamically adjusted by rank truncation to control the levels of detail, achieving near-optimal compression without extra optimization. Furthermore, different models can be arbitrarily transformed and composed into one scene by concatenating along the rank dimension. The growth of storage cost can also be mitigated by compressing the unimportant objects in the composed scene. We demonstrate that our method is able to achieve comparable rendering quality to state-of-the-art methods, while enabling extra capability of compression and composition. Code will be made available at https://github.com/ashawkey/CCNeRF.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 已成为一种引人注目的方法，用于表示 3D 对象和场景以实现照片级真实感渲染。然而，它的隐式表示导致像显式网格表示一样难以操作模型。 NeRF 操作的一些最新进展通常受到共享渲染器网络的限制，或者受到大模型尺寸的影响。为了绕过这个障碍，在本文中，我们提出了一种显式的神经场表示，可以实现高效、便捷的模型操作。为了实现这一目标，我们在没有神经网络的情况下学习场景的混合张量秩分解。受 SVD 算法的低秩近似特性的启发，我们提出了一种秩残差学习策略，以鼓励在较低秩中保留主要信息。然后可以通过等级截断动态调整模型大小以控制细节级别，无需额外优化即可实现接近最优的压缩。此外，不同的模型可以通过沿秩维度串联来任意变换并组合成一个场景。还可以通过压缩组合场景中不重要的对象来减轻存储成本的增长。我们证明，我们的方法能够实现与最先进的方法相当的渲染质量，同时实现额外的压缩和合成功能。代码将在 https://github.com/ashawkey/CCNeRF 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可压缩且可组合的神经辐射场（NeRF）方法，通过秩残差分解实现高效模型操作。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF的隐式表示难以像显式网格那样进行模型操作，且现有方法受限于共享渲染网络或模型体积过大。
AI.method: 采用混合张量秩分解代替神经网络，结合SVD低秩近似特性，通过秩残差学习策略保留关键信息，支持动态压缩与场景模型拼接。
AI.result: 在保持渲染质量接近最先进方法的同时，实现了模型压缩与多场景组合能力，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过秩分解有效解决了NeRF的压缩与组合难题，为高效3D场景操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Beier Zhu,Yulei Niu,Yucheng Han,Yue Wu,Hanwang Zhang
title: Prompt-aligned Gradient for Prompt Tuning
title_zh: 快速对齐渐变以进行快速调整
abstract: Thanks to the large pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP, we can craft a zero-shot classifier by "prompt", e.g., the confidence score of an image being "[CLASS]" can be obtained by using the VLM provided similarity measure between the image and the prompt sentence "a photo of a [CLASS]". Therefore, prompt shows a great potential for fast adaptation of VLMs to downstream tasks if we fine-tune the prompt-based similarity measure. However, we find a common failure that improper fine-tuning may not only undermine the prompt's inherent prediction for the task-related classes, but also for other classes in the VLM vocabulary. Existing methods still address this problem by using traditional anti-overfitting techniques such as early stopping and data augmentation, which lack a principled solution specific to prompt. We present Prompt-aligned Gradient, dubbed ProGrad, to prevent prompt tuning from forgetting the the general knowledge learned from VLMs. In particular, ProGrad only updates the prompt whose gradient is aligned (or non-conflicting) to the "general direction", which is represented as the gradient of the KL loss of the pre-defined prompt prediction. Extensive experiments demonstrate the stronger few-shot generalization ability of ProGrad over state-of-the-art prompt tuning methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/BeierZhu/Prompt-align.
summary: Thanks to the large pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP, we can craft a zero-shot classifier by "prompt", e.g., the confidence score of an image being "[CLASS]" can be obtained by using the VLM provided similarity measure between the image and the prompt sentence "a photo of a [CLASS]". Therefore, prompt shows a great potential for fast adaptation of VLMs to downstream tasks if we fine-tune the prompt-based similarity measure. However, we find a common failure that improper fine-tuning may not only undermine the prompt's inherent prediction for the task-related classes, but also for other classes in the VLM vocabulary. Existing methods still address this problem by using traditional anti-overfitting techniques such as early stopping and data augmentation, which lack a principled solution specific to prompt. We present Prompt-aligned Gradient, dubbed ProGrad, to prevent prompt tuning from forgetting the the general knowledge learned from VLMs. In particular, ProGrad only updates the prompt whose gradient is aligned (or non-conflicting) to the "general direction", which is represented as the gradient of the KL loss of the pre-defined prompt prediction. Extensive experiments demonstrate the stronger few-shot generalization ability of ProGrad over state-of-the-art prompt tuning methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/BeierZhu/Prompt-align.
abstract_zh: 得益于像 CLIP 这样的大型预训练视觉语言模型（VLM），我们可以通过“提示”来制作零样本分类器，例如，可以通过使用 VLM 提供的图像与提示句子“a photo of a [CLASS]”之间的相似性度量来获得图像为“[CLASS]”的置信度得分。因此，如果我们微调基于提示的相似性度量，提示显示出 VLM 快速适应下游任务的巨大潜力。然而，我们发现一个常见的失败，即不适当的微调不仅可能破坏提示对任务相关类的固有预测，而且还会破坏 VLM 词汇表中其他类的提示。现有方法仍然通过使用提前停止和数据增强等传统的防过拟合技术来解决这个问题，缺乏针对提示的原则性解决方案。我们提出了 Prompt-aligned Gradient（Prompt-aligned Gradient），称为 ProGrad，以防止提示调整忘记从 VLM 中学到的一般知识。特别地，ProGrad仅更新梯度与“大方向”对齐（或不冲突）的提示，其表示为预定义提示预测的KL损失的梯度。大量实验证明 ProGrad 比最先进的提示调整方法具有更强的小样本泛化能力。代码可在 https://github.com/BeierZhu/Prompt-align 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ProGrad的方法，用于改进提示调优过程，以防止VLMs在微调过程中遗忘其通用知识。
AI.motivation: 在使用预训练视觉语言模型（VLMs）进行零样本分类时，不当的提示微调可能会损害模型对任务相关类别的预测能力，同时也会对VLM词汇表中的其他类别产生负面影响。
AI.method: ProGrad方法通过仅更新与预定义提示预测的KL损失梯度对齐的提示梯度，防止提示调优过程中遗忘VLMs的通用知识。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明，ProGrad在少样本泛化能力方面优于当前最先进的提示调优方法。
AI.conclusion: ProGrad为提示调优提供了一种原理性解决方案，有效防止了模型在微调过程中遗忘其通用知识。

search_text: Prompt-aligned Gradient for Prompt Tuning 快速对齐渐变以进行快速调整 Thanks to the large pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP, we can craft a zero-shot classifier by "prompt", e.g., the confidence score of an image being "[CLASS]" can be obtained by using the VLM provided similarity measure between the image and the prompt sentence "a photo of a [CLASS]". Therefore, prompt shows a great potential for fast adaptation of VLMs to downstream tasks if we fine-tune the prompt-based similarity measure. However, we find a common failure that improper fine-tuning may not only undermine the prompt's inherent prediction for the task-related classes, but also for other classes in the VLM vocabulary. Existing methods still address this problem by using traditional anti-overfitting techniques such as early stopping and data augmentation, which lack a principled solution specific to prompt. We present Prompt-aligned Gradient, dubbed ProGrad, to prevent prompt tuning from forgetting the the general knowledge learned from VLMs. In particular, ProGrad only updates the prompt whose gradient is aligned (or non-conflicting) to the "general direction", which is represented as the gradient of the KL loss of the pre-defined prompt prediction. Extensive experiments demonstrate the stronger few-shot generalization ability of ProGrad over state-of-the-art prompt tuning methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/BeierZhu/Prompt-align. 得益于像 CLIP 这样的大型预训练视觉语言模型（VLM），我们可以通过“提示”来制作零样本分类器，例如，可以通过使用 VLM 提供的图像与提示句子“a photo of a [CLASS]”之间的相似性度量来获得图像为“[CLASS]”的置信度得分。因此，如果我们微调基于提示的相似性度量，提示显示出 VLM 快速适应下游任务的巨大潜力。然而，我们发现一个常见的失败，即不适当的微调不仅可能破坏提示对任务相关类的固有预测，而且还会破坏 VLM 词汇表中其他类的提示。现有方法仍然通过使用提前停止和数据增强等传统的防过拟合技术来解决这个问题，缺乏针对提示的原则性解决方案。我们提出了 Prompt-aligned Gradient（Prompt-aligned Gradient），称为 ProGrad，以防止提示调整忘记从 VLM 中学到的一般知识。特别地，ProGrad仅更新梯度与“大方向”对齐（或不冲突）的提示，其表示为预定义提示预测的KL损失的梯度。大量实验证明 ProGrad 比最先进的提示调整方法具有更强的小样本泛化能力。代码可在 https://github.com/BeierZhu/Prompt-align 获取。 本文提出了一种名为ProGrad的方法，用于改进提示调优过程，以防止VLMs在微调过程中遗忘其通用知识。 Beier Zhu,Yulei Niu,Yucheng Han,Yue Wu,Hanwang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Glenda Tan Hui En,Koay Tze Erhn,Shen Bingquan
title: Anti-virus Autobots: Predicting More Infectious Virus Variants for Pandemic Prevention through Deep Learning
title_zh: 防病毒汽车机器人：通过深度学习预测更多传染性病毒变体以预防流行病
abstract: More infectious virus variants can arise from rapid mutations in their proteins, creating new infection waves. These variants can evade one's immune system and infect vaccinated individuals, lowering vaccine efficacy. Hence, to improve vaccine design, this project proposes Optimus PPIme - a deep learning approach to predict future, more infectious variants from an existing virus (exemplified by SARS-CoV-2). The approach comprises an algorithm which acts as a "virus" attacking a host cell. To increase infectivity, the "virus" mutates to bind better to the host's receptor. 2 algorithms were attempted - greedy search and beam search. The strength of this variant-host binding was then assessed by a transformer network we developed, with a high accuracy of 90%. With both components, beam search eventually proposed more infectious variants. Therefore, this approach can potentially enable researchers to develop vaccines that provide protection against future infectious variants before they emerge, pre-empting outbreaks and saving lives.
summary: More infectious virus variants can arise from rapid mutations in their proteins, creating new infection waves. These variants can evade one's immune system and infect vaccinated individuals, lowering vaccine efficacy. Hence, to improve vaccine design, this project proposes Optimus PPIme - a deep learning approach to predict future, more infectious variants from an existing virus (exemplified by SARS-CoV-2). The approach comprises an algorithm which acts as a "virus" attacking a host cell. To increase infectivity, the "virus" mutates to bind better to the host's receptor. 2 algorithms were attempted - greedy search and beam search. The strength of this variant-host binding was then assessed by a transformer network we developed, with a high accuracy of 90%. With both components, beam search eventually proposed more infectious variants. Therefore, this approach can potentially enable researchers to develop vaccines that provide protection against future infectious variants before they emerge, pre-empting outbreaks and saving lives.
abstract_zh: 其蛋白质的快速突变可能会产生更具传染性的病毒变体，从而产生新的感染波。这些变异可以逃避免疫系统并感染接种疫苗的个体，从而降低疫苗功效。因此，为了改进疫苗设计，该项目提出了 Optimus PPIme——一种深度学习方法，用于预测现有病毒（以 SARS-CoV-2 为例）未来更具传染性的变体。该方法包括一种充当攻击宿主细胞的“病毒”的算法。为了增加传染性，“病毒”发生突变以更好地与宿主的受体结合。尝试了 2 种算法 - 贪婪搜索和束搜索。然后通过我们开发的变压器网络评估这种变体-宿主结合的强度，准确度高达 90%。有了这两个组件，集束搜索最终提出了更具传染性的变体。因此，这种方法有可能使研究人员能够开发出疫苗，在未来的传染性变种出现之前提供保护，预防疫情爆发并挽救生命。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法Optimus PPIme，用于预测更具传染性的病毒变体（如SARS-CoV-2），以改进疫苗设计并预防疫情。
AI.motivation: 病毒快速突变导致新变体出现，可能逃避免疫系统并降低疫苗有效性，需提前预测以优化疫苗研发。
AI.method: 设计模拟病毒攻击宿主细胞的算法，通过贪心搜索和束搜索两种策略生成变体，并利用自研的Transformer网络评估结合强度。
AI.result: Transformer网络实现90%的高准确率，束搜索策略成功生成更具传染性的预测变体。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可帮助研究人员提前开发针对未来病毒变体的疫苗，从而预防疫情爆发并挽救生命。

authors_text: Jiunn-Kai Huang,Yingwen Tan,Dongmyeong Lee,Vishnu R. Desaraju,Jessy W. Grizzle
title: Informable Multi-Objective and Multi-Directional RRT* System for Robot Path Planning
title_zh: 用于机器人路径规划的信息丰富的多目标和多方向 RRT* 系统
abstract: Multi-objective or multi-destination path planning is crucial for mobile robotics applications such as mobility as a service, robotics inspection, and electric vehicle charging for long trips. This work proposes an anytime iterative system to concurrently solve the multi-objective path planning problem and determine the visiting order of destinations. The system is comprised of an anytime informable multi-objective and multi-directional RRT* algorithm to form a simple connected graph, and a proposed solver that consists of an enhanced cheapest insertion algorithm and a genetic algorithm to solve the relaxed traveling salesman problem in polynomial time. Moreover, a list of waypoints is often provided for robotics inspection and vehicle routing so that the robot can preferentially visit certain equipment or areas of interest. We show that the proposed system can inherently incorporate such knowledge, and can navigate through challenging topology. The proposed anytime system is evaluated on large and complex graphs built for real-world driving applications. All implementations are coded in multi-threaded C++ and are available at: https://github.com/UMich-BipedLab/IMOMD-RRTStar.
summary: Multi-objective or multi-destination path planning is crucial for mobile robotics applications such as mobility as a service, robotics inspection, and electric vehicle charging for long trips. This work proposes an anytime iterative system to concurrently solve the multi-objective path planning problem and determine the visiting order of destinations. The system is comprised of an anytime informable multi-objective and multi-directional RRT* algorithm to form a simple connected graph, and a proposed solver that consists of an enhanced cheapest insertion algorithm and a genetic algorithm to solve the relaxed traveling salesman problem in polynomial time. Moreover, a list of waypoints is often provided for robotics inspection and vehicle routing so that the robot can preferentially visit certain equipment or areas of interest. We show that the proposed system can inherently incorporate such knowledge, and can navigate through challenging topology. The proposed anytime system is evaluated on large and complex graphs built for real-world driving applications. All implementations are coded in multi-threaded C++ and are available at: https://github.com/UMich-BipedLab/IMOMD-RRTStar.
abstract_zh: 多目标或多目的地路径规划对于移动机器人应用至关重要，例如移动即服务、机器人检查和长途旅行的电动汽车充电。这项工作提出了一种随时迭代系统来同时解决多目标路径规划问题并确定目的地的访问顺序。该系统由随时可获取信息的多目标和多方向 RRT* 算法组成，以形成简单的连通图，以及所提出的求解器，该求解器由增强型最便宜插入算法和遗传算法组成，用于在多项式时间内解决宽松的旅行商问题。此外，通常会提供路径点列表用于机器人检查和车辆路由，以便机器人可以优先访问某些设备或感兴趣的区域。我们表明，所提出的系统可以本质上融合这些知识，并且可以通过具有挑战性的拓扑进行导航。所提出的随时系统在为现实世界驾驶应用构建的大型复杂图表上进行评估。所有实现均采用多线程 C++ 编码，可从以下位置获取：https://github.com/UMich-BipedLab/IMOMD-RRTStar。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可告知的多目标、多方向RRT*系统，用于解决机器人路径规划中的多目标和多目的地问题。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人应用（如出行服务、机器人巡检和电动汽车长途充电）需要同时处理多目标路径规划和目的地访问顺序优化，现有方法难以兼顾效率与复杂环境适应性。
AI.method: 系统结合 anytime informable 多目标多方向 RRT* 算法构建连通图，并采用改进的最便宜插入算法与遗传算法求解放松后的旅行商问题，支持优先访问特定路标点。
AI.result: 在真实道路场景的复杂图上验证了系统的有效性，能够高效处理高拓扑复杂度环境下的多目标路径规划问题。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过算法融合实现了多目标路径规划与访问顺序优化的协同求解，为复杂场景下的机器人导航提供了新方法。
