result: 在真实道路场景的复杂图上验证了系统的有效性，能够高效处理高拓扑复杂度环境下的多目标路径规划问题。
conclusion: 该系统通过算法融合实现了多目标路径规划与访问顺序优化的协同求解，为复杂场景下的机器人导航提供了新方法。
search_text: Informable Multi-Objective and Multi-Directional RRT* System for Robot Path Planning 用于机器人路径规划的信息丰富的多目标和多方向 RRT* 系统 Multi-objective or multi-destination path planning is crucial for mobile robotics applications such as mobility as a service, robotics inspection, and electric vehicle charging for long trips. This work proposes an anytime iterative system to concurrently solve the multi-objective path planning problem and determine the visiting order of destinations. The system is comprised of an anytime informable multi-objective and multi-directional RRT* algorithm to form a simple connected graph, and a proposed solver that consists of an enhanced cheapest insertion algorithm and a genetic algorithm to solve the relaxed traveling salesman problem in polynomial time. Moreover, a list of waypoints is often provided for robotics inspection and vehicle routing so that the robot can preferentially visit certain equipment or areas of interest. We show that the proposed system can inherently incorporate such knowledge, and can navigate through challenging topology. The proposed anytime system is evaluated on large and complex graphs built for real-world driving applications. All implementations are coded in multi-threaded C++ and are available at: https://github.com/UMich-BipedLab/IMOMD-RRTStar. 多目标或多目的地路径规划对于移动机器人应用至关重要，例如移动即服务、机器人检查和长途旅行的电动汽车充电。这项工作提出了一种随时迭代系统来同时解决多目标路径规划问题并确定目的地的访问顺序。该系统由随时可获取信息的多目标和多方向 RRT* 算法组成，以形成简单的连通图，以及所提出的求解器，该求解器由增强型最便宜插入算法和遗传算法组成，用于在多项式时间内解决宽松的旅行商问题。此外，通常会提供路径点列表用于机器人检查和车辆路由，以便机器人可以优先访问某些设备或感兴趣的区域。我们表明，所提出的系统可以本质上融合这些知识，并且可以通过具有挑战性的拓扑进行导航。所提出的随时系统在为现实世界驾驶应用构建的大型复杂图表上进行评估。所有实现均采用多线程 C++ 编码，可从以下位置获取：https://github.com/UMich-BipedLab/IMOMD-RRTStar。 本文提出一种可告知的多目标、多方向RRT*系统，用于解决机器人路径规划中的多目标和多目的地问题。 Jiunn-Kai Huang,Yingwen Tan,Dongmyeong Lee,Vishnu R. Desaraju,Jessy W. Grizzle cs.RO

authors_text: Ye Zheng,Xiang Wang,Yu Qi,Wei Li,Liwei Wu
title: Benchmarking Unsupervised Anomaly Detection and Localization
title_zh: 无监督异常检测和定位的基准测试
abstract: Unsupervised anomaly detection and localization, as of one the most practical and challenging problems in computer vision, has received great attention in recent years. From the time the MVTec AD dataset was proposed to the present, new research methods that are constantly being proposed push its precision to saturation. It is the time to conduct a comprehensive comparison of existing methods to inspire further research. This paper extensively compares 13 papers in terms of the performance in unsupervised anomaly detection and localization tasks, and adds a comparison of inference efficiency previously ignored by the community. Meanwhile, analysis of the MVTec AD dataset are also given, especially the label ambiguity that affects the model fails to achieve full marks. Moreover, considering the proposal of the new MVTec 3D-AD dataset, this paper also conducts experiments using the existing state-of-the-art 2D methods on this new dataset, and reports the corresponding results with analysis.
summary: Unsupervised anomaly detection and localization, as of one the most practical and challenging problems in computer vision, has received great attention in recent years. From the time the MVTec AD dataset was proposed to the present, new research methods that are constantly being proposed push its precision to saturation. It is the time to conduct a comprehensive comparison of existing methods to inspire further research. This paper extensively compares 13 papers in terms of the performance in unsupervised anomaly detection and localization tasks, and adds a comparison of inference efficiency previously ignored by the community. Meanwhile, analysis of the MVTec AD dataset are also given, especially the label ambiguity that affects the model fails to achieve full marks. Moreover, considering the proposal of the new MVTec 3D-AD dataset, this paper also conducts experiments using the existing state-of-the-art 2D methods on this new dataset, and reports the corresponding results with analysis.
abstract_zh: 无监督异常检测和定位作为计算机视觉中最实际和最具挑战性的问题之一，近年来受到了极大的关注。从MVTec AD数据集提出到现在，不断提出的新研究方法将其精度推向饱和。现在是对现有方法进行全面比较以激发进一步研究的时候了。本文广泛比较了 13 篇论文在无监督异常检测和定位任务中的性能，并添加了先前被社区忽视的推理效率的比较。同时，还给出了MVTec AD数据集的分析，特别是影响模型的标签歧义未能获得满分。此外，考虑到新的MVTec 3D-AD数据集的提出，本文还在这个新数据集上使用现有最先进的2D方法进行了实验，并报告了相应的结果和分析。

AI.tldr: 该论文对无监督异常检测与定位领域的现有方法进行全面基准测试与比较分析。
AI.motivation: 随着MVTec AD数据集提出后方法精度接近饱和，需通过系统性比较推动领域进一步发展。
AI.method: 对比13种方法的检测性能与推理效率，分析MVTec AD数据集标签模糊性，并在新提出的MVTec 3D-AD数据集上测试2D方法效果。
AI.result: 发现现有方法在标签模糊场景下难以达到满分，且2D方法在3D数据集上表现存在明显局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需针对3D数据特性开发新方法，并需更关注标签模糊性对模型性能的影响。

authors_text: Songlin Yang,Wei Wang,Chenye Xu,Ziwen He,Bo Peng,Jing Dong
title: Exposing Fine-Grained Adversarial Vulnerability of Face Anti-Spoofing Models
title_zh: 暴露人脸反欺骗模型的细粒度对抗漏洞
comment: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshop, 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshop, 2023
abstract: Face anti-spoofing aims to discriminate the spoofing face images (e.g., printed photos) from live ones. However, adversarial examples greatly challenge its credibility, where adding some perturbation noise can easily change the predictions. Previous works conducted adversarial attack methods to evaluate the face anti-spoofing performance without any fine-grained analysis that which model architecture or auxiliary feature is vulnerable to the adversary. To handle this problem, we propose a novel framework to expose the fine-grained adversarial vulnerability of the face anti-spoofing models, which consists of a multitask module and a semantic feature augmentation (SFA) module. The multitask module can obtain different semantic features for further evaluation, but only attacking these semantic features fails to reflect the discrimination-related vulnerability. We then design the SFA module to introduce the data distribution prior for more discrimination-related gradient directions for generating adversarial examples. Comprehensive experiments show that SFA module increases the attack success rate by nearly 40$\%$ on average. We conduct this fine-grained adversarial analysis on different annotations, geometric maps, and backbone networks (e.g., Resnet network). These fine-grained adversarial examples can be used for selecting robust backbone networks and auxiliary features. They also can be used for adversarial training, which makes it practical to further improve the accuracy and robustness of the face anti-spoofing models.
summary: Face anti-spoofing aims to discriminate the spoofing face images (e.g., printed photos) from live ones. However, adversarial examples greatly challenge its credibility, where adding some perturbation noise can easily change the predictions. Previous works conducted adversarial attack methods to evaluate the face anti-spoofing performance without any fine-grained analysis that which model architecture or auxiliary feature is vulnerable to the adversary. To handle this problem, we propose a novel framework to expose the fine-grained adversarial vulnerability of the face anti-spoofing models, which consists of a multitask module and a semantic feature augmentation (SFA) module. The multitask module can obtain different semantic features for further evaluation, but only attacking these semantic features fails to reflect the discrimination-related vulnerability. We then design the SFA module to introduce the data distribution prior for more discrimination-related gradient directions for generating adversarial examples. Comprehensive experiments show that SFA module increases the attack success rate by nearly 40$\%$ on average. We conduct this fine-grained adversarial analysis on different annotations, geometric maps, and backbone networks (e.g., Resnet network). These fine-grained adversarial examples can be used for selecting robust backbone networks and auxiliary features. They also can be used for adversarial training, which makes it practical to further improve the accuracy and robustness of the face anti-spoofing models.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗旨在区分欺骗人脸图像（例如打印的照片）和真实人脸图像。然而，对抗性例子极大地挑战了它的可信度，添加一些扰动噪声很容易改变预测。以前的工作采用对抗性攻击方法来评估人脸反欺骗性能，而没有任何细粒度分析哪些模型架构或辅助特征容易受到对手的攻击。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来暴露人脸反欺骗模型的细粒度对抗漏洞，该框架由多任务模块和语义特征增强（SFA）模块组成。多任务模块可以获得不同的语义特征以进行进一步评估，但仅攻击这些语义特征并不能反映与判别相关的漏洞。然后，我们设计 SFA 模块来引入数据分布先验，以获得更多与判别相关的梯度方向，以生成对抗性示例。综合实验表明，SFA模块平均提高攻击成功率近40$\%$。我们对不同的注释、几何图和骨干网络（例如 Resnet 网络）进行细粒度的对抗分析。这些细粒度的对抗性示例可用于选择鲁棒的骨干网络和辅助特征。它们还可以用于对抗性训练，这使得进一步提高人脸反欺骗模型的准确性和鲁棒性变得可行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新框架，用于揭示面部反欺骗模型的细粒度对抗脆弱性，并通过语义特征增强模块提升对抗攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法未分析具体模型架构或辅助特征的脆弱性，导致无法针对性提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计包含多任务模块和语义特征增强（SFA）模块的框架，利用数据分布先验生成更具判别性的对抗样本。
AI.result: SFA模块使攻击成功率平均提升40%，可指导选择鲁棒网络结构及辅助特征，并用于对抗训练提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效暴露模型细粒度脆弱性，为构建更鲁棒的面部反欺骗系统提供实践指导。

authors_text: Maximilian Du,Olivia Y. Lee,Suraj Nair,Chelsea Finn
title: Play it by Ear: Learning Skills amidst Occlusion through Audio-Visual Imitation Learning
title_zh: 见机行事：通过视听模仿学习在遮挡中学习技巧
abstract: Humans are capable of completing a range of challenging manipulation tasks that require reasoning jointly over modalities such as vision, touch, and sound. Moreover, many such tasks are partially-observed; for example, taking a notebook out of a backpack will lead to visual occlusion and require reasoning over the history of audio or tactile information. While robust tactile sensing can be costly to capture on robots, microphones near or on a robot's gripper are a cheap and easy way to acquire audio feedback of contact events, which can be a surprisingly valuable data source for perception in the absence of vision. Motivated by the potential for sound to mitigate visual occlusion, we aim to learn a set of challenging partially-observed manipulation tasks from visual and audio inputs. Our proposed system learns these tasks by combining offline imitation learning from a modest number of tele-operated demonstrations and online finetuning using human provided interventions. In a set of simulated tasks, we find that our system benefits from using audio, and that by using online interventions we are able to improve the success rate of offline imitation learning by ~20%. Finally, we find that our system can complete a set of challenging, partially-observed tasks on a Franka Emika Panda robot, like extracting keys from a bag, with a 70% success rate, 50% higher than a policy that does not use audio.
summary: Humans are capable of completing a range of challenging manipulation tasks that require reasoning jointly over modalities such as vision, touch, and sound. Moreover, many such tasks are partially-observed; for example, taking a notebook out of a backpack will lead to visual occlusion and require reasoning over the history of audio or tactile information. While robust tactile sensing can be costly to capture on robots, microphones near or on a robot's gripper are a cheap and easy way to acquire audio feedback of contact events, which can be a surprisingly valuable data source for perception in the absence of vision. Motivated by the potential for sound to mitigate visual occlusion, we aim to learn a set of challenging partially-observed manipulation tasks from visual and audio inputs. Our proposed system learns these tasks by combining offline imitation learning from a modest number of tele-operated demonstrations and online finetuning using human provided interventions. In a set of simulated tasks, we find that our system benefits from using audio, and that by using online interventions we are able to improve the success rate of offline imitation learning by ~20%. Finally, we find that our system can complete a set of challenging, partially-observed tasks on a Franka Emika Panda robot, like extracting keys from a bag, with a 70% success rate, 50% higher than a policy that does not use audio.
abstract_zh: 人类能够完成一系列具有挑战性的操作任务，这些任务需要对视觉、触觉和声音等方式进行联合推理。此外，许多此类任务都是部分观察的；例如，从背包中取出笔记本会导致视觉遮挡，并需要对音频或触觉信息的历史进行推理。虽然在机器人上捕获强大的触觉传感可能成本高昂，但机器人抓手附近或之上的麦克风是获取接触事件音频反馈的一种廉价而简单的方法，这可能是在没有视觉的情况下进行感知的非常有价值的数据源。受声音缓解视觉遮挡的潜力的启发，我们的目标是从视觉和音频输入中学习一组具有挑战性的部分观察操作任务。我们提出的系统通过结合来自少量远程操作演示的离线模仿学习和使用人工提供的干预的在线微调来学习这些任务。在一组模拟任务中，我们发现我们的系统受益于使用音频，并且通过使用在线干预，我们能够将离线模仿学习的成功率提高约 20%。最后，我们发现我们的系统可以在 Franka Emika Panda 机器人上完成一系列具有挑战性、部分观察到的任务，例如从包里提取钥匙，成功率达 70%，比不使用音频的策略高出 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视听模仿学习的方法，使机器人在视觉遮挡情况下通过音频反馈学习完成复杂操作任务。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过视觉、听觉等多模态信息完成部分观测任务，而机器人视觉遮挡时音频反馈可作为低成本替代方案。
AI.method: 结合离线模仿学习（基于少量远程操作示范）与在线微调（人类干预），利用音频和视觉信息联合训练操作策略。
AI.result: 模拟任务中音频使成功率提升20%，Franka Emika Panda机器人完成钥匙提取等任务的成功率达70%（纯视觉策略仅20%）。
AI.conclusion: 音频信息有效弥补视觉遮挡缺陷，结合在线干预的混合学习框架显著提升部分观测任务的完成性能。

search_text: Play it by Ear: Learning Skills amidst Occlusion through Audio-Visual Imitation Learning 见机行事：通过视听模仿学习在遮挡中学习技巧 Humans are capable of completing a range of challenging manipulation tasks that require reasoning jointly over modalities such as vision, touch, and sound. Moreover, many such tasks are partially-observed; for example, taking a notebook out of a backpack will lead to visual occlusion and require reasoning over the history of audio or tactile information. While robust tactile sensing can be costly to capture on robots, microphones near or on a robot's gripper are a cheap and easy way to acquire audio feedback of contact events, which can be a surprisingly valuable data source for perception in the absence of vision. Motivated by the potential for sound to mitigate visual occlusion, we aim to learn a set of challenging partially-observed manipulation tasks from visual and audio inputs. Our proposed system learns these tasks by combining offline imitation learning from a modest number of tele-operated demonstrations and online finetuning using human provided interventions. In a set of simulated tasks, we find that our system benefits from using audio, and that by using online interventions we are able to improve the success rate of offline imitation learning by ~20%. Finally, we find that our system can complete a set of challenging, partially-observed tasks on a Franka Emika Panda robot, like extracting keys from a bag, with a 70% success rate, 50% higher than a policy that does not use audio. 人类能够完成一系列具有挑战性的操作任务，这些任务需要对视觉、触觉和声音等方式进行联合推理。此外，许多此类任务都是部分观察的；例如，从背包中取出笔记本会导致视觉遮挡，并需要对音频或触觉信息的历史进行推理。虽然在机器人上捕获强大的触觉传感可能成本高昂，但机器人抓手附近或之上的麦克风是获取接触事件音频反馈的一种廉价而简单的方法，这可能是在没有视觉的情况下进行感知的非常有价值的数据源。受声音缓解视觉遮挡的潜力的启发，我们的目标是从视觉和音频输入中学习一组具有挑战性的部分观察操作任务。我们提出的系统通过结合来自少量远程操作演示的离线模仿学习和使用人工提供的干预的在线微调来学习这些任务。在一组模拟任务中，我们发现我们的系统受益于使用音频，并且通过使用在线干预，我们能够将离线模仿学习的成功率提高约 20%。最后，我们发现我们的系统可以在 Franka Emika Panda 机器人上完成一系列具有挑战性、部分观察到的任务，例如从包里提取钥匙，成功率达 70%，比不使用音频的策略高出 50%。 本文提出一种结合视听模仿学习的方法，使机器人在视觉遮挡情况下通过音频反馈学习完成复杂操作任务。 Maximilian Du,Olivia Y. title: QFaaS: A Serverless Function-as-a-Service Framework for Quantum Computing
title_zh: QFaaS：用于量子计算的无服务器功能即服务框架
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in quantum hardware are creating opportunities for its use in many applications. However, quantum software engineering is still in its infancy with many challenges, especially dealing with the diversity of quantum programming languages and hardware platforms. To alleviate these challenges, we propose QFaaS, a novel Quantum Function-as-a-Service framework, which leverages the advantages of the serverless model and the state-of-the-art software engineering approaches to advance practical quantum computing. Our framework provides essential components of a quantum serverless platform to simplify the software development and adapt to the quantum cloud computing paradigm, such as combining hybrid quantum-classical computation, containerizing functions, and integrating DevOps features. We design QFaaS as a unified quantum computing framework by supporting well-known quantum languages and software development kits (Qiskit, Q#, Cirq, and Braket), executing the quantum tasks on multiple simulators and quantum cloud providers (IBM Quantum and Amazon Braket). This paper proposes architectural design, principal components, the life cycle of hybrid quantum-classical function, operation workflow, and implementation of QFaaS. We present two practical use cases and perform the evaluations on quantum computers and simulators to demonstrate our framework's ability to ease the burden on traditional engineers to expedite the ongoing quantum software transition.
summary: Recent breakthroughs in quantum hardware are creating opportunities for its use in many applications. However, quantum software engineering is still in its infancy with many challenges, especially dealing with the diversity of quantum programming languages and hardware platforms. To alleviate these challenges, we propose QFaaS, a novel Quantum Function-as-a-Service framework, which leverages the advantages of the serverless model and the state-of-the-art software engineering approaches to advance practical quantum computing. Our framework provides essential components of a quantum serverless platform to simplify the software development and adapt to the quantum cloud computing paradigm, such as combining hybrid quantum-classical computation, containerizing functions, and integrating DevOps features. We design QFaaS as a unified quantum computing framework by supporting well-known quantum languages and software development kits (Qiskit, Q#, Cirq, and Braket), executing the quantum tasks on multiple simulators and quantum cloud providers (IBM Quantum and Amazon Braket). This paper proposes architectural design, principal components, the life cycle of hybrid quantum-classical function, operation workflow, and implementation of QFaaS. We present two practical use cases and perform the evaluations on quantum computers and simulators to demonstrate our framework's ability to ease the burden on traditional engineers to expedite the ongoing quantum software transition.
abstract_zh: 量子硬件最近的突破为其在许多应用中的使用创造了机会。然而，量子软件工程仍处于起步阶段，面临许多挑战，特别是处理量子编程语言和硬件平台的多样性。为了缓解这些挑战，我们提出了 QFaaS，一种新颖的量子功能即服务框架，它利用无服务器模型和最先进的软件工程方法的优势来推进实用的量子计算。我们的框架提供了量子无服务器平台的基本组件，以简化软件开发并适应量子云计算范式，例如结合混合量子经典计算、容器化功能以及集成 DevOps 功能。我们将 QFaaS 设计为统一的量子计算框架，支持著名的量子语言和软件开发套件（Qiskit、Q#、Cirq 和 Braket），在多个模拟器和量子云提供商（IBM Quantum 和 Amazon Braket）上执行量子任务。本文提出了混合量子经典函数的架构设计、主要组件、生命周期、操作流程以及QFaaS的实现。我们提出了两个实际用例，并对量子计算机和模拟器进行了评估，以证明我们的框架能够减轻传统工程师的负担，从而加快正在进行的量子软件转型。

AI.tldr: 提出QFaaS框架，解决量子计算中的软件工程挑战，简化开发流程。
AI.motivation: 量子软件工程面临编程语言和硬件平台多样性等挑战，需统一框架推动实用化。
AI.method: 结合无服务器架构与DevOps，支持多种量子语言（Qiskit、Q#等），集成混合计算与容器化技术。
AI.result: 通过两个案例及云平台测试验证，证明框架能降低开发难度并加速量子软件部署。
AI.conclusion: QFaaS有效统一量子计算生态，为工程化应用提供可行路径。
